title: Beyond Static Instruction: A Multi-agent AI Framework for Adaptive Augmented Reality Robot Training
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) offers powerful visualization capabilities for industrial robot training, yet current interfaces remain predominantly static, failing to account for learners' diverse cognitive profiles. In this paper, we present an AR application for robot training and propose a multi-agent AI framework for future integration that bridges the gap between static visualization and pedagogical intelligence. We report on the evaluation of the baseline AR interface with 36 participants performing a robotic pick-and-place task. While overall usability was high, notable disparities in task duration and learner characteristics highlighted the necessity for dynamic adaptation. To address this, we propose a multi-agent framework that orchestrates multiple components to perform complex preprocessing of multimodal inputs (e.g., voice, physiology, robot data) and adapt the AR application to the learner's needs. By utilizing autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents, the proposed system would dynamically adapt the learning environment based on advanced LLM reasoning in real-time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体AI框架的AR机器人培训应用，旨在通过动态调整学习环境来适应不同认知特征的学习者，以解决当前AR培训接口静态化的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前工业机器人培训的AR接口大多是静态的，未能考虑学习者多样化的认知特征，这可能影响培训效果。研究者希望弥合静态可视化与教学智能之间的差距。
AI.method: 首先，作者开发了一个基线的AR应用，并评估了36名参与者在使用该AR应用执行机器人抓取任务的表现。在此基础上，提出了一个多智能体AI框架，该框架能够处理多模态输入（语音、生理信号、机器人数据），并利用大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，实时动态地调整AR培训环境以适应学习者的需求。
AI.result: 基线AR界面的整体可用性很高，但在任务时长和学习者特征方面存在显著差异，表明需要动态适应。初步评估结果强调了开发自适应学习系统的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 现有的AR机器人培训方法在适应个体学习者方面存在不足。所提出的多智能体AI框架，特别是结合LLM的能力，有望实现实时的、个性化的AR培训环境调整，从而提高培训的有效性。

title: From Global to Local: Learning Context-Aware Graph Representations for Document Classification and Summarization
summary: This paper proposes a data-driven method to automatically construct graph-based document representations. Building upon the recent work of Bugueño and de Melo (2025), we leverage the dynamic sliding-window attention module to effectively capture local and mid-range semantic dependencies between sentences, as well as structural relations within documents. Graph Attention Networks (GATs) trained on our learned graphs achieve competitive results on document classification while requiring lower computational resources than previous approaches. We further present an exploratory evaluation of the proposed graph construction method for extractive document summarization, highlighting both its potential and current limitations. The implementation of this project can be found on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的方法，利用动态滑动窗口注意力机制和图注意力网络（GATs）来构建文档表示，并在文档分类任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，同时降低了计算资源。该方法也为抽取式文档摘要提供了潜力。
AI.motivation: 受限于现有方法在捕捉文档语义和结构关系上的不足，以及计算资源的限制，作者希望开发一种更有效且计算效率更高的数据驱动方法来自动构建图表示，以用于下游NLP任务。
AI.method: 作者利用动态滑动窗口注意力模块来捕捉句子间的局部和中程语义依赖，以及文档内部的结构关系，从而自动构建图。然后，将图注意力网络（GATs）训练在这些学习到的图上，用于文档分类。
AI.result: 在文档分类任务上，基于作者提出的图表示和GATs的方法取得了具有竞争力的结果，并且比先前的方法需要更少的计算资源。初步的实验也显示了该方法在抽取式文档摘要上的潜力和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动的图构建方法结合GATs能够有效地用于文档表示，并在文档分类任务中表现出色，同时具有计算效率优势。该方法也为文档摘要任务带来了新的可能性，但仍需进一步的探索和改进。

title: Vector Certificates for $ω$-regular Specifications
summary: The recently introduced notions of ranking functions and closure certificates utilize well-foundedness arguments to facilitate the verification of dynamical systems against $ω$-regular properties. A ranking function and a closure certificate are real-valued functions defined over states and state pairs of a dynamical system whose zero superlevel sets are inductive state invariant and inductive transition invariant, respectively. The search for such certificates can be automated by fixing a specific template class, such as a polynomial of a fixed degree, and then using optimization techniques such as sum-of-squares (SOS) programming to find it. Unfortunately, such certificates may not be found for a fixed template. In such a case, one must change the template; for example, increase the degree of the polynomial. In this paper, we consider a notion of multiple functions in the form of vector certificates. Taking inspiration from the literature on vector barrier certificates as generalizations of standard barrier certificates for safety verification, we propose vector co-Büchi ranking functions and vector closure certificates as nontrivial generalizations of ranking functions and closure certificates, respectively. Both notions consist of a set of functions that jointly overapproximate an inductive invariant by considering each function to be a linear combination of the others. The advantage of such certificates is that they allow us to prove properties even when a single function for a fixed template cannot be found using standard approaches. We present an SOS programming approach to search for these functions and demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method in verifying $ω$-regular specifications in several case studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“向量证书”的新型验证方法，作为现有排序函数和闭包证书的推广。向量证书由一组函数组成，能够克服单个函数在固定模板下无法找到证书的局限性，从而更有效地验证动力系统对ω-正则属性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于排序函数和闭包证书的方法在面对固定模板时可能无法找到有效的证书，需要不断调整模板（如增加多项式次数）。为了克服这一限制，研究者希望找到一种更灵活、更强大的验证工具。
AI.method: 本文将向量证书的概念引入到排序函数和闭包证书中，提出了向量co-Büchi排序函数和向量闭包证书。这些证书由一组函数构成，通过线性组合的方式协同工作，共同近似归纳不变集。研究者还提出了一种基于和平方（SOS）规划的优化方法来搜索这些向量证书，并进行了多个案例研究。
AI.result: 所提出的向量证书方法能够证明在单个函数方法失败的情况下，即使使用固定模板，也能成功验证ω-正则规范。案例研究表明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 向量排序函数和向量闭包证书是现有方法的有效推广，它们通过组合多个函数来克服单函数方法的局限性，为动力系统的ω-正则属性验证提供了更强大的工具，并且可以通过SOS规划进行自动搜索。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Grid Planning in the Real World: A Method Enabling Large-Scale, Two-Stage Adaptive Robust Optimization for Capacity Expansion Planning
comment: Preprint submitted to INFORMS Journal on Optimization
summary: Capacity expansion models are frequently used to inform multi-billion dollar grid infrastructure decisions, a context in which there is significant uncertainty surrounding the future need for and performance of such infrastructure. However, despite much academic literature on the topic, virtually no grid planning processes use capacity expansion models that endogenously consider uncertainty, an oversight which frequently leads to short-sighted infrastructure decisions. This is partially due to a technology transfer gap, but it is also due to a lack of methods that work at large scale. In this paper we introduce a method for endogenizing uncertainty into capacity expansion models, a variant of adaptive robust optimization, that addresses this gap. We apply the method to a real-world capacity expansion planning problem, that of the State of California, and compare its performance to that of traditional adaptive robust optimization. We find that both the traditional method and our method identify increased transmission investment as a key lever for increasing robustness and adaptability, while helping to avoid downside risks that current deterministic planning processes may be exposing ratepayers to. Our method performs similarly to the traditional method in terms of outcomes, while significantly reducing computational complexity, making it scalable to real-world planning problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将不确定性纳入电网容量扩展模型的自适应鲁棒优化方法，该方法在加州能源规划问题中的应用显示出与传统方法相似的结果，但计算复杂度大大降低，更适用于实际规模的规划问题。
AI.motivation: 当前的电网容量扩展模型在考虑未来不确定性方面存在不足，导致规划决策短视，而现有方法在大规模问题上计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 提出了一种自适应鲁棒优化的变体，用于将不确定性内生化到容量扩展模型中，并将其应用于加州的能源规划问题，与传统的自适应鲁棒优化方法进行比较。
AI.result: 研究发现，新的方法和传统的自适应鲁棒优化方法都指出了增加输电投资是提高电网鲁棒性和适应性、规避风险的关键因素。新方法在计算效率上显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应鲁棒优化方法能够有效地将不确定性纳入大规模电网容量扩展模型，并在实际应用中展现出与传统方法相当的性能，同时大幅降低了计算成本，有望弥合技术差距，改进电网规划决策。

title: Multi-Sourced, Multi-Agent Evidence Retrieval for Fact-Checking
summary:
Misinformation spreading over the Internet poses a significant threat to both societies and individuals, necessitating robust and scalable fact-checking that relies on retrieving accurate and trustworthy evidence. Previous methods rely on semantic and social-contextual patterns learned from training data, which limits their generalization to new data distributions. Recently, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) based methods have been proposed to utilize the reasoning capability of LLMs with retrieved grounding evidence documents. However, these methods largely rely on textual similarity for evidence retrieval and struggle to retrieve evidence that captures multi-hop semantic relations within rich document contents. These limitations lead to overlooking subtle factual correlations between the evidence and the claims to be fact-checked during evidence retrieval, thus causing inaccurate veracity predictions.
  To address these issues, we propose WKGFC, which exploits authorized open knowledge graph as a core resource of evidence. LLM-enabled retrieval is designed to assess the claims and retrieve the most relevant knowledge subgraphs, forming structured evidence for fact verification. To augment the knowledge graph evidence, we retrieve web contents for completion. The above process is implemented as an automatic Markov Decision Process (MDP): A reasoning LLM agent decides what actions to take according to the current evidence and the claims. To adapt the MDP for fact-checking, we use prompt optimization to fine-tune the agentic LLM.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为WKGFC的新方法，该方法利用知识图谱和LLM来改进事实核查中的证据检索，以解决现有方法在处理复杂语义关系和多跳推理方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有的事实核查方法在检索准确、可信的证据方面存在局限性，尤其是在处理新数据分布、多跳语义关系和细微事实关联时。这导致了不准确的真实性预测。
AI.method: WKGFC方法利用授权的开放知识图谱作为核心证据资源。通过LLM驱动的检索来评估声明并检索相关的知识子图，形成结构化证据。为了增强知识图谱证据，还会检索网页内容进行补充。整个过程被设计成一个自动化的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其中一个推理LLM代理根据当前证据和声明采取行动。通过提示优化对代理LLM进行微调以适应事实核查任务。
AI.result: 该方法能够更准确地检索到能够捕捉声明与证据之间多跳语义关系和细微事实关联的证据，从而提高事实核查的准确性。
AI.conclusion: WKGFC通过结合知识图谱、LLM驱动的检索和MDP框架，有效地克服了现有事实核查方法在证据检索方面的不足，能够处理更复杂的事实核查场景。

title: GazeXPErT: An Expert Eye-tracking Dataset for Interpretable and Explainable AI in Oncologic FDG-PET/CT Scans
summary: [18F]FDG-PET/CT is a cornerstone imaging modality for tumor staging and treatment response assessment across many cancer types, yet expert reader shortages necessitate more efficient diagnostic aids. While standalone AI models for automatic lesion segmentation exist, clinical translation remains hindered by concerns about interpretability, explainability, reliability, and workflow integration. We present GazeXPErT, a 4D eye-tracking dataset capturing expert search patterns during tumor detection and measurement on 346 FDG-PET/CT scans. Each study was read by a trainee and a board-certified nuclear medicine or radiology specialist using an eye-tracking-enabled annotation platform that simulates routine clinical reads. From 3,948 minutes of raw 60Hz eye-tracking data, 9,030 unique gaze-to-lesion trajectories were extracted, synchronized with PET/CT image slices, and rendered in COCO-style format for multiple machine learning applications. Baseline validation experiments demonstrate that a 3D nnUNet tumor segmentation model achieved superior performance when incorporating expert gaze patterns versus without (DICE score 0.6819 versus 0.6008), and that vision transformers trained on sequential gaze and PET/CT images can improve dynamic lesion localization (74.95% predicted gaze point closer to tumor) and expert intention prediction (Accuracy 67.53% and AUROC 0.747). GazeXPErT is a valuable resource designed to explore multiple machine learning problems beyond these baseline experiments, which include and are not limited to, visual grounding or causal reasoning, clinically explainable feature augmentation, human-computer interaction, human intention prediction or understanding, and expert gaze-rewarded modeling approaches to AI in oncologic FDG-PET/CT imaging.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了GazeXPErT数据集，该数据集包含专家在解读FDG-PET/CT扫描时的眼动追踪数据，并证明了将眼动数据整合到AI模型中可以提高肿瘤分割和定位的准确性，并有助于预测专家意图。
AI.motivation: 肿瘤影像学诊断中存在专家读片者短缺的问题，迫切需要更有效的辅助诊断工具。现有的AI模型在临床应用中面临可解释性、可靠性和工作流程整合等方面的挑战。
AI.method: 收集了346例FDG-PET/CT扫描的4D眼动追踪数据集（GazeXPErT），记录了专家（包括培训生和资深专家）在肿瘤检测和测量过程中的注视模式。利用眼动追踪平台模拟临床读片过程，并提取了注视轨迹数据，与PET/CT图像切片同步，并转化为COCO格式。利用3D nnUNet模型和视觉Transformer模型进行了基线验证实验。
AI.result: 将专家眼动数据纳入3D nnUNet肿瘤分割模型，DICE评分从0.6008提高到0.6819。基于顺序眼动和PET/CT图像训练的视觉Transformer模型，能够将预测的注视点更准确地定位在肿瘤区域（74.95%），并能预测专家意图（准确率67.53%，AUROC 0.747）。
AI.conclusion: GazeXPErT数据集为探索AI在肿瘤FDG-PET/CT影像学中的应用提供了宝贵的资源，尤其是在提高模型的可解释性、人机交互和专家意图理解方面，有望克服当前AI模型在临床应用中的障碍。

title: Robust Adaptive MPC Under Nonlinear Time-Varying Uncertainties: An Uncertainty Compensation Approach
summary: This paper introduces an uncertainty compensation-based robust adaptive model predictive control (MPC) framework for linear systems with nonlinear time-varying uncertainties. The framework integrates an L1 adaptive controller to compensate for the matched uncertainty and a robust feedback controller, designed using linear matrix inequalities, to mitigate the effect of unmatched uncertainty on target output channels. Uniform bounds on the errors between the system's states and control inputs and those of a nominal (i.e., uncertainty-free) system are derived. These error bounds are then used to tighten the actual system's state and input constraints, enabling the design of an MPC for the nominal system under these tightened constraints. Referred to as uncertainty compensation-based MPC (UC-MPC), this approach ensures constraint satisfaction while delivering enhanced performance compared to existing methods. Simulation results for a flight control example and a spacecraft landing on an asteroid demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于不确定性补偿的鲁棒自适应模型预测控制（MPC）框架，用于解决具有非线性时变不确定性的线性系统。该框架结合了 L1 自适应控制器和鲁棒反馈控制器，并推导出系统状态和控制输入的均匀界限，以紧缩实际系统的约束，从而设计一个适用于名义系统的 MPC。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理线性系统中的非线性时变不确定性时存在局限性，导致约束满足和性能下降。研究动机是开发一种能有效补偿不确定性并保证约束满足的控制策略。
AI.method: 采用 L1 自适应控制器补偿匹配不确定性，利用线性矩阵不等式（LMIs）设计鲁棒反馈控制器来抑制非匹配不确定性的影响。推导了系统状态和控制输入的均匀界限，并将这些界限用于收紧实际系统的约束，最终设计一个针对名义系统的 MPC。
AI.result: 推导出了系统状态和控制输入与名义系统之间的误差的均匀界限。这些界限被用来紧缩实际系统的状态和输入约束，使得 MPC 可以在这些紧缩约束下运行。仿真结果表明，该方法在飞行控制和航天器着陆任务中均有效。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的不确定性补偿型 MPC（UC-MPC）框架能够有效地补偿系统中的非线性时变不确定性，保证约束的满足，并能获得比现有方法更好的性能。该框架在实际应用中具有潜力。

title: Smart Prism with Tilt Compensation for CAN bus on Mobile Machinery Using Robotic Total Stations
summary: Accurate reference trajectories are required to validate autonomous agricultural robots and highly automated off-road vehicles under real-world field conditions. In practice, robotic total stations provide millimeter-level prism center coordinates, but the point of interest on the vehicle is typically displaced by a lever arm, ranging from decimeters to multiple meters. Roll and pitch motions, as typically observed in off-road machinery, therefore introduce horizontal point of interest errors far exceeding the measurement accuracy of robotic total stations observations. This paper presents the design, implementation, and validation of a Smart Prism prototype that augments a robotic total station prism with an inertial measurement unit to enable real-time tilt compensation. The prototype integrates an STM32H7 microcontroller and a Murata SCH16T-series IMU and estimates roll and pitch angles using an adaptive complementary filter. The tilt-compensated point of interest coordinates are obtained by transforming a calibrated lever arm from the body frame into the navigation frame and combining it with robotic total station prism positions. To support vehicle-side integration, the system can transmit prism and tilt-compensated point of interest coordinates on the Controller Area Network bus, allowing the point of interest to be treated as a virtual position sensor (e.g., co-located with a rear-axle reference point). Experiments with a fixed ground reference point, using a prism to point of interest lever arm of approximately 1.07m and manual roll/pitch excursions of up to 60 deg, yield three-dimensional root-mean-square errors between 2.9mm and 23.6mm across five test series. The results demonstrate that IMU-based tilt compensation enables reference measurements suitable for validating centimeter-level navigation systems under dynamic field conditions.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为“智能棱镜”的设备，它集成了惯性测量单元（IMU），可以实时补偿因农业机器人或越野车辆的俯仰和滚动而产生的测量误差，从而提高参考轨迹的精度。
AI.motivation: 为了在真实的田野条件下验证自动农业机器人和高度自动化的越野车辆，需要精确的参考轨迹。然而，传统方法中，由于车辆本体与测量棱镜之间存在偏移（lever arm）以及车辆的俯仰和滚动运动，会导致测量误差远超测量设备的精度。
AI.method: 该研究设计并实现了一个“智能棱镜”原型，它将惯性测量单元（IMU）集成到传统的机器人全站仪棱镜中。该系统使用STM32H7微控制器和Murata SCH16T系列IMU，通过自适应互补滤波器实时估计俯仰和滚动角度。然后，将经过标定的偏移量从本体坐标系转换到导航坐标系，并与全站仪测量到的棱镜位置结合，从而获得倾斜补偿后的兴趣点（point of interest）坐标。该系统还支持通过CAN总线传输数据，以便集成到车辆中。
AI.result: 实验表明，在约1.07米的棱镜到兴趣点偏移和高达60度的俯仰/滚动幅度下，该系统实现的二维均方根误差在2.9mm到23.6mm之间。这证明了基于IMU的倾斜补偿可以提供适用于动态田野条件下验证厘米级导航系统的参考测量。
AI.conclusion: 基于IMU的倾斜补偿技术能够有效地解决传统测量方法中因车辆姿态变化引起的误差，显著提高了参考轨迹的测量精度，使得在动态田野条件下验证厘米级导航系统成为可能。

title: Learning Under Extreme Data Scarcity: Subject-Level Evaluation of Lightweight CNNs for fMRI-Based Prodromal Parkinsons Detection
comment: Methodological case study cs.LG on subject-level evaluation and model capacity under extreme data scarcity; 9 pages, 1 figure. Experiments use 40-subject PPMI fMRI cohort; no external validation
summary:
Deep learning is often applied in settings where data are limited, correlated, and difficult to obtain, yet evaluation practices do not always reflect these constraints. Neuroimaging for prodromal Parkinsons disease is one such case, where subject numbers are small and individual scans produce many highly related samples. This work examines prodromal Parkinsons detection from resting-state fMRI as a machine learning problem centered on learning under extreme data scarcity.
  Using fMRI data from 40 subjects, including 20 prodromal Parkinsons cases and 20 healthy controls, ImageNet-pretrained convolutional neural networks are fine-tuned and evaluated under two different data partitioning strategies. Results show that commonly used image-level splits allow slices from the same subject to appear in both training and test sets, leading to severe information leakage and near-perfect accuracy. When a strict subject-level split is enforced, performance drops substantially, yielding test accuracies between 60 and 81 percent.
  Models with different capacity profiles are compared, including VGG19, Inception V3, Inception ResNet V2, and the lightweight MobileNet V1. Under subject-level evaluation, MobileNet demonstrates the most reliable generalization, outperforming deeper architectures despite having significantly fewer parameters. These results indicate that in extreme low-data regimes, evaluation strategy and model capacity have a greater impact on performance than architectural depth. Although the analysis is limited to a single cohort of 40 subjects and does not include external validation or cross-validation, it provides a concrete case study and practical recommendations for evaluating deep learning models under severe data scarcity.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在数据极度稀缺的情况下，如何评估用于检测早期帕金森病（prodromal Parkinsons disease）的深度学习模型。结果表明，严格的样本划分策略（subject-level split）比图像级划分（image-level split）更能真实地反映模型性能，并且在低数据量场景下，模型容量（capacity）和选择比模型深度更重要，轻量级模型MobileNet表现更优。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型通常在数据有限、相关性强且难以获取的场景下应用，但现有的评估方法未能充分考虑这些限制。作者以早期帕金森病检测为例，该领域数据量小且扫描数据高度相关，旨在研究极端数据稀缺下的学习问题。
AI.method: 研究人员使用了40名受试者（20例早期帕金森病，20例健康对照）的静息态fMRI数据。他们对ImageNet预训练的卷积神经网络（VGG19, Inception V3, Inception ResNet V2, MobileNet V1）进行了微调，并在两种数据划分策略下进行评估：1）图像级划分（允许同一受试者的切片出现在训练集和测试集中）；2）严格的受试者级划分（确保同一受试者的所有数据只出现在训练集或测试集中）。
AI.result: 在图像级划分下，由于信息泄露，模型准确率接近完美。在严格的受试者级划分下，模型性能显著下降，测试准确率在60%到81%之间。在受试者级评估中，轻量级模型MobileNet V1表现出最可靠的泛化能力，优于更深层的架构，尽管其参数量远少于其他模型。
AI.conclusion: 在极端低数据量场景下，评估策略和模型容量对模型性能的影响比网络架构的深度更大。本研究虽然仅限于一个40名受试者的队列且未包含外部验证或交叉验证，但为在严重数据稀缺下评估深度学习模型提供了具体的案例研究和实际建议。

title: Design Framework and Manufacturing of an Active Magnetic Bearing Spindle for Micro-Milling Applications
summary: Micro-milling spindles require high rotational speeds where conventional rolling element bearings face limitations such as friction and thermal expansion. Active magnetic bearings (AMBs) address these challenges by providing non-contact and lubrication-free operation at ultra-high speeds with the ability to actively regulate spindle dynamics. The existing literature on AMB spindles has mainly reported specific prototype realizations or control system implementations for specific spindle dynamics. Consequently, design knowledge remains fragmented across isolated successful studies. This paper addresses this gap by presenting a systematic and iterative framework to design and manufacture a micro-milling AMB spindle. The process involves a multidisciplinary design flow with a focus on critical practical aspects of manufacturing. The realized spindle is reported as a case study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统性的、迭代式的微铣削主动磁轴承（AMB）主轴设计制造框架，旨在解决传统滚动轴承在高速运转下的局限性，并提供了一个实际的主轴设计制造案例研究。
AI.motivation: 传统的滚动轴承在微铣削主轴的高转速下存在摩擦和热膨胀等问题。主动磁轴承（AMB）通过非接触、无润滑和主动调控的优势可以克服这些挑战，但现有研究多集中于特定原型或控制系统，缺乏系统性的设计知识。因此，研究的动机是为了弥补这一设计知识的空白。
AI.method: 本文采用了一个系统性的、迭代式的设计与制造框架。该框架整合了多学科的设计流程，并特别关注了制造过程中的关键实际问题。最后，通过一个实际的主轴作为案例研究来验证该框架。
AI.result: 本文成功地开发了一个微铣削AMB主轴，并将其作为一个案例研究进行了报告。虽然具体的技术参数和性能数据未在摘要中详细列出，但结果表明该框架能够指导AMB主轴的设计和制造。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个系统性的设计和制造框架，用于解决微铣削AMB主轴的设计挑战，填补了现有文献中设计知识碎片化的空白。该框架强调了多学科协作和实际制造问题的重要性，并通过一个案例研究证明了其有效性。

title: Adaptive Channel Estimation and Hybrid Beamforming for RIS aided Vehicular Communication
summary: Reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) constitutes a disruptive technology for enhancing vehicular communication performance through reconfigurable propagation environments. In this paper, we propose an adaptive channel estimation framework and hybrid beamforming optimization strategy for RIS-aided vehicular multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems operating in high-mobility scenarios. To address severe Doppler effects and rapid channel variations, we design a velocity-aware pilot scheme that progressively estimates cascaded channels across two timescales, leveraging tensor decomposition and adaptive grouping of passive elements. This framework dynamically balances channel estimation accuracy and spectral efficiency, significantly reducing training overhead. Furthermore, we develop a low-complexity hybrid beamforming algorithm for both narrowband single vehicle user equipment (VUE) and broadband multi-VUE systems. For single-VUE scenarios, we derive closed-form active beamforming solutions and optimize passive beamforming via alternating optimization. For multi-VUE broadband systems, we jointly optimize subcarrier allocation, power distribution, and beamforming to maximize system throughput while mitigating inter-carrier interference (ICI) caused by Doppler spread, subject to quality-of-service (QoS) constraints and RIS hardware limitations. Our simulation results demonstrate that the proposed methods achieve substantial performance gains in channel estimation efficiency, beamforming robustness, and system throughput compared to conventional schemes, particularly under high mobility conditions.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种用于高移动性场景下RIS辅助MIMO车辆通信的自适应信道估计和混合波束成形框架，通过速度感知的导频方案和张量分解优化信道估计，并设计了低复杂度波束成形算法，在高移动性下显著提升了通信性能。
AI.motivation: 高移动性场景下车辆通信面临严峻的多普勒效应和信道快速变化问题，现有技术难以有效应对，因此需要新的技术来提升信道估计精度和波束成形性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种速度感知的导频方案，利用张量分解和被动单元自适应分组来估计级联信道，并提出了一种低复杂度的混合波束成形算法，包括单用户和多用户的场景，通过交替优化和联合优化子载波分配、功率分配和波束成形来实现。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的方法在高移动性条件下，在信道估计效率、波束成形鲁棒性和系统吞吐量方面相比传统方案取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的自适应信道估计和混合波束成形框架能有效应对高移动性车辆通信的挑战，显著提升了系统的整体性能。

title: TraderBench: How Robust Are AI Agents in Adversarial Capital Markets?
comment: Equal Contribution: Xiaochuang Yuan and Hui Xu contributed equally to this work. All correspondence should be directed to yxc20098@gmail.com. Submitted to Agents in the Wild Workshop, ICLR2026
summary: Evaluating AI agents in finance faces two key challenges: static benchmarks require costly expert annotation yet miss the dynamic decision-making central to real-world trading, while LLM-based judges introduce uncontrolled variance on domain-specific tasks. We introduce TraderBench, a benchmark that addresses both issues. It combines expert-verified static tasks (knowledge retrieval, analytical reasoning) with adversarial trading simulations scored purely on realized performance-Sharpe ratio, returns, and drawdown-eliminating judge variance entirely. The framework features two novel tracks: crypto trading with four progressive market-manipulation transforms, and options derivatives scoring across P&L accuracy, Greeks, and risk management. Trading scenarios can be refreshed with new market data to prevent benchmark contamination. Evaluating 13 models (8B open-source to frontier) on ~50 tasks, we find: (1) 8 of 13 models score ~33 on crypto with <1-point variation across adversarial conditions, exposing fixed non-adaptive strategies; (2) extended thinking helps retrieval (+26 points) but has zero impact on trading (+0.3 crypto, -0.1 options). These findings reveal that current agents lack genuine market adaptation, underscoring the need for performance-grounded evaluation in finance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TraderBench，一个结合了静态任务和对抗性交易模拟的金融AI代理评估基准，旨在解决现有评估方法的局限性。TraderBench在加密货币和期权衍生品交易方面进行了评估，结果显示当前AI代理在市场适应性方面存在不足。
AI.motivation: 现有金融AI代理评估方法存在挑战：静态基准需要昂贵的专家标注且无法捕捉动态决策，而基于LLM的裁判引入了不可控的方差。作者希望创建一个更全面、更可靠的金融AI代理评估框架。
AI.method: TraderBench结合了专家验证的静态任务（知识检索、分析推理）和对抗性交易模拟。交易模拟根据实现表现（夏普比率、回报、回撤）进行评分，消除了裁判方差。基准包含两个新颖的赛道：加密货币交易（具有四种渐进的市场操纵变换）和期权衍生品评分（涵盖盈亏准确性、希腊字母和风险管理）。交易场景可以通过新的市场数据进行刷新。
AI.result: 对13个模型（从8B开源到前沿模型）进行了评估。结果显示：1) 13个模型中有8个在加密货币交易上得分约为33，在对抗性条件下的变化小于1点，暴露了固定的非适应性策略；2) 扩展思考有助于检索（+26分），但对交易（加密货币+0.3，期权-0.1）没有影响。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI金融代理缺乏真正的市场适应性，这凸显了在金融领域进行基于表现的评估的必要性。

title: Efficient Flow Matching for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
summary: Generative models, particularly Diffusion Models (DM), have shown strong potential for Computed Tomography (CT) reconstruction serving as expressive priors for solving ill-posed inverse problems. However, diffusion-based reconstruction relies on Stochastic Differential Equations (SDEs) for forward diffusion and reverse denoising, where such stochasticity can interfere with repeated data consistency corrections in CT reconstruction. Since CT reconstruction is often time-critical in clinical and interventional scenarios, improving reconstruction efficiency is essential. In contrast, Flow Matching (FM) models sampling as a deterministic Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE), yielding smooth trajectories without stochastic noise injection. This deterministic formulation is naturally compatible with repeated data consistency operations. Furthermore, we observe that FM-predicted velocity fields exhibit strong correlations across adjacent steps. Motivated by this, we propose an FM-based CT reconstruction framework (FMCT) and an efficient variant (EFMCT) that reuses previously predicted velocity fields over consecutive steps to substantially reduce the number of Neural network Function Evaluations (NFEs), thereby improving inference efficiency. We provide theoretical analysis showing that the error introduced by velocity reuse is bounded when combined with data consistency operations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FMCT/EFMCT achieve competitive reconstruction quality while significantly improving computational efficiency compared with diffusion-based methods. The codebase is open-sourced at https://github.com/EFMCT/EFMCT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于流匹配（Flow Matching, FM）的CT重建方法（FMCT）及其高效变体（EFMCT），利用FM模型固有的确定性特性以及速度场复用机制，显著提高了CT重建的效率，同时保持了与扩散模型（DM）相当的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散模型（DM）的CT重建方法虽然可以作为强大的先验，但其固有的随机性会干扰CT重建中的数据一致性校正，且计算效率不高，难以满足临床和介入治疗场景对时间敏感性的要求。因此，需要一种更高效且与数据一致性操作兼容的重建方法。
AI.method: 1. 提出基于流匹配（FM）的CT重建框架FMCT，利用FM模型固有的确定性ODE采样轨迹，避免了DM中的随机噪声。2. 提出高效变体EFMCT，通过复用连续步骤中预测的速度场来减少神经网络评估次数（NFEs），从而提高推理效率。3. 提供了理论分析，证明速度场复用与数据一致性操作结合时的误差是有界的。
AI.result: FMCT/EFMCT在重建质量上达到了与基于扩散模型的方法相当的水平，但在计算效率上显著优于它们。实验证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 流匹配模型提供了一种比扩散模型更适合CT重建的确定性生成模型框架，尤其是在效率方面。通过速度场复用机制，EFMCT进一步提高了重建速度，为CT重建在实际应用中提供了更优的选择。

title: VoxelDiffusionCut: Non-destructive Internal-part Extraction via Iterative Cutting and Structure Estimation
summary: Non-destructive extraction of the target internal part, such as batteries and motors, by cutting surrounding structures is crucial at recycling and disposal sites. However, the diversity of products and the lack of information on disassembly procedures make it challenging to decide where to cut. This study explores a method for non-destructive extraction of a target internal part that iteratively estimates the internal structure from observed cutting surfaces and formulates cutting plans based on the estimation results. A key requirement is to estimate the probability of the target part's presence from partial observations. However, learning conditional generative models for this task is challenging: The high dimensionality of 3D shape representations makes learning difficult, and conventional models (e.g., conditional variational autoencoders) often fail to capture multi-modal predictive uncertainty due to mode collapse, resulting in overconfident predictions. To address these issues, we propose VoxelDiffusionCut, which iteratively estimates the internal structure represented as voxels using a diffusion model and plans cuts for non-destructive extraction of the target internal part based on the estimation results. Voxel representation allows the model to predict only attributes at fixed grid positions, i.e., types of constituent parts, making learning more tractable. The diffusion model completes the voxel representation conditioned on observed cutting surfaces, capturing uncertainty in unobserved regions to avoid erroneous cuts. Experimental results in simulation suggest that the proposed method can estimate internal structures from observed cutting surfaces and enable non-destructive extraction of the target internal part by leveraging the estimated uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 VoxelDiffusionCut 的方法，利用扩散模型迭代地估计切割表面下的内部结构，并据此规划切割路径，以实现对目标内部部件（如电池、电机）的无损提取，从而解决回收和处置过程中因产品多样性和拆卸信息缺乏而导致的切割决策难题。
AI.motivation: 在回收和处置过程中，需要对产品内部的目标部件（如电池、电机）进行无损提取。然而，产品种类繁多且缺乏详细的拆卸信息，导致难以确定合适的切割位置，这促使研究者探索一种能够自主决策切割方法的解决方案。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一种名为 VoxelDiffusionCut 的新方法。该方法将内部结构表示为体素（voxels），并利用扩散模型来迭代地估计和完成体素表示。模型根据观察到的切割表面来推断未知区域的结构，并考虑预测的不确定性。在此基础上，算法能够规划出用于无损提取目标部件的切割路径。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VoxelDiffusionCut 能够从观察到的切割表面有效地估计出产品的内部结构。通过利用估计出的不确定性信息，该方法能够成功地实现目标内部部件的无损提取。
AI.conclusion: VoxelDiffusionCut 方法能够通过迭代估计内部结构并结合不确定性信息，有效地解决在信息不全的情况下进行产品内部部件无损提取的挑战，为回收和处置行业提供了新的技术途径。

title: Automated Quality Check of Sensor Data Annotations
summary: The monitoring of the route and track environment plays an important role in automated driving. For example, it can be used as an assistance system for route monitoring in automation level Grade of Automation (GoA) 2, where the train driver is still on board. In fully automated, driverless driving at automation level GoA4, these systems finally take over environment monitoring completely independently. With the help of artificial intelligence (AI), they react automatically to risks and dangerous events on the route. To train such AI algorithms, large amounts of training data are required, which must meet high-quality standards due to their safety relevance. In this publication we present an automatic method for assuring the quality of training data, significantly reducing the manual workload and accelerating the development of these systems. We propose an open-source tool designed to detect nine common errors found in multi-sensor datasets for railway vehicles. To evaluate the performance of the framework, all detected errors were manually validated. Six issue detection methods achieved 100% precision, while three additional methods reached precision rates 96% and 97%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于铁路车辆多传感器训练数据的自动质量保证方法和开源工具，可检测九种常见错误，显著减少人工工作量并加速自动驾驶系统的开发。
AI.motivation: 为训练用于自动驾驶（特别是铁路领域的 GoA2 和 GoA4）所需的高质量 AI 算法，需要大量且高质量的训练数据。手动验证这些数据的质量工作量大且耗时，因此需要一种自动化的数据质量保证方法。
AI.method: 开发了一个开源工具，能够自动检测多传感器铁路车辆训练数据中存在的九种常见错误。实验通过人工验证所有检测到的错误来评估该框架的性能。
AI.result: 六种错误检测方法实现了 100% 的精确率，另外三种方法的精确率分别为 96% 和 97%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自动质量保证方法和开源工具能够有效地检测铁路车辆多传感器训练数据中的常见错误，并具有很高的精确率，从而大大减少了人工工作量，提高了开发效率。

title: A User Study on the Suitability of Teleoperation Interfaces for Primitive Manipulation Tasks
comment: Accepted at 21st ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI'26), Late Breaking Report
summary: The application of teleoperation to control robotic arms has been widely explored, and user-friendly teleoperation systems have been studied for facilitating higher performance and lower operational burden. To investigate the dominant factors in a practical teleoperation system, this study focused on the characteristics of an interface used to operate a robotic arm. The usability of an interface depends on the characteristics of the manipulation tasks to be completed; however, systematic comparisons of different interfaces across different tasks remain limited. In this study, we compared two widely used teleoperation interfaces, a 3D mouse and a VR controller, for two simple yet broadly applicable tasks with a six-degree-of-freedom (6DoF) robotic arm: repetitively pushing buttons and rotating knobs. Participants (N = 23) controlled a robotic arm with 6DoF to push buttons and rotate knobs as many times as possible in 3-minute trials. Each trial was followed by a NASA-TLX workload rating. The results showed a clear connection between the interface and task performance: the VR controller yielded higher performance for pushing buttons, whereas the 3D mouse performed better and was less demanding for knob rotation. These findings highlight the importance of considering dominant motion primitives of the task when designing practical teleoperation interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了3D鼠标和VR控制器在控制六自由度（6DoF）机械臂进行按钮推送和旋钮旋转任务时的性能和工作负荷，发现VR控制器在按钮推送任务中表现更优，而3D鼠标在旋钮旋转任务中表现更好且负荷更低。
AI.motivation: 现有用户友好型远程操作系统的研究旨在提高性能和降低操作负担，但对于不同任务类型下不同远程操作界面的影响因素的系统性比较研究仍然有限。
AI.method: 招募23名参与者，让他们使用3D鼠标和VR控制器分别控制6DoF机械臂执行按钮推送和旋钮旋转任务，并在3分钟试用期内尽可能多地完成操作。每次试用后，参与者填写NASA-TLX工作负荷量表。
AI.result: VR控制器在按钮推送任务中实现了更高的性能。3D鼠标在旋钮旋转任务中表现更佳，并且被认为对用户的需求更低。
AI.conclusion: 任务的主要运动原语（motion primitives）对远程操作界面的设计至关重要，在设计实际的远程操作界面时应充分考虑这一点。

title: Personalization Increases Affective Alignment but Has Role-Dependent Effects on Epistemic Independence in LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to sycophantic behavior, uncritically conforming to user beliefs. As models increasingly condition responses on user-specific context (personality traits, preferences, conversation history), they gain information to tailor agreement more effectively. Understanding how personalization modulates sycophancy is critical, yet systematic evaluation across models and contexts remains limited. We present a rigorous evaluation of personalization's impact on LLM sycophancy across nine frontier models and five benchmark datasets spanning advice, moral judgment, and debate contexts. We find that personalization generally increases affective alignment (emotional validation, hedging/deference), but affects epistemic alignment (belief adoption, position stability, resistance to influence) with context-dependent role modulation. When the LLM's role is to give advice, personalization strengthens epistemic independence (models challenge user presuppositions). When its role is that of a social peer, personalization decreases epistemic independence. In this role, extensively personalized user challenges causing LLMs to abandon their position at significantly higher rates. Robustness tests confirm that the effects are driven by personalized conditioning, not by additional input tokens per se or demographic information alone. Our work provides measurement frameworks for evaluating personalized AI systems, demonstrates the necessity of role-sensitive evaluation, and establishes a novel benchmark to assess goal alignment.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了个性化如何影响大型语言模型（LLMs）的奉承行为。结果表明，个性化通常会增加情感上的认同，但在认知上的影响则取决于模型的角色：在提供建议时，个性化增强了模型的独立性；而在扮演社交伙伴时，则会削弱其独立性，使其更容易被用户挑战所动摇。
AI.motivation: 理解个性化如何影响大型语言模型（LLMs）的奉承行为至关重要，因为LLMs越来越依赖用户特定的背景信息来定制回应，但目前缺乏系统的评估。
AI.method: 研究人员在九种前沿模型和五个跨越建议、道德判断和辩论的基准数据集上，对个性化对LLM奉承行为的影响进行了严格评估。还进行了稳健性测试以确认效果。
AI.result: 研究发现，个性化普遍增强了情感上的认同（如情绪验证、委婉/尊重），但对认知认同（如信念采纳、立场稳定、抗拒影响）的影响因上下文而异。当LLM扮演建议者的角色时，个性化增强了认知上的独立性；而当其扮演社交伙伴的角色时，个性化则降低了认知上的独立性，并显著增加了LLM因用户挑战而放弃立场的概率。
AI.conclusion: 个性化对LLM奉承行为的影响是复杂的，并且在很大程度上取决于模型的角色。研究提出了评估个性化AI系统的衡量框架，强调了进行角色敏感评估的必要性，并建立了一个新的基准来评估目标一致性。

title: Optimisation of SOUP-GAN and CSR-GAN for High Resolution MR Images Reconstruction
summary: Magnetic Resonance (MR) imaging is a diagnostic tool used in modern medicine; however, its output can be affected by motion artefacts and may be limited by equipment. This research focuses on MRI image quality enhancement using two efficient Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) models: SOUP-GAN and CSR-GAN. In both models, meaningful architectural modifications were introduced. The generator and discriminator of each were further deepened by adding convolutional layers and were enhanced in filter sizes as well. The LeakyReLU activation function was used to improve gradient flow, and hyperparameter tuning strategies were applied, including a reduced learning rate and an optimal batch size. Moreover, spectral normalisation was proposed to address mode collapse and improve training stability. The experiment shows that CSR-GAN has better performance in reconstructing the image with higher frequency details and reducing noise compared to other methods, with an optimised PSNR of 34.6 and SSIM of 0.89. However, SOUP-GAN performed the best in terms of delivering less noisy images with good structures, achieving a PSNR of 34.4 and SSIM of 0.83. The obtained results indicate that the proposed enhanced GAN model can be a useful tool for MR image quality improvement for subsequent better disease diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出并评估了两种改进的生成对抗网络（GAN）模型（SOUP-GAN和CSR-GAN）用于增强磁共振（MR）成像质量，以克服运动伪影和设备限制，并取得了更好的图像重建和降噪效果。
AI.motivation: 磁共振（MR）成像输出易受运动伪影和设备限制影响，影响诊断效果。因此，研究旨在通过改进的GAN模型提升MR图像质量。
AI.method: 研究提出了两种改进的GAN模型：SOUP-GAN和CSR-GAN。关键改进包括：加深了生成器和判别器的卷积层，增大了滤波器尺寸，使用了LeakyReLU激活函数，优化了学习率和批次大小，并引入了谱归一化来解决模式崩溃和提高训练稳定性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CSR-GAN在重建具有更高频率细节和降噪方面优于其他方法，其PSNR为34.6，SSIM为0.89。SOUP-GAN在提供结构良好的低噪声图像方面表现最佳，PSNR为34.4，SSIM为0.83。
AI.conclusion: 提出的增强型GAN模型（SOUP-GAN和CSR-GAN）能够有效地提高MR图像质量，为后续的疾病诊断提供更好的工具。

title: Designing Social Robots with Ethical, User-Adaptive Explainability in the Era of Foundation Models
comment: Companion Proceedings of the 21st ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Foundation models are increasingly embedded in social robots, mediating not only what they say and do but also how they adapt to users over time. This shift renders traditional ``one-size-fits-all'' explanation strategies especially problematic: generic justifications are now wrapped around behaviour produced by models trained on vast, heterogeneous, and opaque datasets. We argue that ethical, user-adapted explainability must be treated as a core design objective for foundation-model-driven social robotics. We first identify open challenges around explainability and ethical concerns that arise when both adaptation and explanation are delegated to foundation models. Building on this analysis, we propose four recommendations for moving towards user-adapted, modality-aware, and co-designed explanation strategies grounded in smaller, fairer datasets. An illustrative use case of an LLM-driven socially assistive robot demonstrates how these recommendations might be instantiated in a sensitive, real-world domain.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在基于基础模型的社交机器人中，如何实现面向用户的、符合伦理的、适应性强的解释策略，并提出了四项建议。
AI.motivation: 随着基础模型越来越多地应用于社交机器人，其行为的不可解释性和适应性带来了新的伦理挑战，需要新的解释策略。
AI.method: 识别解释性和伦理问题，提出四项建议，并以一个LLM驱动的社交辅助机器人为例进行演示。
AI.result: 提出了面向用户、模态感知、协同设计的解释策略，这些策略应该基于更小、更公平的数据集。
AI.conclusion: 将用户适应性解释作为基础模型驱动的社交机器人设计的核心目标，并应优先考虑基于更小、更公平数据集的解释策略。

title: Noise reduction in BERT NER models for clinical entity extraction
summary: Precision is of utmost importance in the realm of clinical entity extraction from clinical notes and reports. Encoder Models fine-tuned for Named Entity Recognition (NER) are an efficient choice for this purpose, as they don't hallucinate. We pre-trained an in-house BERT over clinical data and then fine-tuned it for NER. These models performed well on recall but could not close upon the high precision range, needed for clinical models. To address this challenge, we developed a Noise Removal model that refines the output of NER. The NER model assigns token-level entity tags along with probability scores for each token. Our Noise Removal (NR) model then analyzes these probability sequences and classifies predictions as either weak or strong. A naïve approach might involve filtering predictions based on low probability values; however, this method is unreliable. Owing to the characteristics of the SoftMax function, Transformer based architectures often assign disproportionately high confidence scores even to uncertain or weak predictions, making simple thresholding ineffective. To address this issue, we adopted a supervised modeling strategy in which the NR model leverages advanced features such as the Probability Density Map (PDM). The PDM captures the Semantic-Pull effect observed within Transformer embeddings, an effect that manifests in the probability distributions of NER class predictions across token sequences. This approach enables the model to classify predictions as weak or strong with significantly improved accuracy. With these NR models we were able to reduce False Positives across various clinical NER models by 50\% to 90\%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的噪声去除（NR）模型，通过分析NER模型输出的概率分布（包括PDM）来识别和过滤低置信度的实体识别预测，从而将临床实体提取中的假阳性降低了50%至90%。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于BERT的NER模型在临床实体提取中召回率高但精度不足，无法达到临床应用所需的高精度要求。直接通过概率阈值过滤无效，因为Transformer模型常给出高置信度但错误预测。
AI.method: 首先，在临床数据上预训练BERT模型并进行NER任务微调。然后，开发了一个噪声去除（NR）模型，该模型接收NER模型的输出（包括token级实体标签和概率分数），并利用高级特征（如概率密度图PDM）来区分弱预测和强预测。PDM捕获了Transformer嵌入中的“语义拉动效应”，以识别Transformer预测分布的特性。
AI.result: 通过引入NR模型，实现了对临床NER模型假阳性的显著降低，降幅在50%到90%之间。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于PDM的噪声去除模型能够有效地提高临床实体提取的精度，通过识别和过滤不确定的预测来减少假阳性，这对于需要高精度的临床应用至关重要。

title: Autonomous Block Assembly for Boom Cranes with Passive Joint Dynamics: Integrated Vision MPC Control
summary: This paper presents an autonomous control framework for articulated boom cranes performing prefabricated block assembly in construction environments. The key challenge addressed is precise placement control under passive joint dynamics that cause pendulum-like sway, complicating the accurate positioning of building components. Our integrated approach combines real-time vision-based pose estimation of building blocks, collision-aware B-spline path planning, and nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to achieve autonomous pickup, placement, and obstacle-avoidance assembly operations. The framework is validated on a laboratory-scale testbed that emulates crane kinematics and passive dynamics while enabling rapid experimentation. The collision-aware planner generates feasible B-spline references in real-time on CPU hardware with anytime performance, while the NMPC controller actively suppresses passive joint sway and tracks the planned trajectory under continuous vision feedback. Experimental results demonstrate autonomous block stacking and obstacle-avoidance assembly, with sway damping reducing settling times by more than an order of magnitude compared to uncontrolled passive dynamics, confirming the real-time feasibility of the integrated approach for construction automation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于建筑环境中预制块装配的自主控制框架，通过集成视觉姿态估计、避碰路径规划和非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）来解决起重机被动关节动力学引起的摆动问题，并成功实现了积木堆叠和避障组装。
AI.motivation: 建筑环境中起重机被动关节动力学引起的摆动（类似钟摆效应）阻碍了对构件的精确放置，这是一个关键的技术挑战。
AI.method: 该框架结合了：1. 实时视觉驱动的建筑块位姿估计；2. 考虑碰撞的 B-样条路径规划；3. 非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）。
AI.result: 实验证明，该框架能够自主完成积木堆叠和避障组装任务。与无控制的被动动力学相比，NMPC 控制将摆动抑制作用使沉降时间缩短了一个数量级以上。CPU 硬件可实时生成避碰 B-样条轨迹，并保持了随时可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方法在实验室规模的测试台上得到了验证，证实了其在建筑自动化领域实现实时自主装配的可行性，尤其是在处理被动关节动力学引起的摆动方面表现出色。

title: DIG to Heal: Scaling General-purpose Agent Collaboration via Explainable Dynamic Decision Paths
summary: The increasingly popular agentic AI paradigm promises to harness the power of multiple, general-purpose large language model (LLM) agents to collaboratively complete complex tasks. While many agentic AI systems utilize predefined workflows or agent roles in order to reduce complexity, ideally these agents would be truly autonomous, able to achieve emergent collaboration even as the number of collaborating agents increases. Yet in practice, such unstructured interactions can lead to redundant work and cascading failures that are difficult to interpret or correct. In this work, we study multi-agent systems composed of general-purpose LLM agents that operate without predefined roles, control flow, or communication constraints, relying instead on emergent collaboration to solve problems. We introduce the Dynamic Interaction Graph (DIG), which captures emergent collaboration as a time-evolving causal network of agent activations and interactions. DIG makes emergent collaboration observable and explainable for the first time, enabling real-time identification, explanation, and correction of collaboration-induced error patterns directly from agents' collaboration paths. Thus, DIG fills a critical gap in understanding how general LLM agents solve problems together in truly agentic multi-agent systems. The project webpage can be found at: https://happyeureka.github.io/dig.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为动态交互图（DIG）的新方法，用于观察和解释由通用 LLM 代理组成的、没有预定义角色或流程的无结构多智能体系统的涌现式协作，从而识别和纠正协作中的错误。
AI.motivation: 现有的智能体 AI 系统通常依赖预定义的流程或角色来简化复杂性，但理想情况下，这些智能体应该能够自主协作以实现涌现式协作，即使在智能体数量增加的情况下也是如此。然而，非结构化交互容易导致冗余工作和级联故障，难以理解和纠正。
AI.method: 研究由通用 LLM 智能体组成、不依赖预定义角色、控制流或通信约束的多智能体系统，而是依靠涌现式协作来解决问题。引入动态交互图（DIG），它将涌现式协作捕获为智能体激活和交互的随时间演变因果网络。
AI.result: DIG 首次使得涌现式协作可观察和可解释，能够直接从智能体的协作路径实时识别、解释和纠正协作引起的错误模式。
AI.conclusion: DIG 填补了理解通用 LLM 智能体如何在真正自主的多智能体系统中协同解决问题的关键空白。

title: Grid Integration of AI Data Centers: A Critical Review of Energy Storage Solutions
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is driving a rapid expansion of data centers (DCs). These facilities consume large amounts of electricity and introduce new challenges for power systems. AI workloads cause rapid power changes and high peak demand. These behaviors are different from traditional data centers (TDCs) and can affect grid stability and reliability. This paper reviews how energy storage systems (ESSs) can help integrate AI data DCs with the electric grid. We examine storage solutions at multiple levels, including grid-scale batteries, UPS systems, rack-level storage, and chip-level buffering. Each layer operates at a different time scale and serves a different purpose. Grid-interactive UPS (GiUPS) systems can respond quickly to disturbances and assist with frequency regulation or voltage ride through. Large battery energy storage systems (BESSs) can smooth power demand, support renewable on-site generation, and provide grid services. Rack-level and server-level storage help manage fast power fluctuations close to computing hardware. We also discuss other technologies such as fuel cells (FCs) and thermal energy storage (TE) that can support co-generation and reduce emissions. In addition, second-life battery energy storage (SLBESS) are reviewed as a lower-cost option for large installations whether supporting UPS battery or as a backup generation. The paper compares the benefits, challenges, and coordination requirements of these solutions. Overall, the study provides a structured view of how energy storage can improve reliability, flexibility, and sustainability when connecting future AI data centers to the power grid.

AI.tldr: 本篇论文综述了能源存储系统（ESSs）如何帮助集成人工智能（AI）数据中心与电网，以应对AI带来的快速电力变化和高峰值需求。文章探讨了包括电网级电池、UPS系统、机架级存储和芯片级缓冲等不同层级的存储解决方案，并分析了其各自的优势、挑战和协调需求，旨在提高AI数据中心接入电网的可靠性、灵活性和可持续性。
AI.motivation: 人工智能（AI）驱动的数据中心（DC）快速扩张，其电力消耗巨大且工作负载特性（快速功率变化、高峰值需求）与传统数据中心不同，给电网稳定性和可靠性带来了新挑战，因此需要研究解决方案来应对。
AI.method: 本文通过文献综述的方式，研究了不同层级的能源存储系统（ESSs）在集成AI数据中心与电网中的作用，包括电网级电池（BESSs）、不间断电源（UPS）系统（特别是电网交互式UPS - GiUPS）、机架级和芯片级存储。同时，还讨论了燃料电池（FCs）、热能存储（TE）和二代电池储能（SLBESS）等技术。文章对比了这些解决方案的优势、挑战及协调需求。
AI.result: 文章分析了不同层级的ESSs各自发挥的作用：GiUPS系统可快速响应扰动，支持频率调节或电压穿越；BESSs可平滑功率需求，支持本地可再生能源发电和提供电网服务；机架级和服务器级存储有助于管理靠近计算硬件的快速功率波动。二代电池储能（SLBESS）作为一种低成本选项，可用于大型设施。文章还讨论了FCs和TEs在减少排放和支持热电联产方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 能源存储系统（ESSs）在连接未来AI数据中心与电网方面，能够显著提升电网的可靠性、灵活性和可持续性。通过多层级、多技术的协同应用，可以有效管理AI数据中心带来的电力挑战。

title: GLIDE-Reg: Global-to-Local Deformable Registration Using Co-Optimized Foundation and Handcrafted Features
summary: Deformable registration is crucial in medical imaging. Several existing applications include lesion tracking, probabilistic atlas generation, and treatment response evaluation. However, current methods often lack robustness and generalizability across two key factors: spatial resolution and differences in anatomical coverage. We jointly optimize a registration field and a learnable dimensionality reduction module so that compressed VFM embeddings remain registration-relevant, and fuse these global semantic cues with MIND local descriptors. GLIDE-Reg achieves average dice similarity coefficients (DSC) across 6 anatomical structures of 0.859, 0.862, and 0.901 in two public cohorts (Lung250M and NLST) and one institution cohort (UCLA5DCT), and outperforms the state-of-the-art DEEDS (0.834, 0.858, 0.900) with relative improvements of 3.0%, 0.5%, and 0.1%. For target registration errors, GLIDE-Reg achieves 1.58 mm on Lung250M landmarks (compared to 1.25 mm on corrField and 1.91 mm on DEEDS) and 1.11 mm on NLST nodule centers (compared to 1.11 mm on DEEDS). The substantiated performance on the nodule centers also demonstrates its robustness across challenging downstream tasks, such as nodule tracking, which is an essential prior step for early-stage lung cancer diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 GLIDE-Reg 的可变形配准方法，通过联合优化配准场和可学习降维模块，并融合全局语义线索与 MIND 局部描述符，在三个数据集上取得了优于现有最先进方法的 Dice 系数和靶配准误差。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像可变形配准方法在空间分辨率和解剖覆盖范围差异方面缺乏鲁棒性和泛化性。
AI.method: 联合优化配准场和一个可学习的降维模块，使压缩的 VFM 嵌入保持配准相关性，并将这些全局语义线索与 MIND 局部描述符融合。
AI.result: 在 Lung250M、NLST 和 UCLA5DCT 数据集上，GLIDE-Reg 的平均 Dice 系数分别为 0.859、0.862 和 0.901，优于 DEEDS。在 Lung250M 和 NLST 上，靶配准误差分别为 1.58 mm 和 1.11 mm，与现有方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: GLIDE-Reg 是一种鲁棒且泛化的可变形配准方法，在医学图像配准任务中表现出色，并对结节追踪等下游任务具有实际意义。

title: How Well Do Multimodal Models Reason on ECG Signals?
summary: While multimodal large language models offer a promising solution to the "black box" nature of health AI by generating interpretable reasoning traces, verifying the validity of these traces remains a critical challenge. Existing evaluation methods are either unscalable, relying on manual clinician review, or superficial, utilizing proxy metrics (e.g. QA) that fail to capture the semantic correctness of clinical logic. In this work, we introduce a reproducible framework for evaluating reasoning in ECG signals. We propose decomposing reasoning into two distinct, components: (i) Perception, the accurate identification of patterns within the raw signal, and (ii) Deduction, the logical application of domain knowledge to those patterns. To evaluate Perception, we employ an agentic framework that generates code to empirically verify the temporal structures described in the reasoning trace. To evaluate Deduction, we measure the alignment of the model's logic against a structured database of established clinical criteria in a retrieval-based approach. This dual-verification method enables the scalable assessment of "true" reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种评估心电图（ECG）信号中多模态大语言模型（MLLM）可解释推理能力的新框架，将推理分解为感知和演绎两个阶段，并分别采用基于代码生成和基于检索的方法进行验证，以实现可扩展的“真实”推理能力评估。
AI.motivation: 现有的健康AI解释方法（如MLLM生成的推理过程）虽然有望解决“黑箱”问题，但其推理过程的有效性难以验证。现有的评估方法要么不可扩展（依赖人工审查），要么过于肤浅（使用代理指标），无法捕捉临床逻辑的语义正确性。
AI.method: 提出一个可复现的框架来评估ECG信号中的推理。将推理分解为感知（从原始信号中准确识别模式）和演绎（将领域知识逻辑地应用于这些模式）两个部分。感知阶段使用一个代理框架生成代码来经验性地验证推理过程中描述的时间结构。演绎阶段则使用基于检索的方法，衡量模型逻辑与结构化的临床标准数据库的对齐程度。
AI.result: 所提出的双重验证方法能够可扩展地评估模型在ECG信号分析中的“真实”推理能力，而无需依赖人工审查或浅层代理指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过将推理分解为感知和演绎两个可独立评估的组件，并采用基于代码生成和基于检索的验证方法，可以更有效、可扩展地评估多模态大语言模型在心电图分析中的可解释推理能力。

title: Efficient Image Super-Resolution with Multi-Scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Networks
summary: This paper introduces a lightweight image super-resolution (SR) network, termed the Multi-scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Network (MSAAN), to address the common dilemma between high reconstruction fidelity and low model complexity in existing SR methods. The core of our approach is a novel Multi-scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Module (MSAA), designed to jointly model fine-grained local details and long-range contextual dependencies. The MSAA comprises two synergistic components: a Global Feature Modulation Module (GFM) that learns coherent texture structures through differential feature extraction, and a Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Module (MFA) that adaptively fuses features from local to global scales using pyramidal processing. To further enhance the network's capability, we propose a Local Enhancement Block (LEB) to strengthen local geometric perception and a Feature Interactive Gated Feed-Forward Module (FIGFF) to improve nonlinear representation while reducing channel redundancy. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks (Set5, Set14, B100, Urban100, Manga109) across $\times2$, $\times3$, and $\times4$ scaling factors demonstrate that both our lightweight (MSAAN-light) and standard (MSAAN) versions achieve superior or competitive performance in terms of PSNR and SSIM, while maintaining significantly lower parameters and computational costs than state-of-the-art methods. Ablation studies validate the contribution of each component, and visual results show that MSAAN reconstructs sharper edges and more realistic textures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MSAAN的轻量级图像超分辨率网络，通过引入多尺度空间自适应注意力模块（MSAA）以及局部增强块（LEB）和特征交互门控前馈模块（FIGFF），在保证低模型复杂度的同时，实现了高重建保真度，并在多个基准测试中取得了优于或媲美先进方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法常常面临重建保真度与模型复杂度之间的两难权衡，研究者希望开发一种既能实现高精度重建，又具备低模型复杂度的轻量级超分辨率网络。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为MSAAN（Multi-scale Spatial Adaptive Attention Network）的轻量级超分辨率网络。其核心是多尺度空间自适应注意力模块（MSAA），该模块包含全局特征调制模块（GFM）和多尺度特征聚合模块（MFA）。此外，还引入了局部增强块（LEB）和特征交互门控前馈模块（FIGFF）来增强网络的性能。研究中同时提出了MSAAN-light（轻量级版本）和MSAAN（标准版本）。
AI.result: 在Set5, Set14, B100, Urban100, Manga109等标准数据集上，MSAAN-light和MSAAN在×2, ×3, ×4的放大因子下，均取得了优于或媲美当前最先进方法的PSNR和SSIM性能，同时参数量和计算成本显著降低。消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MSAAN网络通过其新颖的MSAA模块以及LEB和FIGFF模块，成功地在低模型复杂度的前提下实现了高质量的图像超分辨率重建，能够重建出更清晰的边缘和更真实的纹理。

title: TAB-PO: Preference Optimization with a Token-Level Adaptive Barrier for Token-Critical Structured Generation
summary: Direct Preference Optimization is an offline post-SFT method for aligning language models from preference pairs, with strong results in instruction following and summarization. However, DPO's sequence-level implicit reward can be brittle for token-critical structured prediction settings such as medical annotation, which often exhibit (i) low-separation preference pairs, where chosen and rejected completions differ by minimal edit distance (often 1-3 tokens), and (ii) token-importance skew, where sparse semantic tokens (hierarchical labels and evidence Spans) carry disproportionate task importance relative to high-frequency structural tokens (JSON scaffolding). In this regime, standard DPO suffers from margin collapse (insufficient log-probability separation between near-identical preferences), likelihood squeezing (the margin objective shifts the absolute likelihoods of both completions together), and gradient dilution, where uniform sequence-level weighting diffuses learning signal across shared scaffolding while rare, confusable label tokens receive weak, noisy updates. We introduce Token-Adaptive Barrier Preference Optimization (TAB-PO), which augments DPO with token-weighted, reference-adjusted advantages that prioritize high-value semantic tokens, and a conditional token-level barrier that regularizes under-confident tokens balancing SFT-anchored likelihood and preference-driven separation in low-separation, importance-skewed regimes. We evaluate TAB-PO on medical communication annotation, a task requiring joint prediction of hierarchical labels and evidence Spans from patient-provider messages. TAB-PO achieves a ~ 4% relative improvement in micro-F1 over SFT and consistently outperforms recent preference-optimization baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TAB-PO（Token-Adaptive Barrier Preference Optimization）的新方法，用于改进DPO在处理需要精确标记特定标记的结构化预测任务（如医学信息标注）时的性能。TAB-PO通过引入标记自适应的优势函数和条件标记级障碍来解决DPO在低区分度偏好对和标记重要性偏斜问题上的不足，并在医学信息标注任务上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的直接偏好优化（DPO）方法在处理指令遵循和摘要生成等任务时效果良好，但在医学信息标注这类对标记（token）要求极高的结构化预测任务中存在局限性。具体表现为：1. 偏好对区分度低（选项和拒绝项之间的编辑距离很小）；2. 标记重要性偏斜（稀疏语义标记比高频结构标记更重要）。这些问题导致DPO出现边距坍塌、似然挤压和梯度稀释等问题，影响了学习效果。
AI.method: 本文提出的TAB-PO方法是对DPO的改进，主要包含两个方面：1. 引入标记加权的、参考调整的优势函数，优先考虑高价值的语义标记；2. 引入条件标记级障碍，在低区分度、重要性偏斜的场景下，平衡基于SFT的似然和偏好驱动的区分度，以解决置信度不足的标记问题。
AI.result: 在医学信息标注任务（需要从医患消息中联合预测分层标签和证据跨度）的评估中，TAB-PO相较于SFT（Supervised Fine-Tuning）在微F1分数上取得了约4%的相对提升，并且在性能上持续优于最近的偏好优化基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TAB-PO是一种有效的后SFT方法，能够显著提高语言模型在低区分度偏好对和标记重要性偏斜的结构化预测任务（如医学信息标注）中的性能，解决了标准DPO在该类任务中的局限性。

title: Curtail Renewables to Enhance Flexibility: A Regulated Forecast-based Dispatch Approach
summary: This paper considers the flexibility degradation problem caused by excessive flexible ramping product (FRP) requirements with high variable energy resource (VER) penetration}. Based on the rolling-window co-optimization model of energy and FRP, theoretical analysis of this paper reveals a unit dispatch transfer effect, in which high FRP requirements under forecast-based dispatch (FBD) constrain real-time flexibility and distort economic efficiency. To alleviate this effect, a regulated forecast-based dispatch (RFBD) approach is proposed, which moderately caps VER outputs and enhances system flexibility. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively lowers FRP requirements and reduces operating cost compared with FBD.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种受调节的基于预测的调度（RFBD）方法，通过适度限制可变能源资源（VER）的输出，缓解了因过度灵活爬坡产品（FRP）需求导致的可再生能源波动引起的灵活性退化问题，并降低了运营成本。
AI.motivation: 高比例可再生能源（VER）导致对灵活爬坡产品（FRP）的需求增加，这可能导致灵活性退化和经济效率扭曲。
AI.method: 基于滚动窗口能源和FRP的联合优化模型，分析了单位调度转移效应，并提出了一种受调节的基于预测的调度（RFBD）方法，该方法适度限制VER输出并提高系统灵活性。
AI.result: 与传统的基于预测的调度（FBD）相比，RFBD方法有效降低了FRP需求，并减少了运营成本。
AI.conclusion: RFBD方法是一种有效的解决方案，可以缓解高VER渗透率下因过度FRP需求引起的可再生能源灵活性问题，并提高经济效益。

title: Efficient Conformal Volumetry for Template-Based Segmentation
summary: Template-based segmentation, a widely used paradigm in medical imaging, propagates anatomical labels via deformable registration from a labeled atlas to a target image, and is often used to compute volumetric biomarkers for downstream decision-making. While conformal prediction (CP) provides finite-sample valid intervals for scalar metrics, existing segmentation-based uncertainty quantification (UQ) approaches either rely on learned model features, often unavailable in classic template-based pipelines, or treat the registration process as a black box, resulting in overly conservative intervals when applied directly in output space. We introduce ConVOLT, a CP framework that achieves efficient volumetric UQ by conditioning calibration on properties of the estimated deformation field from template-based segmentation. ConVOLT calibrates a learned volumetric scaling factor from deformation space features. We evaluate ConVOLT on template-based segmentation tasks involving global, regional, and label volumetry across multiple datasets and registration methods. ConVOLT achieves target coverage while producing substantially tighter intervals than output-space conformal baselines. Our work paves way to exploit the registration process for efficient UQ in medical imaging pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ConVOLT的共形预测（CP）框架，用于在基于模板的医学图像分割中实现高效的体积不确定性量化（UQ）。ConVOLT通过利用变形场（deformation field）的特征来条件化校准过程，从而生成比输出空间共形基线更窄的不确定性区间，同时保证目标覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于分割的不确定性量化方法存在局限性，要么依赖于在经典模板化流程中不可用的模型特征，要么将配准过程视为黑箱，导致不确定性区间过于保守。研究人员希望开发一种能够利用配准过程信息来提高不确定性量化效率和准确性的方法。
AI.method: ConVOLT是一个共形预测（CP）框架。它通过从变形场特征中学习一个体积缩放因子（volumetric scaling factor）来进行校准。这种校准方式能够有效地利用模板化分割中的变形场信息，实现高效的体积不确定性量化。
AI.result: 在涉及全局、区域和标签体积测量的模板化分割任务中，ConVOLT在多个数据集和配准方法上进行了评估。结果表明，ConVOLT在实现目标覆盖率的同时，生成的区间比输出空间共形基线方法显著更窄。
AI.conclusion: ConVOLT框架能够有效地利用配准过程中的信息来获得更精确、更窄的不确定性区间，为医学影像处理中的不确定性量化提供了一种新的途径，尤其是在经典的模板化分割流程中。

title: EmCoop: A Framework and Benchmark for Embodied Cooperation Among LLM Agents
summary: Real-world scenarios increasingly require multiple embodied agents to collaborate in dynamic environments under embodied constraints, as many tasks exceed the capabilities of any single agent. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) enable high-level cognitive coordination through reasoning, planning, and natural language communication. However, fine-grained analyses of how such collaboration emerges, unfolds, and contributes to task success in embodied multi-agent systems are difficult to conduct with existing benchmarks. In this paper, we introduce EmCoop, a benchmark framework for studying cooperation in LLM-based embodied multi-agent systems. Our framework separates a high-level cognitive layer from a low-level embodied interaction layer, allowing us to characterize agent cooperation through their interleaved dynamics over time. Given a cooperation-constrained embodied task, we propose generalizable, process-level metrics that diagnose collaboration quality and failure modes, beyond final task success. We instantiate our framework in two embodied environments that scale to arbitrary numbers of agents and support diverse communication topologies, and use these instantiations to demonstrate how EmCoop enables systematic analysis of cooperation dynamics across team sizes and task settings. The project web page can be found at: https://happyeureka.github.io/emcoop.

AI.tldr: 提出EmCoop基准框架，用于研究基于LLM的具身多智能体系统的协作，该框架分离了高级认知层和低级交互层，并提供了过程级指标来评估协作质量和失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现实世界任务需要多个具身智能体在动态环境中协作，现有基准难以对LLM驱动的具身多智能体系统的协作涌现、展开和对任务成功的影响进行细粒度分析。
AI.method: 提出EmCoop基准框架，该框架将高级认知层与低级具身交互层分离，允许通过智能体随时间的交织动态来刻画协作。提出通用的过程级指标，用于诊断协作质量和失败模式。
AI.result: EmCoop框架已在两个具身环境中实现，这些环境可以扩展到任意数量的智能体并支持多样的通信拓扑。通过实例演示了EmCoop如何实现对不同团队规模和任务设置下协作动态的系统性分析。
AI.conclusion: EmCoop提供了一个分析LLM驱动的具身多智能体系统协作的新框架，通过分离不同层次以及引入过程级指标，可以更深入地理解和评估协作的涌现和有效性。

title: BiSe-Unet: A Lightweight Dual-path U-Net with Attention-refined Context for Real-time Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Submitted to IEEE EMBC 2026. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: During image-guided procedures, real-time image segmentation is often required. This demands lightweight AI models that can operate on resource-constrained devices. One important use case is endoscopy-guided colonoscopy, where polyps must be detected in real time. The Kvasir-Seg dataset, a publicly available benchmark for this task, contains 1,000 high-resolution endoscopic images of polyps with corresponding pixel-level segmentation masks. Achieving real-time inference speed for clinical deployment in constrained environments requires highly efficient and lightweight network architectures. However, many existing models remain too computationally intensive for embedded deployment. Lightweight architectures, although faster, often suffer from reduced spatial precision and weaker contextual understanding, leading to degraded boundary quality and reduced diagnostic reliability. To address these challenges, we introduce BiSe-UNet, a lightweight dual-path U-Net that integrates an attention-refined context path with a shallow spatial path for detailed feature preservation, followed by a depthwise separable decoder for efficient reconstruction. Evaluated on the Kvasir-Seg dataset, BiSe-UNet achieves competitive Dice and IoU scores while sustaining real-time throughput exceeding 30 FPS on Raspberry Pi 5, demonstrating its effectiveness for accurate, lightweight, and deployable medical image segmentation on edge hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BiSe-UNet的轻量级双路径U-Net模型，用于实时内窥镜图像分割，特别是在结肠镜检查中检测息肉。该模型在Kvasir-Seg数据集上表现出高精度和超过30 FPS的实时推理速度，适用于资源受限的边缘设备。
AI.motivation: 在图像引导的手术中，尤其是在结肠镜检查中实时检测息肉，需要轻量级AI模型在资源受限的设备上运行。现有模型计算量大，而轻量级模型则精度和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为BiSe-UNet的轻量级双路径U-Net架构。它结合了一个注意力增强的上下文路径和一个浅层空间路径，以保留细节特征，并使用深度可分离卷积解码器进行高效重建。
AI.result: 在Kvasir-Seg数据集上，BiSe-UNet在Dice和IoU分数上取得了有竞争力的结果，并在Raspberry Pi 5上实现了超过30 FPS的实时吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: BiSe-UNet是一种有效、轻量级且可部署的医学图像分割模型，适用于在边缘硬件上实现高精度的实时息肉检测。

title: SurgFusion-Net: Diversified Adaptive Multimodal Fusion Network for Surgical Skill Assessment
summary: Robotic-assisted surgery (RAS) is established in clinical practice, and automated surgical skill assessment utilizing multimodal data offers transformative potential for surgical analytics and education. However, developing effective multimodal methods remains challenging due to the task complexity, limited annotated datasets and insufficient techniques for cross-modal information fusion. Existing state-of-the-art relies exclusively on RGB video and only applies on dry-lab settings, failing to address the significant domain gap between controlled simulation and real clinical cases, where the surgical environment together with camera and tissue motion introduce substantial complexities. This work introduces SurgFusion-Net and Divergence Regulated Attention (DRA), an innovative fusion strategy for multimodal surgical skill assessment. We contribute two first-of-their-kind clinical datasets: the RAH-skill dataset containing 279,691 RGB frames from 37 videos of Robot-assisted Hysterectomy (RAH), and the RARP-skill dataset containing 70,661 RGB frames from 33 videos of Robot-Assisted Radical Prostatectomy (RARP). Both datasets include M-GEARS skill annotations, corresponding optical flow and tool segmentation masks. DRA incorporates adaptive dual attention and diversity-promoting multi-head attention to fuse multimodal information, from three modalities, based on surgical context, enhancing assessment accuracy and reliability. Validated on the JIGSAWS benchmark, RAH-skill, and RARP-skill datasets, our approach outperforms recent baselines with SCC improvements of 0.02 in LOSO, 0.04 in LOUO across JIGSAWS tasks, and 0.0538 and 0.0493 gains on RAH-skill and RARP-skill, respectively.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为 SurgFusion-Net 的多模态融合网络，并结合了 Divergence Regulated Attention (DRA) 机制，用于评估机器人辅助手术的技能。该方法利用 RGB 视频、光流和工具分割掩码等多种模态信息，克服了现有方法仅依赖 RGB 视频且仅限于模拟环境的局限性，并在真实临床数据集上取得了显著优于基线模型的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人辅助手术技能评估方法主要依赖 RGB 视频，且局限于模拟环境，无法有效处理真实临床场景中的复杂性（如环境、相机和组织运动），也面临数据集有限和跨模态信息融合技术不足的挑战。
AI.method: 提出了 SurgFusion-Net 和 Divergence Regulated Attention (DRA) 融合策略。DRA 采用自适应双注意力机制和促进多样性的多头注意力机制，根据手术上下文融合三种模态（RGB 视频、光流、工具分割掩码）的信息。研究还贡献了两个新的临床数据集：RAH-skill（机器人辅助子宫切除术）和 RARP-skill（机器人辅助根治性前列腺切除术）。
AI.result: 在 JIGSAWS 基准、RAH-skill 和 RARP-skill 数据集上，SurgFusion-Net 结合 DRA 的方法在 LOSO（Leave-One-Subject-Out）和 LOUO（Leave-One-Operator-Out）交叉验证下，相比现有基线模型，在 Spearman Correlation Coefficient (SCC) 上分别提升了 0.02 和 0.04。在 RAH-skill 和 RARP-skill 数据集上，性能分别提升了 0.0538 和 0.0493。
AI.conclusion: SurgFusion-Net 结合 DRA 的多模态融合策略能够有效提升机器人辅助手术技能评估的准确性和可靠性，尤其是在处理真实临床数据和融合多模态信息方面具有显著优势。

title: Integrated Guidance and Control for Path-Following with Bounded Inputs
summary: Precise motion control of underactuated surface vessels is a crucial task in various maritime applications. In this work, we develop a nonlinear motion control strategy for surface vessels inspired by the pursuit guidance philosophy. Any sufficiently smooth path can be seen as a continuum of virtual targets moving along a specified path, which the pursuer is trying to catch. Contrary to the traditional path-following methods, this work develops an integrated guidance and control approach capable of following any smooth path (unlike the ones composed of a finite number of straight lines and circles). The approach relies on steering the vehicle such that its velocity vector aligns with the line-of-sight (the line joining the moving virtual target and the surface vessel), resulting in a tail-chase scenario. This leads to a path-following behavior. This integrated approach also overcomes the disadvantages inherent in the traditional two-loop-based approaches. Additionally, the proposed work takes into account the asymmetric actuator constraints in the design, which makes the design close to realistic scenarios. Furthermore, the control law has been derived within a nonlinear framework using sliding mode, and thus remains applicable for a wider envelope. The stability of the proposed control strategy is formally proven. Numerical simulations for various specified paths validate the controller's accurate path-following performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于追逐制导理念的非线性运动控制策略，用于欠驱动水面舰艇的精确运动控制。该策略能跟随任意光滑路径，克服了传统方法的局限性，并考虑了不对称执行器约束，通过滑模控制实现稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有水面舰艇路径跟踪方法存在局限性，如只能跟踪特定类型的路径（直线和圆弧组合），以及传统两环控制方法固有的缺点。本文旨在开发一种能跟随任意光滑路径、集成化制导与控制、并考虑实际执行器约束的鲁棒控制策略。
AI.method: 研究受到追逐制导理念的启发，将任意光滑路径视为一系列沿路径移动的虚拟目标。控制策略的核心是将舰艇的运动速度矢量与视线（连接虚拟目标和舰艇的直线）对齐，从而实现尾随式路径跟踪。控制律在非线性框架下使用滑模控制方法推导，并考虑了不对称执行器约束。最后，通过理论证明验证了控制策略的稳定性。
AI.result: 开发的非线性运动控制策略能够实现对任意光滑路径的精确跟踪。该方法克服了传统路径跟踪方法的不足，并能处理不对称执行器约束。仿真结果表明了该控制器的有效性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于追逐制导理念的非线性集成化制导与控制策略，能够实现欠驱动水面舰艇对任意光滑路径的精确跟踪，并且考虑了实际的执行器约束。该方法在理论上具有稳定性保证，并在数值模拟中得到了验证，为水面舰艇的运动控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: ActMem: Bridging the Gap Between Memory Retrieval and Reasoning in LLM Agents
summary: Effective memory management is essential for large language model (LLM) agents handling long-term interactions. Current memory frameworks typically treat agents as passive "recorders" and retrieve information without understanding its deeper implications. They may fail in scenarios requiring conflict detection and complex decision-making. To bridge this critical gap, we propose a novel actionable memory framework called ActMem that integrates memory retrieval with active causal reasoning. ActMem transforms unstructured dialogue history into a structured causal and semantic graph. By leveraging counterfactual reasoning and commonsense completion, it enables agents to deduce implicit constraints and resolve potential conflicts between past states and current intentions. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive dataset ActMemEval to evaluate agent reasoning capabilities in logic-driven scenarios, moving beyond the fact-retrieval focus of existing memory benchmarks. Experiments demonstrate that ActMem significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in handling complex, memory-dependent tasks, paving the way for more consistent and reliable intelligent assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ActMem的行动记忆框架，该框架通过集成记忆检索和主动因果推理，将LLM代理的长期互动能力提升到新的水平，能够处理冲突检测和复杂决策，并引入了ActMemEval数据集来评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理的记忆管理框架将代理视为被动的“记录者”，在处理需要冲突检测和复杂决策的长期交互场景时存在不足。
AI.method: ActMem框架将非结构化的对话历史转化为结构化的因果和语义图，并利用反事实推理和常识补全来推断隐含约束并解决过去状态与当前意图之间的潜在冲突。此外，还构建了一个名为ActMemEval的数据集来评估代理在逻辑驱动场景下的推理能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，ActMem在处理复杂的、依赖记忆的任务上显著优于最先进的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: ActMem提供了一种更强大、更可靠的LLM代理记忆管理方法，能够处理复杂的推理和决策，为构建更一致、更智能的助手铺平了道路。

title: Solving a Nonlinear Blind Inverse Problem for Tagged MRI with Physics and Deep Generative Priors
summary: Tagged MRI enables tracking internal tissue motion non-invasively. It encodes motion by modulating anatomy with periodic tags, which deform along with tissue. However, the entanglement between anatomy, tags and motion poses significant challenges for post-processing. The existence of tags and imaging blur hinders downstream tasks such as segmenting anatomy. Tag fading, due to T1-relaxation, disrupts the brightness constancy assumption for motion tracking. For decades, these challenges have been handled in isolation and sub-optimally. In contrast, we introduce a blind and nonlinear inverse framework for tagged MRI that, for the first time, unifies these tasks: anatomical image recovery, high-resolution cine image synthesis, and motion estimation. At its core, the synergy of MR physics and generative priors enables us to blindly estimate the unknown forward imaging models and high-resolution underlying anatomy, while simultaneously tracking 3D diffeomorphic Lagrangian motion over time. Experiments on tagged brain MRI demonstrate that our approach yields high-resolution anatomy images, cine images, and more accurate motion than specialized methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合MR物理和生成先验的盲非线性逆变换框架，首次统一了解缠结MRI中的解剖图像恢复、高分辨率动态图像合成和运动估计问题，并在脑部MRI实验中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有技术在处理缠结的解剖结构、运动和MRI伪影（如标签衰减和成像模糊）时面临挑战，并且这些问题通常是孤立且次优地解决的。
AI.method: 开发了一个盲且非线性的逆变换框架，利用MR物理原理和生成先验，能够盲估计未知的成像模型和高分辨率的潜在解剖结构，同时跟踪三维的李群运动。
AI.result: 该方法能够生成高分辨率的解剖图像和动态图像，并比专用方法更准确地估计运动。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合MR物理和生成先验，能够有效地解决解缠结MRI中的多重挑战，并有望在脑部MRI等应用中提供更准确的运动跟踪和图像合成。

title: Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Models: A Multimodal Continuous and Sequential World Interaction Models for Robotic Manipulation
summary: The scarcity of large-scale robotic data has motivated the repurposing of foundation models from other modalities for policy learning. In this work, we introduce PhysGen (Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Generation Models), a scalable continuous and sequential world interaction framework that leverages autoregressive video generation to solve robotic manipulation tasks. By treating the pretrained video model as a proxy for a physics simulator, PhysGen models the dynamic interplay between the external environment and robot actions. We introduce a multimodal continuous representation that unifies video and action into shared physical tokens, bridging the gap between discrete video generation and continuous robotic control. This approach enables the seamless transfer of implicit physical knowledge-such as object permanence and dynamics-from video pretraining to downstream manipulation.To ensure efficient convergence, we incorporate causal masking, inverse kinematics, Lookahead Multi-Token Prediction (L-MTP), and key-value (KV) caching. Experimental results on the Libero and ManiSkill benchmarks demonstrate that PhysGen consistently outperforms robust baselines, surpassing OpenVLA and WorldVLA by margins of 13.8% and 8.8%, respectively. Notably, in real-world scenarios, PhysGen matches the performance of large-scale action-pretrained models like $π_0$ without requiring prior action-specific pretraining, demonstrating superior capability in physically complex tasks such as grasping transparent objects. These findings validate the potential of extracting physical intuition from pretrained video generators to facilitate generalizable robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: PhysGen 框架利用预训练的视频生成模型来学习机器人操作策略，通过将视频和动作统一为共享的物理 token，实现了从视频中提取的物理知识（如物体持续性、动力学）到机器人控制的迁移，并在模拟和真实世界实验中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人领域缺乏大规模数据集，促使研究者尝试将其他模态（如视频）的预训练基础模型用于策略学习。
AI.method: PhysGen 框架将预训练的自回归视频生成模型作为物理模拟器的代理，通过引入一种多模态的连续表示，将视频和机器人动作统一到共享的物理 token 中。该方法还采用了因果掩码、逆运动学、前瞻多 token 预测 (L-MTP) 和键值 (KV) 缓存来提高训练效率。
AI.result: 在 Libero 和 ManiSkill 基准测试中，PhysGen 的性能优于 OpenVLA 和 WorldVLA 分别 13.8% 和 8.8%。在真实世界场景中，PhysGen 在无需动作特定预训练的情况下，达到了与 $π_0$ 等大规模动作预训练模型相当的性能，尤其在抓取透明物体等物理复杂任务上表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 从预训练的视频生成器中提取物理直觉，可以有效地促进可泛化的机器人操作能力。PhysGen 证明了这种方法在克服数据稀缺性方面的潜力。

title: NovaLAD: A Fast, CPU-Optimized Document Extraction Pipeline for Generative AI and Data Intelligence
summary: Document extraction is an important step before retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), knowledge bases, and downstream generative AI can work. It turns unstructured documents like PDFs and scans into structured text and layout-aware representations. We introduce NovaLAD, a comprehensive document parsing system that integrates two concurrent YOLO object detection models - element detection and layout detection - with rule-based grouping and optional vision-language enhancement. When a page image is sent in, the first thing that happens is that it goes through both models at the same time. The element model finds semantic content like the title, header, text, table, image, and so on, and the layout model finds structural regions like layout_box, column_group, multi_column, row_group, and so on. A key design decision is to first send an image or figure through an image classifier (ViT) that decides whether it is relevant or not. Only useful images are then submitted to the Vision LLM for title, summary, and structured information, which cuts down on noise and costs. NovaLAD is built for speed: it works on CPU, employs parallel execution for detection, classification, OCR, and conversion, and generates several forms, including structured JSON, Markdown, RAG-ready texts, and knowledge graphs. We test on the DP-Bench benchmark (upstage/dp-bench) and get 96.49% TEDS and 98.51% NID, which is better than both commercial and open-source parsers. This paper explains how to extract data, how the architecture works, how data flows, and how to make NovaLAD both accurate and usable without needing a GPU.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为NovaLAD的文档解析系统，它集成了YOLO目标检测模型（用于元素和布局检测）、图像分类器（ViT）和可选的视觉语言模型，旨在快速、准确地将非结构化文档转换为结构化数据，并且可以在CPU上运行。
AI.motivation: 文档提取是检索增强生成、知识库和生成式AI等下游应用的关键前提，然而现有的方法在速度和准确性上仍有提升空间，并且通常需要GPU支持。
AI.method: NovaLAD系统同时运行两个YOLO模型（元素检测和布局检测），前者识别文本、标题、表格等内容，后者识别页面区域结构。对于图像，先通过ViT进行相关性判断，然后才将相关图像送入视觉语言模型提取信息，以减少成本和噪声。系统支持并行处理OCR和格式转换，并能在CPU上运行。
AI.result: 在DP-Bench基准测试中，NovaLAD取得了96.49%的TEDS得分和98.51%的NID得分，性能优于现有的商业和开源解析器。
AI.conclusion: NovaLAD是一个高效且准确的文档解析系统，它通过结合多模态模型和优化的处理流程，实现了在CPU上无需GPU即可进行高质量的文档数据提取，并能输出多种结构化格式。

title: EPPCMinerBen: A Novel Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Electronic Patient-Provider Communication via the Patient Portal
summary: Effective communication in health care is critical for treatment outcomes and adherence. With patient-provider exchanges shifting to secure messaging, analyzing electronic patient-communication (EPPC) data is both essential and challenging. We introduce EPPCMinerBen, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs in detecting communication patterns and extracting insights from electronic patient-provider messages. EPPCMinerBen includes three sub-tasks: Code Classification, Subcode Classification, and Evidence Extraction. Using 1,933 expert annotated sentences from 752 secure messages of the patient portal at Yale New Haven Hospital, it evaluates LLMs on identifying communicative intent and supportive text. Benchmarks span various LLMs under zero-shot and few-shot settings, with data to be released via the NCI Cancer Data Service. Model performance varied across tasks and settings. Llama-3.1-70B led in evidence extraction (F1: 82.84%) and performed well in classification. Llama-3.3-70b-Instruct outperformed all models in code classification (F1: 67.03%). DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B excelled in subcode classification (F1: 48.25%), while sdoh-llama-3-70B showed consistent performance. Smaller models underperformed, especially in subcode classification (>30% F1). Few-shot prompting improved most tasks. Our results show that large, instruction-tuned models generally perform better in EPPCMinerBen tasks, particularly evidence extraction while smaller models struggle with fine-grained reasoning. EPPCMinerBen provides a benchmark for discourse-level understanding, supporting future work on model generalization and patient-provider communication analysis. Keywords: Electronic Patient-Provider Communication, Large language models, Data collection, Prompt engineering

AI.tldr: 本文提出EPPCMinerBen基准，用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）在电子患者-提供者通信（EPPC）数据中识别沟通模式和提取见解的能力，并对比了不同LLM在该基准上的表现。
AI.motivation: 随着医疗保健中患者-提供者交流越来越多地转向安全的在线消息传递，分析这些电子患者通信（EPPC）数据变得至关重要且充满挑战。因此，需要一个标准化的基准来评估LLM在理解和提取EPPC数据中的信息方面的能力。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了一个名为EPPCMinerBen的基准，包含代码分类、子代码分类和证据提取三个子任务。他们使用耶鲁新港医院患者门户网站上的752条安全消息中，由专家注释的1,933个句子进行标注。该基准在零样本和少样本设置下对多种LLM进行了评估，并计划通过NCI癌症数据服务发布数据。
AI.result: 不同LLM在不同任务和设置下的表现各异。Llama-3.1-70B在证据提取方面表现最佳（F1: 82.84%），并在分类任务中表现良好。Llama-3.3-70b-Instruct在代码分类方面表现最优（F1: 67.03%）。DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B在子代码分类方面表现突出（F1: 48.25%），而sdoh-llama-3-70B表现稳定。较小的模型表现不佳，尤其是在子代码分类任务中（F1 < 30%）。少样本提示在大多数任务上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 大型、经过指令微调的模型在EPPCMinerBen任务中通常表现更好，尤其是在证据提取方面，而小型模型在精细推理方面存在困难。EPPCMinerBen为分析EPPC数据提供了一个促进话语层面理解的基准，有助于未来模型泛化能力和患者-提供者沟通分析的研究。
