title: Precision Switching Schedule for Efficient Control Implementations
summary:
Modern cyber-physical systems, such as automotive control, rely on feedback controllers that regulate the system towards desired a setpoint. In practice, however, the controller must also be scheduled efficiently on resource-constrained processors, where the choice of numerical precision for controller implementation directly affects both control quality and computational cost. This trade-off is critical: higher precision improves control performance but increases runtime, while lower precision executes faster in the processor but may degrade overall system performance.
  In this work, we propose the first approach for a precision switching schedule, where the controller switches between different floating-point precisions to balance control performance and enhance computational efficiency. We formulate this problem as a multi-objective optimization, expressed as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) with sound linearizations and error bounds that capture roundoff effects from different precision implementations. Our method efficiently computes a switching schedule that ensures the system output remains within a specified reference band. Through experimental evaluation on standard benchmark control systems, we demonstrate that switching between 32-bit and 16-bit floating-point implementations offers an average runtime reduction of 26.5% compared to 32-bit execution and a 27.6% improvement in control performance over 16-bit execution, while maintaining near-optimal overall performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种精度切换调度方法，可以在不同浮点精度之间切换控制器，以在控制性能和计算效率之间取得平衡，并将其公式化为混合整数二次规划问题。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的处理器上高效调度控制器，同时平衡控制质量和计算成本，这对于现代网络物理系统至关重要。数值精度直接影响这两者。
AI.method: 将精度切换调度问题表述为多目标优化问题，并使用混合整数二次规划（MIQP）求解，该方法包含线性和误差界限，以捕获不同精度实现的舍入效应。
AI.result: 通过在标准基准控制系统上的实验评估，证明了在 32 位和 16 位浮点实现之间切换，与仅使用 32 位相比，平均运行时减少了 26.5%，与仅使用 16 位相比，控制性能提高了 27.6%，同时保持了接近最优的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的精度切换调度方法是一种有效的策略，可以在保持系统输出在指定参考带内的情况下，显著提高控制系统的计算效率和控制性能。

title: Monotropic Artificial Intelligence: Toward a Cognitive Taxonomy of Domain-Specialized Language Models
summary: The prevailing paradigm in artificial intelligence research equates progress with scale: larger models trained on broader datasets are presumed to yield superior capabilities. This assumption, while empirically productive for general-purpose applications, obscures a fundamental epistemological tension between breadth and depth of knowledge. We introduce the concept of \emph{Monotropic Artificial Intelligence} -- language models that deliberately sacrifice generality to achieve extraordinary precision within narrowly circumscribed domains. Drawing on the cognitive theory of monotropism developed to understand autistic cognition, we argue that intense specialization represents not a limitation but an alternative cognitive architecture with distinct advantages for safety-critical applications. We formalize the defining characteristics of monotropic models, contrast them with conventional polytropic architectures, and demonstrate their viability through Mini-Enedina, a 37.5-million-parameter model that achieves near-perfect performance on Timoshenko beam analysis while remaining deliberately incompetent outside its domain. Our framework challenges the implicit assumption that artificial general intelligence constitutes the sole legitimate aspiration of AI research, proposing instead a cognitive ecology in which specialized and generalist systems coexist complementarily.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为“单向人工智能”（Monotropic AI）的新型模型架构，该模型通过牺牲通用性来专注于特定领域，以实现极高的精度，尤其适用于安全关键型应用，并提出这是一种与通用人工智能互补的AI发展方向。
AI.motivation: 现有的AI研究范式倾向于通过扩大模型规模和数据集来追求通用能力，这可能忽视了在特定领域实现深度和高精度的潜力。作者认为，这种“博而不精”的模式在安全关键型应用中可能存在风险，并受到“单向性”（monotropism）认知理论的启发，提出了一种替代性的AI架构。
AI.method: 研究引入了“单向人工智能”的概念，并对其定义特征进行了形式化。通过对比传统的“多向”（polytropic）模型架构，作者提出了单向模型的优势。并通过一个名为Mini-Enedina的3750万参数模型进行了实验验证，该模型在Timoshenko梁分析任务上表现出色，但在其他领域则能力受限。
AI.result: Mini-Enedina模型在Timoshenko梁分析任务上实现了近乎完美的性能。实验证明了单向模型在特定领域内实现高精度的可行性，同时也展示了其在领域外能力的显著局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究认为，通才AI（AGI）并非AI研究的唯一目标。单向AI作为一种高度专业化的模型架构，在安全关键型应用中具有独特优势。研究提倡建立一个AI认知生态系统，让专业化和通用化系统能够互补共存。

title: Embracing Anisotropy: Turning Massive Activations into Interpretable Control Knobs for Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit highly anisotropic internal representations, often characterized by massive activations, a phenomenon where a small subset of feature dimensions possesses magnitudes significantly larger than the rest. While prior works view these extreme dimensions primarily as artifacts to be managed, we propose a distinct perspective: these dimensions serve as intrinsic interpretable functional units arising from domain specialization. Specifically, we propose a simple magnitude-based criterion to identify Domain-Critical Dimensions in a training-free manner. Our analyses reveal that such dimensions behave as interpretable semantic detectors for symbolic/quantitative patterns or domain-specific terms. In addition, we introduce Critical Dimension Steering, which applies activation steering exclusively to the identified dimensions. Empirical results show that this approach outperforms conventional whole-dimension steering in domain adaptation and jailbreaking scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为“领域关键维度”的新概念，认为LLM中具有巨大激活值的维度并非噪声，而是领域专业化的结果，可以作为可解释的语义探测器。研究还提出了一种仅针对这些维度进行激活引导的方法，并在领域适应和越狱任务中取得了优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将LLM中幅度巨大的内部表征维度视为需要处理的“噪声”或“伪影”，而本研究提出一种新视角，认为这些维度是领域专业化的产物，具有内在的可解释功能。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于幅度的训练无关标准，用于识别“领域关键维度”。在此基础上，引入“关键维度引导”技术，仅对识别出的维度应用激活引导。
AI.result: 识别出的领域关键维度表现出可解释的语义探测能力，能够检测符号/定量模式或领域特定术语。与传统的全维度引导相比，关键维度引导在领域适应和越狱场景中表现出更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: LLM中的大规模激活维度是可解释的功能单元，源于领域专业化。通过识别并仅引导这些“领域关键维度”，可以更有效地实现模型在特定任务上的适应和行为调控。

title: PEPA: a Persistently Autonomous Embodied Agent with Personalities
summary: Living organisms exhibit persistent autonomy through internally generated goals and self-sustaining behavioral organization, yet current embodied agents remain driven by externally scripted objectives. This dependence on predefined task specifications limits their capacity for long-term deployment in dynamic, unstructured environments where continuous human intervention is impractical. We propose that personality traits provide an intrinsic organizational principle for achieving persistent autonomy. Analogous to genotypic biases shaping biological behavioral tendencies, personalities enable agents to autonomously generate goals and sustain behavioral evolution without external supervision. To realize this, we develop PEPA, a three-layer cognitive architecture that operates through three interacting systems: Sys3 autonomously synthesizes personality-aligned goals and refines them via episodic memory and daily self-reflection; Sys2 performs deliberative reasoning to translate goals into executable action plans; Sys1 grounds the agent in sensorimotor interaction, executing actions and recording experiences. We validate the framework through real-world deployment on a quadruped robot in a multi-floor office building. Operating without reliance on fixed task specifications, the robot autonomously arbitrates between user requests and personality-driven motivations, navigating elevators and exploring environments accordingly. Quantitative analysis across five distinct personality prototypes demonstrates stable, trait-aligned behaviors. The results confirm that personality-driven cognitive architectures enable sustained autonomous operation characteristic of persistent embodied systems. Code and demo videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/pepa-persistent/.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了PEPA，一个基于人格特质的认知架构，旨在赋予具身智能体（如机器人）在无外部指令下自主生成目标和维持行为的能力，并在真实世界环境中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前具身智能体依赖外部预设目标，限制了它们在动态、非结构化环境中长期自主运行的能力。研究旨在克服这一限制，实现持久自主性。
AI.method: 提出PEPA认知架构，包含三个相互作用的系统：Sys3负责自主生成并反思个性化目标，Sys2负责制定行动计划，Sys1负责执行行动和记录经验。并在真实的四足机器人上进行了多楼层办公环境的部署。
AI.result: 在真实环境中，机器人能够根据用户请求和内在人格动机自主决策，并导航和探索环境。不同人格原型展现出稳定且与其特质相符的行为。
AI.conclusion: 人格驱动的认知架构能够实现持久自主运行，为构建具有持久自主性的具身系统提供了有效途径。

title: Spectral Super-Resolution via Adversarial Unfolding and Data-Driven Spectrum Regularization: From Multispectral Satellite Data to NASA Hyperspectral Image
summary: The European Space Agency's Sentinel-2 satellite provides global multispectral coverage for remote sensing (RS) applications. However, limited spectral resolution (12 bands) and non-unified spatial resolution (60/20/10 m) restrict their practicality. In contrast, the high spectral-spatial resolution sensor (e.g., NASA's AVIRIS-NG) covers only the American region due to practical considerations. This raises a fundamental question: ``Can a global hyperspectral coverage be achieved by reconstructing Sentinel-2 data to NASA hyperspectral images?'' This study aims to achieve spectral super-resolution from 12-to-186 and unify the spatial resolution of Sentinel-2 data to 5 m. To enable a reliable and efficient reconstruction, we formulate a novel deep unfolding framework regularized by a data-driven spectrum prior from PriorNet, instead of relying on implicit deep priors as conventional deep unfolding does. Moreover, an adversarial term is integrated into the unfolded architecture, enabling the discriminator to guide the reconstruction in both the training and testing phases; we term this novel concept unfolding adversarial learning (UAL). Experiments show that our UALNet outperforms the next-best Transformer in PSNR, SSIM, and SAM, while requiring only 15% MACs and 20 times fewer parameters. The associated code will be publicly available at https://sites.google.com/view/chiahsianglin/software.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为UALNet的深度展开框架，通过利用数据驱动的谱先验和对抗性学习，实现了Sentinel-2卫星数据的光谱超分辨率和空间分辨率统一，将光谱分辨率从12波段提升到186波段，并将空间分辨率统一到5米。
AI.motivation: Sentinel-2卫星数据虽然覆盖全球，但其有限的光谱和非统一的空间分辨率限制了其实用性；而高光谱传感器（如AVIRIS-NG）的光谱和空间分辨率高，但覆盖范围有限。研究动机是探索是否能通过重建Sentinel-2数据来实现全球高光谱覆盖。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的深度展开框架UALNet。该框架使用数据驱动的谱先验（PriorNet）进行正则化，避免了传统深度展开依赖隐式深度先验的方法。此外，集成了对抗性学习项，使判别器能在训练和测试阶段指导重建过程，该技术被称为展开对抗学习（UAL）。
AI.result: UALNet在PSNR、SSIM和SAM指标上优于次优的Transformer模型。同时，UALNet所需的计算量（MACs）仅为15%，参数量减少了20倍。
AI.conclusion: UALNet能够有效地实现Sentinel-2数据的光谱超分辨率和空间分辨率统一，显著提高了数据质量，并具有更高的计算效率，为实现全球高光谱数据覆盖提供了可行方案。

title: CT-Flow: Orchestrating CT Interpretation Workflow with Model Context Protocol Servers
summary: Recent advances in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown strong potential for multi-modal radiological reasoning, particularly in tasks like diagnostic visual question answering (VQA) and radiology report generation. However, most existing approaches for 3D CT analysis largely rely on static, single-pass inference. In practice, clinical interpretation is a dynamic, tool-mediated workflow where radiologists iteratively review slices and use measurement, radiomics, and segmentation tools to refine findings. To bridge this gap, we propose CT-Flow, an agentic framework designed for interoperable volumetric interpretation. By leveraging the Model Context Protocol (MCP), CT-Flow shifts from closed-box inference to an open, tool-aware paradigm. We curate CT-FlowBench, the first large-scale instruction-tuning benchmark tailored for 3D CT tool-use and multi-step reasoning. Built upon this, CT-Flow functions as a clinical orchestrator capable of decomposing complex natural language queries into automated tool-use sequences. Experimental evaluations on CT-FlowBench and standard 3D VQA datasets demonstrate that CT-Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing baseline models by 41% in diagnostic accuracy and achieving a 95% success rate in autonomous tool invocation. This work provides a scalable foundation for integrating autonomous, agentic intelligence into real-world clinical radiology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CT-Flow的智能框架，用于3D CT影像的互操作性体积解释，通过利用模型上下文协议（MCP）和一系列自动化工具，实现了比现有方法更准确的诊断和工具调用。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在3D CT分析中主要依赖静态、单次推理，未能捕捉到临床放射科医生动态、多工具辅助的解释流程，因此需要一种能够模拟这种动态工作流程的框架。
AI.method: 提出CT-Flow，一个基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的智能框架，能够将复杂的自然语言查询分解为自动化工具使用序列。同时，构建了一个名为CT-FlowBench的大规模指令调优基准，用于3D CT工具使用和多步推理。
AI.result: 在CT-FlowBench和标准的3D VQA数据集上的实验评估显示，CT-Flow在诊断准确性上超越基线模型41%，并在自主工具调用方面达到95%的成功率，实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: CT-Flow提供了一个可扩展的基础，能够将自主的、智能化的代理能力集成到真实的临床放射学中，实现了对3D CT影像的更有效和准确的解释。

title: Conservative Equilibrium Discovery in Offline Game-Theoretic Multiagent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline learning of strategies takes data efficiency to its extreme by restricting algorithms to a fixed dataset of state-action trajectories. We consider the problem in a mixed-motive multiagent setting, where the goal is to solve a game under the offline learning constraint. We first frame this problem in terms of selecting among candidate equilibria. Since datasets may inform only a small fraction of game dynamics, it is generally infeasible in offline game-solving to even verify a proposed solution is a true equilibrium. Therefore, we consider the relative probability of low regret (i.e., closeness to equilibrium) across candidates based on the information available. Specifically, we extend Policy Space Response Oracles (PSRO), an online game-solving approach, by quantifying game dynamics uncertainty and modifying the RL objective to skew towards solutions more likely to have low regret in the true game. We further propose a novel meta-strategy solver, tailored for the offline setting, to guide strategy exploration in PSRO. Our incorporation of Conservatism principles from Offline reinforcement learning approaches for strategy Exploration gives our approach its name: COffeE-PSRO. Experiments demonstrate COffeE-PSRO's ability to extract lower-regret solutions than state-of-the-art offline approaches and reveal relationships between algorithmic components empirical game fidelity, and overall performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为COffeE-PSRO的离线多人游戏求解方法，该方法通过量化博弈动态不确定性和修改强化学习目标来解决数据效率极低的情况下求解混合动机多人博弈的问题，实验证明其性能优于现有离线方法。
AI.motivation: 在数据效率极低的离线学习约束下，求解混合动机多人博弈问题。由于数据有限，难以验证解是否为真实均衡，因此需要寻找相对概率较低后悔的策略。
AI.method: 1. 将问题建模为在候选均衡中进行选择。2. 扩展了在线博弈求解方法PSRO，通过量化博弈动态不确定性并修改RL目标，偏向于具有低后悔概率的解。3. 提出了一个新颖的元策略求解器，用于指导PSRO中的策略探索。4. 借鉴了离线强化学习中的保守性原则，将其命名为COffeE-PSRO。
AI.result: COffeE-PSRO能够提取比现有最先进的离线方法具有更低后悔的解。实验揭示了算法组件、经验博弈保真度和整体性能之间的关系。
AI.conclusion: COffeE-PSRO是一种有效的离线多人游戏求解方法，特别是在数据有限的情况下，通过量化不确定性和引导策略探索，能够获得比现有方法更好的低后悔解。

title: Observer-Based Active Fault/Disturbance Compensation Control for Fully Actuated Systems
comment: This paper was initially accepted by SCIENCE CHINA Information Sciences on 09-Oct-2025, editorially revised on 28-Feb-2026, and has been scheduled for publication in Volume 69, Issue 5 (2026). *Corresponding author: Guang-Ren Duan
summary: This paper is concerned with fault/disturbance compensation control for fully actuated systems. In particular, we explore observer-based control, incorporating an active compensation mechanism. First, we propose a novel observer with enhanced design flexibility for the fully actuated system model, enabling simultaneous estimation of system states and exogenous unknown signals, such as faults or disturbances. Then, a nonlinear controller is developed with an active fault or disturbance compensation term, leveraging the fully actuated system approach. The asymptotic stability of both the state estimation error and the closed-loop control system is systematically established. Finally, the feasibility and merits of the proposed method are validated through comparative simulations and experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于全驱动系统的基于观测器的故障/扰动补偿控制方法，该方法能够同时估计系统状态和未知信号，并通过非线性控制器实现主动补偿，并证明了系统的渐近稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究的动机是为了解决全驱动系统中存在的故障或扰动问题，并提出一种能够有效估计和补偿这些未知信号的控制策略。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的观测器，能够同时估计系统状态和未知信号（如故障或扰动）。基于此观测器，设计了一个非线性控制器，包含主动补偿项，利用全驱动系统的特性。通过数学推导证明了状态估计误差和闭环系统的渐近稳定性。
AI.result: 所提出的观测器和控制器能够成功地估计系统状态和未知信号，并实现对故障或扰动的有效补偿。仿真和实验结果表明，该方法在稳定性和性能方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一种适用于全驱动系统的观测器-控制器联合设计方法，能够有效地进行故障/扰动补偿，并保证了系统的渐近稳定性，该方法具有实际应用的可行性和优越性。

title: Multiview Progress Prediction of Robot Activities
summary: For robots to operate effectively and safely alongside humans, they must be able to understand the progress of ongoing actions. This ability, known as action progress prediction, is critical for tasks ranging from timely assistance to autonomous decision-making. However, modeling action progression in robotics has often been overlooked. Moreover, a single camera may be insufficient for understanding robot's ego-actions, as self-occlusion can significantly hinder perception and model performance. In this paper, we propose a multi-view architecture for action progress prediction in robot manipulation tasks. Experiments on Mobile ALOHA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人操作任务的多视角动作进度预测架构，以解决现有方法在处理自我遮挡和动作进度建模方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 为了让机器人能够与人类协同工作，它们需要理解正在进行的动作的进度。然而，动作进度建模在机器人领域被忽视，并且单一视角可能不足以应对自我遮挡问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种多视角架构，用于在机器人操作任务中进行动作进度预测。
AI.result: 在 Mobile ALOHA 数据集上的实验证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多视角架构是机器人操作任务中动作进度预测的有效方法，能够克服单一视角带来的限制。

title: MR-Compass: Inertial Navigation-Driven Motion Correction for Brain MRI
summary: Inertial sensors can track object kinematics, however, unbounded drift from integrating noisy signals makes them impractical for MRI motion correction at millimeter resolution and minute-long scans. We introduce MR-Compass, which exploits the MRI system's static magnetic and gravitational fields to estimate 3-DOF orientation at 2 kHz directly, without integration, eliminating random-walk. The remaining 3-DOF translation is recovered via phase correlation from the MRI data. We experimentally validate the efficacy of the method retrospectively using a 3D radial koosh-ball sequence and prospectively using 2D EPI fMRI during large volunteer motions. MR-Compass followed by phase-correlation achieved a mean accuracy of 0.6$^o$ and 0.4 pixels across all experiments. Image quality improved when motion correction was applied in all volunteer scans for both retrospective and prospective correction cases. MR-Compass was effective in measuring head motion in the MRI scanner with high accuracy at unprecedented sample rates, and enabled both retrospective and prospective reconstruction to improve image quality by aligning the k-space data appropriately and by reducing the motion related artifacts.

AI.tldr: MR-Compass 使用 MRI 系统的静态磁场和重力场直接估计 MRI 扫描中的 3 自由度定向，无需积分，从而解决了惯性传感器漂移问题。结合相位相关法恢复 3 自由度平移，在实验中实现了高精度运动校正，并提高了图像质量。
AI.motivation: 惯性传感器在 MRI 运动校正中存在积分噪声导致的漂移问题，限制了其在毫米级分辨率和分钟级扫描中的应用。
AI.method: MR-Compass 利用 MRI 系统的静态磁场和重力场直接估计 3 自由度方向，采样频率高达 2 kHz，避免了积分漂移。通过 MRI 数据的相位相关法恢复剩余的 3 自由度平移。
AI.result: MR-Compass 结合相位相关法在所有实验中实现了平均 0.6 度的方向精度和 0.4 像素的平移精度。在志愿者扫描中，无论前瞻性还是回顾性运动校正，图像质量均得到改善。
AI.conclusion: MR-Compass 能够以高精度、高采样率测量 MRI 扫描仪中的头部运动，有效解决了惯性传感器漂移问题，并通过对 k 空间数据进行对齐和减少运动相关伪影，提升了图像质量，实现了前瞻性和回顾性的图像重建。

title: SimpleTool: Parallel Decoding for Real-Time LLM Function Calling
summary: LLM-based function calling enables intelligent agents to interact with external tools and environments, yet autoregressive decoding imposes a fundamental latency bottleneck that limits real-time applications such as embodied intelligence, game AI, and interactive avatars (e.g., 10 Hz control frequency). We observe that function calling differs fundamentally from free-form text generation: structured outputs exhibit substantial token redundancy (delimiters, parameter names), and arguments exhibit weak causal dependencies. Crucially, these two properties must be exploited jointly to achieve real-time performance. We present SimpleTool, which introduces special tokens that serve a dual role: compressing low-entropy tokens (4-6x reduction) while acting as mode selectors that enable independent parallel generation of function name and arguments. This synergistic design achieves 3-6x end-to-end speedup (up to 9.6x) with only +8.2% parallelization overhead. Experiments on five benchmarks across Qwen-series models (0.5B-14B) demonstrate substantial speedup while maintaining competitive or improved accuracy. On Mobile Actions, ST-Qwen-0.5B outperforms Google's FunctionGemma in both accuracy and latency consistency. With quantization on consumer-grade GPU, SimpleTool achieves 61.2ms P50 latency, enabling 16 Hz real-time control at 4B model scale, bridging the gap between LLM function calling and latency-critical real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出SimpleTool，一种通过特殊令牌利用函数调用中的令牌冗余和参数依赖性来加速LLM函数调用的方法，实现了3-6倍的速度提升，并能在消费级GPU上实现16Hz的实时控制。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM函数调用依赖自回归解码，存在延迟瓶颈，限制了实时应用（如具身智能、游戏AI、交互式虚拟形象）的性能。
AI.method: SimpleTool引入特殊令牌，该令牌具有双重作用：压缩低熵令牌（4-6倍缩减）并作为模式选择器，实现函数名和参数的独立并行生成。这种协同设计实现了端到端3-6倍（最高9.6倍）的速度提升。
AI.result: 在Qwen系列模型（0.5B-14B）的五个基准测试中，SimpleTool显著提高了速度，同时保持了具有竞争力的准确性。在Mobile Actions任务上，ST-Qwen-0.5B在准确性和延迟一致性方面优于FunctionGemma。通过量化，SimpleTool在消费级GPU上实现了61.2ms的P50延迟，使得4B模型能够实现16Hz的实时控制。
AI.conclusion: SimpleTool通过有效利用LLM函数调用的结构化特性，成功克服了自回归解码的延迟限制，为LLM在实时性要求高的应用场景中的部署提供了可行方案。

title: NeuroHex: Highly-Efficient Hex Coordinate System for Creating World Models to Enable Adaptive AI
summary: \textit{NeuroHex} is a hexagonal coordinate system designed to support highly efficient world models and reference frames for online adaptive AI systems. Inspired by the hexadirectional firing structure of grid cells in the human brain, NeuroHex adopts a cubic isometric hexagonal coordinate formulation that provides full 60° rotational symmetry and low-cost translation, rotation and distance computation. We develop a mathematical framework that incorporates ring indexing, quantized angular encoding, and a hierarchical library of foundational, simple, and complex geometric shape primitives. These constructs allow low-overhead point-in-shape tests and spatial matching operations that are expensive in Cartesian coordinate systems. To support realistic settings, the NeuroHex framework can process OpenStreetMap (OSM) data sets using an OSM-to-NeuroHex (\textit{OSM2Hex}) conversion tool. The OSM2Hex spatial abstraction processing pipeline can achieve a reduction of 90-99\% in geometric complexity while maintaining the relevant spatial structure map for navigation. Our initial results, based on actual city and neighborhood scale data sets, demonstrate that NeuroHex offers a highly efficient substrate for building dynamic world models to enable adaptive spatial reasoning in autonomous AI systems with continuous online learning capability.

AI.tldr: NeuroHex是一个受人脑网格细胞启发的六边形坐标系，旨在为自适应AI系统提供高效的世界模型和参考系。它通过立方体等轴六边形坐标、环索引、量化角度编码和几何形状原语库，实现了低成本的计算和高效的空间测试，显著降低了OSM数据的几何复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在处理复杂空间信息和进行在线自适应学习时效率不高，作者受到人脑网格细胞的启发，希望设计一种更高效的坐标系统来支持AI的空间推理能力。
AI.method: 提出NeuroHex六边形坐标系统，采用立方体等轴六边形坐标，结合环索引、量化角度编码和几何形状原语库。开发了OSM2Hex工具，将OpenStreetMap数据转换为NeuroHex格式，以降低几何复杂度。
AI.result: NeuroHex系统实现了60°旋转对称性和低成本的平移、旋转和距离计算。OSM2Hex工具能够将OSM数据的几何复杂度降低90-99%，同时保留导航所需的空间结构。实验结果表明NeuroHex能显著提高AI系统处理城市规模数据集的空间推理效率。
AI.conclusion: NeuroHex提供了一个高效的底层系统，能够支持动态世界模型的构建，并使自主AI系统具备连续在线学习和适应性空间推理能力。

title: OrthoAI: A Lightweight Deep Learning Framework for Automated Biomechanical Analysis in Clear Aligner Orthodontics -- A Methodological Proof-of-Concept
summary: Clear aligner therapy now dominates orthodontics, yet clinician review of digitally planned tooth movements-typically via ClinCheck (Align Technology)-remains slow and error-prone. We present OrthoAI, an open-source proof-of-concept decision-support system combining lightweight 3D dental segmentation with automated biomechanical analysis to assist treatment-plan evaluation. The framework uses a Dynamic Graph CNN trained on landmark-reconstructed point clouds from 3DTeethLand (MICCAI) and integrates a rule-based biomechanical engine grounded in orthodontic evidence (Kravitz et al 2009; Simon et al 2014). The system decomposes per-tooth motion across six degrees of freedom, computes movement-specific predictability, issues alerts when biomechanical limits are exceeded, and derives an exploratory composite index. With 60,705 trainable parameters, segmentation reaches a Tooth Identification Rate of $81.4\%$ and mIoU of $8.25\%$ on surrogate point clouds-reflecting sparse landmark supervision rather than dense meshes. Although spatial boundaries are coarse, downstream analysis depends mainly on tooth identity and approximate centroid/axis estimation. Results establish a baseline for future full-mesh training and highlight current perceptual limits. The end-to-end pipeline runs in $<4s$ on consumer hardware. Code, weights, and analysis tools are released to support reproducible research in geometric deep learning and digital orthodontics. The system has not been validated on real intraoral meshes and should not be assumed to generalize beyond landmark-derived representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 OrthoAI，一个开源的辅助决策系统，利用轻量级 3D 牙齿分割和自动生物力学分析来加速和提高清晰矫治器治疗计划的审查效率，该系统在消费级硬件上运行速度快，并已发布相关代码以支持研究。
AI.motivation: 当前的清晰矫治器治疗计划审查过程缓慢且容易出错，需要一种更有效的辅助工具来支持牙医。
AI.method: 使用动态图卷积神经网络（Dynamic Graph CNN）在 3DTeethLand 生成的基准点云上进行训练，并结合基于规则的生物力学引擎，该引擎基于现有的正畸学证据。系统能够对牙齿在六个自由度上的运动进行分解，计算运动可预测性，并在超出生物力学限制时发出警报，最后生成一个综合指数。
AI.result: 在基准点云上，分割达到了 81.4% 的牙齿识别率和 8.25% 的 mIoU。该端到端流程在消费级硬件上运行时间少于 4 秒。研究结果为未来的全网格训练奠定了基础，并指出了当前在感知限制方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: OrthoAI 是一个具有潜力的辅助决策系统，能够提高清晰矫治器治疗计划审查的效率。尽管目前的分割精度有限，但该系统为几何深度学习和数字正畸学领域的研究提供了一个开放的平台，但尚未在真实口腔网格上进行验证，且不应假定其泛化能力超出基于基准点的方法。

title: Digital Twin-Based Cooling System Optimization for Data Center
summary: Data center cooling systems consume significant auxiliary energy, yet optimization studies rarely quantify the gap between theoretically optimal and operationally deployable control strategies. This paper develops a digital twin of the liquid cooling infrastructure at the Frontier exascale supercomputer, in which a hot-temperature water system comprises three parallel subloops, each serving dedicated coolant distribution unit clusters through plate heat exchangers and variable-speed pumps. The surrogate model is built based on Modelica and validated through one full calendar year of 10-minute operational data following ASHRAE Guideline 14. The model achieves a subloop coefficient of variation of the root mean square error below 2.7% and a normalized mean bias error within 2.5%. Using this validated surrogate model, a layered optimization framework evaluates three progressively constrained strategies: an analytical flow-only optimization achieves 20.4% total energy saving, unconstrained joint optimization of flow rate and supply temperature demonstrates 30.1% total energy saving, and ramp-constrained optimization of flow rate and supply temperature, enforcing actuator rate limits, can reach total energy saving of 27.8%. The analysis reveals that the baseline system operates at 2.9 times the minimum thermally safe flow rate, and the co-optimizing supply temperature with flow rate nearly doubles the savings achievable by flow reduction alone.

AI.tldr: 该研究为Frontier超级计算机的液冷系统构建了一个经验证的数字孪生模型，并利用该模型评估了不同控制策略下的节能潜力，发现联合优化流量和供水温度可实现显著的能源节约。
AI.motivation: 数据中心冷却系统能耗巨大，但现有研究很少量化理论最优与实际可部署控制策略之间的差距。
AI.method: 1. 构建Frontier超级计算机液冷基础设施的数字孪生模型（基于Modelica）。 2. 使用长达一年的运行数据（10分钟粒度）并遵循ASHRAE Guideline 14验证模型。 3. 采用分层优化框架，评估了三种控制策略：仅流量优化、无约束的流量和供水温度联合优化、以及考虑执行器速率限制的斜率约束联合优化。
AI.result: 经验证的数字孪生模型精度高（CV(RMSE) < 2.7%, NMBE < 2.5%）。仅流量优化可节能20.4%；无约束联合优化可节能30.1%；考虑斜率约束的联合优化可节能27.8%。现有系统流量是最低安全流量的2.9倍。与单独降流量相比，联合优化流量和供水温度可使节能效果近乎翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过数字孪生模型和优化框架，证实了联合优化冷却系统流量和供水温度是实现显著节能的关键，并且比仅优化流量更能有效降低能耗。同时，研究也揭示了当前系统在流量配置上存在较大的优化空间。

title: Trust in Autonomous Human--Robot Collaboration: Effects of Responsive Interaction Policies
summary: Trust plays a central role in human--robot collaboration, yet its formation is rarely examined under the constraints of fully autonomous interaction. This pilot study investigated how interaction policy influences trust during in-person collaboration with a social robot operating without Wizard-of-Oz control or scripted repair. Participants completed a multi-stage collaborative task with a mobile robot that autonomously managed spoken-language dialogue, affect inference, and task progression. Two interaction policies were compared: a responsive policy, in which the robot proactively adapted its dialogue and assistance based on inferred interaction state, and a neutral, reactive policy, in which the robot provided only direct, task-relevant responses when prompted. Responsive interaction was associated with significantly higher post-interaction trust under viable communication conditions, despite no reliable differences in overall task accuracy. Sensitivity analyses indicated that affective and experiential components of trust were more sensitive to communication breakdown than evaluative judgments of reliability, and that as language-mediated interaction degraded, the trust advantage associated with responsiveness attenuated and ratings became less clearly interpretable as calibrated evaluations of collaborative competence. These findings suggest that trust in autonomous human--robot interaction emerges from process-level interaction dynamics and operates within constraints imposed by communication viability, highlighting the importance of evaluating trust under real autonomy conditions when designing interactive robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在完全自主的人机协作中，互动策略对信任形成的影响。结果表明，在通信良好的情况下，响应式互动策略比中立、被动式互动策略能显著提高事后信任度，即使在任务准确性上没有显著差异。
AI.motivation: 在完全自主的人机协作中，信任的形成机制研究尚不充分，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过一项多阶段的协作任务，比较了两种互动策略（响应式和中立/被动式）对参与者与一台完全自主的社交机器人互动时信任度的影响。机器人自主管理对话、情感推断和任务进展。
AI.result: 响应式互动策略在通信良好的条件下，能够显著提高参与者事后的信任度，而任务准确性方面没有发现可靠差异。信任的感性（affective）和经验性（experiential）维度比评估性（evaluative）维度更容易受到通信中断的影响。随着语言交互的恶化，响应式互动带来的信任优势减弱。
AI.conclusion: 在完全自主的人机交互中，信任的产生源于互动过程的动态变化，并受到通信可行性的制约。在设计交互式机器人系统时，有必要在真实的自主条件下评估信任度。

title: Revisiting Global Token Mixing in Task-Dependent MRI Restoration: Insights from Minimal Gated CNN Baselines
summary: Global token mixing, implemented via self-attention or state-space sequence models, has become a popular model design choice for MRI restoration. However, MRI restoration tasks differ substantially in how their degradations vary over image and k-space domains, and in the degree to which global coupling is already imposed by physics-driven data consistency terms. In this work, we ask the question whether global token mixing is actually beneficial in each individual task across three representative settings: accelerated MRI reconstruction with explicit data consistency, MRI super-resolution with k-space center cropping, and denoising of clinical carotid MRI data with spatially heteroscedastic noise. To reduce confounding factors, we establish a controlled testbed comparing a minimal local gated CNN and its large-field variant, benchmarking them directly against state-of-the-art global models under aligned training and evaluation protocols. For accelerated MRI reconstruction, the minimal unrolled gated-CNN baseline is already highly competitive compared to recent token-mixing approaches in public reconstruction benchmarks, suggesting limited additional benefits when the forward model and data-consistency steps provide strong global constraints. For super-resolution, where low-frequency k-space data are largely preserved by the controlled low-pass degradation, local gated models remain competitive, and a lightweight large-field variant yields only modest improvements. In contrast, for denoising with pronounced spatially heteroscedastic noise, token-mixing models achieve the strongest overall performance, consistent with the need to estimate spatially varying reliability. In conclusion, our results demonstrate that the utility of global token mixing in MRI restoration is task-dependent, and it should be tailored to the underlying imaging physics and degradation structure.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实验对比了全局与局部特征提取方法在三种不同的MRI重建任务中的表现，发现全局特征提取（如自注意力）在噪声复杂且空间变化的去噪任务中效果显著，但在有物理约束的加速重建和k空间中心裁剪的超分辨率任务中，局部方法已足够且全局方法的优势不明显，表明全局特征提取的必要性取决于具体的MRI重建任务、成像物理学和退化特性。
AI.motivation: 目前的MRI重建模型倾向于使用全局特征提取（如自注意力），但不同MRI重建任务的退化方式和物理约束不同，全局特征提取是否总是有益尚不明确。研究旨在探究在加速重建、超分辨率和去噪这三个代表性任务中，全局特征提取的实际效益。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个受控的测试平台，对比了一个最小化的局部门控CNN及其大视野变体，并将其与最先进的全局模型在相同的训练和评估协议下进行比较，以减少混淆因素。测试了三个任务：带数据一致性的加速MRI重建，k空间中心裁剪的MRI超分辨率，以及临床颈动脉MRI数据的异方差噪声去噪。
AI.result: 对于加速MRI重建，即使是最小化的局部CNN基线也与最新的全局模型相当，表明当数据一致性提供强全局约束时，全局方法的额外增益有限。对于超分辨率任务，局部模型依然有竞争力，大视野变体仅带来微小改进。然而，在具有明显空间异方差噪声的去噪任务中，全局模型表现最佳，这与需要估计空间变化的可靠性一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，全局特征提取在MRI重建中的效用是任务依赖的，应根据成像物理学和退化结构进行定制。并不是所有任务都需要全局特征提取，应根据具体情况选择最有效的方法。

title: QuickGrasp: Responsive Video-Language Querying Service via Accelerated Tokenization and Edge-Augmented Inference
summary: Video-language models (VLMs) are reshaping video querying services, bringing unified solutions to complex perception and reasoning tasks. However, deploying large VLMs in real-world systems remains challenging due to their high resource demands, and remote-based deployment often results in unacceptable response delays. Although small, locally deployable VLMs offer faster responses, they unavoidably fall short in accuracy. To reconcile this trade-off, we propose QuickGrasp, a responsive, quality of service (QoS)-aware system that bridges this gap through a local-first architecture with on-demand edge augmentation. Built upon the highly modular architecture of VLMs, QuickGrasp shares the vision representation across model variants to avoid redundant computation. To maximize system-wide efficiency, QuickGrasp introduces three key designs: accelerated video tokenization, query-adaptive edge augmentation, and delay-aware, accuracy-preserving vision token density configuration. We implement a prototype of QuickGrasp and evaluate it across multiple video understanding benchmarks. The results show that QuickGrasp matches the accuracy of large VLMs while achieving up to a 12.8x reduction in response delay. QuickGrasp represents a key advancement toward building responsive video querying services for open-world understanding that fully leverage the capabilities of VLMs.

AI.tldr: QuickGrasp 是一种服务质量 (QoS) 感知的系统，通过本地优先架构和按需边缘增强，解决了部署大型视频语言模型 (VLM) 的延迟和准确性问题，能够在保持大型 VLM 准确性的同时显著降低响应延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型 VLM 在视频查询服务中表现出色，但其高资源需求导致部署困难且响应延迟不可接受。小型 VLM 本地部署速度快但准确性不足。研究旨在解决这种准确性和延迟之间的权衡。
AI.method: QuickGrasp 采用本地优先架构，并结合按需边缘增强。其关键设计包括：共享的视觉表示以避免冗余计算；加速视频标记化；查询自适应边缘增强；以及延迟感知、精度保持的视觉标记密度配置。
AI.result: QuickGrasp 在多个视频理解基准测试中的表现表明，其准确性可与大型 VLM 相媲美，同时响应延迟降低高达 12.8 倍。
AI.conclusion: QuickGrasp 是构建响应式视频查询服务的关键进展，它能充分利用 VLM 的能力，实现开放世界的理解，并显著提升用户体验。

title: Confusion-Aware Rubric Optimization for LLM-based Automated Grading
summary: Accurate and unambiguous guidelines are critical for large language model (LLM) based graders, yet manually crafting these prompts is often sub-optimal as LLMs can misinterpret expert guidelines or lack necessary domain specificity. Consequently, the field has moved toward automated prompt optimization to refine grading guidelines without the burden of manual trial and error. However, existing frameworks typically aggregate independent and unstructured error samples into a single update step, resulting in "rule dilution" where conflicting constraints weaken the model's grading logic. To address these limitations, we introduce Confusion-Aware Rubric Optimization (CARO), a novel framework that enhances accuracy and computational efficiency by structurally separating error signals. CARO leverages the confusion matrix to decompose monolithic error signals into distinct modes, allowing for the diagnosis and repair of specific misclassification patterns individually. By synthesizing targeted "fixing patches" for dominant error modes and employing a diversity-aware selection mechanism, the framework prevents guidance conflict and eliminates the need for resource-heavy nested refinement loops. Empirical evaluations on teacher education and STEM datasets demonstrate that CARO significantly outperforms existing SOTA methods. These results suggest that replacing mixed-error aggregation with surgical, mode-specific repair yields robust improvements in automated assessment scalability and precision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CARO（Confusion-Aware Rubric Optimization）的新框架，用于优化大型语言模型（LLM）的评分指南。CARO通过将错误信号分解为不同的模式，并针对性地修复，解决了现有方法中“规则稀释”的问题，提高了评分的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 手动创建LLM评分指南既耗时又不准确，LLM可能误解指南或缺乏领域特异性。现有的自动优化方法存在“规则稀释”问题，即混合错误信号会削弱模型评分逻辑。因此，需要一种更有效的方法来优化评分指南。
AI.method: CARO框架利用混淆矩阵将单一的错误信号分解为不同的模式，然后针对占主导地位的错误模式合成“修复补丁”。该框架还采用了一种“多样性感知”的选择机制，避免了指导冲突和资源消耗大的嵌套优化过程。
AI.result: 在教师教育和STEM数据集上的实证评估表明，CARO显著优于现有最先进（SOTA）的方法。通过将混合错误聚合替换为有针对性的、模式特定的修复，CARO在自动化评估的可扩展性和精确性方面取得了稳健的提升。
AI.conclusion: 将混合错误聚合替换为针对不同错误模式的、手术式的修复，可以显著提高LLM评分的准确性和效率，并具有更好的可扩展性。

title: GRIP: Geometric Refinement and Adaptive Information Potential for Data Efficiency
summary: The performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) is increasingly governed by data efficiency rather than raw scaling volume. However, existing selection methods often decouple global distribution balancing from local instance selection, compromising the hierarchical integrity of the training set. We introduce \textbf{GRIP} (Geometric Refinement and Adaptive Information Potential), a framework that unifies these dimensions by modeling the corpus as an information-dense geometric space. GRIP employs a \textbf{Rapid Adaptation Probe (RAP)} to quantify the information potential of semantic clusters, dynamically re-allocating the sampling budget to regions with the highest representation deficits. Subsequently, we perform Intra-Cluster Selection using a \textbf{length-rectified geometric prior} to counteract embedding density artifacts and preserve long-tail logical sequences. Extensive evaluations on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models up to 300B tokens demonstrate that GRIP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, \textbf{surpassing the performance of models trained on $3\times$ larger uncurated datasets}. Our work establishes a robust geometric foundation for adaptive data curation in large-scale pre-training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GRIP的框架，用于在LLM预训练中进行高效的数据选择，该框架将全局分布均衡与局部实例选择统一起来，并通过信息密度和语义集群来动态调整采样预算，最终在不增加数据量的情况下显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型（LLM）性能瓶颈在于数据效率而非原始数据量。现有的数据选择方法将全局分布均衡与局部实例选择分离开来，破坏了训练集的层级结构，导致数据效率不高。
AI.method: 提出GRIP（Geometric Refinement and Adaptive Information Potential）框架，将语料库建模为一个信息密集的几何空间。使用Rapid Adaptation Probe（RAP）量化语义集群的信息潜力，并动态分配采样预算给代表性不足的区域。然后，使用长度校正的几何先验进行簇内选择，以消除嵌入密度伪影并保留长尾逻辑序列。
AI.result: 在高达300B token的MoE模型上进行的大量评估表明，GRIP始终优于最先进的基线方法，其性能超越了在3倍于GRIP所选数据的未筛选数据集上训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: GRIP框架为大规模预训练中的自适应数据策展奠定了坚实的几何基础，实现了在不增加数据量的情况下提高数据效率和模型性能。

title: Segmenting Low-Contrast XCTs of Concretes: An Unsupervised Approach
summary: This work tests a self-annotation-based unsupervised methodology for training a convolutional neural network (CNN) model for semantic segmentation of X-ray computed tomography (XCT) scans of concretes. Concrete poses a unique challenge for XCT imaging due to similar X-ray attenuation coefficients of aggregates and mortar, resulting in low-contrast between the two phases in the ensuing images. While CNN-based models are a proven technique for semantic segmentation in such challenging cases, they typically require labeled training data, which is often unavailable for new datasets or are costly to obtain. To counter that limitation, a self-annotation technique is used here which leverages superpixel algorithms to identify perceptually similar local regions in an image and relates them to the global context in the image by utilizing the receptive field of a CNN-based model. This enables the model to learn a global-local relationship in the images and enables identification of semantically similar structures. We therefore present the performance of the unsupervised training methodology on our XCT datasets and discuss potential avenues for further improvements.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于自标注的无监督方法，用于训练卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，以对混凝土的X射线断层扫描（XCT）图像进行语义分割。
AI.motivation: 由于骨料和砂浆在XCT图像中具有相似的X射线衰减系数，导致低对比度，混凝土的语义分割是一个挑战。传统的CNN模型需要大量标注数据，而这对于新数据集来说通常是不可用的或成本高昂的。
AI.method: 研究人员提出了一种自标注技术，该技术利用超像素算法识别图像中的感知相似的局部区域，并通过CNN模型的感受野将它们与图像的全局上下文联系起来。这使得模型能够学习图像中的全局-局部关系，并识别语义相似的结构。
AI.result: 该研究展示了无监督训练方法在XCT数据集上的性能，并讨论了进一步改进的潜在途径。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自标注无监督方法能够克服标注数据不足的限制，实现混凝土XCT图像的语义分割，并能学习图像的全局-局部关系。

title: EgoMoD: Predicting Global Maps of Dynamics from Local Egocentric Observations
summary: Efficient navigation in dynamic environments requires anticipating how motion patterns evolve beyond the robot's immediate perceptual range, enabling preemptive rather than purely reactive planning in crowded scenes. Maps of Dynamics (MoDs) offer a structured representation of motion tendencies in space useful for long-term global planning, but constructing them traditionally requires global environment observations over extended periods of time. We introduce EgoMoD, the first approach that learns to predict future MoDs directly from short egocentric video clips collected during robot operation. Our method learns to infer environment-wide motion tendencies from local dynamic cues using a video- and pose-conditioned architecture trained with MoDs computed from external observations as privileged supervision, allowing local observations to serve as predictive signals of global motion structure. Thanks to this, we offer the capacity to forecast future motion dynamics over the whole environment rather than merely extend past patterns in the robot's field of view. Experiments in large simulated environments show that EgoMoD accurately predicts future MoDs under limited observability, while evaluation with real images showcases its zero-shot transferability to real systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 EgoMoD 的方法，能够从机器人短时间内的第一人称视频片段中学习预测未来动态地图（Maps of Dynamics, MoDs），从而实现对动态环境中运动趋势的预测。
AI.motivation: 在动态环境中高效导航需要预测机器人视野之外的运动模式，以便进行前瞻性规划，而不是仅仅被动反应。传统的 MoD 构建方法需要长时间的全局环境观测，这在实际操作中往往不可行。
AI.method: EgoMoD 使用一种视频和姿态条件化的神经网络架构，从局部动态线索推断全局运动趋势。该模型使用从外部观测计算出的 MoD 作为特权监督进行训练，使局部观测能够预测全局运动结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，EgoMoD 在观察受限的情况下能够准确预测未来的 MoD，并且在真实图像上的评估显示了其零样本迁移到真实系统的能力。
AI.conclusion: EgoMoD 是第一个能够从短 egocentric 视频片段中学习预测未来 MoD 的方法，为在动态环境中进行更有效的长期规划提供了新的可能性，并且能够直接应用于真实机器人系统。

title: AC-Informed DC Optimal Transmission Switching via Admittance Sensitivity-Augmented Constraints and Repair Costs
summary: AC optimal transmission switching (AC-OTS) is a computationally challenging problem due to the nonconvexity and nonlinearity of AC power-flow (PF) equations coupled with a large number of binary variables. A computationally efficient alternative is the DC-OTS model, which uses the DC PF equations, but it can yield infeasible or suboptimal switching decisions when evaluated under the full AC optimal power flow (AC-OPF). To tackle this issue, we propose an AC-Informed DC Optimal Transmission Switching (AIDC-OTS) scheme that enhances the DC-OTS model by leveraging first- and second-order admittance sensitivities-based constraints and repair/penalty costs that guide the DC OTS towards AC-feasible topologies. The resulting model initially is a Mixed-Integer Quadratically Constrained Quadratic Program (MIQCQP), which we further reformulate into solver-friendly representations, such as a Mixed-Integer Second-Order Cone Program (MISOCP) and a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP). This proposed scheme yields switching topologies that are AC-feasible, while maintaining computational tractability. We validate the proposed scheme using extensive simulations across a large set of PGlib test cases, demonstrating its effectiveness, with performance benchmarks against original DC-OTS and other OTS formulations such as LPAC-OTS and QC-OTS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为AIDC-OTS的AC信息直流最优输电切换方案，通过引入AC功率流的灵敏度约束和修复/惩罚成本来改进直流最优输电切换模型，使其导向AC可行拓扑，并能被有效求解。
AI.motivation: 传统的直流最优输电切换（DC-OTS）模型计算效率高，但可能产生在AC潮流下不可行或次优的切换决策。AC最优输电切换（AC-OTS）计算复杂。
AI.method: 提出AIDC-OTS方案，通过引入基于第一和第二阶导纳灵敏度的约束，以及修复/惩罚成本，来增强DC-OTS模型。将模型重构为混合整数二次约束二次规划（MIQCQP），并进一步转化为混合整数二阶锥规划（MISOCP）和混合整数线性规划（MILP）。
AI.result: 提出的AIDC-OTS方案能够生成AC可行且在计算上可处理的切换拓扑。在PGlib测试案例上的广泛仿真表明，其性能优于原始DC-OTS以及LPAC-OTS和QC-OTS等其他OTS方法。
AI.conclusion: AIDC-OTS方案通过融合AC潮流的洞察力，在保持计算效率的同时，显著提高了直流最优输电切换决策的AC可行性和有效性。

title: Near-Field Focusing Operators for Planar Multi-Static Microwave Imaging Using Back-Projection in the Spatial Domain
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE. This is the author's version which has not been fully edited and content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.23919/EuCAP63536.2025.10999865. Copyright \c{opyright}2025 IEEE
summary: Based on a plane-wave expansion of the observation data in quasi-planar multi-static scattering scenarios, an improved formalism for image creation utilizing back-projection in the spatial domain is derived. The underlying integral expressions for different focusing operators are derived analytically leading to magnitude correction factors, which are mostly relevant for reconstructing microwave images when the distance from the scattering object to the aperture plane is small. It is shown that the derived imaging procedure is superior to the traditional back-projection only compensating the phase delay of the measurement signals and validate our findings based on simulated as well as measured data. Since the derived focusing operators correspond to a low-pass filtering of the spatial images, the resulting modified multi-static back-projection algorithms effectively suppress imaging artifacts as well.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种改进的基于空间域后投影的成像方法，用于准平面多站散射场景，通过解析推导的幅值校正因子来提高图像质量，尤其是在散射体到孔径平面的距离较小时。该方法优于传统后投影，并能有效抑制成像伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于后投影的成像方法在补偿相位延迟方面存在不足，尤其是在散射体与孔径平面距离较近时，导致图像质量不高，并存在成像伪影。需要一种改进的成像方法来提高图像质量和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1. 基于准平面多站散射场景下的观测数据，利用平面波展开推导出一种改进的基于空间域后投影的成像形式。 2. 解析推导出不同聚焦算子的积分表达式，得到幅值校正因子。 3. 将该成像过程与仅补偿相位延迟的传统后投影进行比较。 4. 基于模拟和测量数据验证改进方法的有效性。
AI.result: 1. 推导出的成像方法优于仅补偿相位延迟的传统后投影。 2. 幅值校正因子对于重建微波图像尤其重要，当散射体到孔径平面的距离较小时。 3. 改进的成像算法（多静态后投影）通过低通滤波抑制了成像伪影。
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进的基于空间域后投影的成像方法能够有效地提高 quasi-planar 多站散射场景下的成像质量，尤其在散射体距离孔径平面较近时，并能有效抑制成像伪影，验证了其优越性。

title: Least-Cost Overvoltage Control in PV-Rich Distribution Networks via Unbalanced Optimal Power Flow
comment: Published in journal Sustainable Energy, Grids and Networks
summary: The increasing penetration of photovoltaic (PV) generation in low-voltage distribution networks presents operational challenges, with overvoltages being among the most critical. This study introduces a tool based on Unbalanced Optimal Power Flow (UBOPF) to assess cost-effective local inverter control strategies specifically aimed at mitigating overvoltage issues. Two approaches are examined: dynamic active power curtailment and combined active and reactive power control. These strategies are tested on a residential low-voltage network with high PV penetration, where the UBOPF model with voltage-magnitude constraints was implemented in Julia using the JuMP optimization package. The results demonstrate that both methods are effective in maintaining voltage levels within regulatory limits, with the latter leading to lower PV curtailment. The analysis highlights the need to consider these control actions as ancillary services to the grid, which should be properly compensated given their effect on generator revenues.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不平衡最优潮流（UBOPF）的工具，用于评估成本效益高的本地逆变器控制策略，以缓解低压配电网中光伏发电引起的过电压问题，并比较了动态有功功率削减和有功/无功联合控制的效果。
AI.motivation: 低压配电网中光伏发电渗透率的提高导致了操作挑战，特别是过电压问题。需要开发成本效益高的本地控制策略来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于不平衡最优潮流（UBOPF）的工具，并在Julia中使用JuMP优化包实现。该工具用于评估动态有功功率削减和有功/无功联合控制两种策略，以缓解过电压。在具有高光伏渗透率的住宅低压网络上进行了测试。
AI.result: 两种控制策略均能有效将电压水平维持在规定范围内。有功/无功联合控制策略导致的光伏削减量较低。分析强调了将这些控制措施视为电网辅助服务的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 基于UBOPF的本地逆变器控制策略（特别是联合有功/无功控制）可以有效解决低压配电网中的过电压问题。这些控制措施应被视为辅助服务并获得相应补偿，以考虑到它们对发电收入的影响。

title: Autorubric: A Unified Framework for Rubric-Based LLM Evaluation
summary: Rubric-based evaluation with large language models (LLMs) has become standard practice for assessing text generation at scale, yet the underlying techniques are scattered across papers with inconsistent terminology and partial solutions. We present a unified framework: each identified technique is paired with its realization in Autorubric, an open-source Python framework proposed in this paper. Autorubric supports binary, ordinal, and nominal criteria with configurable weights; single-judge and multi-judge ensemble evaluation with majority, weighted, unanimous, and any-vote aggregation; few-shot calibration with verdict-balanced sampling; and mitigations for position bias (option shuffling), verbosity bias (length penalties), and criterion conflation (per-criterion atomic evaluation with natural language explanations). The framework provides reliability metrics drawn from psychometrics (Cohen's $κ$, weighted $κ$, correlation coefficients, and distribution-level tests) alongside production infrastructure including response caching, checkpointing with resumable runs, multi-provider rate limiting, and cost tracking. We evaluate Autorubric on three benchmarks spanning educational assessment, deep research evaluation, and chatbot quality assessment, demonstrating that it produces results consistent with published benchmarks while exercising the framework's key capabilities: per-criterion binary evaluation with few-shot calibration (RiceChem), multi-judge ensemble evaluation across judge models (ResearcherBench), and mixed criterion types combining binary, ordinal, and nominal scales (CHARM-100). We also contribute CHARM-100, a 100-sample chatbot evaluation dataset with per-sample ground truth labels across all three criterion types, designed to stress-test rubric evaluation frameworks on heterogeneous criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为Autorubric的统一框架，用于基于LLM的评分卡评估，该框架支持多种评估标准、多评审员集成、少样本校准以及偏见缓解，并提供可靠性指标和生产级基础设施。在三个基准测试上的评估表明，Autorubric与现有方法结果一致，并展示了其核心功能。此外，还引入了一个新的100个样本的聊天机器人评估数据集CHARM-100。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于LLM的评分卡评估技术零散且术语不一致，缺乏统一的解决方案。作者希望整合这些技术，并提供一个易于使用的、功能丰富的框架。
AI.method: 本文提出了Autorubric统一框架，实现了以下功能：1. 支持二元、有序和名义标准，并可配置权重。2. 支持单评审员和多评审员集成，具备多种聚合方式（多数、加权、一致、任意投票）。3. 支持少样本校准，采用判决平衡采样。4. 提出偏见缓解技术，包括位置偏见（选项打乱）、冗长偏见（长度惩罚）和标准混淆（逐标准原子评估及自然语言解释）。5. 提供源自心理测量学的可靠性指标（Cohen's κ、加权κ、相关系数、分布级测试）。6. 包含生产基础设施，如响应缓存、可恢复的检查点、多提供商速率限制和成本跟踪。7. 在三个基准测试上进行了评估。
AI.result: Autorubric在三个基准测试（教育评估、深度研究评估、聊天机器人质量评估）上产生了与已发布基准一致的结果，并成功展示了其关键能力，包括逐标准二元评估与少样本校准（RiceChem）、多评审员集成（ResearcherBench）以及混合标准类型（CHARM-100）。
AI.conclusion: Autorubric是一个强大的、统一的LLM驱动的评分卡评估框架，能够处理异构标准，缓解偏见，并提供可靠的评估结果和生产级支持。新引入的CHARM-100数据集也为评估此类框架提供了有价值的资源。

title: Guaranteed Image Classification via Goal-oriented Joint Semantic Source and Channel Coding
summary: To enable critical applications such as remote diagnostics, image classification must be guaranteed under bandwidth constraints and unreliable wireless channels through joint source and channel coding (JSCC) design. However, most existing JSCC methods focus on minimizing image distortion, implicitly assuming that all image regions contribute equally to classification performance, thereby overlooking their varying importance for the task. In this paper, we propose a goal-oriented joint semantic source and channel coding (G-JSSCC) framework that applies \emph{various} levels of source coding compression and channel coding protection across image regions based on their semantic importance. Specifically, we design a semantic information extraction method that identifies and ranks various image regions based on their contributions to classification, where the contribution is measured by the shapely value from explainable artificial intelligence (AI). Based on that, we design a semantic source coding and a semantic channel coding method, which allocates higher-quality compression and stronger error protection to image regions of great semantic importance. In addition, we define a new metric, termed coding efficiency, to evaluate the effectiveness of the source and channel coding in the classification task. Simulations show that our proposed G-JSSCC framework improves classification probability by 2.70 times, reduces transmission cost by 38%, and enhances coding efficiency by 5.91 times, compared to the benchmark scheme using uniform compression and an idealized channel code to uniformly protect the whole image.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向目标的联合语义信源和信道编码 (G-JSSCC) 框架，根据图像区域的语义重要性分配不同的压缩和信道保护级别，以提高在带宽受限和不可靠无线信道下的图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联合信源信道编码 (JSCC) 方法主要关注最小化图像失真，忽略了图像不同区域对分类性能的不同重要性，尤其是在带宽受限和不可靠无线信道下。
AI.method: 1. 设计一种语义信息提取方法，利用可解释 AI 的 Shapley 值衡量图像区域对分类的贡献，并据此排序。 2. 设计语义信源编码和语义信道编码方法，对语义重要性高的区域分配更高质量的压缩和更强的纠错保护。 3. 定义新的“编码效率”指标来评估编码在分类任务中的有效性。
AI.result: 与采用均匀压缩和理想化信道编码的基准方案相比，G-JSSCC 框架将分类概率提高了 2.70 倍，传输成本降低了 38%，编码效率提高了 5.91 倍。
AI.conclusion: G-JSSCC 框架能够根据图像区域的语义重要性优化联合信源和信道编码，显著提升了在挑战性信道条件下的图像分类性能和编码效率。

title: MED-COPILOT: A Medical Assistant Powered by GraphRAG and Similar Patient Case Retrieval
summary:
Clinical decision-making requires synthesizing heterogeneous evidence, including patient histories, clinical guidelines, and trajectories of comparable cases. While large language models (LLMs) offer strong reasoning capabilities, they remain prone to hallucinations and struggle to integrate long, structured medical documents. We present MED-COPILOT, an interactive clinical decision-support system designed for clinicians and medical trainees, which combines guideline-grounded GraphRAG retrieval with hybrid semantic-keyword similar-patient retrieval to support transparent and evidence-aware clinical reasoning. The system builds a structured knowledge graph from WHO and NICE guidelines, applies community-level summarization for efficient retrieval, and maintains a 36,000-case similar-patient database derived from SOAP-normalized MIMIC-IV notes and Synthea-generated records.
  We evaluate our framework on clinical note completion and medical question answering, and demonstrate that it consistently outperforms parametric LLM baselines and standard RAG, improving both generation fidelity and clinical reasoning accuracy. The full system is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Cryo3978/Med_GraphRAG , enabling users to inspect retrieved evidence, visualize token-level similarity contributions, and conduct guided follow-up analysis. Our results demonstrate a practical and interpretable approach to integrating structured guideline knowledge with patient-level analogical evidence for clinical LLMs.

AI.tldr: MED-COPILOT 是一个结合图谱检索和相似病例检索的临床决策支持系统，旨在帮助医生和医学生进行透明且有证据支持的临床推理，并在临床笔记补全和医学问答任务上优于现有 LLM 和 RAG 方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理长而结构化的医学文档时容易出现幻觉，并且难以整合异构证据（如病史、指南、相似病例），这阻碍了其在临床决策中的应用。研究动机是开发一个能够克服这些限制，支持透明且有证据的临床推理的系统。
AI.method: 该系统构建了基于 WHO 和 NICE 指南的结构化知识图谱，并采用社区级别摘要进行高效检索。同时，它维护了一个包含 36,000 个病例的相似病例数据库，该数据库从 MIMIC-IV 笔记和 Synthea 生成的记录中提取，并进行了 SOAP 格式标准化。系统结合了指南检索（GraphRAG）和基于语义-关键词的相似病例检索。
AI.result: 在临床笔记补全和医学问答的评估中，MED-COPILOT 系统在生成保真度和临床推理准确性方面始终优于参数化 LLM 基线和标准 RAG 方法。
AI.conclusion: MED-COPILOT 提供了一种实用且可解释的方法，将结构化的指南知识与个体病例的类比证据整合到临床 LLMs 中，从而支持更可靠的临床决策。

title: Embedding Morphology into Transformers for Cross-Robot Policy Learning
summary: Cross-robot policy learning -- training a single policy to perform well across multiple embodiments -- remains a central challenge in robot learning. Transformer-based policies, such as vision-language-action (VLA) models, are typically embodiment-agnostic and must infer kinematic structure purely from observations, which can reduce robustness across embodiments and even limit performance within a single embodiment. We propose an embodiment-aware transformer policy that injects morphology via three mechanisms: (1) kinematic tokens that factorize actions across joints and compress time through per-joint temporal chunking; (2) a topology-aware attention bias that encodes kinematic topology as an inductive bias in self-attention, encouraging message passing along kinematic edges; and (3) joint-attribute conditioning that augments topology with per-joint descriptors to capture semantics beyond connectivity. Across a range of embodiments, this structured integration consistently improves performance over a vanilla pi0.5 VLA baseline, indicating improved robustness both within an embodiment and across embodiments.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种能够处理多种机器人形态的Transformer策略，通过引入运动学信息（运动学token、拓扑感知注意力偏置、关节属性条件），提高了在不同机器人本体上的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的Transformer策略（如VLA模型）在跨机器人策略学习上面临挑战，它们通常不考虑机器人本体信息，需要从观察中推断运动学结构，这可能导致在不同机器人本体上的鲁棒性下降，甚至影响单一本体的性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种“实体感知Transformer策略”，通过三种机制注入实体信息：1. 运动学Token（分解关节动作，通过分块压缩时间）；2. 拓扑感知注意力偏置（将运动学拓扑作为归纳偏置引入自注意力，鼓励沿着运动学边传递信息）；3. 关节属性条件（用描述符增强拓扑，捕捉连接性之外的语义）。
AI.result: 在多种机器人本体上进行评估，所提出的方法与基线（vanilla pi0.5 VLA）相比，性能得到了持续的提升，表明其在单一本体内部以及跨本体上的鲁棒性都得到了改善。
AI.conclusion: 通过将运动学信息结构化地整合到Transformer策略中，可以显著提高策略在不同机器人本体上的性能和鲁棒性，解决了跨机器人策略学习中的一个核心挑战。

title: Predicting Local Climate Zones using Urban Morphometrics and Satellite Imagery
summary: The Local Climate Zone (LCZ) framework is commonly employed to represent urban form in morphological analyses despite its mapping predominantly relies on satellite imagery. Urban morphometrics, describing urban form via numerical measures of physical aspects and spatial relationships of its elements, offers another avenue. This study evaluates the ability of morphometric assessment to predict LCZs using a) a morphometric-based LCZ prediction, and b) a fusion-based LCZ prediction combining morphometrics with satellite imagery. We calculate 321 2D morphometric attributes from building footprints and street networks, covering their various properties at multiple spatial scales. Subsequently, we develop four classification schemes: morphometric-based prediction, baseline image-based prediction, and two techniques fusing morphometrics with imagery. We evaluate them across five sites. Results from the morphometric-based prediction indicate that the correspondence between 2D urban morphometrics and urban LCZ types is selective and inconsistent, rendering the efficacy of this method site-dependent. Nevertheless, it demonstrated that a much broader range of urban form properties is relevant for distinguishing LCZ types compared to standard parameters. Relative to the image-based baseline, the fusion yielded relatively distinct accuracy improvements for urban LCZ types at two sites; however, gains at the remaining sites were negligible or even slightly negative, suggesting that the benefits of fusion are modest and inconsistent. Collectively, these results indicate that the relationship between the LCZs and the measurable, visible aspects of urban form is tenuous, thus the LCZ framework should be used with caution in morphological studies.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了城市形态学（urban morphometrics）预测局地气候区（LCZ）的能力，并结合卫星影像进行了融合预测。结果表明，单纯的形态学预测效果选择性强且不一致，融合预测的准确性提升有限且不稳定，显示LCZ与城市形态的可测量、可见特征之间关系不牢固，在形态学研究中应谨慎使用LCZ。
AI.motivation: 当前LCZ制图主要依赖卫星影像，但城市形态学提供了描述城市形态的另一途径。本研究旨在评估城市形态学预测LCZs的能力，并探索其与卫星影像融合的优势。
AI.method: 计算了321个2D城市形态学属性（基于建筑轮廓和街道网络），并开发了四种分类方案：纯形态学预测、纯影像预测、以及两种结合形态学与影像的融合预测。在五个地点进行评估。
AI.result: 纯形态学预测显示，2D城市形态学与LCZ类型之间的对应关系具有选择性和不一致性，效果因地而异。融合预测在两个地点相对基线影像预测有一定准确性提升，但在其他地点提升微乎其微甚至略有下降，表明融合效益有限且不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 2D城市形态学与LCZ类型之间的关系是脆弱的，预测能力有限且不稳定。因此，在形态学研究中应谨慎使用LCZ框架。

title: Iterative LLM-based improvement for French Clinical Interview Transcription and Speaker Diarization
summary: Automatic speech recognition for French medical conversations remains challenging, with word error rates often exceeding 30% in spontaneous clinical speech. This study proposes a multi-pass LLM post-processing architecture alternating between Speaker Recognition and Word Recognition passes to improve transcription accuracy and speaker attribution. Ablation studies on two French clinical datasets (suicide prevention telephone counseling and preoperative awake neurosurgery consultations) investigate four design choices: model selection, prompting strategy, pass ordering, and iteration depth. Using Qwen3-Next-80B, Wilcoxon signed-rank tests confirm significant WDER reductions on suicide prevention conversations (p < 0.05, n=18), while maintaining stability on awake neurosurgery consultations (n=10), with zero output failures and acceptable computational cost (RTF 0.32), suggesting feasibility for offline clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多轮LLM后处理架构，通过交替进行说话人识别和词语识别，以提高法语医疗对话的语音识别准确率和说话人归属，并在自杀预防电话咨询数据集上取得了显著的词错误率降低。
AI.motivation: 法语医疗对话的自动语音识别（ASR）在识别准确率方面面临挑战，尤其是在自发性临床语音中，词错误率（WER）常常超过30%。
AI.method: 提出了一种多轮LLM后处理架构，该架构交替进行说话人识别（Speaker Recognition）和词语识别（Word Recognition）轮次。研究人员对模型选择、提示策略、轮次排序和迭代深度等四个设计选择进行了消融研究，并在两个法语临床数据集（自杀预防电话咨询和术前清醒神经外科会诊）上进行了评估。
AI.result: 使用Qwen3-Next-80B模型，Wilcoxon符号秩检验证实，在自杀预防对话上，词错误率（WDER）显著降低（p < 0.05, n=18），同时在清醒神经外科会诊上保持了稳定性（n=10）。该方法没有出现输出失败的情况，计算成本可接受（RTF 0.32）。
AI.conclusion: 该多轮LLM后处理架构可以有效提高法语医疗对话的语音识别准确率和说话人归属，并且具有在线部署的可行性。

title: Operational Modal Analysis of Aeronautical Structures via Tangential Interpolation
summary: Over the last decades, progress in modal analysis has enabled increasingly routine use of modal parameters, including those extracted from in-situ measurements, for applications such as structural health monitoring and finite element model updating. For output-only identification, or Operational Modal Analysis (OMA), widely adopted approaches include Stochastic Subspace Identification (SSI) methods and the Natural Excitation Technique combined with the Eigensystem Realization Algorithm (NExT-ERA). Nevertheless, SSI-based techniques may become cumbersome on large systems, while NExT-ERA fitting can struggle when measurements are contaminated by noise. To alleviate these, this work investigates an OMA frequency-domain formulation for aeronautical structures by coupling the Loewner Framework (LF) with NExT, yielding the proposed NExT-LF method. The method exploits the computational efficiency of LF together with the impulse response function retrieval enabled by NExT. NExT-LF is assessed on two experimental benchmarks: the eXperimental BeaRDS 2 high-aspect-ratio wing main spar and an Airbus Helicopters H135 bearingless main rotor blade. The identified modal parameters are compared against available experimental references and results obtained via SSI with Canonical Variate Analysis and NExT-ERA. The results show that the modes identified by NExT-LF correlate well with benchmark data, particularly for high-amplitude tests and in the low-frequency range.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 NExT-LF 的新型运维模态分析（OMA）方法，结合了 Loewner 框架（LF）和 NExT 技术，用于航空结构模态参数识别。该方法在两个实验基准测试中得到了验证，结果表明其在低频范围内表现良好，与现有方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现有的运维模态分析方法（如 SSI 和 NExT-ERA）在大系统上可能效率低下或对噪声敏感。因此，需要一种更有效、更鲁棒的方法来识别航空结构的模态参数。
AI.method: 该方法将 Loewner 框架（LF）与 NExT 技术相结合，形成 NExT-LF。NExT 用于获取脉冲响应函数，而 LF 利用其计算效率来识别模态参数。
AI.result: NExT-LF 在两个航空结构实验基准测试（高展弦比机翼主梁和 H135 无铰链主旋翼桨叶）上进行了评估。结果显示，NExT-LF 识别出的模态参数与实验参考数据及 SSI 和 NExT-ERA 的结果吻合良好，特别是在高幅度激励和低频范围内。
AI.conclusion: NExT-LF 是一种有效的运维模态分析方法，适用于航空结构，并且在低频范围内表现出良好的性能。它结合了 LF 的计算效率和 NExT 的脉冲响应函数提取能力，为模态分析提供了新的解决方案。

title: Modeling PWM-Time-SOC Interaction in a Simulated Robot
summary: Accurate prediction of battery state of charge is needed for autonomous robots to plan movements without using up all available power. This work develops a physics and data-informed model from a simulation that predicts SOC depletion as a function of time and PWM duty cycle for a simulated 4-wheel Arduino robot. A forward-motion simulation incorporating motor electrical characteristics (resistance, inductance, back-EMF, torque constant) and mechanical dynamics (mass, drag, rolling resistance, wheel radius) was used to generate SOC time-series data across PWM values from 1-100%. Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy), combined with least-squares regression, was applied to construct a unified nonlinear model that captures SOC(t, p). The framework allows for energy-aware planning for similar robots and can be extended to incorporate arbitrary initial SOC levels and environment-dependent parameters for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合物理学和数据的模型，用于预测模拟四轮Arduino机器人的电池荷电状态（SOC）消耗情况，该模型将SOC消耗表示为时间和脉冲宽度调制（PWM）占空比的函数。
AI.motivation: 为了使自主机器人能够进行不耗尽电力的运动规划，需要精确预测电池的荷电状态（SOC）。
AI.method: 研究人员利用一个包含电机电气特性（电阻、电感、反电动势、扭矩常数）和机械动力学（质量、阻力、滚动阻力、轮子半径）的模拟器生成了不同PWM占空比（1-100%）下的SOC随时间变化的序列数据。然后，使用非线性动力学的稀疏识别（SINDy）方法结合最小二乘回归，构建了一个能够表示SOC(t, p)的统一非线性模型。
AI.result: 成功构建了一个能够预测给定时间和PWM占空比下SOC消耗的非线性模型。该模型适用于模拟的四轮Arduino机器人。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为类似机器人提供了能源感知规划的能力，并且可以扩展以适应任意初始SOC和环境相关的参数，从而实现真实世界的部署。

title: Optimizing In-Context Demonstrations for LLM-based Automated Grading
summary: Automated assessment of open-ended student responses is a critical capability for scaling personalized feedback in education. While large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in grading tasks via in-context learning (ICL), their reliability is heavily dependent on the selection of few-shot exemplars and the construction of high-quality rationales. Standard retrieval methods typically select examples based on semantic similarity, which often fails to capture subtle decision boundaries required for rubric adherence. Furthermore, manually crafting the expert rationales needed to guide these models can be a significant bottleneck. To address these limitations, we introduce GUIDE (Grading Using Iteratively Designed Exemplars), a framework that reframes exemplar selection and refinement in automated grading as a boundary-focused optimization problem. GUIDE operates on a continuous loop of selection and refinement, employing novel contrastive operators to identify "boundary pairs" that are semantically similar but possess different grades. We enhance exemplars by generating discriminative rationales that explicitly articulate why a response receives a specific score to the exclusion of adjacent grades. Extensive experiments across datasets in physics, chemistry, and pedagogical content knowledge demonstrate that GUIDE significantly outperforms standard retrieval baselines. By focusing the model's attention on the precise edges of rubric, our approach shows exceptionally robust gains on borderline cases and improved rubric adherence. GUIDE paves the way for trusted, scalable assessment systems that align closely with human pedagogical standards.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为GUIDE的新框架，用于改进基于大型语言模型（LLM）的开放式学生答卷自动评分。GUIDE通过迭代优化和设计区分性示例来解决现有方法的不足，提高了评分的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于LLM的自动评分方法在选取示例和生成判别理由时存在不足，难以处理细微的评分边界，且人工撰写理由耗时耗力。研究旨在提高自动评分的可靠性和可扩展性，使其更接近人类的评分标准。
AI.method: GUIDE框架将评分示例的选择和精炼视为一个边界优化的过程。它通过设计新的对比算子识别“边界对”（语义相似但评分不同），并生成判别性理由来解释为何一个答卷获得特定分数而非相邻分数。该框架在选择和精炼之间进行迭代。
AI.result: 在物理、化学和教育内容知识等多个数据集上的实验表明，GUIDE显著优于标准的检索基线方法。在处理接近评分边界的案例时，GUIDE表现出特别鲁棒的性能提升，并提高了对评分标准的遵循度。
AI.conclusion: GUIDE通过关注模型对评分细微差别的理解，提供了一种可靠且可扩展的自动评估方法。该框架能够生成更准确、更符合人类评分标准的评分结果，为开发可信赖的教育评估系统奠定了基础。

title: Why Not? Solver-Grounded Certificates for Explainable Mission Planning
summary: Operators of Earth observation satellites need justifications for scheduling decisions: why a request was selected, rejected, or what changes would make it schedulable. Existing approaches construct post-hoc reasoning layers independent of the optimizer, risking non-causal attributions, incomplete constraint conjunctions, and solver-path dependence. We take a faithfulness-first approach: every explanation is a certificate derived from the optimization model itself: minimal infeasible subsets for rejections, tight constraints and contrastive trade-offs for selections, and inverse solves for what-if queries. On a scheduling instance with structurally distinct constraint interactions, certificates achieve perfect soundness with respect to the solver's constraint model (15/15 cited-constraint checks), counterfactual validity (7/7), and stability (Jaccard = 1.0 across 28 seed-pairs), while a post-hoc baseline produces non-causal attributions in 29% of cases and misses constraint conjunctions in every multi-cause rejection. A scalability analysis up to 200 orders and 30 satellites confirms practical extraction times for operational batches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化模型本身的“忠实度优先”方法来为地球观测卫星调度决策提供解释，克服了现有后验解释方法的局限性，并在实际应用中验证了其有效性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有地球观测卫星调度决策的解释方法独立于优化器，容易产生非因果归因、不完整的约束组合以及依赖于求解器路径的问题。
AI.method: 采用“忠实度优先”方法，将解释作为优化模型本身的证书。对于拒绝的请求，使用最小不可行子集；对于选中的请求，使用紧约束和对比权衡；对于“假设”查询，使用逆向求解。
AI.result: 在具有结构化约束交互的调度实例上，该证书方法在正确性（15/15 约束检查）、反事实有效性（7/7）和稳定性（Jaccard = 1.0）方面表现完美。相比之下，后验方法在29%的情况下会产生非因果归因，并在所有多原因拒绝中遗漏约束组合。在大规模（200个订单，30颗卫星）测试中，解释提取时间也证明了其在实际操作中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于优化模型本身的证书方法是一种有效且可扩展的方法，可以为地球观测卫星调度决策提供可靠、有因果关系的解释，优于传统的后验解释方法。

title: Stepwise Penalization for Length-Efficient Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Large reasoning models improve with more test-time computation, but often overthink, producing unnecessarily long chains-of-thought that raise cost without improving accuracy. Prior reinforcement learning approaches typically rely on a single outcome reward with trajectory-level length penalties, which cannot distinguish essential from redundant reasoning steps and therefore yield blunt compression. Although recent work incorporates step-level signals, such as offline pruning, supervised data construction, or verifier-based intermediate rewards, reasoning length is rarely treated as an explicit step-level optimization objective during RL. We propose Step-wise Adaptive Penalization (SWAP), a fine-grained framework that allocates length reduction across steps based on intrinsic contribution. We estimate step importance from the model's on-policy log-probability improvement toward the correct answer, then treat excess length as a penalty mass redistributed to penalize low-importance steps more heavily while preserving high-importance reasoning. We optimize with a unified outcome-process advantage within group-relative policy optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SWAP reduces reasoning length by 64.3% on average while improving accuracy by 5.7% relative to the base model.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为 SWAP 的新框架，通过在强化学习中根据步进重要性分配长度惩罚，有效缩短了大型推理模型的推理链，并在提高准确性的同时降低了成本。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在增加计算量时表现更好，但容易产生冗余的推理步骤，导致成本增加而准确性并未提高。现有的强化学习方法在区分必要和冗余推理步骤方面效果不佳。
AI.method: SWAP 框架通过估计模型在正确答案上的对数概率改进来衡量步进重要性，并将过长的推理视为惩罚，然后重新分配给低重要性的步进，同时保留高重要性的推理。该方法使用统一的最终结果-过程优势进行优化。
AI.result: SWAP 平均将推理长度减少了 64.3%，同时相对基础模型提高了 5.7% 的准确率。
AI.conclusion: SWAP 是一种有效的细粒度方法，可以根据步进贡献来优化推理长度，从而在不牺牲准确性的情况下显着降低大型推理模型的推理成本。

title: Koopman-based Estimation of Lyapunov Functions: Theory on a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space
summary: Koopman operator provides a general linear description of nonlinear systems, whose estimation from data (via extended dynamic mode decomposition) has been extensively studied. However, the elusiveness between the Koopman spectrum and the stability of equilibrium point poses a challenge to utilizing the Koopman operator for stability analysis, which further hinders the construction of a universal theory of Koopman-based control. In our prior work, we defined the Koopman operator on a reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) using a linear--radial product kernel, and proved that the Koopman spectrum is confined in the unit disk of the complex plane when the origin is an asymptotically stable equilibrium point. Building on this fundamental spectrum--stability relation, here we consider the problem of Koopman operator-based Lyapunov function estimation with a given decay rate function. The decay rate function and the Lyapunov function are both specified by positive operators on the RKHS and are related by an operator algebraic Lyapunov equation (ALE), whose solution exists uniquely. The error bound of such a Lyapunov function estimate, obtained via kernel extended dynamic mode decomposition (kEDMD), are established based on statistical learning theory and verified by a numerical study.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于Koopman算子的Lyapunov函数估计问题，通过在RKHS空间中定义Koopman算子，并利用kEDMD方法估计Lyapunov函数，给出了误差界并进行了数值验证。
AI.motivation: 现有Koopman算子研究在稳定性分析方面存在挑战，阻碍了基于Koopman的控制理论的发展。本文旨在解决Koopman算子与平衡点稳定性之间的联系问题。
AI.method: 在RKHS空间中定义Koopman算子，使用线性-径向积核函数。基于先前的研究，将Koopman算子谱与系统稳定性联系起来。研究了基于Koopman算子的Lyapunov函数估计问题，利用算子代数Lyapunov方程（ALE）建立Lyapunov函数和衰减率函数之间的关系。通过核扩展动态模式分解（kEDMD）估计Lyapunov函数，并利用统计学习理论建立了误差界。
AI.result: 证明了当原点是渐近稳定平衡点时，Koopman算子的谱被限制在复平面的单位圆盘内。给出了通过kEDMD估计的Lyapunov函数的误差界。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了Koopman算子谱与系统稳定性之间的关系，并成功地在RKHS空间中估计了Lyapunov函数，为基于Koopman的控制理论奠定了基础。

title: Leveraging GenAI for Segmenting and Labeling Centuries-old Technical Documents
summary: Image segmentation and image recognition are well established computational techniques in the broader discipline of image processing. Segmentation allows to locate areas in an image, while recognition identifies specific objects within an image. These techniques have shown remarkable accuracy with modern images, mainly because the amount of training data is vast. Achieving similar accuracy in digitized images of centuries-old documents is more challenging. This difficulty is due to two main reasons: first, the lack of sufficient training data, and second, because the degree of specialization in a given domain. Despite these limitations, the ability to segment and recognize objects in these collections is important for automating the curation, cataloging, and dissemination of knowledge, making the contents of priceless collections accessible to scholars and the general public. In this paper, we report on our ongoing work in segmenting and labeling images pertaining to shipbuilding treatises from the XVI and XVII centuries, a historical period known as the Age of Exploration. To this end, we leverage SAM2 for image segmentation; Florence2 and ChatGPT for labeling; and a specialized ontology ontoShip and glossary glosShip of nautical architecture for enhancing the labeling process. Preliminary results demonstrate the potential of marrying these technologies for improving curation and retrieval of priceless historical documents. We also discuss the challenges and limitations encountered in this approach and ideas on how to overcome them in the future.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用SAM2进行图像分割，Florence2和ChatGPT进行图像标注，并结合ontoShip和glosShip本体与术语表，对XVI和XVII世纪造船文献图像进行分割和标注，以提高历史文献的策展和检索能力。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏足够的训练数据和领域专业性，在数码化的古老文献图像上实现高精度的图像分割和识别比现代图像更具挑战性。然而，自动化的策展、编目和知识传播对于使这些珍贵文献可供学者和公众访问至关重要。
AI.method: 本研究采用了SAM2进行图像分割，Florence2和ChatGPT进行图像标注。为了增强标注过程，还引入了ontoShip（航海建筑专业本体）和glosShip（航海建筑专业术语表）。
AI.result: 初步结果表明，结合这些技术能够有效提升珍贵历史文献的策展和检索能力。研究还讨论了在此方法中遇到的挑战和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 将先进的AI技术（如SAM2、Florence2、ChatGPT）与专业化的本体和术语表相结合，为处理和利用古老历史文献图像提供了一种有前景的方法，尽管仍存在挑战，但未来有克服这些挑战的潜力。

title: You Don't Need All That Attention: Surgical Memorization Mitigation in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Generative models have been shown to "memorize" certain training data, leading to verbatim or near-verbatim generating images, which may cause privacy concerns or copyright infringement. We introduce Guidance Using Attractive-Repulsive Dynamics (GUARD), a novel framework for memorization mitigation in text-to-image diffusion models. GUARD adjusts the image denoising process to guide the generation away from an original training image and towards one that is distinct from training data while remaining aligned with the prompt, guarding against reproducing training data, without hurting image generation quality. We propose a concrete instantiation of this framework, where the positive target that we steer towards is given by a novel method for (cross) attention attenuation based on (i) a novel statistical mechanism that automatically identifies the prompt positions where cross attention must be attenuated and (ii) attenuating cross-attention in these per-prompt locations. The resulting GUARD offers a surgical, dynamic per-prompt inference-time approach that, we find, is by far the most robust method in terms of consistently producing state-of-the-art results for memorization mitigation across two architectures and for both verbatim and template memorization, while also improving upon or yielding comparable results in terms of image quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GUARD的新框架，用于减轻文本到图像扩散模型中的数据记忆问题，该框架通过调整去噪过程引导生成过程远离训练数据，同时保持与提示的对齐，以防止复现训练数据，且不损害图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型会“记忆”某些训练数据，可能导致逐字或近乎逐字地生成图像，引发隐私问题或版权侵权。
AI.method: GUARD通过调整图像去噪过程来引导生成过程，使其远离原始训练图像，并朝着与提示对齐但与训练数据不同的图像发展。具体实现中，利用一种新颖的（交叉）注意力衰减方法，该方法包含一个自动识别必须衰减交叉注意力的提示位置的统计机制，并对这些特定提示位置进行衰减。
AI.result: GUARD被发现是迄今为止在记忆缓解方面最鲁棒的方法，能够在两个不同的架构和逐字/模板记忆化场景下持续产生最先进的结果，同时在图像质量方面也有所改进或相当。
AI.conclusion: GUARD提供了一种精细、动态且针对每个提示的推理时方法，有效地解决了文本到图像扩散模型中的数据记忆问题，同时保持了生成图像的高质量。

title: From Scale to Speed: Adaptive Test-Time Scaling for Image Editing
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Image Chain-of-Thought (Image-CoT) is a test-time scaling paradigm that improves image generation by extending inference time. Most Image-CoT methods focus on text-to-image (T2I) generation. Unlike T2I generation, image editing is goal-directed: the solution space is constrained by the source image and instruction. This mismatch causes three challenges when applying Image-CoT to editing: inefficient resource allocation with fixed sampling budgets, unreliable early-stage verification using general MLLM scores, and redundant edited results from large-scale sampling. To address this, we propose ADaptive Edit-CoT (ADE-CoT), an on-demand test-time scaling framework to enhance editing efficiency and performance. It incorporates three key strategies: (1) a difficulty-aware resource allocation that assigns dynamic budgets based on estimated edit difficulty; (2) edit-specific verification in early pruning that uses region localization and caption consistency to select promising candidates; and (3) depth-first opportunistic stopping, guided by an instance-specific verifier, that terminates when intent-aligned results are found. Extensive experiments on three SOTA editing models (Step1X-Edit, BAGEL, FLUX.1 Kontext) across three benchmarks show that ADE-CoT achieves superior performance-efficiency trade-offs. With comparable sampling budgets, ADE-CoT obtains better performance with more than 2x speedup over Best-of-N.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ADaptive Edit-CoT (ADE-CoT)，一种用于图像编辑的测试时间扩展框架，通过难度感知资源分配、编辑特定验证和机会性停止来提高效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的Image-CoT方法主要用于文本到图像生成，在图像编辑任务中存在资源分配低效、早期验证不可靠和结果冗余等问题。图像编辑是有目标导向的，解决方案空间受源图像和指令约束，这与通用Image-CoT存在不匹配。
AI.method: ADE-CoT 包含三个策略：1. 难度感知资源分配：根据估计的编辑难度动态分配采样预算。2. 编辑特定验证：在早期剪枝阶段使用区域定位和字幕一致性来选择有前景的候选编辑结果。3. 深度优先机会性停止：由实例特定的验证器引导，在找到符合意图的结果时终止。
AI.result: 在三个SOTA编辑模型（Step1X-Edit, BAGEL, FLUX.1 Kontext）和三个基准上的实验表明，ADE-CoT在性能-效率权衡方面表现优越。在可比的采样预算下，ADE-CoT获得了更好的性能，并且速度比Best-of-N快2倍以上。
AI.conclusion: ADE-CoT是一种有效且高效的图像编辑测试时间扩展框架，能够显著提升编辑性能并加速生成过程。

title: From Prerequisites to Predictions: Validating a Geometric Hallucination Taxonomy Through Controlled Induction
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, appendices (reproducibility, sample generation, additional figures)
summary: We test whether a geometric hallucination taxonomy -- classifying failures as center-drift (Type~1), wrong-well convergence (Type~2), or coverage gaps (Type~3) -- can distinguish hallucination types through controlled induction in GPT-2. Using a two-level statistical design with prompts ($N = 15$/group) as the unit of inference, we run each experiment 20 times with different generation seeds to quantify result stability. In static embeddings, Type~3 norm separation is robust (significant in 18/20 runs, Holm-corrected in 14/20, median $r = +0.61$). In contextual hidden states, the Type~3 norm effect direction is stable (19/20 runs) but underpowered at $N = 15$ (significant in 4/20, median $r = -0.28$). Types~1 and~2 do not separate in either space (${\leq}\,3/20$ runs). Token-level tests inflate significance by 4--16$\times$ through pseudoreplication -- a finding replicated across all 20 runs. The results establish coverage-gap hallucinations as the most geometrically distinctive failure mode, carried by magnitude rather than direction, and confirm the Type~1/2 non-separation as genuine at 124M parameters.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，几何幻觉分类法（中心漂移、错误井收敛、覆盖范围空白）可以区分覆盖范围空白型幻觉。其他两种类型（中心漂移和错误井收敛）无法区分。发现代币级别的测试会夸大显著性。
AI.motivation: 作者希望验证一种几何幻觉分类法（分为中心漂移、错误井收敛和覆盖范围空白）是否能够区分幻觉类型。
AI.method: 研究人员在 GPT-2 模型上进行了对照实验，使用了统计设计和不同生成种子来量化结果稳定性。他们分析了静态嵌入和上下文隐藏状态，并进行了代币级别的测试。
AI.result: 覆盖范围空白型幻觉（Type~3）在静态嵌入和上下文隐藏状态中表现出最明显的几何特征。中心漂移（Type~1）和错误井收敛（Type~2）则无法区分。代币级别的测试会夸大统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: 覆盖范围空白型幻觉是最具几何区分度的幻觉模式。中心漂移和错误井收敛在 1.24 亿参数的模型上确实难以区分。代币级别的测试通过假复制（pseudoreplication）夸大了显著性。
