Extensive simulations and real-world robot experiments demonstrate that optimal foresight selection is critical for robust social navigation in partially observable crowds. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, the proposed approach achieves a 6.8\% improvement in success rate, reduces collisions by 50\%, and shortens navigation time by 19\%, with a low timeout rate of 0.8\%, validating the necessity of socially optimal planning horizons for efficient and safe robot navigation in crowded environments. Code and videos are available at Under Review.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的社会导航框架，通过在线优化模型预测控制（MPC）的预测范围，以适应动态人群中的不确定性和复杂的社会互动。该方法利用Transformer模型推断行人的社会属性，并基于此选择最优预测范围，从而提高导航效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有的MPC方法在处理密集、动态人群时存在局限性，如预测范围固定、忽视行人社会异质性以及容易导致“冻结机器人问题”。研究旨在解决这些问题，提升机器人在真实复杂环境中的导航能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种最优范围的社会导航框架。利用时空Transformer模型从轨迹观察中推断行人的合作属性，并将其作为社会先验信息。基于这些信息，使用强化学习策略来最优地选择MPC的预测范围。最终的范围感知MPC结合了以社会为条件的约束，以平衡导航效率和交互安全性。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人实验中，所提出的方法在成功率上提高了6.8%，碰撞减少了50%，导航时间缩短了19%，超时率仅为0.8%。这表明了最优预测范围选择对于在部分可观测人群中的稳健社会导航至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 最优预测范围的选择对于在部分可观测人群中实现高效且安全的机器人导航是至关重要的。所提出的框架通过将规划范围视为社会条件决策变量，显著提高了机器人在复杂社会环境中的导航性能。

title: Opponent State Inference Under Partial Observability: An HMM-POMDP Framework for 2026 Formula 1 Energy Strategy
comment: 17 pages. Pre-registered theoretical framework; empirical calibration on 2026 race telemetry begins Australian Grand Prix, 8 March 2026. Paper 1 of 3. ResearchGate preprint: DOI 10.13140/RG.2.2.16034.08644
summary: The 2026 Formula 1 technical regulations introduce a fundamental change to energy strategy: under a 50/50 internal combustion engine / battery power split with unlimited regeneration and a driver-controlled Override Mode (abbreviated MOM throughout), the optimal energy deployment policy depends not only on a driver's own state but on the hidden state of rival cars. This creates a Partially Observable Stochastic Game that cannot be solved by single-agent optimisation methods. We present a tractable two-layer inference and decision framework. The first layer is a 30-state Hidden Markov Model (HMM) that infers a probability distribution over each rival's ERS charge level, Override Mode status, and tyre degradation state from five publicly observable telemetry signals. The second layer is a Deep Q-Network (DQN) policy that takes the HMM belief state as input and selects between energy deployment strategies. We formally characterise the counter-harvest trap -- a deceptive strategy in which a car deliberately suppresses observable deployment signals to induce a rival into a failed attack -- and show that detecting it requires belief-state inference rather than reactive threshold rules. On synthetic races generated from the model's own assumptions, the HMM achieves 92.3% ERS inference accuracy (random baseline: 33.3%) and detects counter-harvest trap conditions with 95.7% recall. Pre-registration -- empirical validation begins Australian Grand Prix, 8 March 2026.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一个两层框架来解决 F1 赛车中部分可观随机博弈的能量部署问题。第一层使用 HMM 推断对手的状态，第二层使用 DQN 根据推断出的状态选择最佳能量部署策略，并能够检测“反收获陷阱”。
AI.motivation: 2026 年 F1 新规则改变了能量策略，使得最优能量部署不仅取决于自身状态，还取决于对手的隐藏状态，这构成了一个部分可观随机博弈，无法用单智能体优化解决。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一个两层推理和决策框架。第一层使用包含 30 个状态的隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM) 从五个可观测信号推断对手的 ERS 电量、MOM 状态和轮胎磨损度。第二层使用深度 Q 网络 (DQN) 策略，以 HMM 的置信状态作为输入，选择能量部署策略。
AI.result: 在模型自身假设生成的合成比赛中，HMM 在 ERS 推断方面达到了 92.3% 的准确率（随机基线为 33.3%），并且能够以 95.7% 的召回率检测到反收获陷阱条件。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效地推断对手的隐藏状态并做出最优能量部署决策，克服了传统方法在部分可观随机博弈中的局限性，特别是能够检测和应对“反收获陷阱”这种欺骗性策略。

title: Planning Method for Skill-Based Control of Robots Using a PLC as Skill Trigger
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables, submitted to the 19th CIRP Conference on Intelligent Computation in Manufacturing Engineering - CIRP ICME '25, 16-18 July 2025, Ischia (Naples), Italy, has been officially accepted for publication in Procedia CIRP, ISSN: 2212-8271, where the Elsevier's copyright policy applies, and is currently in print
summary: Skill-based programming of robots provides a flexible approach for automation. Existing solutions neglect the optimization of motion sequences, leading to inefficiencies in execution. This work introduces a planning method that enhances skill-based robot programming by integrating motion sequence optimization. This optimization leads to a new MoveContinuousSkill. The software for executing the MoveContinuousSkill is implemented on a Programmable Logic Controller and applied across multiple robotic systems. Experimental results demonstrate a significant improvement in execution time through optimized motion sequence.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种改进机器人技能编程的方法，通过优化运动序列来提高执行效率，并已在实际系统中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 现有基于技能的机器人编程方法忽略了运动序列的优化，导致执行效率低下。
AI.method: 引入了一种新的规划方法，该方法将运动序列优化整合到技能编程中，从而创建了 MoveContinuousSkill。该软件实现在可编程逻辑控制器（PLC）上，并应用于多个机器人系统。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，通过优化运动序列，执行时间得到了显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的整合运动序列优化的技能编程方法能够有效提高机器人的执行效率，并在实际应用中证明了其可行性。

title: CoMoL: Efficient Mixture of LoRA Experts via Dynamic Core Space Merging
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance on diverse downstream and domain-specific tasks via parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT). However, existing PEFT methods, particularly MoE-LoRA architectures, suffer from limited parameter efficiency and coarse-grained adaptation due to the proliferation of LoRA experts and instance-level routing. To address these issues, we propose Core Space Mixture of LoRA (\textbf{CoMoL}), a novel MoE-LoRA framework that incorporates expert diversity, parameter efficiency, and fine-grained adaptation. Specifically, CoMoL introduces two key components: core space experts and core space routing. Core space experts store each expert in a compact core matrix, preserving diversity while controlling parameter growth. Core space routing dynamically selects and activates the appropriate core experts for each token, enabling fine-grained, input-adaptive routing. Activated core experts are then merged via a soft-merging strategy into a single core expert, which is combined with a shared LoRA to form a specialized LoRA module. Besides, the routing network is projected into the same low-rank space as the LoRA matrices, further reducing parameter overhead without compromising expressiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoMoL retains the adaptability of MoE-LoRA architectures while achieving parameter efficiency comparable to standard LoRA, consistently outperforming existing methods across multiple tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CoMoL的新型MoE-LoRA框架，通过引入核心空间专家和核心空间路由，提高了参数效率和细粒度适应性，在多项任务上表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法，特别是MoE-LoRA，存在参数效率有限和粗粒度适应性问题，原因在于LoRA专家数量的激增和实例级路由。
AI.method: CoMoL框架包含两个关键组件：核心空间专家（将专家存储在紧凑的核心矩阵中以控制参数增长并保留多样性）和核心空间路由（为每个token动态选择和激活合适的核心专家，实现细粒度、输入自适应路由）。激活的核心专家通过软合并策略合并成一个单一的核心专家，并与共享LoRA结合形成一个专门的LoRA模块。此外，路由网络被投影到与LoRA矩阵相同的低秩空间，进一步减少参数开销。
AI.result: CoMoL在参数效率方面可与标准LoRA相媲美，同时保留了MoE-LoRA的适应性。在多项任务上，CoMoL的性能始终优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CoMoL成功地解决了现有MoE-LoRA方法在参数效率和适应性方面的局限性，提供了一种更优的PEFT方案。

title: Draft-Thinking: Learning Efficient Reasoning in Long Chain-of-Thought LLMs
summary: Long chain-of-thought~(CoT) has become a dominant paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capability of large reasoning models~(LRMs); however, the performance gains often come with a substantial increase in reasoning budget. Recent studies show that existing CoT paradigms tend to induce systematic overthinking, unnecessarily coupling reasoning capability with reasoning cost. Most prior approaches reduce token usage through post hoc techniques such as token compression, truncation, or length penalties, without explicitly addressing the core mechanisms of reasoning. We propose \textbf{Draft-Thinking}, which guides models to first learn a concise \textit{draft-style} reasoning structure that retains only the critical reasoning steps. Through a \textit{progressive curriculum learning}, the model stably internalizes this efficient reasoning pattern as its capability scales. Moreover, Draft-Thinking introduces adaptive prompting, which elevates reasoning depth to a flexible, model-selectable behavior. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Draft-Thinking substantially reduces reasoning budget while largely preserving reasoning performance; for example, on MATH500, it achieves an 82.6\% reduction in reasoning budget at the cost of only a 2.6\% performance drop.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Draft-Thinking 的新方法，通过引导模型学习简洁的推理草稿，并结合渐进式课程学习和自适应提示，显著降低了大型语言模型的推理成本，同时基本保持了推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的长链式思考（CoT）方法虽然提高了大型推理模型的性能，但带来了显著的推理成本增加。研究发现，现有 CoT 范式倾向于过度思考，导致推理能力与成本不必要的耦合。因此，需要一种方法在不牺牲性能的前提下降低推理成本。
AI.method: Draft-Thinking 方法包含三个主要部分：1. 引导模型学习简洁的“草稿式”推理结构，只保留关键步骤。2. 通过“渐进式课程学习”使模型稳定内化高效的推理模式。3. 引入“自适应提示”，使推理深度成为可灵活选择的行为。
AI.result: 在 MATH500 等数据集上的广泛实验表明，Draft-Thinking 显著降低了推理成本（例如，在 MATH500 上降低了 82.6% 的推理预算），同时性能损失很小（仅 2.6%）。
AI.conclusion: Draft-Thinking 是一种有效的方法，可以解决大型推理模型中推理成本过高的问题，通过学习简洁的推理草稿和渐进式课程学习，实现了推理成本和性能之间的良好权衡，并提供了自适应的推理深度控制。

title: Shape-Interpretable Visual Self-Modeling Enables Geometry-Aware Continuum Robot Control
summary: Continuum robots possess high flexibility and redundancy, making them well suited for safe interaction in complex environments, yet their continuous deformation and nonlinear dynamics pose fundamental challenges to perception, modeling, and control. Existing vision-based control approaches often rely on end-to-end learning, achieving shape regulation without explicit awareness of robot geometry or its interaction with the environment. Here, we introduce a shape-interpretable visual self-modeling framework for continuum robots that enables geometry-aware control. Robot shapes are encoded from multi-view planar images using a Bezier-curve representation, transforming visual observations into a compact and physically meaningful shape space that uniquely characterizes the robot's three-dimensional configuration. Based on this representation, neural ordinary differential equations are employed to self-model both shape and end-effector dynamics directly from data, enabling hybrid shape-position control without analytical models or dense body markers. The explicit geometric structure of the learned shape space allows the robot to reason about its body and surroundings, supporting environment-aware behaviors such as obstacle avoidance and self-motion while maintaining end-effector objectives. Experiments on a cable-driven continuum robot demonstrate accurate shape-position regulation and tracking, with shape errors within 1.56% of image resolution and end-effector errors within 2% of robot length, as well as robust performance in constrained environments. By elevating visual shape representations from two-dimensional observations to an interpretable three-dimensional self-model, this work establishes a principled alternative to vision-based end-to-end control and advances autonomous, geometry-aware manipulation for continuum robots.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种形状可解释的视觉自建模框架，用于连续体机器人的几何感知控制。该框架使用贝塞尔曲线从多视图图像表示机器人形状，并利用神经ODE模型学习形状和末端执行器动力学，从而实现环境感知和避障控制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的连续体机器人控制方法常采用端到端学习，缺乏对机器人几何形状和与环境交互的显式认知，限制了其在复杂环境中的应用。因此，需要一种能够感知自身几何形状并进行环境交互的控制方法。
AI.method: 1. 使用多视图平面图像通过贝塞尔曲线表示机器人形状，将其转化为紧凑且具有物理意义的三维形状空间。 2. 利用神经普通微分方程（Neural ODE）直接从数据中学习形状和末端执行器动力学。 3. 基于学习到的几何结构，实现混合形状-位置控制，并支持环境感知行为（如避障）。
AI.result: 实验证明，该框架在形状-位置调控和跟踪方面表现出色，形状误差在图像分辨率的1.56%以内，末端执行器误差在机器人长度的2%以内。同时，在约束环境下也展现出鲁棒的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将二维视觉观测提升到可解释的三维自模型，本研究为基于视觉的端到端控制提供了一种有原则性的替代方案，并推动了连续体机器人自主、几何感知的操作能力。

title: Physics-Consistent Diffusion for Efficient Fluid Super-Resolution via Multiscale Residual Correction
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2026)
summary: Existing image SR and generic diffusion models transfer poorly to fluid SR: they are sampling-intensive, ignore physical constraints, and often yield spectral mismatch and spurious divergence. We address fluid super-resolution (SR) with \textbf{ReMD} (\underline{Re}sidual-\underline{M}ultigrid \underline{D}iffusion), a physics-consistent diffusion framework. At each reverse step, ReMD performs a \emph{multigrid residual correction}: the update direction is obtained by coupling data consistency with lightweight physics cues and then correcting the residual across scales; the multiscale hierarchy is instantiated with a \emph{multi-wavelet} basis to capture both large structures and fine vortical details. This coarse-to-fine design accelerates convergence and preserves fine structures while remaining equation-free. Across atmospheric and oceanic benchmarks, ReMD improves accuracy and spectral fidelity, reduces divergence, and reaches comparable quality with markedly fewer sampling steps than diffusion baselines. Our results show that enforcing physics consistency \emph{inside} the diffusion process via multigrid residual correction and multi-wavelet multiscale modeling is an effective route to efficient fluid SR. Our code are available on https://github.com/lizhihao2022/ReMD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ReMD（残差-多重网格扩散）的物理一致性扩散框架，用于解决流体超分辨率问题。ReMD通过多重网格残差校正，在每个反向扩散步骤中耦合数据一致性、轻量级物理线索以及多小波基的多尺度表示，从而提高了准确性、光谱保真度，减少了发散，并显著减少了采样步数。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像超分辨率和通用扩散模型在应用于流体超分辨率时表现不佳，存在采样密集、忽略物理约束、光谱不匹配和发散等问题。因此，需要一种能够解决这些问题的流体超分辨率方法。
AI.method: ReMD框架在每个反向扩散步骤中执行“多重网格残差校正”。首先，通过耦合数据一致性与轻量级物理线索来获得更新方向，然后跨尺度校正残差。其多尺度层级利用多小波基来实现，能够捕捉大尺度结构和精细的涡旋细节。这种粗粒到细粒的设计加速了收敛并保留了精细结构，同时保持了无方程的特性。
AI.result: 在大气和海洋基准测试中，ReMD提高了准确性和光谱保真度，减少了发散，并且在采样步数明显少于现有扩散基线的情况下达到了可比的质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过在扩散过程内部强制执行物理一致性（利用多重网格残差校正和多小波多尺度建模），是实现高效流体超分辨率的有效途径。

title: LangGap: Diagnosing and Closing the Language Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures. Code and benchmark will be available at https://github.com/YC11Hou/langgap
summary:
Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve over 95% success on standard benchmarks. However, through systematic experiments, we find that current state-of-the-art VLA models largely ignore language instructions. Prior work lacks: (1) systematic semantic perturbation diagnostics, (2) a benchmark that forces language understanding by design, and (3) linguistically diverse training data.
  This paper constructs the LangGap benchmark, based on a four-dimensional semantic perturbation method -- varying instruction semantics while keeping the tabletop layout fixed -- revealing language understanding deficits in π0.5. Existing benchmarks like LIBERO assign only one task per layout, underutilizing available objects and target locations; LangGap fully diversifies pick-and-place tasks under identical layouts, forcing models to truly understand language.
  Experiments show that targeted data augmentation can partially close the language gap -- success rate improves from 0% to 90% with single-task training, and 0% to 28% with multi-task training. However, as semantic diversity of extended tasks increases, model learning capacity proves severely insufficient; even trained tasks perform poorly. This reveals a fundamental challenge for VLA models in understanding diverse language instructions -- precisely the long-term value of LangGap.

AI.tldr: 现有的 Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 模型在标准基准上表现优异，但实际上却忽视了语言指令。本研究提出了 LangGap 基准，通过系统性地扰乱语义来评估 VLA 模型对语言的理解能力，并发现现有模型在这方面存在严重不足。通过数据增强可以部分缓解这一问题，但 VLA 模型在理解多样化语言指令方面仍面临根本性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在标准基准测试中表现良好，但研究发现它们实际上并未充分理解语言指令。现有研究缺乏系统性的语义扰动诊断方法、强制模型进行语言理解的基准以及语言多样化的训练数据。
AI.method: 本研究构建了 LangGap 基准，该基准基于四维语义扰动方法，即在保持桌面布局不变的情况下，改变指令的语义。通过这种方式，LangGap 充分利用了同一布局下的多种拾取和放置任务，迫使模型真正理解语言指令。研究人员还进行了数据增强实验，以评估其对弥合语言理解差距的影响。
AI.result: LangGap 基准揭示了现有 VLA 模型（π0.5）在语言理解方面存在缺陷。实验表明，通过有针对性的数据增强，单任务训练的成功率可以从 0% 提高到 90%，多任务训练的成功率可以从 0% 提高到 28%。然而，随着任务语义多样性的增加，模型的学习能力严重不足，即使是已训练过的任务表现也很差。
AI.conclusion: 当前的 VLA 模型在理解多样化的语言指令方面面临根本性挑战。LangGap 基准的价值在于其能够揭示并量化这种语言理解的差距，为未来 VLA 模型的发展指明了方向。

title: Attention to Neural Plagiarism: Diffusion Models Can Plagiarize Your Copyrighted Images!
comment: Accepted to ICCV 2025. Code available at: https://github.com/zzzucf/Neural-Plagiarism
summary: In this paper, we highlight a critical threat posed by emerging neural models: data plagiarism. We demonstrate how modern neural models (e.g., diffusion models) can replicate copyrighted images, even when protected by advanced watermarking techniques. To expose vulnerabilities in copyright protection and facilitate future research, we propose a general approach to neural plagiarism that can either forge replicas of copyrighted data or introduce copyright ambiguity. Our method, based on "anchors and shims", employs inverse latents as anchors and finds shim perturbations that gradually deviate the anchor latents, thereby evading watermark or copyright detection. By applying perturbations to the cross-attention mechanism at different timesteps, our approach induces varying degrees of semantic modification in copyrighted images, enabling it to bypass protections ranging from visible trademarks and signatures to invisible watermarks. Notably, our method is a purely gradient-based search that requires no additional training or fine-tuning. Experiments on MS-COCO and real-world copyrighted images show that diffusion models can replicate copyrighted images, underscoring the urgent need for countermeasures against neural plagiarism.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种名为“锚点与衬垫”的通用方法，用于利用扩散模型复制受版权保护的图像，即使存在水印，并展示了这种数据剽窃对现有版权保护措施的威胁。
AI.motivation: 发现并揭示新兴的神经网络模型（特别是扩散模型）对受版权保护图像构成的数据剽窃威胁，以及现有水印技术的脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于“锚点与衬垫”的通用方法。该方法使用逆向潜在向量作为“锚点”，并通过寻找“衬垫”扰动来逐步偏离锚点潜在向量，从而规避水印或版权检测。通过在不同时间步长对交叉注意力机制进行扰动，实现了对图像不同程度的语义修改，以绕过各种版权保护措施。该方法纯粹基于梯度搜索，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 实验证明，扩散模型能够复制受版权保护的图像，即使这些图像受到了可见商标、签名和不可见水印的保护。该方法能够成功绕过多种版权保护机制。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型存在复制受版权保护图像的能力，对现有版权保护构成严重威胁，迫切需要开发针对神经网络剽窃的对策。

title: MicroVerse: A Preliminary Exploration Toward a Micro-World Simulation
summary: Recent advances in video generation have opened new avenues for macroscopic simulation of complex dynamic systems, but their application to microscopic phenomena remains largely unexplored. Microscale simulation holds great promise for biomedical applications such as drug discovery, organ-on-chip systems, and disease mechanism studies, while also showing potential in education and interactive visualization. In this work, we introduce MicroWorldBench, a multi-level rubric-based benchmark for microscale simulation tasks. MicroWorldBench enables systematic, rubric-based evaluation through 459 unique expert-annotated criteria spanning multiple microscale simulation task (e.g., organ-level processes, cellular dynamics, and subcellular molecular interactions) and evaluation dimensions (e.g., scientific fidelity, visual quality, instruction following). MicroWorldBench reveals that current SOTA video generation models fail in microscale simulation, showing violations of physical laws, temporal inconsistency, and misalignment with expert criteria. To address these limitations, we construct MicroSim-10K, a high-quality, expert-verified simulation dataset. Leveraging this dataset, we train MicroVerse, a video generation model tailored for microscale simulation. MicroVerse can accurately reproduce complex microscale mechanism. Our work first introduce the concept of Micro-World Simulation and present a proof of concept, paving the way for applications in biology, education, and scientific visualization. Our work demonstrates the potential of educational microscale simulations of biological mechanisms. Our data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/MicroVerse

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MicroWorldBench基准和MicroSim-10K数据集，并训练了MicroVerse模型，以解决当前视频生成模型在微观尺度模拟方面的不足，该模型能够准确复现复杂的微观机制，为生物学、教育和科学可视化等领域带来新的应用前景。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成技术在宏观模拟方面取得进展，但在微观模拟领域应用不足。微观模拟在生物医学（药物发现、器官芯片、疾病机理研究）和教育、可视化方面具有巨大潜力，因此需要开发专门的评估工具和模型来克服现有SOTA模型的局限性。
AI.method: 提出MicroWorldBench，一个包含459个专家标注标准的、基于多级评价尺度的微观模拟基准。利用该基准评估现有SOTA模型，发现其在物理定律遵守、时间一致性和专家标准对齐方面存在问题。随后构建高质量的MicroSim-10K数据集，并在此基础上训练MicroVerse模型，一个专为微观模拟设计的视频生成模型。
AI.result: MicroWorldBench揭示了现有SOTA视频生成模型在微观模拟中存在显著的物理定律违反、时间不一致和不符合专家标准的问题。MicroVerse模型能够准确复现复杂的微观机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出了“微观世界模拟”的概念，并提供了概念验证。MicroWorldBench基准和MicroSim-10K数据集为评估和改进微观模拟模型提供了基础。MicroVerse模型展示了其在准确复现微观机制方面的能力，为生物学、教育和科学可视化领域的应用铺平了道路。

title: Tiny-DroNeRF: Tiny Neural Radiance Fields aboard Federated Learning-enabled Nano-drones
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE ICRA 2026 conference. ©2026 IEEE
summary: Sub-30g nano-sized aerial robots can leverage their agility and form factor to autonomously explore cluttered and narrow environments, like in industrial inspection and search and rescue missions. However, the price for their tiny size is a strong limit in their resources, i.e., sub-100 mW microcontroller units (MCUs) delivering $\sim$100 GOps/s at best, and memory budgets well below 100 MB. Despite these strict constraints, we aim to enable complex vision-based tasks aboard nano-drones, such as dense 3D scene reconstruction: a key robotic task underlying fundamental capabilities like spatial awareness and motion planning. Top-performing 3D reconstruction methods leverage neural radiance fields (NeRF) models, which require GBs of memory and massive computation, usually delivered by high-end GPUs consuming 100s of Watts. Our work introduces Tiny-DroNeRF, a lightweight NeRF model, based on Instant-NGP, and optimized for running on a GAP9 ultra-low-power (ULP) MCU aboard our nano-drones. Then, we further empower our Tiny-DroNeRF by leveraging a collaborative federated learning scheme, which distributes the model training among multiple nano-drones. Our experimental results show a 96% reduction in Tiny-DroNeRF's memory footprint compared to Instant-NGP, with only a 5.7 dB drop in reconstruction accuracy. Finally, our federated learning scheme allows Tiny-DroNeRF to train with an amount of data otherwise impossible to keep in a single drone's memory, increasing the overall reconstruction accuracy. Ultimately, our work combines, for the first time, NeRF training on an ULP MCU with federated learning on nano-drones.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了Tiny-DroNeRF，一个能在超低功耗MCU上运行的轻量级NeRF模型，并通过联邦学习方案增强其在纳米无人机上的3D重建能力。
AI.motivation: 纳米无人机资源受限（功耗低、内存小），难以执行复杂的视觉任务，例如3D场景重建。现有NeRF模型计算和内存需求高，不适用于纳米无人机。
AI.method: 1. 提出Tiny-DroNeRF，一个基于Instant-NGP的轻量级NeRF模型，针对GAP9 ULP MCU进行优化。 2. 采用联邦学习方案，在多架纳米无人机之间分布式训练模型，克服单机内存限制。
AI.result: Tiny-DroNeRF的内存占用相比Instant-NGP减少了96%，重建精度仅下降5.7 dB。联邦学习方案提高了整体重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了在ULP MCU上进行NeRF训练，并结合了纳米无人机上的联邦学习，为纳米无人机执行复杂的3D重建任务提供了解决方案。

title: Super Research: Answering Highly Complex Questions with Large Language Models through Super Deep and Super Wide Research
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated proficiency in Deep Research or Wide Search, their capacity to solve highly complex questions-those requiring long-horizon planning, massive evidence gathering, and synthesis across heterogeneous sources-remains largely unexplored. We introduce Super Research, a task for complex autonomous research tasks that integrates (i) structured decomposition into a research plan, (ii) super wide retrieval for diverse perspectives, and (iii) super deep investigation to resolve uncertainties through iterative queries. To evaluate this capability, we curated a benchmark of 300 expert-written questions across diverse domains, each requiring up to 100+ retrieval steps and 1,000+ web pages to reconcile conflicting evidence. Super Research produces verifiable reports with fine-grained citations and intermediate artifacts (e.g., outlines and tables) to ensure traceable reasoning. Furthermore, we present a graph-anchored auditing protocol that evaluates Super Research along five dimensions: Coverage, Logical Consistency, Report Utility, Objectivity and Citation Health. While super-complex questions may be infrequent in standard applications, Super Research serves as a critical ceiling evaluation and stress test for LLM capabilities. A model's proficiency within Super Research acts as a powerful proxy for its general research competence; success here suggests the robustness necessary to navigate nearly any subordinate research task. Leaderboard is available at: https://cnsdqd-dyb.github.io/Super-Research-Benchmark/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Super Research任务，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）在处理需要长期规划、海量证据收集和多源异构信息综合的复杂研究问题上的能力。通过一个包含300个专家级问题的基准来评估，该任务整合了结构化规划、超级广度检索和超级深度探究。该方法生成带有详细引文和中间过程产物的可验证报告，并提出一个图谱审计协议来评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在深层研究或广度搜索方面表现出色，但在解决需要长期规划、大量证据收集和跨异构源综合的超复杂问题方面的能力尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Super Research任务，包含三个核心环节：（i）结构化分解为研究计划；（ii）超级广度检索以获取多样化视角；（iii）超级深度探究以通过迭代查询解决不确定性。构建了一个包含300个专家级问题的基准，并设计了一个图谱锚定的审计协议，从覆盖度、逻辑一致性、报告效用、客观性和引文健康度五个维度进行评估。
AI.result: Super Research能够生成带有精细引用和中间产物（如大纲和表格）的可验证报告，确保推理的可追溯性。该基准包含了需要多达100+次检索和1000+个网页才能调和冲突证据的复杂问题。
AI.conclusion: Super Research作为一个关键的上限评估和压力测试，用于衡量LLM在复杂自主研究任务上的能力。在Super Research中的熟练程度是LLM通用研究能力的有力代理，表明其能够应对几乎任何从属研究任务。

title: AI-IO: An Aerodynamics-Inspired Real-Time Inertial Odometry for Quadrotors
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics(ICRA 2026)
summary: Inertial Odometry (IO) has gained attention in quadrotor applications due to its sole reliance on inertial measurement units (IMUs), attributed to its lightweight design, low cost, and robust performance across diverse environments. However, most existing learning-based inertial odometry systems for quadrotors either use only IMU data or include additional dynamics-related inputs such as thrust, but still lack a principled formulation of the underlying physical model to be learned. This lack of interpretability hampers the model's ability to generalize and often limits its accuracy. In this work, we approach the inertial odometry learning problem from a different perspective. Inspired by the aerodynamics model and IMU measurement model, we identify the key physical quantity--rotor speed measurements required for inertial odometry and design a transformer-based inertial odometry. By incorporating rotor speed measurements, the proposed model improves velocity prediction accuracy by 36.9%. Furthermore, the transformer architecture more effectively exploits temporal dependencies for denoising and aerodynamics modeling, yielding an additional 22.4% accuracy gain over previous results. To support evaluation, we also provide a real-world quadrotor flight dataset capturing IMU measurements and rotor speed for high-speed motion. Finally, combined with an uncertainty-aware extended Kalman filter (EKF), our framework is validated across multiple datasets and real-time systems, demonstrating superior accuracy, generalization, and real-time performance. We share the code and data to promote further research (https://github.com/SJTU-ViSYS-team/AI-IO).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Transformer的惯性里程计方法，该方法通过引入旋翼速度测量和考虑空气动力学模型，显著提高了四旋翼飞行器的定位精度，并提供了一个新的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的四旋翼惯性里程计系统要么仅使用IMU数据，要么包含额外的动力学输入，但缺乏对底层物理模型的原理性建模，导致泛化能力和准确性受限。
AI.method: 提出了一种Transformer模型的惯性里程计方法，该方法借鉴了空气动力学模型和IMU测量模型，引入了旋翼速度测量，并利用Transformer架构来捕捉时间依赖性，进行去噪和空气动力学建模。最后，结合不确定性感知的扩展卡尔曼滤波器进行验证。
AI.result: 引入旋翼速度测量将速度预测精度提高了36.9%。Transformer架构带来了额外的22.4%的精度提升。该框架在多个数据集和实时系统中验证了其优越的准确性、泛化能力和实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入旋翼速度测量和利用Transformer架构对物理模型进行建模，可以显著提升四旋翼惯性里程计的性能。该框架在准确性、泛化能力和实时性方面表现出色，并提供了可用的代码和数据集以供进一步研究。

title: I-Perceive: A Foundation Model for Active Perception with Language Instructions
summary: Active perception, the ability of a robot to proactively adjust its viewpoint to acquire task-relevant information, is essential for robust operation in unstructured real-world environments. While critical for downstream tasks such as manipulation, existing approaches have largely been confined to local settings (e.g., table-top scenes) with fixed perception objectives (e.g., occlusion reduction). Addressing active perception with open-ended intents in large-scale environments remains an open challenge. To bridge this gap, we propose I-Perceive, a foundation model for active perception conditioned on natural language instructions, designed for mobile manipulators and indoor environments. I-Perceive predicts camera views that follows open-ended language instructions, based on image-based scene contexts. By fusing a Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone with a geometric foundation model, I-Perceive bridges semantic and geometric understanding, thus enabling effective reasoning for active perception. We train I-Perceive on a diverse dataset comprising real-world scene-scanning data and simulation data, both processed via an automated and scalable data generation pipeline. Experiments demonstrate that I-Perceive significantly outperforms state-of-the-art VLMs in both prediction accuracy and instruction following of generated camera views, and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to novel scenes and tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 I-Perceive 的基础模型，用于解决在大型室内环境中，基于自然语言指令的主动感知问题，使其能够预测适应开放式指令的相机视角。
AI.motivation: 现有主动感知方法局限于局部场景和固定感知目标，无法应对开放式意图和大规模环境中的主动感知挑战。
AI.method: I-Perceive 通过融合视觉语言模型（VLM）和几何基础模型，结合图像场景上下文，预测符合自然语言指令的相机视角。模型在一个包含真实世界扫描数据和模拟数据的多样化数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: I-Perceive 在生成相机视图的预测准确性和指令遵循方面显著优于现有的最先进VLMs，并展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: I-Perceive 成功弥合了语义和几何理解之间的差距，为移动操作器在大型室内环境中执行开放式指令的主动感知任务提供了一种有效的方法。

title: Dr. Seg: Revisiting GRPO Training for Visual Large Language Models through Perception-Oriented Design
summary: Following the success of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) in foundation LLMs, an increasing number of works have sought to adapt GRPO to Visual Large Language Models (VLLMs) for visual perception tasks (e.g., detection and segmentation). However, much of this line of research rests on a long-standing yet unexamined assumption: training paradigms developed for language reasoning can be transferred seamlessly to visual perception. Our experiments show that this assumption is not valid, revealing intrinsic differences between reasoning-oriented and perception-oriented settings. Using reasoning segmentation as a representative case, we surface two overlooked factors: (i) the need for a broader output space, and (ii) the importance of fine-grained, stable rewards. Building on these observations, we propose Dr.~Seg, a simple, plug-and-play GRPO-based framework consisting of a Look-to-Confirm mechanism and a Distribution-Ranked Reward module, requiring no architectural modifications and integrating seamlessly with existing GRPO-based VLLMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Dr.~Seg improves performance in complex visual scenarios while maintaining strong generalization. Code and models will be available at https://github.com/xVI-group-SCU/Dr-Seg.

AI.tldr: 该研究表明，将用于语言推理的GRPO训练范式直接应用于视觉感知任务（如分割）存在固有差异，并提出了一种名为Dr. Seg的即插即用框架，通过引入“Look-to-Confirm”机制和“Distribution-Ranked Reward”模块来解决这些差异，从而提升在复杂视觉场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）方法在处理视觉语言模型（VLLMs）的视觉感知任务时，普遍假设其训练范式可以直接从语言推理任务迁移。然而，研究者们发现这一假设不成立，存在推理导向和感知导向设置的内在差异，因此需要进行研究以理解和解决这些差异。
AI.method: 研究者通过实验揭示了视觉感知任务与语言推理任务在GRPO训练中的两个关键差异：输出空间的广度和奖励信号的精细度和稳定性。在此基础上，他们提出了Dr. Seg框架，该框架包含两个核心组件：“Look-to-Confirm”机制（用于扩展输出空间）和“Distribution-Ranked Reward”模块（用于提供更精细、更稳定的奖励）。Dr. Seg是一个即插即用的模块，不需要对现有VLLM架构进行修改。
AI.result: 在复杂的视觉场景下，Dr. Seg框架显著提高了性能，同时保持了良好的泛化能力。具体来说，通过引入“Look-to-Confirm”机制和“Distribution-Ranked Reward”模块，Dr. Seg解决了GRPO在视觉感知任务中遇到的挑战，并取得了实验上的成功。
AI.conclusion: 将用于语言推理的GRPO训练范式直接应用于视觉感知任务存在固有的挑战。Dr. Seg框架通过解决输出空间和奖励信号的不足，为GRPO在VLLMs的视觉感知任务中提供了一个有效的解决方案，并证明了其在复杂视觉场景下的优越性。

title: EfficientPosterGen: Semantic-aware Efficient Poster Generation via Token Compression and Accurate Violation Detection
summary: Automated academic poster generation aims to distill lengthy research papers into concise, visually coherent presentations. Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) based approaches, however, suffer from three critical limitations: low information density in full-paper inputs, excessive token consumption, and unreliable layout verification. We present EfficientPosterGen, an end-to-end framework that addresses these challenges through semantic-aware retrieval and token-efficient multimodal generation. EfficientPosterGen introduces three core innovations: (1) Semantic-aware Key Information Retrieval (SKIR), which constructs a semantic contribution graph to model inter-segment relationships and selectively preserves important content; (2) Visual-based Context Compression (VCC), which renders selected text segments into images to shift textual information into the visual modality, significantly reducing token usage while generating poster-ready bullet points; and (3) Agentless Layout Violation Detection (ALVD), a deterministic color-gradient-based algorithm that reliably detects content overflow and spatial sparsity without auxiliary MLLMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EfficientPosterGen achieves substantial improvements in token efficiency and layout reliability while maintaining high poster quality, offering a scalable solution for automated academic poster generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/vinsontang1/EfficientPosterGen-Code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EfficientPosterGen的端到端框架，用于自动生成学术海报，解决了现有方法在信息密度、Token消耗和布局验证方面的不足，通过语义信息检索、视觉上下文压缩和无代理布局检测技术，提高了效率和海报质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的自动学术海报生成方法存在信息密度低、Token消耗过大和布局验证不可靠等问题，这阻碍了其在实际应用中的推广。
AI.method: EfficientPosterGen框架包含三个核心创新：1. 语义感知关键信息检索（SKIR），通过构建语义贡献图来识别和保留重要内容；2. 视觉上下文压缩（VCC），将文本信息转换为图像，减少Token消耗并生成海报格式的要点；3. 无代理布局违规检测（ALVD），使用基于颜色渐变的确定性算法来检测布局问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，EfficientPosterGen在Token效率和布局可靠性方面取得了显著改进，同时保持了较高的海报质量，证明了其作为一种可扩展的自动学术海报生成解决方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: EfficientPosterGen通过其创新的SKIR、VCC和ALVD技术，成功克服了现有方法的局限性，提供了一种更高效、可靠且高质量的自动学术海报生成方法。

title: QQ: A Toolkit for Language Identifiers and Metadata
summary: The growing number of languages considered in multilingual NLP, including new datasets and tasks, poses challenges regarding properly and accurately reporting which languages are used and how. For example, datasets often use different language identifiers; some use BCP-47 (e.g. en_Latn), others use ISO 639-1 (en), and more linguistically oriented datasets use Glottocodes (stan1293). Mapping between identifiers is manageable for a few dozen languages, but becomes unscalable when dealing with thousands. We introduce QwanQwa, a light-weight Python toolkit for unified language metadata management. QQ integrates multiple language resources into a single interface, provides convenient normalization and mapping between language identifiers, and affords a graph-based structure that enables traversal across families, regions, writing systems, and other linguistic attributes. QQ serves both as (1) a simple "glue" library in multilingual NLP research to make working with many languages easier, and (2) as an intuitive way for exploring languages, such as finding related ones through shared scripts, regions or other metadata.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为 QwanQwa 的 Python 工具包，用于统一管理多语言 NLP 中的语言元数据，解决了不同语言标识符带来的挑战，并提供了方便的语言映射和探索功能。
AI.motivation: 随着多语言 NLP 领域处理的语言数量不断增加，数据集和任务中语言标识符不一致（如 BCP-47、ISO 639-1、Glottocodes）导致元数据管理困难且难以扩展。
AI.method: 开发了一个轻量级 Python 工具包 QwanQwa，它集成了多种语言资源，提供统一的接口，支持语言标识符的规范化和映射，并采用基于图的结构方便跨语言族、地区、书写系统等属性进行遍历。
AI.result: QwanQwa 能够有效地整合语言元数据，方便研究者在多语言 NLP 中处理大量语言，并提供直观的语言探索功能，例如通过共享脚本、地区或其他元数据查找相关语言。
AI.conclusion: QwanQwa 是一个实用的工具，可以简化多语言 NLP 研究中的语言元数据管理，并为语言探索提供新的途径。

title: Heterophily-Agnostic Hypergraph Neural Networks with Riemannian Local Exchanger
summary: Hypergraphs are the natural description of higher-order interactions among objects, widely applied in social network analysis, cross-modal retrieval, etc. Hypergraph Neural Networks (HGNNs) have become the dominant solution for learning on hypergraphs. Traditional HGNNs are extended from message passing graph neural networks, following the homophily assumption, and thus struggle with the prevalent heterophilic hypergraphs that call for long-range dependence modeling. In this paper, we achieve heterophily-agnostic message passing through the lens of Riemannian geometry. The key insight lies in the connection between oversquashing and hypergraph bottleneck within the framework of Riemannian manifold heat flow. Building on this, we propose the novel idea of locally adapting the bottlenecks of different subhypergraphs. The core innovation of the proposed mechanism is the design of an adaptive local (heat) exchanger. Specifically, it captures the rich long-range dependencies via the Robin condition, and preserves the representation distinguishability via source terms, thereby enabling heterophily-agnostic message passing with theoretical guarantees. Based on this theoretical foundation, we present a novel Heat-Exchanger with Adaptive Locality for Hypergraph Neural Network (HealHGNN), designed as a node-hyperedge bidirectional systems with linear complexity in the number of nodes and hyperedges. Extensive experiments on both homophilic and heterophilic cases show that HealHGNN achieves the state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HealHGNN的新型超图神经网络，它利用黎曼几何的思想，通过自适应局部热交换器来处理超图中的同质性和异质性问题，并在各种数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的超图神经网络（HGNN）基于同质性假设，在处理异质性超图（即节点之间的关系不是聚集性的）时表现不佳，难以捕捉长距离依赖关系。因此，研究的动机是开发一种能够处理异质性超图的HGNN。
AI.method: 该研究将超图问题映射到黎曼流形上的热流模型，并利用黎曼几何的理论洞察，提出了一个“自适应局部热交换器”（adaptive local (heat) exchanger）机制。该机制通过Robin条件捕获长距离依赖，通过源项保持表示的可区分性，从而实现异质性无关的消息传递，并具有理论保证。
AI.result: 所提出的HealHGNN模型在包括同质性和异质性在内的各种数据集上都达到了最先进的性能。该模型具有节点和超边双向系统，且复杂度为线性的。
AI.conclusion: HealHGNN是一种新型的超图神经网络，通过利用黎曼几何和自适应局部热交换器，成功地解决了超图中的同质性问题，并能有效处理异质性超图，展现了优越的性能。

title: BiCLIP: Bidirectional and Consistent Language-Image Processing for Robust Medical Image Segmentation
summary:
Medical image segmentation is a cornerstone of computer-assisted diagnosis and treatment planning. While recent multimodal vision-language models have shown promise in enhancing semantic understanding through textual descriptions, their resilience in "in-the-wild" clinical settings-characterized by scarce annotations and hardware-induced image degradations-remains under-explored.
  We introduce BiCLIP (Bidirectional and Consistent Language-Image Processing), a framework engineered to bolster robustness in medical segmentation. BiCLIP features a bidirectional multimodal fusion mechanism that enables visual features to iteratively refine textual representations, ensuring superior semantic alignment. To further stabilize learning, we implement an augmentation consistency objective that regularizes intermediate representations against perturbed input views.
  Evaluation on the QaTa-COV19 and MosMedData+ benchmarks demonstrates that BiCLIP consistently surpasses state-of-the-art image-only and multimodal baselines. Notably, BiCLIP maintains high performance when trained on as little as 1% of labeled data and exhibits significant resistance to clinical artifacts, including motion blur and low-dose CT noise.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BiCLIP的框架，通过双向多模态融合和增强一致性目标来提高医学图像分割的鲁棒性，特别是在数据稀缺和图像退化的情况下。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态视觉语言模型在医学图像分割中表现出潜力，但它们在真实临床环境中（数据稀缺、图像退化）的鲁棒性仍未得到充分研究。
AI.method: BiCLIP框架采用双向多模态融合机制，使视觉特征迭代地优化文本表示，并引入增强一致性目标来稳定学习过程，以应对输入扰动。
AI.result: BiCLIP在QaTa-COV19和MosMedData+基准测试中，一致性优于现有的仅图像和多模态基线。即使在仅使用1%标记数据训练的情况下，BiCLIP也能保持高性能，并能有效抵抗运动模糊和低剂量CT噪声等临床伪影。
AI.conclusion: BiCLIP框架显著提高了医学图像分割在数据稀缺和图像退化等临床挑战下的鲁棒性，并在实际应用中展现出优越的性能。

title: From Literature to Hypotheses: An AI Co-Scientist System for Biomarker-Guided Drug Combination Hypothesis Generation
summary: The rapid growth of biomedical literature and curated databases has made it increasingly difficult for researchers to systematically connect biomarker mechanisms to actionable drug combination hypotheses. We present AI Co-Scientist (CoDHy), an interactive, human-in-the-loop system for biomarker-guided drug combination hypothesis generation in cancer research. CoDHy integrates structured biomedical databases and unstructured literature evidence into a task-specific knowledge graph, which serves as the basis for graph-based reasoning and hypothesis construction. The system combines knowledge graph embeddings with agent-based reasoning to generate, validate, and rank candidate drug combinations, while explicitly grounding each hypothesis in retrievable evidence. Through a web-based interface, users can configure the scientific context, inspect intermediate results, and iteratively refine hypotheses, enabling transparent and researcher-steerable exploration rather than automated decision-making. We demonstrate CoDHy as a system for exploratory hypothesis generation and decision support in translational oncology, highlighting its design, interaction workflow, and practical use cases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CoDHy的人工智能系统，用于癌症研究中基于生物标志物的药物组合假设生成，该系统结合了结构化数据库和非结构化文献证据，通过知识图谱和基于智能体的推理来生成、验证和排序药物组合，并提供可追溯的证据支持，同时允许用户进行交互式探索和干预。
AI.motivation: 生物医学文献和数据库的快速增长，使得研究人员难以系统地连接生物标志物机制与可操作的药物组合假设。
AI.method: CoDHy系统整合结构化生物医学数据库和非结构化文献证据，构建任务特定的知识图谱。利用知识图谱嵌入和基于智能体的推理（agent-based reasoning）来生成、验证和排序候选药物组合，并提供可检索的证据。
AI.result: CoDHy能够生成、验证和排序药物组合假设，并将其与证据联系起来。系统通过Web界面提供交互式探索和用户干预的能力。
AI.conclusion: CoDHy是一个用于转化肿瘤学中探索性假设生成和决策支持的系统，其设计、交互流程和实际用例展示了其透明和可由研究人员引导的特性，而非全自动化决策。

title: Fair in Mind, Fair in Action? A Synchronous Benchmark for Understanding and Generation in UMLLMs
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly deployed across domains, ensuring fairness has become a core challenge. However, the field faces a "Tower of Babel'' dilemma: fairness metrics abound, yet their underlying philosophical assumptions often conflict, hindering unified paradigms-particularly in unified Multimodal Large Language Models (UMLLMs), where biases propagate systemically across tasks. To address this, we introduce the IRIS Benchmark, to our knowledge the first benchmark designed to synchronously evaluate the fairness of both understanding and generation tasks in UMLLMs. Enabled by our demographic classifier, ARES, and four supporting large-scale datasets, the benchmark is designed to normalize and aggregate arbitrary metrics into a high-dimensional "fairness space'', integrating 60 granular metrics across three dimensions-Ideal Fairness, Real-world Fidelity, and Bias Inertia & Steerability (IRIS). Through this benchmark, our evaluation of leading UMLLMs uncovers systemic phenomena such as the "generation gap'', individual inconsistencies like "personality splits'', and the "counter-stereotype reward'', while offering diagnostics to guide the optimization of their fairness capabilities. With its novel and extensible framework, the IRIS benchmark is capable of integrating evolving fairness metrics, ultimately helping to resolve the "Tower of Babel'' impasse. Project Page: https://iris-benchmark-web.vercel.app/

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了IR IS Benchmark，一个用于同步评估多模态大型语言模型（UMLLMs）理解和生成任务公平性的基准，并引入了ARES人口统计学分类器和四个大型数据集。该基准将60个度量标准整合到“公平空间”中，评估了现有UMLLMs在公平性方面的系统性问题，并提供了优化方向。
AI.motivation: 人工智能（AI）的广泛应用带来了公平性挑战，但现有的公平性度量标准存在冲突，尤其是在多模态大型语言模型（UMLLMs）中，偏见会在不同任务间系统性传播。因此，需要一个统一的框架来评估和解决UMLLMs的公平性问题。
AI.method: 研究提出了IR IS Benchmark，一个集成了人口统计学分类器ARES和四个大型数据集的基准。该基准能够将任意公平性度量标准化并聚合到高维“公平空间”中，涵盖了60个细粒度度量，分为理想公平性、现实保真度和偏差惯性与可控性（IRIS）三个维度。
AI.result: 通过IR IS Benchmark对领先UMLLMs的评估，研究发现了“生成差距”、“个性分裂”等系统性现象，以及“刻板印象反奖”等个体不一致性。同时，研究提供了诊断方法来指导UMLLMs公平性能力的优化。
AI.conclusion: IR IS Benchmark提供了一个新颖且可扩展的框架，能够集成不断发展的公平性度量，有望解决公平性度量标准“巴别塔”式的困境，并为UMLLMs的公平性评估和优化提供指导。

title: TGM-VLA: Task-Guided Mixup for Sampling-Efficient and Robust Robotic Manipulation
summary: The performance of robotic imitation learning is fundamentally limited by data quality and training strategies. Prevalent sampling strategies on RLBench suffer from severe keyframe redundancy and imbalanced temporal distribution, leading to inefficient memory usage and unstable optimization. Moreover, reprojecting point clouds onto multi-view images with a black background--while more efficient than voxel-based methods--often causes dark objects to be indistinguishable and hard to manipulate. In this work, we propose a novel holistic framework that significantly improves both model performance and training efficiency. First, we redesign and optimize the keyframe sampling strategy, reducing memory consumption by 80% and accelerating training speed by 5x. Second, we augment the model with a color inversion projection branch--a simple yet effective module that resolves the ambiguity of dark objects. Finally, we propose a task-guided mixup technique that dynamically fuses point clouds and action heatmaps according to task instructions, greatly improving robustness to distractors and performance in multi-goal scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with a 90.5% success rate on RLBench and 68.8% on the COLOSSEUM benchmark under challenging interference conditions. Our code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/PuFanqi23/TGM-VLA.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种改进机器人模仿学习的框架，通过优化采样策略、引入颜色反转投影分支和任务引导的混合技术，提高了训练效率和模型性能，并在RLBench和COLOSSEUM基准测试中取得了最先进的成果。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人模仿学习方法在数据质量和训练策略上存在不足，例如关键帧冗余、时间分布不均导致效率低下和优化不稳定，以及在多视图图像重投影中黑暗物体难以区分的问题。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一种整体框架，包括：1. 重新设计和优化关键帧采样策略，以减少内存消耗和加速训练。2. 引入颜色反转投影分支，以解决黑暗物体识别问题。3. 提出任务引导的混合技术，动态融合点云和动作热图，提高鲁棒性和多目标场景下的性能。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在RLBench上取得了90.5%的成功率，在COLOSSEUM基准上取得了68.8%的成功率，在具有挑战性的干扰条件下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架通过改进数据处理和训练策略，显著提高了机器人模仿学习的性能和效率，并在现有基准测试中达到了最先进水平。

title: FujiView: Multimodal Late-Fusion for Predicting Scenic Visibility
comment: 9 pages (including references), 8 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to the IEEE/CVF WACV 2026 proceedings. Introduces a large human-labeled Mount Fuji visibility dataset; public release forthcoming
summary: Visibility of natural landmarks such as Mount Fuji is a defining factor in both tourism planning and visitor experience, yet it remains difficult to predict due to rapidly changing atmospheric conditions. We present FujiView, a multimodal learning framework and dataset for predicting scenic visibility by fusing webcam imagery with structured meteorological data. Our late-fusion approach combines image-derived class probabilities with numerical weather features to classify visibility into five categories. The dataset currently comprises over 100,000 webcam images paired with concurrent and forecasted weather conditions from more than 40 cameras around Mount Fuji, and continues to expand; it will be released to support further research in environmental forecasting. Experiments show that YOLO-based vision features dominate short-term horizons such as "nowcasting" and "samedaycasting", while weather-driven forecasts increasingly take over as the primary predictive signal beyond $+1$d. Late fusion consistently yields the highest overall accuracy, achieving ACC of approx 0.89 for same-day prediction and up to 84% for next-day forecasts. These results position Scenic Visibility Forecasting (SVF) as a new benchmark task for multimodal learning.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个名为 FujiView 的多模态学习框架和数据集，用于预测富士山等自然地标的可见性，通过融合网络摄像头图像和气象数据。实验结果表明，多模态融合在可见性预测方面表现出色，尤其是在短期预测中。该研究还提出了 Scenic Visibility Forecasting (SVF) 作为多模态学习的一个新基准任务。
AI.motivation: 自然地标（如富士山）的可见性对旅游规划和游客体验至关重要，但由于大气条件变化迅速，其预测困难。因此，需要一个能够准确预测可见性的方法。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种名为 FujiView 的多模态学习框架。该框架采用 late-fusion（晚期融合）策略，结合了从网络摄像头图像提取的类别概率和结构化的气象数据（数值天气特征），将可见性分为五个类别进行预测。构建了一个包含超过10万张网络摄像头图像及其同步和预测天气条件的数据集。
AI.result: 基于 YOLO 的视觉特征在短期预测（“即时预测”和“当日预测”）中表现占优。气象数据在 $+1$ 天之后的预测中成为主要信号。晚期融合在整体准确性上始终最优，当日预测的准确率（ACC）约为0.89，次日预测的准确率高达84%。
AI.conclusion: FujiView 框架在自然地标可见性预测方面取得了显著成效，证明了多模态学习在环境预测领域的潜力。研究结果表明，结合图像和气象数据进行预测比单独使用任何一种数据源更有效。该研究还提出将 Scenic Visibility Forecasting (SVF) 确立为多模态学习的一个新基准任务。

title: Machine Learning Grade Prediction Using Students' Grades and Demographics
summary: Student repetition in secondary education imposes significant resource burdens, particularly in resource-constrained contexts. Addressing this challenge, this study introduces a unified machine learning framework that simultaneously predicts pass/fail outcomes and continuous grades, a departure from prior research that treats classification and regression as separate tasks. Six models were evaluated: Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, and Random Forest for classification, and Linear Regression, Decision Tree Regressor, and Random Forest Regressor for regression, with hyperparameters optimized via exhaustive grid search. Using academic and demographic data from 4424 secondary school students, classification models achieved accuracies of up to 96%, while regression models attained a coefficient of determination of 0.70, surpassing baseline approaches. These results confirm the feasibility of early, data-driven identification of at-risk students and highlight the value of integrating dual-task prediction for more comprehensive insights. By enabling timely, personalized interventions, the framework offers a practical pathway to reducing grade repetition and optimizing resource allocation.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种统一的机器学习框架，能够同时预测学生在中学教育中的通过/失败结果和连续成绩，以解决学生重读问题。该框架在准确性和预测能力上优于现有方法，并能为早期干预和资源优化提供依据。
AI.motivation: 中学教育中学生重读会给资源有限的环境带来沉重负担，因此需要一种有效的方法来识别有重读风险的学生。
AI.method: 该研究评估了六种机器学习模型：用于分类的逻辑回归、决策树和随机森林，以及用于回归的线性回归、决策树回归器和随机森林回归器。通过详尽的网格搜索优化了超参数，并使用了4424名中学学生的学术和人口统计数据。
AI.result: 分类模型最高准确率达到96%，回归模型决定系数达到0.70，均优于基线方法。这表明该框架能够早期、数据驱动地识别有风险的学生。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了双任务预测（分类和回归）的可行性，并能为理解学生表现提供更全面的见解。该框架可以通过及时、个性化的干预来减少重读，并优化资源分配。

title: TraceSIR: A Multi-Agent Framework for Structured Analysis and Reporting of Agentic Execution Traces
summary: Agentic systems augment large language models with external tools and iterative decision making, enabling complex tasks such as deep research, function calling, and coding. However, their long and intricate execution traces make failure diagnosis and root cause analysis extremely challenging. Manual inspection does not scale, while directly applying LLMs to raw traces is hindered by input length limits and unreliable reasoning. Focusing solely on final task outcomes further discards critical behavioral information required for accurate issue localization. To address these issues, we propose TraceSIR, a multi-agent framework for structured analysis and reporting of agentic execution traces. TraceSIR coordinates three specialized agents: (1) StructureAgent, which introduces a novel abstraction format, TraceFormat, to compress execution traces while preserving essential behavioral information; (2) InsightAgent, which performs fine-grained diagnosis including issue localization, root cause analysis, and optimization suggestions; (3) ReportAgent, which aggregates insights across task instances and generates comprehensive analysis reports. To evaluate TraceSIR, we construct TraceBench, covering three real-world agentic scenarios, and introduce ReportEval, an evaluation protocol for assessing the quality and usability of analysis reports aligned with industry needs. Experiments show that TraceSIR consistently produces coherent, informative, and actionable reports, significantly outperforming existing approaches across all evaluation dimensions. Our project and video are publicly available at https://github.com/SHU-XUN/TraceSIR.

AI.tldr: 提出TraceSIR框架，利用结构化抽象和多智能体协作来解决大型语言模型（LLM）智能体执行痕迹的故障诊断和根本原因分析难题，并构建TraceBench数据集和ReportEval评估协议进行验证。
AI.motivation: 智能体系统的执行痕迹长且复杂，导致故障诊断和根本原因分析困难，现有方法（手动检查、直接LLM分析、仅关注最终结果）存在效率低下、信息丢失或限制。
AI.method: 提出TraceSIR框架，包含三个智能体：StructureAgent（使用TraceFormat抽象压缩执行痕迹）、InsightAgent（进行细粒度诊断，包括问题定位、根本原因分析和优化建议）和ReportAgent（聚合分析并生成报告）。同时构建TraceBench数据集和ReportEval评估协议。
AI.result: TraceSIR能够生成连贯、信息丰富且可操作的分析报告，在所有评估维度上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TraceSIR是一个有效的多智能体框架，可以解决智能体系统执行痕迹的分析和报告问题，为解决复杂智能体任务中的故障诊断和优化提供了新的解决方案。

title: Validation of Space Robotics in Underwater Environments via Disturbance Robustness Equivalency
summary: We present an experimental validation framework for space robotics that leverages underwater environments to approximate microgravity dynamics. While neutral buoyancy conditions make underwater robotics an excellent platform for space robotics validation, there are still dynamical and environmental differences that need to be overcome. Given a high-level space mission specification, expressed in terms of a Signal Temporal Logic specification, we overcome these differences via the notion of maximal disturbance robustness of the mission. We formulate the motion planning problem such that the original space mission and the validation mission achieve the same disturbance robustness degree. The validation platform then executes its mission plan using a near-identical control strategy to the space mission where the closed-loop controller considers the spacecraft dynamics. Evaluating our validation framework relies on estimating disturbances during execution and comparing them to the disturbance robustness degree, providing practical evidence of operation in the space environment. Our evaluation features a dual-experiment setup: an underwater robot operating under near-neutral buoyancy conditions to validate the planning and control strategy of either an experimental planar spacecraft platform or a CubeSat in a high-fidelity space dynamics simulator.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种利用水下环境进行太空机器人实验验证的框架，通过将信号时序逻辑（STL）规范中的最大扰动鲁棒性概念映射到水下验证任务，以克服水下与太空环境的动力学差异，并使用双实验设置（水下机器人与平面航天器平台/CubeSat在模拟器中）来验证该框架。
AI.motivation: 太空机器人任务的开发和验证成本高昂且风险大，而水下中性浮力环境可以模拟微重力动力学，因此研究如何有效利用水下平台进行太空机器人任务的实验验证，并克服水下与太空环境之间的差异。
AI.method:
1. 使用信号时序逻辑（STL）高层抽象表示空间任务规范。
2. 提出“最大扰动鲁棒性”概念，并将空间任务和水下验证任务的扰动鲁棒性度量相等作为目标。
3. 制定运动规划问题，使得水下验证任务的扰动鲁棒性与空间任务相同。
4. 在水下机器人上实施接近空间任务的闭环控制策略，该策略考虑了航天器动力学。
5. 评估框架时，估算执行过程中的扰动，并与扰动鲁棒性度量进行比较。
6. 采用双实验设置：一个水下机器人执行验证任务，同时验证一个平面航天器平台或CubeSat在高保真空间动力学模拟器中的规划和控制策略。
AI.result: 提出的框架能够通过水下实验来评估和验证在太空环境中执行的复杂任务的规划和控制策略。通过使水下验证任务和空间任务具有相同的扰动鲁棒性度量，可以为太空任务的实际运行提供证据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新颖的实验验证框架，该框架能够有效地利用水下中性浮力环境来模拟和验证太空机器人任务。通过将任务的扰动鲁棒性概念映射到水下平台，可以克服环境差异，并为太空任务的可靠性提供实际证据。

title: FlowPortrait: Reinforcement Learning for Audio-Driven Portrait Video Generation
summary: Generating realistic talking-head videos remains challenging due to persistent issues such as imperfect lip synchronization, unnatural motion, and evaluation metrics that correlate poorly with human perception. We propose FlowPortrait, a reinforcement-learning framework for audio-driven portrait animation built on a multimodal backbone for autoregressive audio-to-video generation. FlowPortrait introduces a human-aligned evaluation system based on Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to assess lip-sync accuracy, expressiveness, and motion quality. These signals are combined with perceptual and temporal consistency regularizers to form a stable composite reward, which is used to post-train the generator via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Extensive experiments, including both automatic evaluations and human preference studies, demonstrate that FlowPortrait consistently produces higher-quality talking-head videos, highlighting the effectiveness of reinforcement learning for portrait animation.

AI.tldr: FlowPortrait是一个基于强化学习的框架，用于生成逼真的语音驱动肖像动画，通过多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）进行评估，以提高唇部同步、表现力和运动质量。
AI.motivation: 现有生成逼真说话人头视频的方法存在唇部同步不完美、运动不自然以及评价指标与人类感知相关性差等问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为FlowPortrait的强化学习框架，采用多模态骨干网络进行自回归音视频生成。使用基于MLLMs的人类对齐评估系统来衡量唇部同步、表现力和运动质量，并结合感知和时间一致性正则化器形成复合奖励，通过GRPO进行生成器后训练。
AI.result: FlowPortrait能够生成更高质量的说话人头视频，在自动评估和人类偏好研究中都表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习对于肖像动画是有效的，FlowPortrait通过改进的评估和训练方法显著提升了视频生成质量。

title: BLUFF: Benchmarking the Detection of False and Synthetic Content across 58 Low-Resource Languages
summary: Multilingual falsehoods threaten information integrity worldwide, yet detection benchmarks remain confined to English or a few high-resource languages, leaving low-resource linguistic communities without robust defense tools. We introduce BLUFF, a comprehensive benchmark for detecting false and synthetic content, spanning 79 languages with over 202K samples, combining human-written fact-checked content (122K+ samples across 57 languages) and LLM-generated content (79K+ samples across 71 languages). BLUFF uniquely covers both high-resource "big-head" (20) and low-resource "long-tail" (59) languages, addressing critical gaps in multilingual research on detecting false and synthetic content. Our dataset features four content types (human-written, LLM-generated, LLM-translated, and hybrid human-LLM text), bidirectional translation (English$\leftrightarrow$X), 39 textual modification techniques (36 manipulation tactics for fake news, 3 AI-editing strategies for real news), and varying edit intensities generated using 19 diverse LLMs. We present AXL-CoI (Adversarial Cross-Lingual Agentic Chainof-Interactions), a novel multi-agentic framework for controlled fake/real news generation, paired with mPURIFY, a quality filtering pipeline ensuring dataset integrity. Experiments reveal state-of-theart detectors suffer up to 25.3% F1 degradation on low-resource versus high-resource languages. BLUFF provides the research community with a multilingual benchmark, extensive linguistic-oriented benchmark evaluation, comprehensive documentation, and opensource tools to advance equitable falsehood detection. Dataset and code are available at: https://jsl5710.github.io/BLUFF/

AI.tldr: 解析错误
AI.motivation: 解析错误
AI.method: 解析错误
AI.result: 解析错误
AI.conclusion: 解析错误

title: Piecing Together Cross-Document Coreference Resolution Datasets: Systematic Dataset Analysis and Unification
summary: Research in CDCR remains fragmented due to heterogeneous dataset formats, varying annotation standards, and the predominance of the CDCR definition as the event coreference resolution (ECR). To address these challenges, we introduce uCDCR, a unified dataset that consolidates diverse publicly available English CDCR corpora across various domains into a consistent format, which we analyze with standardized metrics and evaluation protocols. uCDCR incorporates both entity and event coreference, corrects known inconsistencies, and enriches datasets with missing attributes to facilitate reproducible research. We establish a cohesive framework for fair, interpretable, and cross-dataset analysis in CDCR and compare the datasets on their lexical properties, e.g., lexical composition of the annotated mentions, lexical diversity and ambiguity metrics, discuss the annotation rules and principles that lead to high lexical diversity, and examine how these metrics influence performance on the same-head-lemma baseline. Our dataset analysis shows that ECB+, the state-of-the-art benchmark for CDCR, has one of the lowest lexical diversities, and its CDCR complexity, measured by the same-head-lemma baseline, lies in the middle among all uCDCR datasets. Moreover, comparing document and mention distributions between ECB+ and uCDCR shows that using all uCDCR datasets for model training and evaluation will improve the generalizability of CDCR models. Finally, the almost identical performance on the same-head-lemma baseline, separately applied to events and entities, shows that resolving both types is a complex task and should not be steered toward ECR alone. The uCDCR dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnZhu/uCDCR, and the code for parsing, analyzing, and scoring the dataset is available at https://github.com/anastasia-zhukova/uCDCR.

AI.tldr: 研究人员发布了一个名为 uCDCR 的统一数据集，整合了多个英语 CDCR 数据集，解决了现有研究碎片化的问题，并提供了标准化的分析框架和评估协议。该数据集包含实体和事件共指，纠正了不一致之处，并添加了缺失的属性。通过分析，发现 ECB+ 数据集的词汇多样性较低，而使用所有 uCDCR 数据集进行训练和评估有助于提高 CDCR 模型的泛化能力。研究还表明，实体和事件共指解决任务的复杂性不应仅侧重于事件共指。
AI.motivation: 现有的 CDCR 研究因数据集格式不统一、标注标准各异以及过度侧重事件共指（ECR）而显得碎片化。为了解决这些问题，需要一个统一的数据集和分析框架。
AI.method: 作者整合了多个公开的英语 CDCR 语料库，创建了一个名为 uCDCR 的统一数据集。该数据集具有一致的格式，并进行了词汇属性分析，例如词汇构成、多样性和歧义性。同时，作者还分析了标注规则如何影响词汇多样性，并评估了词汇度量对同一头词基线模型性能的影响。最后，作者比较了 ECB+ 和 uCDCR 数据集在文档和提及分布上的差异，并评估了在 uCDCR 数据集上训练和评估模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: uCDCR 数据集整合了多种 CDCR 语料库，具有一致的格式和标准化的评估协议。分析表明，ECB+ 的词汇多样性较低，其 CDCR 复杂度适中。使用所有 uCDCR 数据集训练和评估模型可以提高 CDCR 模型的泛化能力。实体和事件共指的解决任务同等复杂，不应只关注事件共指。
AI.conclusion: uCDCR 数据集为 CDCR 研究提供了一个统一、可复现的分析框架，有助于克服现有研究的挑战。通过对数据集的深入分析，研究为改进 CDCR 模型的设计和评估提供了新的见解，强调了同时解决实体和事件共指的重要性以及提高模型泛化能力的需求。

title: Optimal Solutions for the Moving Target Vehicle Routing Problem via Branch-and-Price with Relaxed Continuity
summary: The Moving Target Vehicle Routing Problem (MT-VRP) seeks trajectories for several agents that intercept a set of moving targets, subject to speed, time window, and capacity constraints. We introduce an exact algorithm, Branch-and-Price with Relaxed Continuity (BPRC), for the MT-VRP. The main challenge in a branch-and-price approach for the MT-VRP is the pricing subproblem, which is complicated by moving targets and time-dependent travel costs between targets. Our key contribution is a new labeling algorithm that solves this subproblem by means of a novel dominance criterion tailored for problems with moving targets. Numerical results on instances with up to 25 targets show that our algorithm finds optimal solutions more than an order of magnitude faster than a baseline based on previous work, showing particular strength in scenarios with limited agent capacities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BPRC（Branch-Price with Relaxed Continuity）的精确算法，用于解决移动目标车辆路径问题（MT-VRP），该算法通过创新的标记算法和主导性判据，在处理移动目标和时变成本方面表现出色，能比现有方法快一个数量级以上地找到最优解，尤其在低容量约束下效果显著。
AI.motivation: 现有的MT-VRP解决方法在处理移动目标和时变成本方面存在挑战，尤其是在需要精确解的情况下。研究旨在开发一种更有效的精确算法来解决MT-VRP。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为BPRC（Branch-Price with Relaxed Continuity）的精确算法。该算法的核心在于开发了一个新的标记算法来解决定价子问题，该算法采用了针对移动目标问题的新型主导性判据。
AI.result: 在包含最多25个目标的实例上进行的数值结果显示，BPRC算法比基于先前工作的基线算法能找到最优解的速度快一个数量级以上。该算法在代理容量有限的情况下表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: BPRC算法是一种有效的解决MT-VRP的精确算法，通过创新的定价子问题求解方法，显著提高了求解效率，尤其适用于代理容量受限的场景。

title: SSKG Hub: An Expert-Guided Platform for LLM-Empowered Sustainability Standards Knowledge Graphs
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, submitted to ACL26 System Demo Track
summary: Sustainability disclosure standards (e.g., GRI, SASB, TCFD, IFRS S2) are comprehensive yet lengthy, terminology-dense, and highly cross-referential, hindering structured analysis and downstream use. We present SSKG Hub (Sustainability Standards Knowledge Graph Hub), a research prototype and interactive web platform that transforms standards into auditable knowledge graphs (KGs) through an LLM-centered, expert-guided pipeline. The system integrates automatic standard identification, configurable chunking, standard-specific prompting, robust triple parsing, and provenance-aware Neo4j storage with fine-grained audit metadata. LLM extraction produces a provenance-linked Draft KG, which is reviewed, curated, and formally promoted to a Certified KG through meta-expert adjudication. A role-based governance framework covering read-only guest access, expert review and CRUD operations, meta-expert certification, and administrative oversight ensures traceability and accountability across draft and certified states. Beyond graph exploration and triple-level evidence tracing, SSKG Hub supports cross-KG fusion, KG-driven tasks, and dedicated modules for insights and curated resources. We validate the platform through a comprehensive expert-led KG review case study that demonstrates end-to-end curation and quality assurance. The web application is publicly available at www.sskg-hub.com.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了SSKG Hub，一个基于大型语言模型（LLM）和专家指导的知识图谱（KG）平台，用于将复杂的 and 冗长的可持续性披露标准转化为结构化、可审计的知识图谱，并提供交互式数据可视化和分析功能。
AI.motivation: 现有的可持续性披露标准（如GRI, SASB, TCFD, IFRS S2）复杂、术语密集且交叉引用多，阻碍了结构化分析和下游应用。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了一个以LLM为中心、专家指导的流水线，用于自动识别、分块、提示和解析可持续性披露标准，并将其存储在具有溯源信息的Neo4j数据库中，形成可审计的知识图谱。平台通过专家审阅、元专家裁定和基于角色的治理框架来确保知识图谱的质量和可追溯性。
AI.result: SSKG Hub成功地将可持续性披露标准转化为结构化的知识图谱，支持图谱探索、证据追溯、跨图谱融合以及特定任务驱动的分析。通过专家主导的案例研究，验证了平台的端到端策展和质量保证能力。
AI.conclusion: SSKG Hub为解决现有可持续性披露标准的复杂性和可访问性问题提供了一个有效的解决方案，通过将非结构化文本转化为结构化、可审计的知识图谱，极大地促进了对可持续性披露标准的理解和利用。

title: LiTS: A Modular Framework for LLM Tree Search
summary: LiTS is a modular Python framework for LLM reasoning via tree search. It decomposes tree search into three reusable components (Policy, Transition, and RewardModel) that plug into algorithms like MCTS and BFS. A decorator-based registry enables domain experts to extend to new domains by registering components, and algorithmic researchers to implement custom search algorithms. We demonstrate composability on MATH500 (language reasoning), Crosswords (environment planning), and MapEval (tool use), showing that components and algorithms are orthogonal: components are reusable across algorithms within each task type, and algorithms work across all components and domains. We also report a mode-collapse finding: in infinite action spaces, LLM policy diversity (not reward quality) is the bottleneck for effective tree search. A demonstration video is available at https://youtu.be/nRGX43YrR3I. The package is released under the Apache 2.0 license at https://github.com/xinzhel/lits-llm, including installation instructions and runnable examples that enable users to reproduce the demonstrated workflows.

AI.tldr: LiTS是一个模块化的Python框架，通过树搜索实现LLM推理。它将树搜索分解为策略、转移和奖励模型三个可重用组件，可与MCTS和BFS等算法结合。该框架支持领域专家通过装饰器注册组件来扩展新领域，也支持算法研究人员实现自定义搜索算法。LiTS在MATH500、Crosswords和MapEval等任务上展示了其组合性和跨域、跨算法的通用性。研究还发现，在无限动作空间中，LLM策略的多样性而非奖励质量是树搜索有效性的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: LLM推理通常需要复杂的规划和搜索，现有方法往往耦合度高，难以复用和扩展。研究者希望提供一个灵活、模块化的框架，以促进LLM推理的研究和应用。
AI.method: LiTS框架将LLM推理的树搜索过程分解为Policy、Transition和RewardModel三个独立且可插拔的组件。通过装饰器注册机制，允许用户轻松添加新的组件或算法。框架支持MCTS和BFS等通用搜索算法，并被应用于MATH500（语言推理）、Crosswords（环境规划）和MapEval（工具使用）等多个任务。
AI.result: LiTS框架展现了良好的组件和算法正交性，组件可在同一任务类型内跨算法复用，算法也可跨所有组件和领域工作。在MATH500、Crosswords和MapEval上的实验证明了其有效性。研究还发现，当动作空间无限时，LLM策略的多样性是限制树搜索效果的关键因素，而非奖励模型的质量。
AI.conclusion: LiTS提供了一个模块化、可组合的LLM推理框架，通过将树搜索分解为可复用组件，大大提高了研究的灵活性和效率。该框架支持领域专家和算法研究人员的定制化需求，并且其研究发现为未来LLM推理算法的设计提供了重要指导，特别是在处理无限动作空间时，应关注提升LLM策略的多样性。

title: Wild-Drive: Off-Road Scene Captioning and Path Planning via Robust Multi-modal Routing and Efficient Large Language Model
summary: Explainability and transparent decision-making are essential for the safe deployment of autonomous driving systems. Scene captioning summarizes environmental conditions and risk factors in natural language, improving transparency, safety, and human--robot interaction. However, most existing approaches target structured urban scenarios; in off-road environments, they are vulnerable to single-modality degradations caused by rain, fog, snow, and darkness, and they lack a unified framework that jointly models structured scene captioning and path planning. To bridge this gap, we propose Wild-Drive, an efficient framework for off-road scene captioning and path planning. Wild-Drive adopts modern multimodal encoders and introduces a task-conditioned modality-routing bridge, MoRo-Former, to adaptively aggregate reliable information under degraded sensing. It then integrates an efficient large language model (LLM), together with a planning token and a gate recurrent unit (GRU) decoder, to generate structured captions and predict future trajectories. We also build the OR-C2P Benchmark, which covers structured off-road scene captioning and path planning under diverse sensor corruption conditions. Experiments on OR-C2P dataset and a self-collected dataset show that Wild-Drive outperforms prior LLM-based methods and remains more stable under degraded sensing. The code and benchmark will be publicly available at https://github.com/wangzihanggg/Wild-Drive.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为Wild-Drive的框架，用于在恶劣的越野环境下进行场景文字描述和路径规划，能够适应传感器退化，并优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶的解释性和决策透明度不足，尤其是在雨、雾、雪、黑暗等恶劣天气或光照条件下的越野环境中，场景描述和路径规划方法存在单模态退化和缺乏统一框架的问题。
AI.method: Wild-Drive框架使用多模态编码器，引入了MoRo-Former（一种任务条件模态路由桥）来聚合可靠信息，并结合了一个高效的大型语言模型（LLM）、规划令牌和GRU解码器来生成结构化文字描述并预测未来轨迹。
AI.result: 在OR-C2P基准和自收集数据集上的实验表明，Wild-Drive在恶劣感知条件下比现有基于LLM的方法表现更好，并且更加稳定。
AI.conclusion: Wild-Drive为越野场景下的文字描述和路径规划提供了一个高效的统一框架，能够有效处理传感器退化问题，并提高了自动驾驶系统的透明度和安全性。

title: DINOv3 Meets YOLO26 for Weed Detection in Vegetable Crops
summary: Developing robust models for precision vegetable weeding is currently constrained by the scarcity of large-scale, annotated weed-crop datasets. To address this limitation, this study proposes a foundational crop-weed detection model by integrating heterogeneous datasets and leveraging self-supervised learning. A total of 618,642 crop-weed images were initially collected and subsequently refined to 199,388 filtered images for fine-tuning a DINOv3 vision transformer (ViT-small) through a sequential curation strategy. The fine-tuned DINOv3 backbone was then integrated into YOLO26, serving either as a primary backbone or part of a dual-backbone architecture. A feature alignment loss was introduced in the dual backbone framework to enhance feature fusion with minimal computational overhead. Experimental results show that the proposed DINOv3-finetuned ViT-small-based YOLO26-large achieved up to a +5.4% mAP50 gain on in-domain images collected in the 2025 season. Moreover, it demonstrated strong cross-domain generalization with mAP50 improvements of +14.0% on the 2021-2023 season dataset and +11.9% on the 2024 season dataset, compared to the standard YOLO26-large. Although the DINOv3-YOLO26-large model has 45.6% more parameters and a 2.9x increase in inference latency, it maintains real-time performance at ~28.5 frames per second (fps). The curated dataset and software programs developed in this study will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种利用异构数据集和自监督学习的作物杂草检测模型，通过微调DINOv3 Vision Transformer并将其集成到YOLOv26中，显著提高了作物杂草检测的准确性和跨领域泛化能力，同时保持了实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现有精度蔬菜除草模型面临大规模、标注过的杂草作物数据集稀缺的限制。
AI.method: 收集并筛选了大量杂草作物图像，利用自监督学习（DINOv3）对Vision Transformer（ViT-small）进行微调。然后将微调后的DINOv3骨干网络集成到YOLOv26中，采用单一骨干或双骨干架构。在双骨干框架中引入了特征对齐损失。
AI.result: 基于DINOv3微调的ViT-small的YOLOv26-large模型在当前季节的图像上mAP50提高了+5.4%。该模型在跨领域泛化方面表现出色，与标准YOLOv26-large相比，在2021-2023年数据集和2024年数据集上的mAP50分别提高了+14.0%和+11.9%。尽管参数量和推理延迟有所增加，但仍能实现约28.5 fps的实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合异构数据集和利用自监督学习，所提出的DINOv3微调ViT-small骨干的YOLOv26模型有效解决了数据稀缺问题，提高了作物杂草检测的精度和泛化能力，并提供了可公开访问的数据集和软件。

title: Polynomial Mixing for Efficient Self-supervised Speech Encoders
summary: State-of-the-art speech-to-text models typically employ Transformer-based encoders that model token dependencies via self-attention mechanisms. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention in both memory and computation imposes significant constraints on scalability. In this work, we propose a novel token-mixing mechanism, the Polynomial Mixer (PoM), as a drop-in replacement for multi-head self-attention. PoM computes a polynomial representation of the input with linear complexity with respect to the input sequence length. We integrate PoM into a self-supervised speech representation learning framework based on BEST-RQ and evaluate its performance on downstream speech recognition tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that PoM achieves a competitive word error rate compared to full self-attention and other linear-complexity alternatives, offering an improved trade-off between performance and efficiency in time and memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PoM（Polynomial Mixer）的新型Token混合机制，作为Transformer中自注意力机制的线性复杂度替代方案，在语音识别任务中取得了具有竞争力的性能，并提高了效率。
AI.motivation: 自注意力机制在语音转文本模型中具有二次复杂度，限制了其可扩展性。研究旨在寻找一种更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出并实现了一种名为PoM（Polynomial Mixer）的Token混合机制，它通过多项式表示来处理输入，具有相对于序列长度的线性复杂度。将PoM集成到基于BEST-RQ的自监督语音表示学习框架中，并在下游语音识别任务上进行评估。
AI.result: PoM在语音识别任务上取得了与全自注意力机制和其他线性复杂度替代方案相比具有竞争力的词错误率，并在时间和内存方面提供了更好的性能与效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: PoM是一种有效的Transformer替代方案，能够降低计算复杂度，同时保持良好的语音识别性能，为构建更具可扩展性的语音转文本模型提供了新思路。

title: Keyframe-Guided Structured Rewards for Reinforcement Learning in Long-Horizon Laboratory Robotics
summary: Long-horizon precision manipulation in laboratory automation, such as pipette tip attachment and liquid transfer, requires policies that respect strict procedural logic while operating in continuous, high-dimensional state spaces. However, existing approaches struggle with reward sparsity, multi-stage structural constraints, and noisy or imperfect demonstrations, leading to inefficient exploration and unstable convergence. We propose a Keyframe-Guided Reward Generation Framework that automatically extracts kinematics-aware keyframes from demonstrations, generates stage-wise targets via a diffusion-based predictor in latent space, and constructs a geometric progress-based reward to guide online reinforcement learning. The framework integrates multi-view visual encoding, latent similarity-based progress tracking, and human-in-the-loop reinforcement fine-tuning on a Vision-Language-Action backbone to align policy optimization with the intrinsic stepwise logic of biological protocols. Across four real-world laboratory tasks, including high-precision pipette attachment and dynamic liquid transfer, our method achieves an average success rate of 82% after 40--60 minutes of online fine-tuning. Compared with HG-DAgger (42%) and Hil-ConRFT (47%), our approach demonstrates the effectiveness of structured keyframe-guided rewards in overcoming exploration bottlenecks and providing a scalable solution for high-precision, long-horizon robotic laboratory automation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种关键帧引导奖励生成框架，用于处理实验室自动化中的长程精密操作。该框架通过提取关键帧、生成阶段性目标并构建基于几何进度的奖励，来指导在线强化学习，有效解决了现有方法在奖励稀疏性和多阶段约束方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有实验室自动化方法难以处理奖励稀疏、多阶段约束和不完美演示等问题，导致探索效率低下和收敛不稳定。
AI.method: 提出关键帧引导奖励生成框架，该框架从演示中提取与运动学相关的关键帧，利用基于扩散的模型在潜在空间中生成阶段性目标，并构建基于几何进度的奖励来指导在线强化学习。该框架结合了多视图视觉编码、基于潜在相似度的进度跟踪以及人类在环强化微调。
AI.result: 在四项真实的实验室任务（包括高精度移液器吸嘴安装和动态液体转移）上，该方法在40-60分钟的在线微调后平均成功率达到82%，显著优于HG-DAgger（42%）和Hil-ConRFT（47%）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的关键帧引导奖励在克服探索瓶颈方面是有效的，为高精度、长程的机器人实验室自动化提供了一个可扩展的解决方案。

title: InfoPO: Information-Driven Policy Optimization for User-Centric Agents
summary: Real-world user requests to LLM agents are often underspecified. Agents must interact to acquire missing information and make correct downstream decisions. However, current multi-turn GRPO-based methods often rely on trajectory-level reward computation, which leads to credit assignment problems and insufficient advantage signals within rollout groups. A feasible approach is to identify valuable interaction turns at a fine granularity to drive more targeted learning. To address this, we introduce InfoPO (Information-Driven Policy Optimization), which frames multi-turn interaction as a process of active uncertainty reduction and computes an information-gain reward that credits turns whose feedback measurably changes the agent's subsequent action distribution compared to a masked-feedback counterfactual. It then combines this signal with task outcomes via an adaptive variance-gated fusion to identify information importance while maintaining task-oriented goal direction. Across diverse tasks, including intent clarification, collaborative coding, and tool-augmented decision making, InfoPO consistently outperforms prompting and multi-turn RL baselines. It also demonstrates robustness under user simulator shifts and generalizes effectively to environment-interactive tasks. Overall, InfoPO provides a principled and scalable mechanism for optimizing complex agent-user collaboration. Code is available at https://github.com/kfq20/InfoPO.

AI.tldr: InfoPO 是一种新的信息驱动策略优化方法，通过计算信息增益奖励来解决 LLM 代理在处理不明确的用户请求时，与用户进行多轮交互学习效率低下的问题，并在多项任务中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中 LLM 代理常面临用户请求不明确的问题，需要通过多轮交互获取信息。然而，现有的基于 GRPO 的方法存在信用分配问题，难以有效地学习有价值的交互轮次。因此，需要一种更精细化的方法来指导代理学习。
AI.method: InfoPO 将多轮交互视为主动减少不确定性的过程。它计算一种信息增益奖励，该奖励会奖励那些其反馈能够显著改变代理后续动作分布的交互轮次（与掩码反馈的反事实对比）。然后，InfoPO 将此信号与任务结果通过自适应的方差门控融合，以识别信息重要性，同时保持面向任务的目标导向。
AI.result: InfoPO 在意图澄清、协作编码和工具增强决策制定等多样化任务中，持续优于现有提示和多轮强化学习基线。它还表现出对用户模拟器变化的鲁棒性，并能有效地泛化到环境交互任务。
AI.conclusion: InfoPO 提供了一种原则性且可扩展的机制，用于优化复杂的代理-用户协作，尤其在处理不明确的用户请求时，能更有效地学习有价值的交互信息。

title: SKINOPATHY AI: Smartphone-Based Ophthalmic Screening and Longitudinal Tracking Using Lightweight Computer Vision
summary: Early ophthalmic screening in low-resource and remote settings is constrained by access to specialized equipment and trained practitioners. We present SKINOPATHY AI, a smartphone-first web application that delivers five complementary, explainable screening modules entirely through commodity mobile hardware: (1) redness quantification via LAB a* color-space normalization; (2) blink-rate estimation using MediaPipe FaceMesh Eye Aspect Ratio (EAR) with adaptive thresholding; (3) pupil light reflex characterization through Pupil-to-Iris Ratio (PIR) time-series analysis; (4) scleral color indexing foricterus and anemia proxies via LAB/HSV statistics; and (5) iris-landmark-calibrated lesion encroachment measurement with millimeter-scale estimates and longitudinal trend tracking. The system is implemented as a React/FastAPI stack with OpenCV and MediaPipe, MongoDB-backed session persistence, and PDF report generation. All algorithms are fully deterministic, privacy-preserving, and designed for non-diagnostic consumer triage. We detail system architecture, algorithm design, evaluation methodology, clinical context, and ethical boundaries of the platform. SKINOPATHY AI demonstrates that multi-signal ophthalmic screening is feasible on unmodified smartphones without cloud-based AI inference, providing a foundation for future clinically validated mobile ophthalmoscopy tools.

AI.tldr: SKINOPATHY AI 是一款基于智能手机的筛查应用，无需专业设备即可进行五种眼科指标的量化，为低资源地区提供眼科筛查的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 在低资源和偏远地区，由于缺乏专业设备和医生，早期眼科筛查受到限制。
AI.method: 开发了一款名为 SKINOPATHY AI 的智能手机 Web 应用，包含五个独立的、可解释的筛查模块，完全利用普通智能手机硬件实现。模块包括：红肿量化、眨眼率估计、瞳孔光反射特征分析、巩膜颜色索引（用于黄疸和贫血筛查）以及虹膜标志物校准的病变侵占测量。技术栈包括 React/FastAPI、OpenCV、MediaPipe、MongoDB 和 PDF 报告生成。所有算法均确定性、隐私保护，并用于非诊断性消费者初步筛查。
AI.result: SKINOPATHY AI 可以在未修改的智能手机上实现多信号眼科筛查，无需云端 AI 推理。
AI.conclusion: SKINOPATHY AI 证明了在普通智能手机上进行多信号眼科筛查是可行的，为未来临床验证的移动眼科检查工具奠定了基础。

title: K^2-Agent: Co-Evolving Know-What and Know-How for Hierarchical Mobile Device Control
summary: Existing mobile device control agents often perform poorly when solving complex tasks requiring long-horizon planning and precise operations, typically due to a lack of relevant task experience or unfamiliarity with skill execution. We propose K2-Agent, a hierarchical framework that models human-like cognition by separating and co-evolving declarative (knowing what) and procedural (knowing how) knowledge for planning and execution. K2-Agent's high level reasoner is bootstrapped from a single demonstration per task and runs a Summarize-Reflect-Locate-Revise (SRLR) loop to distill and iteratively refine task-level declarative knowledge through self-evolution. The low-level executor is trained with our curriculum-guided Group Relative Policy Optimization (C-GRPO), which (i) constructs a balanced sample pool using decoupled reward signals and (ii) employs dynamic demonstration injection to guide the model in autonomously generating successful trajectories for training. On the challenging AndroidWorld benchmark, K2-Agent achieves a 76.1% success rate using only raw screenshots and open-source backbones. Furthermore, K2-Agent shows powerful dual generalization: its high-level declarative knowledge transfers across diverse base models, while its low-level procedural skills achieve competitive performance on unseen tasks in ScreenSpot-v2 and Android-in-the-Wild (AitW).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为K2-Agent的层次化框架，通过分离和协同发展声明式（知道什么）和程序式（知道如何）知识，来解决移动设备控制中长远规划和精确操作的挑战，并在AndroidWorld基准上取得了76.1%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的移动设备控制代理在解决需要长远规划和精确操作的复杂任务时表现不佳，主要是由于缺乏相关的任务经验或不熟悉技能执行。
AI.method: K2-Agent采用层次化框架，高层推理器通过单次演示引导，运行SRLR循环（Summarize-Reflect-Locate-Revise）来提炼和迭代优化声明式知识。低层执行器采用C-GRPO（Curriculum-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization）进行训练，该方法通过解耦的奖励信号构建平衡样本池，并采用动态演示注入来指导模型自主生成成功的训练轨迹。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld基准上，K2-Agent仅使用原始截图和开源骨干网络，取得了76.1%的成功率。同时，K2-Agent展现了强大的双重泛化能力：其高层声明式知识可以跨不同基础模型迁移，低层程序式技能在ScreenSpot-v2和Android-in-the-Wild (AitW)上的新任务上也表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: K2-Agent通过结合声明式和程序式知识的协同进化，有效提升了移动设备控制的复杂任务处理能力，并具备良好的知识迁移和技能泛化能力。

title: RAVEL: Reasoning Agents for Validating and Evaluating LLM Text Synthesis
summary: Large Language Models have evolved from single-round generators into long-horizon agents, capable of complex text synthesis scenarios. However, current evaluation frameworks lack the ability to assess the actual synthesis operations, such as outlining, drafting, and editing.
