Consequently, they fail to evaluate the actual and detailed capabilities of LLMs. To bridge this gap, we introduce RAVEL, an agentic framework that enables the LLM testers to autonomously plan and execute typical synthesis operations, including outlining, drafting, reviewing, and refining. Complementing this framework, we present C3EBench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 1,258 samples derived from professional human writings. We utilize a "reverse-engineering" pipeline to isolate specific capabilities across four tasks: Cloze, Edit, Expand, and End-to-End. Through our analysis of 14 LLMs, we uncover that most LLMs struggle with tasks that demand contextual understanding under limited or under-specified instructions. By augmenting RAVEL with SOTA LLMs as operators, we find that such agentic text synthesis is dominated by the LLM's reasoning capability rather than raw generative capacity. Furthermore, we find that a strong reasoner can guide a weaker generator to yield higher-quality results, whereas the inverse does not hold. Our code and data are available at this link: https://github.com/ZhuoerFeng/RAVEL-Reasoning-Agents-Text-Eval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RAVEL框架和C3EBench基准，用于评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在文本合成操作（如规划、起草、审查和精炼）方面的能力。研究发现，LLMs在上下文理解和不明确指令下的任务表现不佳，并且代理式文本合成更依赖于LLM的推理能力而非生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型评估框架无法有效评估LLMs在文本合成操作（如大纲、起草、编辑）方面的具体能力，因此需要新的评估方法来弥补这一差距。
AI.method: 引入RAVEL框架，使LLM能够自主规划和执行文本合成操作。构建C3EBench基准，包含1,258个专业人类写作样本，并通过“逆向工程”管道设计了Cloze、Edit、Expand和End-to-End四个任务来分离特定能力。
AI.result: 对14个LLMs的分析表明，大多数LLMs在需要上下文理解和处理不明确指令的任务上表现不佳。增强RAVEL框架后，代理式文本合成的能力主要取决于LLM的推理能力。研究还发现，强大的推理能力可以指导较弱的生成器产生更高质量的结果，反之则不然。
AI.conclusion: RAVEL框架和C3EBench能够有效评估LLMs的文本合成能力，揭示了LLMs在特定任务上的局限性，并强调了推理能力在代理式文本合成中的重要性。

title: UniHM: Unified Dexterous Hand Manipulation with Vision Language Model
summary: Planning physically feasible dexterous hand manipulation is a central challenge in robotic manipulation and Embodied AI. Prior work typically relies on object-centric cues or precise hand-object interaction sequences, foregoing the rich, compositional guidance of open-vocabulary instruction. We introduce UniHM, the first framework for unified dexterous hand manipulation guided by free-form language commands. We propose a Unified Hand-Dexterous Tokenizer that maps heterogeneous dexterous-hand morphologies into a single shared codebook, improving cross-dexterous hand generalization and scalability to new morphologies. Our vision language action model is trained solely on human-object interaction data, eliminating the need for massive real-world teleoperation datasets, and demonstrates strong generalizability in producing human-like manipulation sequences from open-ended language instructions. To ensure physical realism, we introduce a physics-guided dynamic refinement module that performs segment-wise joint optimization under generative and temporal priors, yielding smooth and physically feasible manipulation sequences. Across multiple datasets and real-world evaluations, UniHM attains state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen objects and trajectories, demonstrating strong generalization and high physical feasibility. Our project page at \href{https://unihm.github.io/}{https://unihm.github.io/}.

AI.tldr: UniHM是一个统一的灵巧手操作框架，能够理解自由形式的语言指令，并生成物理上可行的操作序列。它通过统一的灵巧手 tokenizer、仅使用人类交互数据训练的视觉语言动作模型以及物理引导的动态精炼模块来实现。
AI.motivation: 现有在机器人操纵和具身AI中进行物理上可行的灵巧手操作的研究，通常依赖于以物体为中心的线索或精确的手-物体交互序列，而忽略了开放词汇指令的丰富、组合式指导。本研究旨在弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 1. 统一灵巧手 Tokenizer：将异构的灵巧手形态映射到单一共享的代码本，以提高跨灵巧手泛化能力和对新形态的可扩展性。 2. 视觉语言动作模型：仅在人类-物体交互数据上进行训练。 3. 物理引导的动态精炼模块：在生成式和时间先验下进行分段式关节优化，以生成平滑且物理上可行的操作序列。
AI.result: UniHM 在多项数据集和真实世界评估中，在已见和未见物体以及轨迹上均取得了最先进的成果，展示了强大的泛化能力和高物理可行性。
AI.conclusion: UniHM 是首个能够通过自由形式语言指令进行统一灵巧手操作的框架，克服了现有方法的局限性，能够生成人类般且物理上可行的操作序列，并在泛化性和物理可行性方面表现出色。

title: DRIV-EX: Counterfactual Explanations for Driving LLMs
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as reasoning engines in autonomous driving, yet their decision-making remains opaque. We propose to study their decision process through counterfactual explanations, which identify the minimal semantic changes to a scene description required to alter a driving plan.
  We introduce DRIV-EX, a method that leverages gradient-based optimization on continuous embeddings to identify the input shifts required to flip the model's decision. Crucially, to avoid the incoherent text typical of unconstrained continuous optimization, DRIV-EX uses these optimized embeddings solely as a semantic guide: they are used to bias a controlled decoding process that re-generates the original scene description. This approach effectively steers the generation toward the counterfactual target while guaranteeing the linguistic fluency, domain validity, and proximity to the original input, essential for interpretability.
  Evaluated using the LC-LLM planner on a textual transcription of the highD dataset, DRIV-EX generates valid, fluent counterfactuals more reliably than existing baselines. It successfully exposes latent biases and provides concrete insights to improve the robustness of LLM-based driving agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 DRIV-EX 的方法，通过生成语言流畅、语义相近的逆事实解释来提高大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动驾驶中的决策可解释性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动驾驶中被用作推理引擎，但其决策过程不透明，需要一种方法来理解和解释其决策。
AI.method: DRIV-EX 利用基于梯度的优化来寻找最小的语义变化，以改变LLM的驾驶计划。通过将优化后的嵌入作为语义指导，并结合受控解码过程来重新生成原始场景描述，从而确保生成结果的语言流畅性、领域有效性和与原始输入的接近度。
AI.result: 在 LC-LLM 规划器和 highD 数据集的文本转录上进行的评估表明，DRIV-EX 比现有基线能更可靠地生成有效且流畅的逆事实解释，并能揭示潜在的偏见。
AI.conclusion: DRIV-EX 是一种有效的方法，可以提高 LLM 在自动驾驶中的可解释性，通过生成高质量的逆事实解释来暴露模型偏见，并为提高 LLM 驱动的驾驶代理的鲁棒性提供见解。

title: Online Generation of Collision-Free Trajectories in Dynamic Environments
comment: Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: In this paper, we present an online method for converting an arbitrary geometric path represented by a sequence of states, generated by any planner (e.g., sampling-based planners like RRT or PRM, search-based planners like ARA*, etc.), into a corresponding kinematically feasible, jerk-limited trajectory. The method generates a sequence of quintic/quartic splines that can be discretized at a user-specified control rate, and then streamed to a low-level robot controller. Our approach enables real-time adaptation to newly captured changes in the environment. It can also be re-invoked at any time instance to generate a new trajectory from the robot's current to a desired target state or sequence of states. We can guarantee that the trajectory will remain collision-free for a certain amount of time in dynamic environments, while allowing bounded geometric deviation from the original path. The kinematic constraints are taken into account, including limited jerk. We validate the approach in a comparative simulation study against the competing method, demonstrating favorable behavior w.r.t. smoothness, computational time, and real-time performance, particularly in scenarios with frequent changes of target states (up to 1 [kHz]). Experiments on a real robot demonstrate that the proposed approach can be used in real-world scenarios including human presence.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种在线方法，将任意几何路径转换为运动学可行、加加速度受限的轨迹，能够实时适应环境变化，并在动态环境中保证一定时间内的无碰撞性。
AI.motivation: 现有的路径规划方法生成的几何路径通常不满足机器人的运动学约束（如速度、加速度、加加速度限制），并且难以在动态环境中实时更新以适应环境变化。
AI.method: 使用一系列五次/四次样条插值来生成运动学上可行且加加速度受限的轨迹。该方法可以以用户指定的控制速率进行离散化，并流式传输到低级机器人控制器。允许在保证无碰撞性的前提下，对原始路径有一定程度的几何偏差。
AI.result: 在仿真研究中，与现有方法相比，该方法在平滑性、计算时间和实时性能方面表现更优，尤其是在频繁更改目标状态的场景下（最高可达 1 kHz）。在真实机器人实验中也验证了其在包含人类存在的真实场景中的可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种有效的在线轨迹生成技术，能够将任意几何路径转换为满足运动学约束的、平滑的、可实时更新的轨迹，适用于动态环境和实时应用场景。

title: AIoT-based Continuous, Contextualized, and Explainable Driving Assessment for Older Adults
summary: The world is undergoing a major demographic shift as older adults become a rapidly growing share of the population, creating new challenges for driving safety. In car-dependent regions such as the United States, driving remains essential for independence, access to services, and social participation. At the same time, aging can introduce gradual changes in vision, attention, reaction time, and driving control that quietly reduce safety. Today's assessment methods rely largely on infrequent clinic visits or simple screening tools, offering only a brief snapshot and failing to reflect how an older adult actually drives on the road. Our work starts from the observation that everyday driving provides a continuous record of functional ability and captures how a driver responds to traffic, navigates complex roads, and manages routine behavior. Leveraging this insight, we propose AURA, an Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) framework for continuous, real-world assessment of driving safety among older adults. AURA integrates richer in-vehicle sensing, multi-scale behavioral modeling, and context-aware analysis to extract detailed indicators of driving performance from routine trips. It organizes fine-grained actions into longer behavioral trajectories and separates age-related performance changes from situational factors such as traffic, road design, or weather. By integrating sensing, modeling, and interpretation within a privacy-preserving edge architecture, AURA provides a foundation for proactive, individualized support that helps older adults drive safely. This paper outlines the design principles, challenges, and research opportunities needed to build reliable, real-world monitoring systems that promote safer aging behind the wheel.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 AURA 的人工智能物联网 (AIoT) 框架，用于在日常驾驶中持续评估老年人的驾驶安全。该框架通过车内传感器、多尺度行为建模和情境感知分析，提取详细的驾驶表现指标，以区分与年龄相关的能力下降和外部环境因素，从而为主动、个性化的安全支持提供基础。
AI.motivation: 随着全球老年人口比例快速增长，老年人驾驶安全面临新的挑战。现有的评估方法（如诊所访问或简单筛查工具）仅提供短暂快照，无法反映实际驾驶表现。因此，需要一种能够持续、真实地评估老年人驾驶安全的方法。
AI.method: 利用车内传感器、多尺度行为建模和情境感知分析，整合了丰富的数据采集、精细的行为分析和对环境因素的识别。该框架将细粒度的驾驶动作整合成长期的行为轨迹，并将年龄相关的表现变化与交通、道路设计或天气等情境因素分离开来。采用隐私保护的边缘计算架构。
AI.result: AURA 框架能够从日常驾驶中提取详细的驾驶表现指标，并区分与年龄相关的能力下降和外部情境因素。为实现主动、个性化的驾驶支持奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: AURA 框架代表了一种在真实世界环境中持续监测老年人驾驶安全的新方法，有望通过提供更准确、更及时的评估来促进老年人的驾驶安全，并为相关研究和系统开发提供了方向。

title: SkillCraft: Can LLM Agents Learn to Use Tools Skillfully?
comment: 21 pages. Code: https://github.com/shiqichen17/SkillCraft ; Project page: https://skillcraft-website.github.io/page
summary: Real-world tool-using agents operate over long-horizon workflows with recurring structure and diverse demands, where effective behavior requires not only invoking atomic tools but also abstracting, and reusing higher-level tool compositions. However, existing benchmarks mainly measure instance-level success under static tool sets, offering limited insight into agents' ability to acquire such reusable skills. We address this gap by introducing SkillCraft, a benchmark explicitly stress-test agent ability to form and reuse higher-level tool compositions, where we call Skills. SkillCraft features realistic, highly compositional tool-use scenarios with difficulty scaled along both quantitative and structural dimensions, designed to elicit skill abstraction and cross-task reuse. We further propose a lightweight evaluation protocol that enables agents to auto-compose atomic tools into executable Skills, cache and reuse them inside and across tasks, thereby improving efficiency while accumulating a persistent library of reusable skills. Evaluating state-of-the-art agents on SkillCraft, we observe substantial efficiency gains, with token usage reduced by up to 80% by skill saving and reuse. Moreover, success rate strongly correlates with tool composition ability at test time, underscoring compositional skill acquisition as a core capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 SkillCraft 基准测试，用于评估智能体学习和重用高层工具组合（称为技能）的能力，并提出一种轻量级评估协议，可以显著提高效率并提升成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要评估在静态工具集下的实例级成功，无法深入了解智能体获取和重用高层工具组合的能力，而这对于现实世界的长远工作流至关重要。
AI.method: 引入 SkillCraft 基准测试，包含真实、高度组合化的工具使用场景，并设计轻量级评估协议，允许智能体自动组合原子工具形成可执行技能，并在任务内外缓存和重用，从而提高效率并积累可重用技能库。
AI.result: 在 SkillCraft 上评估最先进的智能体，观察到显著的效率提升（技能节省和重用可将 token 使用量减少高达 80%），并且成功率与测试时的工具组合能力强相关。
AI.conclusion: 组合化技能获取是智能体实现高效长远工作流的关键能力，SkillCraft 基准测试和提出的评估协议能够有效度量和促进这一能力的发展。

title: ConFoThinking: Consolidated Focused Attention Driven Thinking for Visual Question Answering
summary: Thinking with Images improves fine-grained VQA for MLLMs by emphasizing visual cues. However, tool-augmented methods depend on the capacity of grounding, which remains unreliable for MLLMs. In parallel, attention-driven methods to crop the Region of Interest (ROIs) are proposed but they are constrained by (1) fragmented attention signals scattered across layers, leading to suboptimal localization and (2) relying on question- or redundant-text-conditioned attention extraction. Our analysis reveals three patterns: MLLMs may attend to the correct region yet generate incorrect coordinates, where-to-look attention is often fragmented across layers, and attention extraction is query-sensitive. Motivated by these, We propose ConFoThinking, a Consolidated-Focused-Attention-Driven Thinking framework that learns to aggregate attention into a designated intermediate layer, from which we mine and zoom in salient regions for downstream visual understanding. Moreover, we extract attention using concise semantic cues of what to look into, which mitigates the semantic noise introduced by question- or redundant-text-based attention extraction. Experiments across five VQA benchmarks demonstrate ConFoThinking significantly improves perception performance. The code, checkpoints, and dataset will be released after being accepted.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ConFoThinking的框架，通过整合和聚焦注意力机制，提升了多模态大模型（MLLMs）在细粒度视觉问答（VQA）任务上的表现，解决了现有方法在区域定位和注意力提取上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强方法在MLLMs的定位能力上存在不足，而基于注意力的方法存在注意力信号分散、依赖问题或冗余文本条件以及注意力提取对查询敏感等问题。研究者希望解决这些挑战，提升MLLMs在细粒度VQA任务中的视觉感知能力。
AI.method: 提出ConFoThinking框架，该框架学习将注意力聚合到一个指定的中间层，并从中提取显著区域用于下游视觉理解。同时，使用简洁的语义线索来提取注意力，以减少问题或冗余文本引起的语义噪声。
AI.result: 在五个VQA基准测试中的实验表明，ConFoThinking显著提高了MLLMs的感知性能。
AI.conclusion: ConFoThinking通过整合和聚焦注意力机制，有效解决了现有细粒度VQA方法面临的挑战，能够显著提升MLLMs的视觉理解能力。

title: A Boundary-Metric Evaluation Protocol for Whiteboard Stroke Segmentation Under Extreme Imbalance
summary: The binary segmentation of whiteboard strokes is hindered by extreme class imbalance, caused by stroke pixels that constitute only $1.79%$ of the image on average, and in addition, the thin-stroke subset averages $1.14% \pm 0.41%$ in the foreground. Standard region metrics (F1, IoU) can mask thin-stroke failures because the vast majority of the background dominates the score. In contrast, adding boundary-aware metrics and a thin-subset equity analysis changes how loss functions rank and exposes hidden trade-offs. We contribute an evaluation protocol that jointly examines region metrics, boundary metrics (BF1, B-IoU), a core/thin-subset equity analysis, and per-image robustness statistics (median, IQR, worst-case) under seeded, multi-run training with non-parametric significance testing. Five losses -- cross-entropy, focal, Dice, Dice+focal, and Tversky -- are trained three times each on a DeepLabV3-MobileNetV3 model and evaluated on 12 held-out images split into core and thin subsets. Overlap-based losses improve F1 by more than 20 points over cross-entropy ($0.663$ vs $0.438$, $p < 0.001$). In addition, the boundary metrics confirm that the gain extends to the precision of the contour. Adaptive thresholding and Sauvola binarization at native resolution achieve a higher mean F1 ($0.787$ for Sauvola) but with substantially worse worst-case performance (F1 $= 0.452$ vs $0.565$ for Tversky), exposing a consistency-accuracy trade-off: classical baselines lead on mean F1 while the learned model delivers higher worst-case reliability. Doubling training resolution further increases F1 by 12.7 points.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种用于白板笔画二值分割的评估协议，该协议结合了区域、边界指标以及核心/细线子集公平性分析，以克服类不平衡问题。结果表明，基于 Dice 的损失函数在 F1 分数和轮廓精度上优于交叉熵，但与传统二值化方法相比，在最坏情况下的性能一致性较差。
AI.motivation: 标准的区域分割指标（如 F1、IoU）在白板笔画二值分割任务中存在不足，因为笔画像素占比极低（仅占 1.79%），尤其是细线笔画（占 1.14%），导致这些指标无法有效评估模型在细线上的分割效果。类不平衡问题掩盖了模型的失败。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种新的评估协议，该协议结合了区域指标（F1、IoU）、边界指标（BF1、B-IoU）、核心/细线子集公平性分析以及每张图像的鲁棒性统计（中位数、IQR、最坏情况）。他们对五种损失函数（交叉熵、Focal、Dice、Dice+Focal、Tversky）在 DeepLabV3-MobileNetV3 模型上进行了三次训练，并在 12 张保留图像上进行评估，这些图像被分割成核心和细线子集。
AI.result: 基于 Dice 的损失函数比交叉熵在 F1 分数上提高了 20 个点（0.663 vs 0.438），并且边界指标证实了轮廓精度的提升。传统方法（自适应阈值和 Sauvola 二值化）在平均 F1 分数上表现更好（Sauvola 为 0.787），但在最坏情况下的性能（F1 = 0.452）比 Tversky 损失（0.565）差。提高训练分辨率可使 F1 分数提高 12.7 个点。
AI.conclusion: 提出的评估协议能够更全面地评估白板笔画分割模型，揭示了传统二值化方法在平均精度和学习模型在最坏情况下的鲁棒性之间的权衡。基于 Dice 的损失函数在分割精度上优于交叉熵，但与传统方法相比，在一致性方面存在不足。

title: Hippo: High-performance Interior-Point and Projection-based Solver for Generic Constrained Trajectory Optimization
summary: Trajectory optimization is the core of modern model-based robotic control and motion planning. Existing trajectory optimizers, based on sequential quadratic programming (SQP) or differential dynamic programming (DDP), are often limited by their slow computation efficiency, low modeling flexibility, and poor convergence for complex tasks requiring hard constraints. In this paper, we introduce Hippo, a solver that can handle inequality constraints using the interior-point method (IPM) with an adaptive barrier update strategy and hard equality constraints via projection or IPM. Through extensive numerical benchmarks, we show that Hippo is a robust and efficient alternative to existing state-of-the-art solvers for difficult robotic trajectory optimization problems requiring high-quality solutions, such as locomotion and manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hippo的新型轨迹优化求解器，它能够高效处理不等式约束和硬等式约束，在机器人运动规划等复杂任务中展现出优于现有方法的鲁棒性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SQP或DDP的轨迹优化方法在计算效率、模型灵活性和复杂任务的收敛性方面存在局限，尤其是在需要硬约束的情况下。
AI.method: Hippo求解器利用内点法（IPM）和自适应障碍更新策略来处理不等式约束，并采用投影或IPM来处理硬等式约束。
AI.result: 通过广泛的数值基准测试，Hippo被证明在处理需要高质量解决方案的机器人轨迹优化问题（如运动和抓取）时，是一种比现有最先进求解器更鲁棒、更高效的选择。
AI.conclusion: Hippo是一个处理机器人轨迹优化问题的强大且高效的求解器，特别适合于那些具有挑战性和需要严格约束条件的任务。

title: Exploring the AI Obedience: Why is Generating a Pure Color Image Harder than CyberPunk?
summary: Recent advances in generative AI have demonstrated remarkable ability to produce high-quality content. However, these models often exhibit "Paradox of Simplicity": while they can render intricate landscapes, they often fail at simple, deterministic tasks. To address this, we formalize Obedience as the ability to align with instructions and establish a hierarchical grading system ranging from basic semantic alignment to pixel-level systemic precision, which provides a unified paradigm for incorporating and categorizing existing literature. Then, we conduct case studies to identify common obedience gaps, revealing how generative priors often override logical constraints. To evaluate high-level obedience, we present VIOLIN (VIsual Obedience Level-4 EvaluatIoN), the first benchmark focused on pure color generation across six variants. Extensive experiments on SOTA models reveal fundamental obedience limitations and further exploratory insights. By establishing this framework, we aim to draw more attention on AI Obedience and encourage deeper exploration to bridge this gap.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了“服从性”的概念来衡量生成式AI在执行指令方面的能力，并建立了一个分级评价体系。通过案例研究揭示了生成式模型中常见的服从性缺陷，并提出了一个专门评估纯色生成任务的基准VIOLIN。研究发现当前先进模型在服从性方面存在基本局限。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在生成复杂内容方面表现出色，但在简单、确定性任务上却常表现不佳（“简单性悖论”）。研究旨在解决这一问题，并促使AI在执行指令方面更加可靠。
AI.method: 1. 形式化“服从性”（Obedience）作为AI与指令对齐的能力。 2. 建立一个分级的评价体系，从基本语义对齐到像素级精度。 3. 进行案例研究，识别常见的服从性差距，分析生成先验如何覆盖逻辑约束。 4. 提出VIOLIN（Visual Obedience Level-4 Evaluation）基准，专门用于评估纯色生成任务。 5. 在先进模型上进行大量实验。
AI.result: 研究发现了当前先进生成模型在服从性方面存在根本性局限。VIOLIN基准在纯色生成任务上对模型进行了评估，揭示了模型在遵循指令的精确性上的不足。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过提出“服从性”概念和VIOLIN基准，为评估和改进生成式AI的指令遵循能力提供了一个统一框架。研究强调了AI服从性问题的重要性，并鼓励进一步研究以弥合现有差距。

title: MO-MIX: Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Cooperative Decision-Making With Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, published in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied extensively to solve complex decision-making problems. In many real-world scenarios, tasks often have several conflicting objectives and may require multiple agents to cooperate, which are the multi-objective multi-agent decision-making problems. However, only few works have been conducted on this intersection. Existing approaches are limited to separate fields and can only handle multi-agent decision-making with a single objective, or multi-objective decision-making with a single agent. In this paper, we propose MO-MIX to solve the multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning (MOMARL) problem. Our approach is based on the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) framework. A weight vector representing preference over the objectives is fed into the decentralized agent network as a condition for local action-value function estimation, while a mixing network with parallel architecture is used to estimate the joint action-value function. In addition, an exploration guide approach is applied to improve the uniformity of the final non-dominated solutions. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively solve the multi-objective multi-agent cooperative decision-making problem and generate an approximation of the Pareto set. Our approach not only significantly outperforms the baseline method in all four kinds of evaluation metrics, but also requires less computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为MO-MIX的算法，用于解决多目标多智能体强化学习（MOMARL）问题。该算法基于CTDE框架，通过引入权重向量和并行结构的混合网络来估计联合动作价值函数，并利用探索引导方法提升非支配解的均匀性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在多智能体决策和多目标决策领域存在割裂，难以有效解决同时包含多个冲突目标和多个协作智能体的现实问题。
AI.method: 基于CTDE框架，为去中心化智能体网络引入表示目标偏好的权重向量作为条件，用于估计局部动作价值函数；使用并行结构的混合网络估计联合动作价值函数；采用探索引导方法提高最终非支配解的均匀性。
AI.result: MO-MIX能有效解决多目标多智能体合作决策问题，生成帕累托最优解集的近似。在四个评估指标上均显著优于基线方法，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: MO-MIX是一种有效的MOMARL解决方案，能够处理复杂的多目标多智能体合作决策任务，并生成高质量的非支配解集，同时具有较高的计算效率。

title: A Novel Reconfigurable Dexterous Hand Based on Triple-Symmetric Bricard Parallel Mechanism
comment: 8 pages, 14 figures, 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation
summary: This paper introduces a novel design for a robotic hand based on parallel mechanisms. The proposed hand uses a triple-symmetric Bricard linkage as its reconfigurable palm, enhancing adaptability to objects of varying shapes and sizes. Through topological and dimensional synthesis, the mechanism achieves a well-balanced degree of freedom and link configuration suitable for reconfigurable palm motion, balancing dexterity, stability, and load capacity. Furthermore, kinematic analysis is performed using screw theory and closed-loop constraints, and performance is evaluated based on workspace, stiffness, and motion/force transmission efficiency. Finally, a prototype is developed and tested through a series of grasping experiments, demonstrating the ability to perform stable and efficient manipulation across a wide range of objects. The results validate the effectiveness of the design in improving grasping versatility and operational precision, offering a promising solution for advanced robotic manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于平行机构的新型机器人手设计，利用三对称Bricard连杆作为可重构手掌，提高了适应不同形状和大小物体的手指抓握能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人手在适应不同形状和大小的物体方面存在局限性，需要一种更具通用性和稳定性的设计。
AI.method: 采用拓扑和尺寸综合设计了基于三对称Bricard连杆的可重构手掌；使用螺旋理论和闭环约束进行运动学分析；通过工作空间、刚度、运动/力传输效率评估性能；最后制造原型并进行抓握实验。
AI.result: 该设计实现了自由度与连杆配置的良好平衡，兼顾了灵巧性、稳定性和负载能力。原型机的抓握实验证明了其在广泛物体上实现稳定高效抓握的能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于平行机构和可重构手掌的机器人手设计，有效提高了抓握的通用性和操作的精确性，为高级机器人操作任务提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

title: LaSTR: Language-Driven Time-Series Segment Retrieval
summary: Effectively searching time-series data is essential for system analysis, but existing methods often require expert-designed similarity criteria or rely on global, series-level descriptions. We study language-driven segment retrieval: given a natural language query, the goal is to retrieve relevant local segments from large time-series repositories. We build large-scale segment--caption training data by applying TV2-based segmentation to LOTSA windows and generating segment descriptions with GPT-5.2, and then train a Conformer-based contrastive retriever in a shared text--time-series embedding space. On a held-out test split, we evaluate single-positive retrieval together with caption-side consistency (SBERT and VLM-as-a-judge) under multiple candidate pool sizes. Across all settings, LaSTR outperforms random and CLIP baselines, yielding improved ranking quality and stronger semantic agreement between retrieved segments and query intent.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为LaSTR的语言驱动时间序列片段检索方法，通过在大规模时间序列数据上训练Conformer模型，实现了根据自然语言查询准确检索相关局部时间序列片段，优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列搜索方法存在需要专家设计相似性标准或依赖全局描述的局限性。研究旨在开发一种能够根据自然语言查询检索时间序列局部片段的方法。
AI.method: 构建大规模时间序列片段-描述训练数据（通过LOTSA窗口和GPT-5.2生成描述），然后训练一个基于Conformer的对比学习检索器，使其能在共享的文本-时间序列嵌入空间中工作。
AI.result: 在测试集上，LaSTR在单正例检索和描述一致性评估中，均优于随机和CLIP基线方法，在不同候选池大小下都表现出更好的排序质量和更强的语义一致性。
AI.conclusion: LaSTR是一种有效的时间序列片段检索方法，能够根据自然语言查询精确检索局部时间序列片段，并在语义匹配方面优于现有基线。

title: The Synthetic Web: Adversarially-Curated Mini-Internets for Diagnosing Epistemic Weaknesses of Language Agents
comment: Submitted to ICML 2026, currently under review
summary: Language agents increasingly act as web-enabled systems that search, browse, and synthesize information from diverse sources. However, these sources can include unreliable or adversarial content, and the robustness of agents to adversarial ranking - where misleading information appears prominently in search results - remains poorly understood. Existing benchmarks evaluate functional navigation or static factuality but cannot causally isolate this vulnerability, and current mitigation strategies for retrieval-augmented generation remain largely untested under such conditions. We introduce Synthetic Web Benchmark, a procedurally generated environment comprising thousands of hyperlinked articles with ground-truth labels for credibility and factuality, process-level interaction traces, and contamination filtering to eliminate training-data leakage. By injecting a single high-plausibility misinformation article into a controllable search rank, we measure the causal effect of adversarial exposure in six frontier models. The results reveal catastrophic failures: accuracy collapses despite unlimited access to truthful sources, with minimal search escalation and severe miscalibration. These findings expose fundamental limitations in how current frontier models handle conflicting information, with immediate implications for deployment in high-stakes domains. Our benchmark enables systematic analysis of these failure modes and provides a controlled testbed for evaluating mitigation strategies under adversarial ranking - a gap in current research. This work establishes a reproducible baseline for developing search-robust and epistemically humble agents capable of resisting manipulation in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过引入一个名为“合成网络基准”的程序生成环境，研究了语言模型在面对搜索结果中的误导性信息（即对抗性排名）时的鲁棒性，发现当前模型在处理冲突信息方面存在根本性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对语言模型在对抗性排名下的鲁棒性理解不足，现有的评估基准无法隔离这种漏洞，且针对检索增强生成的缓解策略未得到充分测试。
AI.method: 创建了一个名为“合成网络基准”的环境，包含大量带有可信度和事实性真实标签的超链接文章。通过注入高可信度误导信息文章并控制搜索排名，来衡量对抗性信息对六种前沿模型的影响。
AI.result: 结果显示，即使有充足的真实信息来源，模型的准确率也急剧下降，搜索升级有限，并且存在严重的校准失误。
AI.conclusion: 当前前沿模型在处理冲突信息方面存在根本性局限，这对其在高风险领域的部署具有直接影响。该基准提供了一个系统分析故障模式和评估缓解策略的平台，有助于开发更能抵抗操纵的语言代理。

title: Image-Based Classification of Olive Species Specific to Turkiye with Deep Neural Networks
summary: In this study, image processing and deep learning methodologies were employed to automatically classify local olive species cultivated in Turkiye. A stereo camera was utilized to capture images of five distinct olive species, which were then preprocessed to ensure their suitability for analysis. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures, specifically MobileNetV2 and EfficientNetB0, were employed for image classification. These models were optimized through a transfer learning approach. The training and testing results indicated that the EfficientNetB0 model exhibited the optimal performance, with an accuracy of 94.5%. The findings demonstrate that deep learning-based systems offer an effective solution for classifying olive species with high accuracy. The developed method has significant potential for application in areas such as automatic identification and quality control of agricultural products.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习（MobileNetV2 和 EfficientNetB0）和图像处理技术，通过立体相机拍摄的图像，实现了对土耳其五种橄榄的自动分类，其中 EfficientNetB0 模型准确率达到 94.5%。
AI.motivation: 为了实现对土耳其当地橄榄品种的自动分类，提高农业产品识别和质量控制的效率。
AI.method: 使用立体相机捕捉五种不同橄榄品种的图像，进行预处理。采用卷积神经网络（CNN）模型 MobileNetV2 和 EfficientNetB0，并利用迁移学习进行优化和训练，对图像进行分类。
AI.result: EfficientNetB0 模型在橄榄品种分类任务中表现出最佳性能，准确率高达 94.5%。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的系统能够高精度地对橄榄品种进行分类，为农业产品的自动识别和质量控制提供了有效的解决方案。

title: A Novel Evolutionary Method for Automated Skull-Face Overlay in Computer-Aided Craniofacial Superimposition
summary: Craniofacial Superimposition is a forensic technique for identifying skeletal remains by comparing a post-mortem skull with ante-mortem facial photographs. A critical step in this process is Skull-Face Overlay (SFO). This stage involves aligning a 3D skull model with a 2D facial image, typically guided by cranial and facial landmarks' correspondence. However, its accuracy is undermined by individual variability in soft-tissue thickness, introducing significant uncertainty into the overlay. This paper introduces Lilium, an automated evolutionary method to enhance the accuracy and robustness of SFO. Lilium explicitly models soft-tissue variability using a 3D cone-based representation whose parameters are optimized via a Differential Evolution algorithm. The method enforces anatomical, morphological, and photographic plausibility through a combination of constraints: landmark matching, camera parameter consistency, head pose alignment, skull containment within facial boundaries, and region parallelism. This emulation of the usual forensic practitioners' approach leads Lilium to outperform the state-of-the-art method in terms of both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Lilium的自动化方法，通过改进颅骨-面部叠加（SFO）过程，以提高法医人类学中基于骨骼的身份识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的颅骨-面部叠加（SFO）技术在识别遗骸时，由于软组织厚度的个体差异，准确性受到限制，引入了显著的不确定性。
AI.method: Lilium是一种自动化的演化方法，它使用基于3D锥体的表示来明确模拟软组织变异，并通过差分演化算法优化其参数。该方法结合了地标匹配、相机参数一致性、头部姿态对齐、颅骨在面部边界内的包含以及区域平行性等约束，以确保解剖学、形态学和摄影上的合理性。
AI.result: Lilium在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: Lilium通过显式模拟软组织变异并结合多种约束，能够更准确、更鲁棒地进行颅骨-面部叠加，从而提高法医身份识别的效率和可靠性。

title: MetaMind: General and Cognitive World Models in Multi-Agent Systems by Meta-Theory of Mind
summary: A major challenge for world models in multi-agent systems is to understand interdependent agent dynamics, predict interactive multi-agent trajectories, and plan over long horizons with collective awareness, without centralized supervision or explicit communication. In this paper, MetaMind, a general and cognitive world model for multi-agent systems that leverages a novel meta-theory of mind (Meta-ToM) framework, is proposed. Through MetaMind, each agent learns not only to predict and plan over its own beliefs, but also to inversely reason goals and beliefs from its own behavior trajectories. This self-reflective, bidirectional inference loop enables each agent to learn a metacognitive ability in a self-supervised manner. Then, MetaMind is shown to generalize the metacognitive ability from first-person to third-person through analogical reasoning. Thus, in multi-agent systems, each agent with MetaMind can actively reason about goals and beliefs of other agents from limited, observable behavior trajectories in a zero-shot manner, and then adapt to emergent collective intention without an explicit communication mechanism. Extended simulation results on diverse multi-agent tasks demonstrate that MetaMind can achieve superior task performance and outperform baselines in few-shot multi-agent generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MetaMind的认知世界模型，通过一种新颖的元心智理论（Meta-ToM）框架，使多智能体系统中的每个智能体能够进行自我反思，学习推断自身行为的意图和目标，并能零样本地泛化到推断其他智能体的目标和意图，从而在缺乏显式通信的情况下适应集体意图。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体世界模型面临的挑战是如何在没有集中监督或显式通信的情况下，理解智能体间的相互作用，预测交互轨迹，并进行集体规划。
AI.method: 提出MetaMind框架，其中每个智能体通过一个自我反思的、双向推理循环来学习预测和规划自身信念，并反向推断自身行为轨迹的目标和信念。然后，MetaMind通过类比推理将元认知能力从第一人称泛化到第三人称，从而零样本地推断其他智能体的目标和信念。
AI.result: MetaMind在各种多智能体任务的扩展模拟结果表明，它在任务性能上表现优越，并在少样本多智能体泛化方面优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaMind能够使多智能体系统中的智能体在零样本情况下，仅凭有限的可观测行为轨迹，就能主动推断其他智能体的目标和信念，并在没有显式通信机制的情况下适应涌现的集体意图，从而提高了多智能体任务的性能和泛化能力。

title: AdaFocus: Knowing When and Where to Look for Adaptive Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are shifting towards "Thinking with Images" by actively exploring image details. While effective, large-scale training is computationally expensive, which has spurred growing interest in lightweight, training-free solutions. However, existing training-free methods suffer from two flaws: perceptual redundancy from indiscriminate cropping, which adds overhead and noise; and a drift between semantic intent and spatial attention, which prevents accurate localization of user-focused regions. To address these challenges, we propose AdaFocus, a novel training-free framework designed for adaptive visual reasoning. AdaFocus follows a two-stage pipeline: a confidence-based module decides when to crop, and a semantic-guided localization module determines where to crop. This enables adaptive visual reasoning without additional training. Experimentally, AdaFocus delivers substantial performance gains while achieving approximately 4.0\times speedup inference speedup than the SOTA method ZoomEyes, representing a significant advance in both accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: AdaFocus是一个新的无需训练的框架，通过基于置信度和语义引导的自适应裁剪来提高多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的推理效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在“用图像思考”方面虽然有效，但大规模训练计算成本高昂。现有的无需训练的方法存在感知冗余和语义意图与空间注意力漂移的问题。
AI.method: AdaFocus采用两阶段流程：1. 基于置信度的模块决定何时裁剪；2. 语义引导的定位模块决定裁剪何处。这使得模型能够在无需额外训练的情况下进行自适应视觉推理。
AI.result: AdaFocus在实验中展示了显著的性能提升，并且推理速度比最先进的方法ZoomEyes快约4.0倍。
AI.conclusion: AdaFocus提供了一种高效且准确的训练无关框架，用于多模态大语言模型的自适应视觉推理，解决了现有方法的局限性，并在准确性和效率上取得了显著的进步。

title: Qwen3-Coder-Next Technical Report
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their last names
summary: We present Qwen3-Coder-Next, an open-weight language model specialized for coding agents. Qwen3-Coder-Next is an 80-billion-parameter model that activates only 3 billion parameters during inference, enabling strong coding capability with efficient inference. In this work, we explore how far strong training recipes can push the capability limits of models with small parameter footprints. To achieve this, we perform agentic training through large-scale synthesis of verifiable coding tasks paired with executable environments, allowing learning directly from environment feedback via mid-training and reinforcement learning. Across agent-centric benchmarks including SWE-Bench and Terminal-Bench, Qwen3-Coder-Next achieves competitive performance relative to its active parameter count. We release both base and instruction-tuned open-weight versions to support research and real-world coding agent development.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为 Qwen3-Coder-Next 的新型开源代码语言模型，它拥有 800 亿参数但仅激活 30 亿参数进行推理，以实现高效推理下的强大编码能力。通过结合大规模可验证代码任务、可执行环境以及环境反馈和强化学习，该模型在 SWE-Bench 和 Terminal-Bench 等基准测试中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 研究的动机在于探索通过强大的训练方法，能否在参数量较小的模型上实现强大的能力，特别是针对编码代理。作者希望在保持高效推理的同时，提升模型的编码性能。
AI.method: 该研究采用了一种名为“代理式训练”（agentic training）的方法。具体来说，他们通过大规模合成可验证的代码任务，并将其与可执行环境配对。在训练过程中，模型可以直接从环境反馈中学习，并结合了中期训练和强化学习技术。
AI.result: Qwen3-Coder-Next 在 SWE-Bench 和 Terminal-Bench 等以代理为中心的基准测试中，相对于其激活的参数数量，取得了具有竞争力的性能。该模型在编码能力方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: Qwen3-Coder-Next 是一个在保持高效推理的同时，实现了强大编码能力的开源模型。通过代理式训练方法，该模型在特定任务上表现出色，并且其开源版本将有助于未来编码代理的研究和开发。

title: DAM-VLA: A Dynamic Action Model-Based Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robot Manipulation
summary: In dynamic environments such as warehouses, hospitals, and homes, robots must seamlessly transition between gross motion and precise manipulations to complete complex tasks. However, current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) frameworks, largely adapted from pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs), often struggle to reconcile general task adaptability with the specialized precision required for intricate manipulation. To address this challenge, we propose DAM-VLA, a dynamic action model-based VLA framework. DAM-VLA integrates VLM reasoning with diffusion-based action models specialized for arm and gripper control. Specifically, it introduces (i) an action routing mechanism, using task-specific visual and linguistic cues to select appropriate action models (e.g., arm movement or gripper manipulation), (ii) a dynamic action model that fuses high-level VLM cognition with low-level visual features to predict actions, and (iii) a dual-scale action weighting mechanism that enables dynamic coordination between the arm-movement and gripper-manipulation models. Across extensive evaluations, DAM-VLA achieves superior success rates compared to state-of-the-art VLA methods in simulated (SIMPLER, FurnitureBench) and real-world settings, showing robust generalization from standard pick-and-place to demanding long-horizon and contact-rich tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DAM-VLA的动态动作模型VLA框架，该框架通过动作路由、动态动作模型和双尺度动作加权机制，融合了VLM推理和扩散动作模型，以解决现有VLA框架在精细操作方面的不足，并在模拟和真实环境中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA框架难以平衡通用任务适应性和复杂操作所需的精确度。
AI.method: 提出DAM-VLA框架，包含动作路由机制、动态动作模型和双尺度动作加权机制。动作路由机制利用视觉和语言线索选择合适的动作模型；动态动作模型融合VLM认知和低级视觉特征进行动作预测；双尺度动作加权机制协调手臂运动和抓手操作模型。
AI.result: DAM-VLA在SIMPLER和FurnitureBench等模拟环境以及真实世界环境中，相比现有SOTA VLA方法，在成功率方面表现更优。该方法能够从标准的抓取和放置任务泛化到需要长序列和高接触度的复杂任务。
AI.conclusion: DAM-VLA是一个有效的动态动作模型VLA框架，能够有效解决现有VLA模型在精细操作方面的挑战，并在多种复杂任务中展现出优越的性能和泛化能力。

title: MC-Search: Evaluating and Enhancing Multimodal Agentic Search with Structured Long Reasoning Chains
summary: With the increasing demand for step-wise, cross-modal, and knowledge-grounded reasoning, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are evolving beyond the traditional fixed retrieve-then-generate paradigm toward more sophisticated agentic multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (MM-RAG). Existing benchmarks, however, mainly focus on simplified QA with short retrieval chains, leaving adaptive planning and multimodal reasoning underexplored. We present MC-Search, the first benchmark for agentic MM-RAG with long, step-wise annotated reasoning chains spanning five representative reasoning structures. Each example specifies sub-questions, retrieval modalities, supporting facts, and intermediate answers, with fidelity ensured by HAVE (Hop-wise Attribution and Verification of Evidence), resulting in 3,333 high-quality examples averaging 3.7 hops. Beyond answer accuracy, MC-Search introduces new process-level metrics for reasoning quality, stepwise retrieval and planning accuracy. By developing a unified agentic MM-RAG pipeline, we benchmark six leading MLLMs and reveal systematic issues such as over- and under-retrieval and modality-misaligned planning. Finally, we introduce Search-Align, a process-supervised fine-tuning framework leveraging verified reasoning chains, showing that our data not only enables faithful evaluation but also improves planning and retrieval fidelity in open-source MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了MC-Search，一个针对多模态检索增强生成（MM-RAG）的代理式长链推理基准，并引入了Search-Align微调框架，以提升多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的推理和检索能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要关注简化的问答和短推理链，未能充分探索代理式MM-RAG中的自适应规划和多模态推理能力，这与对逐步、跨模态、知识驱动推理日益增长的需求不符。
AI.method: 提出MC-Search基准，包含3333个高质量示例，每个示例有详细的子问题、检索模态、支持事实和中间答案，并采用HAVE进行证据验证。同时，引入了针对推理质量、逐步检索和规划准确性的新过程级评估指标。此外，开发了一个统一的代理式MM-RAG流水线来评估现有模型，并提出了Search-Align微调框架，利用已验证的推理链进行过程监督。
AI.result: 在MC-Search基准上，评估了六个领先的MLLMs，揭示了它们在检索（过度检索和检索不足）和模态不匹配规划方面存在系统性问题。Search-Align框架表明，MC-Search数据不仅能进行准确评估，还能显著提高开源MLLMs的规划和检索保真度。
AI.conclusion: MC-Search是首个针对代理式MM-RAG的长推理链基准，填补了现有研究的空白。所提出的Search-Align框架能够有效地利用此基准数据来改进MLLMs在复杂多模态推理任务中的性能，特别是在规划和检索方面。

title: A Comprehensive Evaluation of LLM Unlearning Robustness under Multi-Turn Interaction
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific training data from pre-trained models without retraining from scratch, and is increasingly important for large language models (LLMs) due to safety, privacy, and legal concerns. Although prior work primarily evaluates unlearning in static, single-turn settings, forgetting robustness under realistic interactive use remains underexplored. In this paper, we study whether unlearning remains stable in interactive environments by examining two common interaction patterns: self-correction and dialogue-conditioned querying. We find that knowledge appearing forgotten in static evaluation can often be recovered through interaction. Although stronger unlearning improves apparent robustness, it often results in behavioral rigidity rather than genuine knowledge erasure. Our findings suggest that static evaluation may overestimate real-world effectiveness and highlight the need for ensuring stable forgetting under interactive settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了机器学习遗忘在大型语言模型（LLM）交互式环境中的鲁棒性，发现静态评估可能高估遗忘效果，而强力遗忘可能导致行为僵化而非真正的知识擦除。
AI.motivation: 现有关于机器学习遗忘的研究主要关注静态、单轮场景，而忽略了LLM在现实交互式使用中的遗忘鲁棒性问题，这对于LLM的安全性、隐私和合规性至关重要。
AI.method: 研究了两种常见的交互模式：自我纠错和对话条件查询，并评估了遗忘在这些模式下的稳定性。分析了遗忘程度与遗忘稳定性的关系。
AI.result: 在交互式环境中，静态评估中看似被遗忘的知识可以通过交互重新被检索。更强的遗忘虽然能提高表面上的鲁棒性，但可能导致模型行为僵化，而非真正擦除知识。
AI.conclusion: 静态评估可能高估机器学习遗忘在现实交互式场景中的有效性，需要开发能在交互式设置下实现稳定遗忘的方法。

title: DRIFT: Diffusion-based Rule-Inferred For Trajectories
summary: Trajectory generation for mobile robots in unstructured environments faces a critical dilemma: balancing kinematic smoothness for safe execution with terminal precision for fine-grained tasks. Existing generative planners often struggle with this trade-off, yielding either smooth but imprecise paths or geometrically accurate but erratic motions. To address the aforementioned shortcomings, this article proposes DRIFT (Diffusion-based Rule-Inferred for Trajectories), a conditional diffusion framework designed to generate high-fidelity reference trajectories by integrating two complementary inductive biases. First, a Relational Inductive Bias, realized via a GNN-based Structured Scene Perception (SSP) module, encodes global topological constraints to ensure holistic smoothness. Second, a Temporal Attention Bias, implemented through a novel Graph-Conditioned Time-Aware GRU (GTGRU), dynamically attends to sparse obstacles and targets for precise local maneuvering. In the end, quantitative results demonstrate that DRIFT reconciles these conflicting objectives, achieving centimeter-level imitation fidelity (0.041m FDE) and competitive smoothness (27.19 Jerk). This balance yields highly executable reference plans for downstream control.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DRIFT的基于扩散模型的轨迹生成框架，通过结合图神经网络和时序注意力机制，有效平衡了轨迹的平滑性和终点精度，提高了机器人运动的可执行性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式规划器在生成既平滑又精确的机器人轨迹方面存在困难，容易出现平滑但不精确或精确但不平滑的问题。
AI.method: DRIFT框架结合了两种归纳偏置：1. 基于GNN的结构化场景感知（SSP）模块实现关系归纳偏置，编码全局拓扑约束以保证整体平滑性；2. 基于图条件时序感知GRU（GTGRU）实现时序注意力偏置，动态关注稀疏障碍物和目标点以实现精确局部机动。
AI.result: DRIFT在定量评估中实现了厘米级模仿保真度（FDE为0.041m）和具有竞争力的平滑度（加加速度为27.19 Jerk），成功平衡了平滑性和精度。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT框架能够有效协调平滑性和终端精度之间的冲突，生成高质量、高可执行性的参考轨迹，适用于下游控制任务。

title: Minimalist Compliance Control
summary: Compliance control is essential for safe physical interaction, yet its adoption is limited by hardware requirements such as force torque sensors. While recent reinforcement learning approaches aim to bypass these constraints, they often suffer from sim-to-real gaps, lack safety guarantees, and add system complexity. We propose Minimalist Compliance Control, which enables compliant behavior using only motor current or voltage signals readily available in modern servos and quasi-direct-drive motors, without force sensors, current control, or learning. External wrenches are estimated from actuator signals and Jacobians and incorporated into a task-space admittance controller, preserving sufficient force measurement accuracy for stable and responsive compliance control. Our method is embodiment-agnostic and plug-and-play with diverse high-level planners. We validate our approach on a robot arm, a dexterous hand, and two humanoid robots across multiple contact-rich tasks, using vision-language models, imitation learning, and model-based planning. The results demonstrate robust, safe, and compliant interaction across embodiments and planning paradigms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“极简柔顺控制”的新方法，仅使用电机电流或电压信号即可实现机器人的柔顺控制，无需力传感器、电流控制或强化学习，并证明其在多种机器人和任务上表现良好。
AI.motivation: 当前的柔顺控制方法通常需要昂贵的力传感器，或者依赖于存在 sim-to-real 差距、缺乏安全保证且系统复杂的强化学习方法。研究者希望开发一种更易于部署且安全可靠的柔顺控制方案。
AI.method: 通过电机电流或电压信号，结合雅可比矩阵，估算外部作用力，并将其整合到一个任务空间导纳控制器中。该方法不依赖于力传感器、电流控制或机器学习。
AI.result: 该方法在机器人手臂、灵巧手和人形机器人上进行了验证，成功实现了多种接触密集型任务中的稳健、安全和柔顺交互。证明了其跨不同实体和规划范式的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 极简柔顺控制是一种可行且有效的实现机器人柔顺交互的方法，仅需利用电机驱动信号即可，大大降低了硬件和实施成本，并且适用于各种机器人和上层规划器。

title: BioProAgent: Neuro-Symbolic Grounding for Constrained Scientific Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant reasoning capabilities in scientific discovery but struggle to bridge the gap to physical execution in wet-labs. In these irreversible environments, probabilistic hallucinations are not merely incorrect, but also cause equipment damage or experimental failure. To address this, we propose \textbf{BioProAgent}, a neuro-symbolic framework that anchors probabilistic planning in a deterministic Finite State Machine (FSM). We introduce a State-Augmented Planning mechanism that enforces a rigorous \textit{Design-Verify-Rectify} workflow, ensuring hardware compliance before execution. Furthermore, we address the context bottleneck inherent in complex device schemas by \textit{Semantic Symbol Grounding}, reducing token consumption by $\sim$6$\times$ through symbolic abstraction. In the extended BioProBench benchmark, BioProAgent achieves 95.6\% physical compliance (compared to 21.0\% for ReAct), demonstrating that neuro-symbolic constraints are essential for reliable autonomy in irreversible physical environments. \footnote{Code at https://github.com/YuyangSunshine/bioproagent and project at https://yuyangsunshine.github.io/BioPro-Project/}

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BioProAgent的神经符号框架，用于解决大型语言模型在湿式实验中从推理到物理执行的挑战，通过设计-验证-纠正工作流和语义符号接地，显著提高了物理执行的合规性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在科学发现中表现出强大的推理能力，但在湿式实验等不可逆环境中难以实现物理执行，其概率性幻觉可能导致设备损坏或实验失败。
AI.method: 提出BioProAgent神经符号框架，将概率性规划锚定在确定性的有限状态机（FSM）上。引入状态增强规划机制，强制执行“设计-验证-纠正”工作流，确保硬件合规性。通过语义符号接地解决复杂设备模式的上下文瓶颈问题，减少token消耗。
AI.result: 在BioProBench基准测试中，BioProAgent实现了95.6%的物理合规性，远高于ReAct的21.0%。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号约束对于在不可逆物理环境中实现可靠的自主性至关重要。

title: Summer-22B: A Systematic Approach to Dataset Engineering and Training at Scale for Video Foundation Model
summary: We describe our experience training Summer-22B, a video foundation model developed from scratch. This report documents the engineering challenges, design decisions, and lessons learned while scaling from raw footage collection to a functional model trained on approximately 50 million clips. We outline our approach combining metadata-driven dataset curation, multi-stage filtering, $μ$P parameterization, and hypersphere-constrained optimization. We developed the Lavender Data system for dataset management and adopted inference-aware architectural choices. We share observations on what worked in our setting: dataset engineering consumed the majority of effort, architectural variants showed smaller differences than we expected, and $μ$P hyperparameter transfer appeared effective even under geometric constraints. We hope this account proves useful to others undertaking similar projects.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Summer-22B视频基础模型的训练经验，重点描述了从数据收集到模型训练的工程挑战、设计决策和经验教训，并分享了具体的技术方法和观察结果。
AI.motivation: 为了记录和分享训练一个全新的视频基础模型Summer-22B的完整过程，包括遇到的工程挑战、设计选择以及从中获得的经验教训，为未来类似项目提供参考。
AI.method: 采用了元数据驱动的数据集 curation、多阶段过滤、μP 参数化和超球约束优化等方法。开发了Lavender Data系统进行数据集管理，并采用了推理感知的架构设计。训练数据约包含5000万个视频片段。
AI.result: 数据集工程占据了大部分工作量。与预期的不同，架构变体之间的性能差异较小。μP超参数迁移在几何约束下似乎是有效的。
AI.conclusion: 训练大型视频基础模型是一个复杂且耗费大量精力的过程，数据集工程是关键。在训练过程中，应关注实际有效的工程实践，并理解不同技术选择的效果差异。

title: Constitutional Black-Box Monitoring for Scheming in LLM Agents
summary: Safe deployment of Large Language Model (LLM) agents in autonomous settings requires reliable oversight mechanisms. A central challenge is detecting scheming, where agents covertly pursue misaligned goals. One approach to mitigating such risks is LLM-based monitoring: using language models to examine agent behaviors for suspicious actions. We study constitutional black-box monitors: prompted classifiers that detect scheming using only externally observable inputs and outputs, optimized on synthetic data generated from natural-language behavior specifications. We introduce two pipelines for generating synthetic agent trajectories, STRIDE (iterative refinement) and Gloom (agent-environment simulation), from which we generate 1,000 samples each. We optimize frontier LLM monitors on these datasets via prompt sweeps, human refinement, and automated prompt optimization, and evaluate performance on 7,500 held-out trajectories from ControlArena, a suite of grounded environments where agents operate in more realistic contexts. Our results demonstrate that monitors selected purely on synthetic data can generalize to more realistic environments, capturing a meaningful scheming signal. However, we find that performance saturates quickly in our setting, with simple prompt sweeps matching the results of more extensive optimization. Pushing beyond this limit yields no further improvements and instead leads to overfitting.

AI.tldr: 研究使用基于LLM的“宪法黑盒监视器”来检测自主LLM代理的“计谋”（秘密追求错误目标）行为，通过合成数据进行优化，并在真实环境中进行评估。结果表明，纯粹基于合成数据训练的监视器能够泛化到更现实的环境，并捕获到有意义的计谋信号，但性能提升很快达到饱和，简单的提示词搜索效果已足够好，进一步优化可能导致过拟合。
AI.motivation: 在自主环境中安全部署LLM代理，需要可靠的监督机制，特别是要检测代理秘密追求错误目标的“计谋”行为。
AI.method: 提出“宪法黑盒监视器”，这是一种基于提示词的分类器，仅使用外部可观测的输入和输出来检测计谋。使用STRIDE（迭代精炼）和Gloom（代理-环境模拟）两种流水线生成合成代理轨迹，并生成1000个样本。通过提示词搜索、人工精炼和自动提示词优化来优化监视器，并在ControlArena（一个包含更真实上下文的实用环境）的7500个预留轨迹上评估性能。
AI.result: 结果表明，纯粹基于合成数据选择的监视器可以泛化到更现实的环境，并捕获到有意义的计谋信号。然而，在当前设置下，性能提升很快饱和，简单的提示词搜索与更广泛的优化结果相当。超出此限制的进一步优化没有带来任何改进，反而导致了过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的黑盒监视器可以有效地检测自主LLM代理的计谋行为，并且可以通过在合成数据上进行优化来泛化到更真实的场景。然而，在优化过程中需要注意性能饱和和过拟合的问题，简单的优化方法可能已经足够。

title: RLAR: An Agentic Reward System for Multi-task Reinforcement Learning on Large Language Models
summary: Large language model alignment via reinforcement learning depends critically on reward function quality. However, static, domain-specific reward models are often costly to train and exhibit poor generalization in out-of-distribution scenarios encountered during RL iterations. We present RLAR (Reinforcement Learning from Agent Rewards), an agent-driven framework that dynamically assigns tailored reward functions to individual queries. Specifically, RLAR transforms reward acquisition into a dynamic tool synthesis and invocation task. It leverages LLM agents to autonomously retrieve optimal reward models from the Internet and synthesize programmatic verifiers through code generation. This allows the reward system to self-evolve with the shifting data distributions during training. Experimental results demonstrate that RLAR yields consistent performance gains ranging from 10 to 60 across mathematics, coding, translation, and dialogue tasks. On RewardBench-V2, RLAR significantly outperforms static baselines and approaches the performance upper bound, demonstrating superior generalization through dynamic reward orchestration. The data and code are available on this link: https://github.com/ZhuoerFeng/RLAR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RLAR的框架，通过利用LLM代理动态合成和调用奖励模型，来解决强化学习对齐中静态奖励模型泛化能力差的问题，并在多个任务上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统的强化学习对齐方法依赖于静态的、领域特定的奖励模型，这些模型训练成本高，并且在分布外场景下泛化能力差，限制了RL的训练效果。
AI.method: RLAR框架将奖励获取转化为动态工具合成和调用任务。它利用LLM代理自动从互联网检索最优奖励模型，并通过代码生成合成程序化验证器，从而实现奖励系统的自适应进化。
AI.result: 在数学、编码、翻译和对话等任务上，RLAR取得了10%到60%的性能提升。在RewardBench-V2基准测试中，RLAR显著优于静态基线模型，并接近性能上限，证明了其动态奖励协调的优越泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RLAR通过引入代理驱动的动态奖励合成和调用机制，克服了静态奖励模型的局限性，能够有效提升大语言模型在强化学习对齐任务中的性能和泛化能力。

title: Learning Nested Named Entity Recognition from Flat Annotations
comment: Accepted at EACL 2026, 15 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables
summary: Nested named entity recognition identifies entities contained within other entities, but requires expensive multi-level annotation. While flat NER corpora exist abundantly, nested resources remain scarce. We investigate whether models can learn nested structure from flat annotations alone, evaluating four approaches: string inclusions (substring matching), entity corruption (pseudo-nested data), flat neutralization (reducing false negative signal), and a hybrid fine-tuned + LLM pipeline. On NEREL, a Russian benchmark with 29 entity types where 21% of entities are nested, our best combined method achieves 26.37% inner F1, closing 40% of the gap to full nested supervision. Code is available at https://github.com/fulstock/Learning-from-Flat-Annotations.

AI.tldr: 研究人员探索了仅使用扁平化命名实体识别（NER）标注来训练模型识别嵌套实体的方法，并提出了几种策略，其中混合微调+LLM流水线效果最佳，能够弥合与完全嵌套标注方法之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 嵌套命名实体识别（Nested NER）在实践中很重要，但需要昂贵的多层次标注，而扁平化NER语料库丰富。研究旨在解决嵌套NER资源稀缺的问题，探索是否能从仅有的扁平化标注中学习嵌套结构。
AI.method: 评估了四种方法：字符串包含（子串匹配）、实体损坏（伪嵌套数据）、扁平化中和（减少假阴性信号）以及一种混合微调+LLM流水线。研究在NEREL数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 最佳的混合微调+LLM流水线方法在NEREL数据集上取得了26.37%的内部F1分数，成功弥合了与完全嵌套标注方法之间40%的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 尽管存在挑战，但通过结合多种策略，特别是利用LLM，可以有效地从扁平化标注中学习嵌套实体识别，这为解决嵌套NER资源稀缺问题提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

title: HiMAC: Hierarchical Macro-Micro Learning for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in interactive decision-making, yet they remain fundamentally limited in long-horizon tasks that require structured planning and reliable execution. Existing approaches predominantly rely on flat autoregressive policies, where high-level reasoning and low-level actions are generated within a single token sequence, leading to inefficient exploration and severe error propagation over extended trajectories. In this work, we propose HiMAC, a hierarchical agentic RL framework that explicitly decomposes long-horizon decision-making into macro-level planning and micro-level execution. HiMAC models reasoning as a structured blueprint generation process followed by goal-conditioned action execution, enabling robust long-horizon planning within LLM-based agents. To train this hierarchy efficiently, we introduce a critic-free hierarchical policy optimization paradigm that extends group-based reinforcement learning to bi-level structures through hierarchical relative advantage estimation. Furthermore, we propose an iterative co-evolution training strategy that alternates between planner exploration and executor adaptation, mitigating the non-stationarity inherent in hierarchical learning. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Sokoban demonstrate that HiMAC consistently outperforms strong prompting and reinforcement learning baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance and substantially improved sample efficiency across both text-based and visually grounded environments. Our results show that introducing structured hierarchy, rather than increasing model scale alone, is a key factor for enabling robust long-horizon agentic intelligence.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了HiMAC，一个分层的强化学习框架，用于解决大型语言模型（LLM）在长时序任务中的规划和执行限制。HiMAC通过宏观规划和微观执行来分解决策过程，并引入了一种新的无批评者分层策略优化方法和迭代协同演化训练策略。实验结果表明，HiMAC在ALFWorld、WebShop和Sokoban等环境中均优于现有方法，证明了结构化层次的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLM）智能体在长时序任务中存在规划和执行能力不足的问题，现有的方法（如平坦的自回归策略）效率低下且易于传播错误。
AI.method: 提出HiMAC，一个分层智能体强化学习框架，将长时序决策分解为宏观规划和微观执行。引入了无批评者的分层策略优化方法，并通过迭代协同演化训练策略来解决非平稳性问题。
AI.result: HiMAC在ALFWorld、WebShop和Sokoban等环境中，相比于现有的基于提示和强化学习的基线方法，取得了更好的性能，并在样本效率方面有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 结构化层次而非单纯增加模型规模是实现鲁棒长时序智能体的关键因素。HiMAC通过引入分层结构，有效提升了LLM智能体的长时序规划和执行能力。

title: Infinite Self-Attention
summary: The quadratic cost of softmax attention limits Transformer scalability in high-resolution vision. We introduce Infinite Self-Attention (InfSA), a spectral reformulation that treats each attention layer as a diffusion step on a content-adaptive token graph, accumulating multi-hop interactions through a discounted Neumann series over attention matrices. This links self-attention to classical graph centrality (Katz, PageRank, eigenvector centrality) for interpretable token weighting. We also show the Neumann kernel equals the fundamental matrix of an absorbing Markov chain, so a token's centrality is its expected number of random-walk visits before absorption. We then propose Linear-InfSA, a linear-time variant that approximates the principal eigenvector of the implicit attention operator without forming the full attention matrix. It keeps an auxiliary state of fixed size proportional to per-head dimension dh (independent of sequence length N), is drop-in compatible with Vision Transformers, and supports stable training at 4096 by 4096 and inference at 9216 by 9216 (about 332k tokens). In a 4-layer ViT (53.5M parameters, 59 GFLOPs at 224 by 224), Linear-InfSA reaches 84.7% top-1 on ImageNet-1K, a +3.2 point architectural gain over an equal-depth softmax ViT trained with the same recipe. On ImageNet-V2, InfViT variants outperform all compared baselines (up to 79.8% vs 76.8%), indicating robustness under distribution shift. On an A100 40GB GPU, Linear-InfViT runs at 231 images/s and 0.87 J/image (13x better throughput and energy than equal-depth ViT) and is the only tested model to complete 9216 by 9216 inference without out-of-memory. The linear approximation closely matches the dominant eigenvector of the quadratic operator (cosine 0.985).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Infinite Self-Attention (InfSA) 的谱方法来解决 Transformer 在高分辨率视觉任务中的计算瓶颈。InfSA 将注意力层视为内容自适应 token 图上的扩散步骤，并通过折扣 Neumann 级数累积多跳交互。作者还提出了一个线性时间复杂度的变体 Linear-InfSA，它能高效地逼近隐式注意力算子的主特征向量，支持极高分辨率图像的处理，并在 ImageNet 等基准测试中取得了显著的性能提升和效率改进。
AI.motivation: 传统的 Softmax Attention 在处理高分辨率图像时具有二次计算复杂度，这限制了 Transformer 模型在视觉任务中的可扩展性。研究动机是寻找一种计算效率更高、可扩展性更强的注意力机制。
AI.method: 本文将自注意力机制重新表述为谱问题，提出了 Infinite Self-Attention (InfSA)。InfSA 将每个注意力层视为一个内容自适应 token 图上的扩散过程，利用折扣 Neumann 级数累积多跳交互。此外，提出了一种线性时间复杂度的变体 Linear-InfSA，该方法通过维护一个与头维度相关的固定大小的辅助状态来近似隐式注意力算子的主特征向量，避免了构建完整的注意力矩阵。
AI.result: Linear-InfSA 在 ImageNet-1K 上取得了比同等深度的 Softmax ViT 高出 3.2 个百分点的 Top-1 准确率。在 ImageNet-V2 上，InfViT 变体也优于所有对比基线。在 A100 GPU 上，Linear-InfViT 的吞吐量提高了 13 倍，能耗降低，并且是唯一能完成 9216x9216 推理的模型。线性近似与二次算子的主特征向量高度吻合（余弦相似度 0.985）。
AI.conclusion: Infinite Self-Attention (InfSA) 及其线性时间复杂度变体 Linear-InfSA 是一种有效解决 Transformer 在高分辨率视觉任务中计算瓶颈的方法。该方法通过谱重构和 Neumann 级数实现了高效的多跳交互累积，并且能够显著提高模型性能和计算效率，支持处理超高分辨率图像。

title: HierKick: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Guided Soccer Robot Control
summary: Controlling soccer robots involves multi-time-scale decision-making, which requires balancing long-term tactical planning and short-term motion execution. Traditional end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) methods face challenges in complex dynamic environments. This paper proposes HierKick, a vision-guided soccer robot control framework based on dual-frequency hierarchical RL. The framework adopts a hierarchical control architecture featuring a 5 Hz high-level policy that integrates YOLOv8 for real-time detection and selects tasks via a coach model, and a pre-trained 50 Hz low-level controller for precise joint control. Through this architecture, the framework achieves the four steps of approaching, aligning, dribbling, and kicking. Experimental results show that the success rates of this framework are 95.2\% in IsaacGym, 89.8\% in Mujoco, and 80\% in the real world. HierKick provides an effective hierarchical paradigm for robot control in complex environments, extendable to multi-time-scale tasks, with its modular design and skill reuse offering a new path for intelligent robot control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为HierKick的双频分层强化学习框架，用于控制足球机器人。该框架结合了YOLOv8进行实时目标检测，并采用5Hz高层策略进行任务选择，以及一个50Hz的预训练低层控制器进行精确的关节控制，实现了接近、对齐、带球和射门的四个动作。实验结果表明，该框架在模拟和真实世界中均取得了较高的成功率，为复杂环境下的机器人控制提供了一种有效的分层范式。
AI.motivation: 传统的端到端强化学习方法在处理足球机器人这类需要多时间尺度决策（长期战术规划与短期动作执行）的复杂动态环境时面临挑战。因此，需要一种能够有效平衡不同时间尺度决策的控制框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为HierKick的双频分层强化学习框架。该框架采用分层控制架构：一个5Hz的高层策略，集成了YOLOv8进行实时目标检测并由教练模型选择任务；以及一个50Hz的预训练低层控制器，负责精确的关节控制。整个框架实现了接近、对齐、带球和射门这四个关键动作。
AI.result: 在IsaacGym模拟环境中，HierKick的成功率为95.2%；在Mujoco模拟环境中，成功率为89.8%；在真实世界环境中，成功率为80%。
AI.conclusion: HierKick提供了一种有效的分层控制范式，能够用于复杂环境下的机器人控制，并且可以扩展到多时间尺度的任务。其模块化设计和技能复用为智能机器人控制开辟了新的途径。

title: MedGPT-oss: Training a General-Purpose Vision-Language Model for Biomedicine
summary: Biomedical multimodal assistants have the potential to unify radiology, pathology, and clinical-text reasoning, yet a critical deployment gap remains: top-performing systems are either closed-source or computationally prohibitive, precluding the on-premises deployment required for patient privacy and PHI compliance. We introduce MEDGPT-OSS, an open-weight, 20B-parameter generalist vision-language model designed to facilitate open research in clinical AI. Rather than relying on architectural complexity, MEDGPT-OSS pairs the GPT-oss language backbone with a visual front-end via a optimized, three-stage training curriculum. By progressively domain-adapting these modules through rigorous data curation and long-context multimodal alignment, we demonstrate that a 20B model can bridge the capacity gap. It successfully outperforms larger open medical models on out-of-distribution (OOD) multimodal reasoning and complex text-only clinical tasks. By unifying diverse modalities under a single instruction-following interface, MEDGPT-OSS maintains a parameter-efficient footprint fully compatible with commodity GPUs. We release the complete training recipe, open-weight checkpoints, and a rigorous evaluation harness to serve as a verifiable foundation for privacy-preserving, institution-specific clinical AI research.

AI.tldr: MEDGPT-OSS 是一个开源、20B 参数的通用视觉-语言模型，旨在弥合临床 AI 研究的部署差距，支持本地部署和患者隐私，并在多模态和纯文本临床任务上超越了更大的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有顶尖的生物医学多模态助手要么是闭源的，要么计算成本过高，无法满足患者隐私和 PHI 合规性对本地部署的要求。因此，需要一个开放、高效且能够在本地部署的模型。
AI.method: MEDGPT-OSS 将 GPT-oss 语言模型与视觉前端通过优化的三阶段训练课程相结合。通过严格的数据整理和长上下文多模态对齐，逐步对这些模块进行领域自适应。
AI.result: MEDGPT-OSS 在分布外（OOD）多模态推理和复杂的纯文本临床任务上表现优于更大的开源医学模型。它实现了参数效率，兼容普通 GPU。
AI.conclusion: MEDGPT-OSS 是一个可行的解决方案，可以促进隐私保护、机构特定的临床 AI 研究，因为它是一个开源、参数高效且性能优越的模型，并且提供了完整的训练方法、权重检查点和评估工具。

title: MiniUGV$_2$: A Compact UAV-Deployable Tracked Ground Vehicle with Manipulation Capabilities
summary: Exploring and inspecting \emph{Hidden Spaces}, defined as environments whose entrances are accessible only to aerial robots but remain unexplored due to geometric constraints, limited flight time, and communication loss, remains a major challenge. We present miniUGV$_2$, a compact UAV-deployable tracked ground vehicle that extends UAV capabilities into confined environments. The system introduces dual articulated arms, integrated LiDAR and depth sensing, and modular electronics for enhanced autonomy. A novel tether module with an electro-permanent magnetic head enables safe deployment, retrieval, and optional detachment, thereby overcoming prior entanglement issues. Experiments demonstrate robust terrain navigation, self-righting, and manipulation of objects up to 3.5 kg, validating miniUGV$_2$ as a versatile platform for hybrid aerial-ground robotics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 miniUGV2 的紧凑型、无人机可部署的履带式地面车辆，用于探索无人机难以到达但几何受限的“隐藏空间”，并介绍了其双关节臂、传感器和新颖的系绳部署/回收模块。
AI.motivation: 探索和检查“隐藏空间”（即入口仅对空中机器人可及但因几何限制、飞行时间限制和通信丢失而未被探索的环境）仍然是一个重大挑战。
AI.method: 开发了一种名为 miniUGV2 的无人机可部署履带式地面车辆，配备双关节臂、集成 LiDAR 和深度传感器、模块化电子设备以及一个带有电永磁头的新型系绳模块，用于安全部署、回收和可选分离。
AI.result: 实验证明 miniUGV2 能够进行稳健的越野导航、自扶正以及操控重达 3.5 公斤的物体。
AI.conclusion: miniUGV2 是一种多功能平台，可用于混合空中-地面机器人技术，能够克服先前存在的缠绕问题，并扩展无人机的能力以探索受限环境。

title: Tracking Capabilities for Safer Agents
summary: AI agents that interact with the real world through tool calls pose fundamental safety challenges: agents might leak private information, cause unintended side effects, or be manipulated through prompt injection. To address these challenges, we propose to put the agent in a programming-language-based "safety harness": instead of calling tools directly, agents express their intentions as code in a capability-safe language: Scala 3 with capture checking. Capabilities are program variables that regulate access to effects and resources of interest. Scala's type system tracks capabilities statically, providing fine-grained control over what an agent can do. In particular, it enables local purity, the ability to enforce that sub-computations are side-effect-free, preventing information leakage when agents process classified data. We demonstrate that extensible agent safety harnesses can be built by leveraging a strong type system with tracked capabilities. Our experiments show that agents can generate capability-safe code with no significant loss in task performance, while the type system reliably prevents unsafe behaviors such as information leakage and malicious side effects.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种基于Scala 3的“安全线束”方法，通过能力（capabilities）追踪和静态类型检查来增强AI代理与现实世界交互时的安全性，防止信息泄露和意外副作用。
AI.motivation: AI代理通过调用工具与现实世界交互时存在信息泄露、意外副作用和提示注入等安全风险。
AI.method: 使用Scala 3编程语言构建一个“安全线束”，AI代理将意图表达为使用能力（capabilities）的安全代码。Scala的类型系统静态追踪能力，实现局部纯洁性（local purity），并防止不安全操作。
AI.result: 实验表明，AI代理可以生成能力安全的代码，且任务性能损失不大。类型系统能够有效阻止信息泄露和恶意副作用等不安全行为。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用具有追踪能力的强类型系统，可以构建可扩展的AI代理安全线束，实现对代理行为的精细控制，从而提高安全性。

title: An Open-Source Modular Benchmark for Diffusion-Based Motion Planning in Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving
summary: Diffusion-based motion planners have achieved state-of-the-art results on benchmarks such as nuPlan, yet their evaluation within closed-loop production autonomous driving stacks remains largely unexplored. Existing evaluations abstract away ROS 2 communication latency and real-time scheduling constraints, while monolithic ONNX deployment freezes all solver parameters at export time. We present an open-source modular benchmark that addresses both gaps: using ONNX GraphSurgeon, we decompose a monolithic 18,398 node diffusion planner into three independently executable modules and reimplement the DPM-Solver++ denoising loop in native C++. Integrated as a ROS 2 node within Autoware, the open-source AD stack deployed on real vehicles worldwide, the system enables runtime-configurable solver parameters without model recompilation and per-step observability of the denoising process, breaking the black box of monolithic deployment. Unlike evaluations in standalone simulators such as CARLA, our benchmark operates within a production-grade stack and is validated through AWSIM closed-loop simulation. Through systematic comparison of DPM-Solver++ (first- and second-order) and DDIM across six step-count configurations (N in {3, 5, 7, 10, 15, 20}), we show that encoder caching yields a 3.2x latency reduction, and that second-order solving reduces FDE by 41% at N=3 compared to first-order. The complete codebase will be released as open-source, providing a direct path from simulation benchmarks to real-vehicle deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个开源的模块化基准测试，用于评估基于扩散模型运动规划器在真实的自动驾驶系统中的性能，解决了现有评估忽略通信延迟和实时调度限制的问题，并实现了运行时可配置的参数和过程可观测性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的运动规划器在基准测试中表现优异，但其在实际的、闭环的生产级自动驾驶系统中的评估却鲜有研究。现有的评估忽略了ROS 2通信延迟和实时调度约束，并且ONNX部署会锁定所有求解器参数。作者希望弥合仿真基准与真实部署之间的差距。
AI.method: 作者使用ONNX GraphSurgeon将一个大型扩散规划器分解为三个独立的模块，并用C++重新实现了DPM-Solver++的去噪循环。该系统作为ROS 2节点集成到Autoware（一个在真实车辆上部署的开源自动驾驶堆栈）中。通过AWSIM闭环仿真进行验证，并与DPM-Solver++（一阶和二阶）和DDIM在不同步数下进行了比较。
AI.result: 通过实验发现，编码器缓存可以将延迟降低3.2倍，二阶求解相比一阶求解在N=3时可以将最终位移误差（FDE）降低41%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个模块化的基准测试框架，实现了在生产级自动驾驶堆栈中对扩散模型运动规划器的运行时配置和可观测性，并且证明了编码器缓存和二阶求解的有效性，为从仿真到真实部署的路径提供了支持。

title: Zero-Shot and Supervised Bird Image Segmentation Using Foundation Models: A Dual-Pipeline Approach with Grounding DINO~1.5, YOLOv11, and SAM~2.1
summary: Bird image segmentation remains a challenging task in computer vision due to extreme pose diversity, complex plumage patterns, and variable lighting conditions. This paper presents a dual-pipeline framework for binary bird image segmentation leveraging 2025 foundation models. We introduce two operating modes built upon Segment Anything Model 2.1 (SAM 2.1) as a shared frozen backbone: (1) a zero-shot pipeline using Grounding DINO 1.5 to detect birds via the text prompt "bird" before prompting SAM 2.1 with bounding boxes requiring no labelled bird data; and (2) a supervised pipeline that fine-tunes YOLOv11 on the CUB-200-2011 dataset for high-precision detection, again prompting SAM 2.1 for pixel-level masks. The segmentation model is never retrained for new species or domains. On CUB-200-2011 (11,788 images, 200 species), the supervised pipeline achieves IoU 0.912, Dice 0.954, and F1 0.953 outperforming all prior baselines including SegFormer-B2 (IoU 0.842) by +7.0 percentage points. The zero-shot pipeline achieves IoU 0.831 using only a text prompt, the first such result reported on this benchmark. We demonstrate that prompt-based foundation model pipelines outperform task specific end-to-end trained segmentation networks, while requiring only lightweight detector fine-tuning (~1 hour) for domain adaptation. Complete PyTorch implementation, dataset preparation scripts, and trained weights are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用2025个基础模型进行二元鸟类图像分割的双管齐下框架。该框架包含一个零样本模式（使用Grounding DINO和SAM 2.1）和一个监督模式（微调YOLOv11并结合SAM 2.1）。监督模式在CUB-200-2011数据集上取得了先进的分割性能，而零样本模式则实现了首次仅用文本提示的零样本分割结果，并且模型无需针对新物种或领域进行重新训练。
AI.motivation: 鸟类图像分割面临姿态多样、羽毛复杂和光照多变等挑战。现有方法通常需要针对特定物种或领域进行端到端训练，泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 提出一个包含两个模式的双管齐下框架。共享的冻结骨干是SAM 2.1。模式一（零样本）：使用Grounding DINO 1.5识别“bird”以生成边界框，然后用边界框提示SAM 2.1进行分割，无需标注数据。模式二（监督）：在CUB-200-2011数据集上微调YOLOv11进行高精度检测，然后用检测结果提示SAM 2.1进行像素级分割。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011数据集上，监督模式实现了IoU 0.912、Dice 0.954和F1 0.953，显著优于之前的基线方法（如SegFormer-B2的IoU 0.842）。零样本模式仅使用文本提示实现了IoU 0.831，这是该基准上的首次此类结果。研究表明，基于提示的基础模型框架优于任务特定的端到端训练分割网络。
AI.conclusion: 基于基础模型和提示的学习框架能够实现高效且具有泛化能力的鸟类图像分割，并且仅需要轻量级的检测器微调即可适应新领域。该方法在性能上超越了传统的端到端训练方法，并为零样本分割提供了新的解决方案。

title: CHIMERA: Compact Synthetic Data for Generalizable LLM Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently exhibited remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely enabled by supervised fine-tuning (SFT)- and reinforcement learning (RL)-based post-training on high-quality reasoning data. However, reproducing and extending these capabilities in open and scalable settings is hindered by three fundamental data-centric challenges: (1) the cold-start problem, arising from the lack of seed datasets with detailed, long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories needed to initialize reasoning policies; (2) limited domain coverage, as most existing open-source reasoning datasets are concentrated in mathematics, with limited coverage of broader scientific disciplines; and (3) the annotation bottleneck, where the difficulty of frontier-level reasoning tasks makes reliable human annotation prohibitively expensive or infeasible. To address these challenges, we introduce CHIMERA, a compact synthetic reasoning dataset comprising 9K samples for generalizable cross-domain reasoning. CHIMERA is constructed with three key properties: (1) it provides rich, long CoT reasoning trajectories synthesized by state-of-the-art reasoning models; (2) it has broad and structured coverage, spanning 8 major scientific disciplines and over 1K fine-grained topics organized via a model-generated hierarchical taxonomy; and (3) it employs a fully automated, scalable evaluation pipeline that uses strong reasoning models to cross-validate both problem validity and answer correctness. We use CHIMERA to post-train a 4B Qwen3 model. Despite the dataset's modest size, the resulting model achieves strong performance on a suite of challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, AIME 24/25/26, HMMT 25, and Humanity's Last Exam, approaching or matching the reasoning performance of substantially larger models such as DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-235B.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了CHIMERA，一个包含9K样本的合成推理数据集，用于解决LLM在开放和可扩展环境中推理能力训练中的数据冷启动、领域覆盖不足和标注瓶颈问题。CHIMERA通过利用先进模型合成长链思考轨迹，覆盖8个主要科学领域，并采用全自动评估流程，成功用于微调Qwen3模型，使其在多个推理基准上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的推理能力训练面临数据冷启动（缺乏详细CoT轨迹）、领域覆盖有限（多集中于数学）和标注瓶颈（前沿任务标注成本高昂且不可行）三大挑战，阻碍了在开放和可扩展设置中复制和扩展这些能力。
AI.method: 研究者提出了CHIMERA数据集，其特点包括：1. 合成丰富的、长的CoT推理轨迹；2. 覆盖8个主要科学领域和1K+细粒度主题，并构建了模型生成的层级分类体系；3. 采用全自动、可扩展的评估流程，利用强推理模型交叉验证问题有效性和答案正确性。随后，使用CHIMERA对4B Qwen3模型进行后训练。
AI.result: 尽管CHIMERA数据集规模不大，但经过CHIMERA数据集后训练的Qwen3模型在GPQA-Diamond、AIME 24/25/26、HMMT 25和Humanity's Last Exam等一系列具有挑战性的推理基准上取得了强劲的性能，其推理能力接近或达到了远大于其规模的模型（如DeepSeek-R1和Qwen3-235B）的水平。
AI.conclusion: CHIMERA数据集能够有效地解决LLM推理能力训练中的关键数据挑战，并能通过合成数据来提升模型的跨领域推理能力，即使是在相对较小的模型和数据集规模下也能取得显著的性能提升。

title: Compact Task-Aligned Imitation Learning for Laboratory Automation
summary: Robotic laboratory automation has traditionally relied on carefully engineered motion pipelines and task-specific hardware interfaces, resulting in high design cost and limited flexibility. While recent imitation learning techniques can generate general robot behaviors, their large model sizes often require high-performance computational resources, limiting applicability in practical laboratory environments. In this study, we propose a compact imitation learning framework for laboratory automation using small foundation models. The proposed method, TVF-DiT, aligns a self-supervised vision foundation model with a vision-language model through a compact adapter, and integrates them with a Diffusion Transformer-based action expert. The entire model consists of fewer than 500M parameters, enabling inference on low-VRAM GPUs. Experiments on three real-world laboratory tasks - test tube cleaning, test tube arrangement, and powder transfer - demonstrate an average success rate of 86.6%, significantly outperforming alternative lightweight baselines. Furthermore, detailed task prompts improve vision-language alignment and task performance. These results indicate that small foundation models, when properly aligned and integrated with diffusion-based policy learning, can effectively support practical laboratory automation with limited computational resources.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种紧凑型模仿学习框架（TVF-DiT），利用小型基础模型实现实验室自动化，参数量小于5亿，可在低显存GPU上运行，在三个真实实验室任务中平均成功率达到86.6%，优于其他轻量级基线。
AI.motivation: 传统的机器人实验室自动化设计成本高且灵活性差；现有的模仿学习方法模型大，需要高性能计算资源，不适用于实际实验室环境。
AI.method: 提出TVF-DiT框架，将自监督视觉基础模型与视觉-语言模型通过紧凑型适配器对齐，并与基于Diffusion Transformer的动作专家集成，整体模型参数量小于5亿。
AI.result: 在测试管清洁、测试管排列和粉末转移三个真实实验室任务中，TVF-DiT实现了86.6%的平均成功率，显著优于其他轻量级基线。详细的任务提示能改善视觉-语言对齐和任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 小型基础模型经过适当的对齐和与基于扩散策略学习的集成，可以在计算资源有限的情况下有效地支持实际实验室自动化。

title: CollabEval: Enhancing LLM-as-a-Judge via Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized AI-generated content evaluation, with the LLM-as-a-Judge paradigm becoming increasingly popular. However, current single-LLM evaluation approaches face significant challenges, including inconsistent judgments and inherent biases from pre-training data. To address these limitations, we propose CollabEval, a novel multi-agent evaluation framework that implements a three-phase Collaborative Evaluation process: initial evaluation, multi-round discussion, and final judgment. Unlike existing approaches that rely on competitive debate or single-model evaluation, CollabEval emphasizes collaboration among multiple agents with strategic consensus checking for efficiency. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that CollabEval consistently outperforms single-LLM approaches across multiple dimensions while maintaining robust performance even when individual models struggle. The framework provides comprehensive support for various evaluation criteria while ensuring efficiency through its collaborative design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CollabEval的多智能体协同评估框架，通过三阶段协同评估（初评、多轮讨论、终审）解决现有LLM-as-a-Judge方法中存在的判断不一致和偏见问题，并展示了其优于单一LLM评估方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM-as-a-Judge方法存在判断不一致和模型固有偏见的问题，限制了AI生成内容评估的准确性。
AI.method: 提出CollabEval框架，采用三阶段协同评估流程：1. 初评（Initial Evaluation）；2. 多轮讨论（Multi-round Discussion）；3. 终审（Final Judgment）。该框架强调多智能体之间的协作，并通过战略性共识检查来提高效率。
AI.result: CollabEval在多个评估维度上 consistently 超越了单一LLM的评估方法，并且即使在个体模型表现不佳时也能保持鲁棒性。该框架支持多种评估标准，并通过协同设计确保了效率。
AI.conclusion: CollabEval是一种有效的多智能体协同评估框架，能够克服单一LLM评估的局限性，提供更一致、更准确、更鲁棒的AI生成内容评估，同时保持高效。

title: SKeDA: A Generative Watermarking Framework for Text-to-video Diffusion Models
summary: The rise of text-to-video generation models has raised growing concerns over content authenticity, copyright protection, and malicious misuse. Watermarking serves as an effective mechanism for regulating such AI-generated content, where high fidelity and strong robustness are particularly critical. Recent generative image watermarking methods provide a promising foundation by leveraging watermark information and pseudo-random keys to control the initial sampling noise, enabling lossless embedding. However, directly extending these techniques to videos introduces two key limitations: Existing designs implicitly rely on strict alignment between video frames and frame-dependent pseudo-random binary sequences used for watermark encryption. Once this alignment is disrupted, subsequent watermark extraction becomes unreliable; and Video-specific distortions, such as inter-frame compression, significantly degrade watermark reliability. To address these issues, we propose SKeDA, a generative watermarking framework tailored for text-to-video diffusion models. SKeDA consists of two components: (1) Shuffle-Key-based Distribution-preserving Sampling (SKe) employs a single base pseudo-random binary sequence for watermark encryption and derives frame-level encryption sequences through permutation. This design transforms watermark extraction from synchronization-sensitive sequence decoding into permutation-tolerant set-level aggregation, substantially improving robustness against frame reordering and loss; and (2) Differential Attention (DA), which computes inter-frame differences and dynamically adjusts attention weights during extraction, enhancing robustness against temporal distortions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SKeDA preserves high video generation quality and watermark robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SKeDA 的文本到视频生成模型水印框架，通过打乱密钥和差分注意力机制来提高水印的鲁棒性和保真度，解决了现有方法在处理视频帧重排和压缩失真时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 文本到视频生成模型的兴起带来了内容真实性、版权保护和恶意使用的担忧。水印是监管AI生成内容的一种有效机制，对高保真度和强鲁棒性有很高要求。现有方法在直接应用于视频时存在帧对齐依赖和视频特有失真（如帧间压缩）导致的不可靠性问题。
AI.method: SKeDA 框架包含两个主要部分：1. Shuffle-Key-based Distribution-preserving Sampling (SKe)：使用单一基础伪随机二元序列进行水印加密，并通过置换生成帧级加密序列，将水印提取从依赖同步的序列解码转变为容忍置换的集合级聚合，以提高对帧重排和丢失的鲁棒性。2. Differential Attention (DA)：计算帧间差异并动态调整提取时的注意力权重，以增强对时间失真的鲁棒性。
AI.result: SKeDA 在视频生成质量和水印鲁棒性方面表现出色，经过大量实验验证。
AI.conclusion: SKeDA 框架成功解决了现有水印技术在文本到视频生成模型中的局限性，通过置换容忍和差分注意力机制，显著提高了水印的鲁棒性和保真度，为AI生成视频的水印监管提供了有效解决方案。

title: Efficient Long-Horizon GUI Agents via Training-Free KV Cache Compression
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have emerged as powerful engines for autonomous GUI agents, yet their deployment is severely constrained by the substantial memory footprint and latency of the Key-Value (KV) cache during long-horizon interactions. While existing cache compression methods have proven effective for LLMs, we empirically demonstrate that they suffer from suboptimal performance in GUI scenarios due to a fundamental misalignment: unlike general visual tasks where attention sparsity varies across layers, GUI attention patterns exhibit uniform high-sparsity across all transformer layers. Motivated by this insight, we propose ST-Lite, a training-free KV cache compression framework tailored for efficient GUI agents that explicitly addresses the dynamic spatio-trajectory dependencies within GUI data streams. ST-Lite introduces a novel dual-branch scoring policy incorporating Component-centric Spatial Saliency (CSS) and Trajectory-aware Semantic Gating (TSG). Specifically, CSS preserves the structural integrity of interactive UI elements by evaluating local neighborhood saliency, while TSG mitigates historical redundancy by dynamically filtering visually repetitive KV pairs within the interaction trajectory.
