The key insight is that factor graph structure is preserved under Shor's relaxation and Burer-Monteiro factorization: applying these transformations to a QCQP with an associated factor graph representation yields a lifted problem admitting a factor graph model with identical connectivity, in which variables and factors are simple one-to-one algebraic transformations of those in the original QCQP. This structural preservation enables the Riemannian Staircase methodology for certifiable estimation to be implemented using the same mature, highly-performant factor graph libraries and workflows already ubiquitously employed throughout robotics and computer vision, making certifiable estimation as straightforward to design and deploy as conventional factor graph inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将传统因子图推理与可验证全局最优的凸松弛方法相结合的统一框架，利用因子图结构在松弛和分解过程中得以保留的特性，使得可验证估计的实现与传统因子图推理一样简单。
AI.motivation: 现有的因子图推理方法容易陷入局部最优，而在安全关键应用中不可靠。而可验证的全局最优方法计算成本高昂，难以部署。作者希望结合两者的优点。
AI.method: 利用 Shor 松弛和 Burer-Monteiro 分解保持因子图结构不变的特性，将 QCQP 松弛到更高维空间，但保留其因子图结构。然后利用 Riemannian Staircase 方法在保留了因子图结构的高维空间中进行求解，从而实现可验证的全局最优。
AI.result: 提出了一种统一的框架，使得可验证的因子图优化与现有的因子图库和工作流程兼容，从而降低了可验证估计的部署门槛。
AI.conclusion: 该框架使得可验证估计的实现和部署变得像传统的因子图推理一样简单，从而克服了现有方法的局限性，提高了机器人状态估计的可靠性。

title: Semantic XPath: Structured Agentic Memory Access for Conversational AI
summary: Conversational AI (ConvAI) agents increasingly maintain structured memory to support long-term, task-oriented interactions. In-context memory approaches append the growing history to the model input, which scales poorly under context-window limits. RAG-based methods retrieve request-relevant information, but most assume flat memory collections and ignore structure. We propose Semantic XPath, a tree-structured memory module to access and update structured conversational memory. Semantic XPath improves performance over flat-RAG baselines by 176.7% while using only 9.1% of the tokens required by in-context memory. We also introduce SemanticXPath Chat, an end-to-end ConvAI demo system that visualizes the structured memory and query execution details. Overall, this paper demonstrates a candidate for the next generation of long-term, task-oriented ConvAI systems built on structured memory.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Semantic XPath的结构化内存模块，用于改进对话式AI的长期任务导向交互，相比现有方法在性能和效率上均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的对话式AI在处理长期、任务导向交互时，基于上下文窗口的内存方法扩展性差，而基于检索增强生成（RAG）的方法通常忽略内存的结构性。
AI.method: 提出Semantic XPath，一种访问和更新结构化对话内存的树状内存模块。此外，还开发了一个名为SemanticXPath Chat的端到端对话AI演示系统来可视化内存和查询执行。
AI.result: Semantic XPath 在性能上比基于扁平化检索的基线方法提高了176.7%，同时仅使用基于上下文内存方法的9.1%的token。
AI.conclusion: Semantic XPath 是下一代基于结构化内存的长期、任务导向对话AI系统的有力候选者。

title: Proof-of-Perception: Certified Tool-Using Multimodal Reasoning with Compositional Conformal Guarantees
summary: We present Proof-of-Perception (PoP), a tool-using framework that casts multimodal reasoning as an executable graph with explicit reliability guarantees. Each perception or logic node outputs a conformal set, yielding calibrated, stepwise uncertainty; a lightweight controller uses these certificates to allocate compute under a budget, expanding with extra tool calls only when needed and stopping early otherwise. This grounds answers in verifiable evidence, reduces error compounding and hallucinations, and enables principled accuracy-compute trade-offs. Across document, chart, and multi-image QA benchmarks, PoP improves performance and reliability over strong chain-of-thought, ReAct-style, and program-of-thought baselines while using computation more efficiently.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Proof-of-Perception (PoP)的工具使用框架，将多模态推理表示为带显式可靠性保证的可执行图，从而提高性能、可靠性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 为了解决多模态推理中的错误累积、幻觉问题，并实现准确性和计算之间的权衡，作者提出了PoP框架。
AI.method: PoP将多模态推理构建为可执行图，其中每个感知或逻辑节点输出一个共形集，提供校准的、分步的不确定性。一个轻量级控制器利用这些证书在预算内分配计算资源，仅在需要时扩展工具调用，否则提前停止。
AI.result: 在文档、图表和多图像问答基准测试中，PoP在性能和可靠性上优于强链式思考（chain-of-thought）、ReAct式和程序思考（program-of-thought）的基线模型，同时计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: PoP通过提供可验证的证据来支撑答案，减少了错误累积和幻觉，并实现了准确性-计算之间的原则性权衡，是一种有效的多模态推理框架。

title: CARD: Towards Conditional Design of Multi-agent Topological Structures
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems have shown strong capabilities in tasks such as code generation and collaborative reasoning. However, the effectiveness and robustness of these systems critically depend on their communication topology, which is often fixed or statically learned, ignoring real-world dynamics such as model upgrades, API (or tool) changes, or knowledge source variability. To address this limitation, we propose CARD (Conditional Agentic Graph Designer), a conditional graph-generation framework that instantiates AMACP, a protocol for adaptive multi-agent communication. CARD explicitly incorporates dynamic environmental signals into graph construction, enabling topology adaptation at both training and runtime. Through a conditional variational graph encoder and environment-aware optimization, CARD produces communication structures that are both effective and resilient to shifts in model capability or resource availability. Empirical results on HumanEval, MATH, and MMLU demonstrate that CARD consistently outperforms static and prompt-based baselines, achieving higher accuracy and robustness across diverse conditions. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Warma10032/CARD.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CARD的条件图生成框架，用于实现自适应的多智能体通信协议AMACP，以解决现有LLM多智能体系统中固定的或静态学习的通信拓扑的局限性，并通过在训练和运行时集成动态环境信号来提高通信结构的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统在代码生成和协作推理方面表现出色，但其通信拓扑通常是固定的或静态学习的，无法适应模型升级、API变更或知识源变化等现实世界动态。
AI.method: 提出 CARD (Conditional Agentic Graph Designer) 框架，实现 AMACP (adaptive multi-agent communication protocol)。CARD 通过条件变分图编码器和环境感知优化，将动态环境信号显式纳入图结构构建，从而在训练和运行时自适应地调整通信拓扑。
AI.result: 在 HumanEval、MATH 和 MMLU 数据集上的实证结果表明，CARD 在各种条件下始终优于静态和基于提示的基线方法，实现了更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CARD 框架能够生成既有效又能在模型能力或资源可用性变化时保持鲁棒性的通信结构，从而克服了现有LLM多智能体系统通信拓扑的局限性。

title: Agents Learn Their Runtime: Interpreter Persistence as Training-Time Semantics
summary:
Tool-augmented LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that interleave natural-language reasoning with executable Python actions, as in CodeAct-style frameworks. In deployment, these agents rely on runtime state that persists across steps. By contrast, common training pipelines treat agent traces as token sequences, with execution semantics left implicit. This raises a data-centric question: Is state persistence merely an inference-time scaffold, or can models learn to exploit it when training data exposes the corresponding execution semantics?
  We isolate state persistence as a training-time variable. We introduce Opaque Knapsack, a procedurally generated family of partially observable optimization tasks designed to prevent one-shot solutions. Item attributes and constraints are hidden behind budgeted tool calls, forcing multi-turn control flow and iterative state revision. Holding task instances, prompts, tools, model, and supervision fixed, we generate paired trajectories differing only in whether interpreter state persists across steps or resets after each action. We then fine-tune identical base models (Qwen3-8B) on each trace variant and evaluate all four train-runtime combinations.
  Our 2x2 cross-evaluation shows that execution semantics primarily affect how agents reach solutions, not whether they do: solution quality is statistically indistinguishable across conditions, but token cost and stability differ substantially. A persistent-trained model in a stateless runtime triggers missing-variable errors in roughly 80% of episodes; a stateless-trained model in a persistent runtime redundantly re-derives retained state, using roughly 3.5x more tokens.
  Interpreter persistence should be treated as a first-class semantic of agent traces. Aligning fine-tuning data with deployment runtimes improves efficiency and reduces brittle train-runtime mismatches.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在工具增强型语言模型（LLM）代理训练中，解释器状态持久性对模型性能的影响。研究发现，在训练数据中暴露解释器状态的执行语义，能够显著提高模型在推理时使用持久化状态时的效率，并减少错误。
AI.motivation: 当前训练LLM代理的方法通常将代理轨迹视为token序列，而忽略了运行时状态的持久性。作者希望探究状态持久性是否仅是推理时的辅助，还是模型在训练中就能学会利用其特性。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个名为Opaque Knapsack的程序生成任务家族，该任务具有部分可观测性，需要多轮控制流和迭代状态更新。作者生成了两种训练轨迹：一种状态持久化，另一种状态重置。然后，他们使用相同的Qwen3-8B基础模型，分别在这些轨迹变体上进行微调，并评估四种训练-推理组合下的模型表现。
AI.result: 研究表明，解释器状态持久性主要影响代理解决问题的方式，而非能否解决问题。在不同的训练-推理组合下，解决方案的质量没有显著差异。然而，在具有持久化状态的运行时环境中，使用在状态持久化轨迹上训练的模型，可以显著降低token消耗和提高稳定性。反之，在无状态运行时环境中训练的模型，在持久化状态下容易触发缺失变量错误。
AI.conclusion: 解释器状态持久性应被视为代理轨迹的“一流语义”。将微调数据与推理运行时对齐，能够提高代理的效率并减少训练-推理不匹配带来的脆弱性。

title: A Unified Framework to Quantify Cultural Intelligence of AI
summary: As generative AI technologies are increasingly being launched across the globe, assessing their competence to operate in different cultural contexts is exigently becoming a priority. While recent years have seen numerous and much-needed efforts on cultural benchmarking, these efforts have largely focused on specific aspects of culture and evaluation. While these efforts contribute to our understanding of cultural competence, a unified and systematic evaluation approach is needed for us as a field to comprehensively assess diverse cultural dimensions at scale. Drawing on measurement theory, we present a principled framework to aggregate multifaceted indicators of cultural capabilities into a unified assessment of cultural intelligence. We start by developing a working definition of culture that includes identifying core domains of culture. We then introduce a broad-purpose, systematic, and extensible framework for assessing cultural intelligence of AI systems. Drawing on theoretical framing from psychometric measurement validity theory, we decouple the background concept (i.e., cultural intelligence) from its operationalization via measurement. We conceptualize cultural intelligence as a suite of core capabilities spanning diverse domains, which we then operationalize through a set of indicators designed for reliable measurement. Finally, we identify the considerations, challenges, and research pathways to meaningfully measure these indicators, specifically focusing on data collection, probing strategies, and evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于测量理论的统一框架，用于系统性地评估生成式人工智能在不同文化背景下的文化智能。该框架定义了文化的核心领域，并将文化智能概念化为一系列核心能力，然后通过一组可测量指标进行操作化，并讨论了数据收集、探测策略和评估指标等方面的挑战和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式人工智能在全球范围内的广泛应用，评估其在不同文化情境下的适应性和能力变得日益重要。尽管已有相关研究，但现有方法多侧重于文化的特定方面和评估，缺乏一个统一、系统的评估方法来全面、大规模地衡量AI的多元文化能力。
AI.method: 该研究借鉴测量理论和心理测量学效度理论，提出了一种原则性的框架。首先，定义了包含核心文化领域的文化工作定义。然后，构建了一个广泛适用、系统且可扩展的框架来评估AI的文化智能。最后，将文化智能概念化为一系列跨越不同领域的核心能力，并通过设计用于可靠测量的指标集进行操作化。
AI.result: 该研究提出了一个概念化的文化智能评估框架，该框架能够将多方面文化能力指标整合成一个统一的评估。研究还识别了在数据收集、探测策略和评估指标方面有意义地衡量这些指标的考虑因素、挑战和研究路径。
AI.conclusion: 为了全面评估生成式AI的文化智能，需要一个统一、系统的评估方法。该研究提出的框架提供了一个原则性的方法，通过明确文化定义、概念化文化智能并设计可测量的指标，为未来在这方面的研究提供了基础，并指出了实现这一目标的挑战和方向。

title: Spherical Latent Motion Prior for Physics-Based Simulated Humanoid Control
summary: Learning motion priors for physics-based humanoid control is an active research topic. Existing approaches mainly include variational autoencoders (VAE) and adversarial motion priors (AMP). VAE introduces information loss, and random latent sampling may sometimes produce invalid behaviors. AMP suffers from mode collapse and struggles to capture diverse motion skills. We present the Spherical Latent Motion Prior (SLMP), a two-stage method for learning motion priors. In the first stage, we train a high-quality motion tracking controller. In the second stage, we distill the tracking controller into a spherical latent space. A combination of distillation, a discriminator, and a discriminator-guided local semantic consistency constraint shapes a structured latent action space, allowing stable random sampling without information loss. To evaluate SLMP, we collect a two-hour human combat motion capture dataset and show that SLMP preserves fine motion detail without information loss, and random sampling yields semantically valid and stable behaviors. When applied to a two-agent physics-based combat task, SLMP produces human-like and physically plausible combat behaviors only using simple rule-based rewards. Furthermore, SLMP generalizes across different humanoid robot morphologies, demonstrating its transferability beyond a single simulated avatar.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为球形潜在运动先验（SLMP）的两阶段方法，用于学习用于物理驱动人形控制的运动先验。SLMP通过运动跟踪控制器蒸馏到球形潜在空间来克服现有方法的局限性，实现无信息损失的稳定随机采样，并在人形机器人战斗任务中生成逼真且可迁移的行为。
AI.motivation: 现有的人形运动先验学习方法（如VAE和AMP）存在信息损失、无效行为生成、模式崩溃和难以捕捉多样化运动技能等问题。研究动机是开发一种能够克服这些局限性，实现高质量、稳定且多样化运动先验学习的方法。
AI.method: SLMP是一种两阶段方法。第一阶段训练一个高质量的运动跟踪控制器。第二阶段将该跟踪控制器蒸馏到一个球形潜在空间中，并结合蒸馏、判别器和判别器引导的局部语义一致性约束来构建一个结构化的潜在动作空间，从而实现稳定且无信息损失的随机采样。
AI.result: SLMP收集了一个两小时的人类战斗动作捕捉数据集，证明其能保留精细的运动细节且无信息损失。随机采样生成的行为在语义上有效且稳定。在双智能体物理驱动的战斗任务中，SLMP仅使用简单的基于规则的奖励就能产生类人且物理上合理的战斗行为。此外，SLMP能够泛化到不同的人形机器人形态。
AI.conclusion: SLMP是一种有效的运动先验学习方法，能够解决现有方法的不足。它能生成高质量、多样化且稳定的运动，并表现出良好的泛化能力，在物理驱动的人形控制任务中具有应用潜力。

title: Diffusion-Based Low-Light Image Enhancement with Color and Luminance Priors
summary: Low-light images often suffer from low contrast, noise, and color distortion, degrading visual quality and impairing downstream vision tasks. We propose a novel conditional diffusion framework for low-light image enhancement that incorporates a Structured Control Embedding Module (SCEM). SCEM decomposes a low-light image into four informative components including illumination, illumination-invariant features, shadow priors, and color-invariant cues. These components serve as control signals that condition a U-Net-based diffusion model trained with a simplified noise-prediction loss. Thus, the proposed SCEM equipped Diffusion method enforces structured enhancement guided by physical priors. In experiments, our model is trained only on the LOLv1 dataset and evaluated without fine-tuning on LOLv2-real, LSRW, DICM, MEF, and LIME. The method achieves state-of-the-art performance in quantitative and perceptual metrics, demonstrating strong generalization across benchmarks. https://casted.github.io/scem/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SCEM的条件扩散框架，用于低光图像增强，通过分解图像为四个组件（亮度、不变特征、阴影先验、颜色不变线索）来指导扩散模型进行结构化增强，并在多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 低光图像由于对比度低、噪声和颜色失真，导致视觉质量下降并影响下游视觉任务。
AI.method: 提出了一种条件扩散框架，其中包含一个结构化控制嵌入模块（SCEM）。SCEM将低光图像分解为亮度、亮度不变特征、阴影先验和颜色不变线索四个组件，这些组件作为控制信号来指导基于U-Net的扩散模型，并使用简化的噪声预测损失进行训练。
AI.result: 该方法在LOLv1数据集上训练，并在LOLv2-real、LSRW、DICM、MEF和LIME数据集上进行评估，无需微调，在定量和感知指标上均取得了最先进的性能，展现了强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SCEM装备的扩散方法通过物理先验指导的结构化增强，能够有效地提升低光图像质量，并且具有良好的跨数据集泛化能力。

title: The Lattice Representation Hypothesis of Large Language Models
summary: We propose the Lattice Representation Hypothesis of large language models: a symbolic backbone that grounds conceptual hierarchies and logical operations in embedding geometry. Our framework unifies the Linear Representation Hypothesis with Formal Concept Analysis (FCA), showing that linear attribute directions with separating thresholds induce a concept lattice via half-space intersections. This geometry enables symbolic reasoning through geometric meet (intersection) and join (union) operations, and admits a canonical form when attribute directions are linearly independent. Experiments on WordNet sub-hierarchies provide empirical evidence that LLM embeddings encode concept lattices and their logical structure, revealing a principled bridge between continuous geometry and symbolic abstraction.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了“语言模型格表示假说”，认为大型语言模型的嵌入几何可以被视为一个概念格，并通过半空间交集来构建。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将语言模型（LLM）的嵌入几何视为线性代数结构，但缺乏解释其符号抽象和概念层次结构的理论基础。本研究旨在弥合连续几何和符号抽象之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 研究者将形式概念分析（FCA）与线性表示假说相结合，提出“语言模型格表示假说”。该假说认为，具有分离阈值的线性属性方向通过半空间交集诱导了一个概念格。符号推理通过几何上的“meet”（交集）和“join”（并集）操作实现。
AI.result: 实验表明，大型语言模型的嵌入确实编码了概念格及其逻辑结构，特别是在WordNet子层级上。当属性方向线性无关时，模型可以达到规范形式。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型格表示假说提供了一个原则性的框架，解释了大型语言模型如何通过嵌入的几何结构来表示概念层次和执行符号推理，连接了连续的嵌入空间和离散的符号世界。

title: DEP: A Decentralized Large Language Model Evaluation Protocol
summary: With the rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs), a large number of benchmarks have been proposed. However, most benchmarks lack unified evaluation standard and require the manual implementation of custom scripts, making results hard to ensure consistency and reproducibility. Furthermore, mainstream evaluation frameworks are centralized, with datasets and answers, which increases the risk of benchmark leakage. To address these issues, we propose a Decentralized Evaluation Protocol (DEP), a decentralized yet unified and standardized evaluation framework through a matching server without constraining benchmarks. The server can be mounted locally or deployed remotely, and once adapted, it can be reused over the long term. By decoupling users, LLMs, and benchmarks, DEP enables modular, plug-and-play evaluation: benchmark files and evaluation logic stay exclusively on the server side. In remote setting, users cannot access the ground truth, thereby achieving data isolation and leak-proof evaluation. To facilitate practical adoption, we develop DEP Toolkit, a protocol-compatible toolkit that supports features such as breakpoint resume, concurrent requests, and congestion control. We also provide detailed documentation for adapting new benchmarks to DEP. Using DEP toolkit, we evaluate multiple LLMs across benchmarks. Experimental results verify the effectiveness of DEP and show that it reduces the cost of deploying benchmark evaluations. As of February 2026, we have adapted over 60 benchmarks and continue to promote community co-construction to support unified evaluation across various tasks and domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去中心化的评估协议（DEP），旨在解决现有大型语言模型（LLM）基准测试缺乏统一标准、难以复现以及存在数据泄露风险的问题。DEP通过一个独立的匹配服务器实现统一、标准化的评估，并将用户、LLM和基准测试解耦，确保了评估的模块化、即插即用性以及数据隔离。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM基准测试缺乏统一的评估标准，需要手动编写脚本，导致结果难以保证一致性和可复现性。此外，中心化的评估框架容易导致数据集和答案泄露。
AI.method: 提出去中心化评估协议（DEP），通过一个匹配服务器实现LLM、用户和基准测试的解耦。服务器可以本地部署或远程部署，并支持模块化、即插即用的评估。在远程部署时，用户无法访问真实标签，从而实现数据隔离和防泄露评估。还开发了DEP Toolkit，支持断点续传、并发请求和拥塞控制等功能，并提供适配新基准测试的文档。
AI.result: DEP协议被证明是有效的，并且降低了部署基准测试评估的成本。DEP Toolkit已适配超过60个基准测试，并仍在推广社区共建。
AI.conclusion: DEP协议提供了一种去中心化、统一且标准化的LLM评估框架，解决了现有评估方法中的痛点，提高了评估的可信度和效率，并鼓励社区协作以支持更广泛的评估需求。

title: Hybrid TD3: Overestimation Bias Analysis and Stable Policy Optimization for Hybrid Action Space
summary: Reinforcement learning in discrete-continuous hybrid action spaces presents fundamental challenges for robotic manipulation, where high-level task decisions and low-level joint-space execution must be jointly optimized. Existing approaches either discretize continuous components or relax discrete choices into continuous approximations, which suffer from scalability limitations and training instability in high-dimensional action spaces and under domain randomization. In this paper, we propose Hybrid TD3, an extension of Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) that natively handles parameterized hybrid action spaces in a principled manner. We conduct a rigorous theoretical analysis of overestimation bias in hybrid action settings, deriving formal bounds under twin-critic architectures and establishing a complete bias ordering across five algorithmic variants. Building on this analysis, we introduce a weighted clipped Q-learning target that marginalizes over the discrete action distribution, achieving equivalent bias reduction to standard clipped minimization while improving policy smoothness. Experimental results demonstrate that Hybrid TD3 achieves superior training stability and competitive performance against state-of-the-art hybrid action baselines

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Hybrid TD3 的强化学习算法，用于解决机器人操作中离散-连续混合动作空间带来的挑战，该算法能够原生处理参数化混合动作空间，并在理论和实验上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 机器人操作中离散-连续混合动作空间优化存在根本性挑战，现有方法在处理高维动作空间和域随机化时存在可扩展性和训练稳定性问题。
AI.method: 提出 Hybrid TD3 算法，扩展了 Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) 算法，能够原生处理参数化混合动作空间。通过理论分析混合动作空间中的过高估计偏差，并引入加权裁剪 Q-learning 目标。
AI.result: Hybrid TD3 在训练稳定性和性能上优于现有的最先进的混合动作空间基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Hybrid TD3 算法能够以一种原则性的方式有效处理离散-连续混合动作空间，为机器人操作中的强化学习提供了更稳定和高效的解决方案。

title: Token-level Data Selection for Safe LLM Fine-tuning
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on custom datasets has become a standard approach for adapting these models to specific domains and applications. However, recent studies have shown that such fine-tuning can lead to significant degradation in the model's safety. Existing defense methods operate at the sample level and often suffer from an unsatisfactory trade-off between safety and utility. To address this limitation, we perform a systematic token-level diagnosis of safety degradation during fine-tuning. Based on this, we propose token-level data selection for safe LLM fine-tuning (TOSS), a novel framework that quantifies the safety risk of each token by measuring the loss difference between a safety-degraded model and a utility-oriented model. This token-level granularity enables accurate identification and removal of unsafe tokens, thereby preserving valuable task-specific information. In addition, we introduce a progressive refinement strategy, TOSS-Pro, which iteratively enhances the safety-degraded model's ability to identify unsafe tokens. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach robustly safeguards LLMs during fine-tuning while achieving superior downstream task performance, significantly outperforming existing sample-level defense methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/Polly-LYP/TOSS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为TOSS（Token-level data selection for safe LLM fine-tuning）的框架，用于在微调大型语言模型（LLM）时解决安全性能下降的问题。该框架通过识别和移除不安全标记来保护模型的安全，同时保持其效用，并引入了一种名为TOSS-Pro的渐进式优化策略。
AI.motivation: 传统的LLM微调虽然能适应特定领域，但会导致模型安全性能显著下降。现有的基于样本级别的防御方法在安全性和效用之间存在权衡问题，难以令人满意。
AI.method: 通过对微调过程中安全性能下降进行逐个标记（token-level）的诊断。提出TOSS框架，通过测量安全性能下降模型和面向效用的模型之间的损失差异来量化每个标记的安全风险，从而精确识别和移除不安全标记。还引入了TOSS-Pro，一种迭代增强模型识别不安全标记能力的渐进式优化策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，TOSS框架能有效保护LLM在微调过程中的安全性，同时在下游任务上取得优越的性能，显著优于现有的样本级防御方法。
AI.conclusion: TOSS框架及其渐进式优化策略TOSS-Pro能够有效地解决LLM微调过程中的安全风险，并在保持模型效用的同时显著提高其安全性，是优于现有样本级方法的有效解决方案。

title: Extended Empirical Validation of the Explainability Solution Space
summary: This technical report provides an extended validation of the Explainability Solution Space (ESS) through cross-domain evaluation. While initial validation focused on employee attrition prediction, this study introduces a heterogeneous intelligent urban resource allocation system to demonstrate the generality and domain-independence of the ESS framework. The second case study integrates tabular, temporal, and geospatial data under multi-stakeholder governance conditions. Explicit quantitative positioning of representative XAI families is provided for both contexts. Results confirm that ESS rankings are not domain-specific but adapt systematically to governance roles, risk profiles, and stakeholder configurations. The findings reinforce ESS as a generalizable operational decision-support instrument for explainable AI strategy design across socio-technical systems.

AI.tldr: 该技术报告通过跨领域评估，对可解释性解决方案空间（ESS）进行了扩展验证，证明了ESS的通用性和领域无关性。
AI.motivation: 为了验证ESS框架的通用性和领域无关性，将其从员工离职预测领域扩展到更复杂的异构智能城市资源分配系统。
AI.method: 该研究在两个不同的领域（员工离职预测和城市资源分配）中应用了ESS框架。在城市资源分配案例中，集成了表格、时间序列和地理空间数据，并考虑了多方治理条件。通过对代表性的XAI（可解释人工智能）家族进行量化定位来评估ESS。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，ESS的排名并非特定于某个领域，而是能够根据治理角色、风险概况和利益相关者配置进行系统性调整。ESS在两个案例研究中的定位结果是独立的。
AI.conclusion: ESS被证实是一个可推广的、操作性的决策支持工具，可用于跨社会技术系统的可解释人工智能战略设计。

title: Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation in Synchrotron Computed Tomography with Self-Correcting Pseudo Labels
summary: X-ray computed tomography (CT) is a widely used imaging technique that provides detailed examinations into the internal structure of an object with synchrotron CT (SR-CT) enabling improved data quality by using higher energy, monochromatic X-rays. While SR-CT allows for improved resolution, time-resolved experimentation, and reduced imaging artifacts, it also produces significantly larger datasets than conventional CT. Accurate and efficient evaluation of these datasets is a critical component of these workflows; yet is often done manually representing a major bottleneck in the analysis phase. While deep learning has emerged as a powerful tool capable of providing a wide range of purely data-driven solutions, it requires a substantial amount of labeled data for training and manual annotation of SR-CT datasets is impractical in practice. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework that enables automatic segmentation of large, high-resolution SR-CT datasets by eliminating the need to hand label images for deep learning training. First, we generate pseudo labels by clustering on the voxel values identifying regions in the volume with similar attenuation coefficients producing an initial semantic map. Afterwards, we train a segmentation model on the pseudo labels before utilizing the Unbiased Teacher approach to self-correct them ensuring accurate final segmentations. We find our approach improves pixel-wise accuracy and mIoU by 13.31% and 15.94%, respectively, over the baseline pseudo labels when using a magnesium crystal SR-CT sample. Additionally, we extensively evaluate the different components of our workflow including segmentation model, loss function, pseudo labeling strategy, and input type. Finally, we evaluate our approach on to two additional samples highlighting our frameworks ability to produce segmentations that are considerably better than the original pseudo labels.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需手动标注即可自动分割高分辨率同步加速器X射线CT（SR-CT）数据集的新框架，通过伪标签聚类和无偏教师自校正，显著提高了分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统SR-CT数据量大，手动标注耗时且不切实际，深度学习模型训练需要大量标注数据，存在效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 1. 生成伪标签：基于体素值聚类，创建初始语义图。2. 训练分割模型：使用伪标签训练模型。3. 自校正：利用无偏教师方法迭代优化伪标签，提高准确性。
AI.result: 与基线伪标签相比，像素级准确率和mIoU分别提高了13.31%和15.94%。对不同组件（分割模型、损失函数、伪标签策略、输入类型）进行了广泛评估，并在另外两个样本上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了SR-CT数据集的自动分割，无需手动标注，显著提高了分割精度，克服了传统方法在处理大规模高分辨率CT数据时的效率限制。

title: D-GVIO: A Buffer-Driven and Efficient Decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial State Estimator for Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Cooperative localization is essential for swarm applications like collaborative exploration and search-and-rescue missions. However, maintaining real-time capability, robustness, and computational efficiency on resource-constrained platforms presents significant challenges. To address these challenges, we propose D-GVIO, a buffer-driven and fully decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial Odometry (GVIO) framework that leverages a novel buffering strategy to support efficient and robust distributed state estimation. The proposed framework is characterized by four core mechanisms. Firstly, through covariance segmentation, covariance intersection and buffering strategy, we modularize propagation and update steps in distributed state estimation, significantly reducing computational and communication burdens. Secondly, the left-invariant extended Kalman filter (L-IEKF) is adopted for information fusion, which exhibits superior state estimation performance over the traditional extended Kalman filter (EKF) since its state transition matrix is independent of the system state. Thirdly, a buffer-based re-propagation strategy is employed to handle delayed measurements efficiently and accurately by leveraging the L-IEKF, eliminating the need for costly re-computation. Finally, an adaptive buffer-driven outlier detection method is proposed to dynamically cull GNSS outliers, enhancing robustness in GNSS-challenged environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为D-GVIO的分布式GNSS-视觉-惯性里程计框架，通过创新的缓冲策略、协方差分割、左不变扩展卡尔曼滤波以及自适应异常值检测，实现了实时、鲁棒且计算效率高的合作定位，尤其适用于资源受限的平台。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的平台上实现实时、鲁棒且计算高效的合作定位，这对蜂群应用（如协同探索和搜索救援）至关重要，但现有方法面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出D-GVIO框架，采用缓冲驱动的全分布式GNSS-视觉-惯性里程计。核心机制包括：1. 协方差分割、协方差交集和缓冲策略，实现传播和更新步骤的模块化；2. 采用左不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（L-IEKF）进行信息融合；3. 基于缓冲的重传播策略处理延迟测量；4. 自适应缓冲驱动的异常值检测方法。
AI.result: 通过上述机制，D-GVIO显著降低了计算和通信负担，提高了状态估计性能，并能有效处理延迟测量和GNSS异常值，从而增强了在GNSS受限环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: D-GVIO是一个高效、鲁棒且全分布式的GNSS-视觉-惯性里程计框架，通过创新的缓冲策略和滤波方法，解决了资源受限平台上的合作定位挑战。

title: Percept-Aware Surgical Planning for Visual Cortical Prostheses with Vascular Avoidance
summary: Cortical visual prostheses aim to restore sight by electrically stimulating neurons in early visual cortex (V1). With the emergence of high-density and flexible neural interfaces, electrode placement within three-dimensional cortex has become a critical surgical planning problem. Existing strategies emphasize visual field coverage and anatomical heuristics but do not directly optimize predicted perceptual outcomes under safety constraints. We present a percept-aware framework for surgical planning of cortical visual prostheses that formulates electrode placement as a constrained optimization problem in anatomical space. Electrode coordinates are treated as learnable parameters and optimized end-to-end using a differentiable forward model of prosthetic vision. The objective minimizes task-level perceptual error while incorporating vascular avoidance and gray matter feasibility constraints. Evaluated on simulated reading and natural image tasks using realistic folded cortical geometry (FreeSurfer fsaverage), percept-aware optimization consistently improves reconstruction fidelity relative to coverage-based placement strategies. Importantly, vascular safety constraints eliminate margin violations while preserving perceptual performance. The framework further enables co-optimization of multi-electrode thread configurations under fixed insertion budgets. These results demonstrate how differentiable percept models can inform anatomically grounded, safety-aware computer-assisted planning for cortical neural interfaces and provide a foundation for optimizing next-generation visual prostheses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于感知感知的框架，用于皮层视觉假体的手术规划，通过可微分的正向模型优化电极位置，以最小化感知误差并满足血管和灰质可行性约束，从而提高视觉重建保真度并确保手术安全。
AI.motivation: 现有皮层视觉假体手术规划策略侧重于视觉野覆盖和解剖学启发式方法，但未能直接优化安全约束下的感知结果。随着高密度灵活神经接口的出现，三维皮层内电极放置成为一个关键的外科手术规划问题。
AI.method: 提出一个基于感知的框架，将电极放置表述为解剖空间中的约束优化问题。将电极坐标视为可学习参数，并使用可微分的假体视觉正向模型进行端到端优化。优化目标是最小化任务级别的感知误差，同时考虑血管避让和灰质可行性约束。在模拟阅读和自然图像任务上，使用真实的折叠皮层几何模型（FreeSurfer fsaverage）进行评估。
AI.result: 与基于覆盖率的放置策略相比，感知感知优化一致地提高了重建保真度。血管安全约束在避免侵犯血管的同时，保持了感知性能。该框架还能在固定植入预算下，协同优化多电极线程配置。
AI.conclusion: 可微分感知模型可以指导解剖学基础的、安全性意识的计算机辅助皮层神经接口规划。该框架为优化下一代视觉假体提供了基础。

title: Beyond Reward: A Bounded Measure of Agent Environment Coupling
summary: Real-world reinforcement learning (RL) agents operate in closed-loop systems where actions shape future observations, making reliable deployment under distribution shifts a persistent challenge. Existing monitoring relies on reward or task metrics, capturing outcomes but missing early coupling failures. We introduce bipredictability (P) as the ratio of shared information in the observation, action, outcome loop to the total available information, a principled, real time measure of interaction effectiveness with provable bounds, comparable across tasks. An auxiliary monitor, the Information Digital Twin (IDT), computes P and its diagnostic components from the interaction stream. We evaluate SAC and PPO agents on MuJoCo HalfCheetah under eight agent, and environment-side perturbations across 168 trials. Under nominal operation, agents exhibit P = 0.33 plus minus 0.02, below the classical bound of 0.5, revealing an informational cost of action selection. The IDT detects 89.3% of perturbations versus 44.0% for reward based monitoring, with 4.4x lower median latency. Bipredictability enables early detection of interaction degradation before performance drops and provides a prerequisite signal for closed loop self regulation in deployed RL systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“双可预测性”（bipredictability, P）的新指标，用于实时衡量强化学习（RL）在闭环系统中的交互有效性，即使在分布变化下也能检测到耦合失败，并且比基于奖励的监控更早、更准确。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的RL代理部署面临分布偏移问题，现有监控方法（如基于奖励）无法及时检测到交互失败，可能导致性能下降。
AI.method: 引入“双可预测性”（P）作为信息比率，并通过“信息数字孪生”（IDT）计算该指标及其诊断分量。在MuJoCo HalfCheetah环境中，对SAC和PPO代理进行了8种代理端和环境端的扰动测试。
AI.result: 在正常操作下，P为0.33±0.02，低于理论最优值0.5，表明动作选择存在信息成本。IDT检测到89.3%的扰动，显著高于基于奖励的监控（44.0%），且延迟降低了4.4倍。
AI.conclusion: 双可预测性是一种有效的实时指标，可以在性能下降之前及早发现交互退化，为闭环RL系统的自我调节提供基础信号。

title: Reasoning or Rationalization? The Role of Justifications in Masked Diffusion Models for Fact Verification
summary: Unlike autoregressive models, which generate tokens sequentially and benefit from reasoning-before-answering strategies such as Chain-of-Thought, Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) refine all sequence positions simultaneously, raising questions about how these models handle tasks requiring justified verdicts. In this work, we investigate the dynamics of MDLM reasoning on fact verification, examining whether justifications serve as genuine reasoning or post-hoc rationalization. We observe that MDLMs typically converge on a verdict early in the diffusion process, treating it as a global anchor that is resolved before the justification is complete. Crucially, enforcing a reasoning-first constraint via delayed verdict unmasking actively degrades performance, dropping accuracy from 86.2% to 71.9% as accumulating justification tokens introduce inconsistencies that override initially correct predictions. Interventional experiments reveal that the model rationalizes incorrect forced verdicts in 56% of cases, and that verdicts are strongly causally dependent on justification quality (57.3% accuracy with corrupted justifications vs. 97.1% with ground-truth). This causal dependence explains the degradation under forced deliberation: as the model generates noisy justification tokens, it conditions on them, gradually overriding its initially correct assessment. Our findings suggest that for fact verification with MDLMs, extended deliberation can be counterproductive, risking the dilution of accurate early predictions with noise introduced during justification generation.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）在事实核查任务中，其判断（verdict）通常在推理（justification）生成之前就已经确定，而强制要求先进行推理反而会降低模型性能，模型也倾向于为错误的强制判断进行事后合理化。
AI.motivation: 探索掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）在需要推理的任务（如事实核查）中的推理机制，特别是判断和解释之间的关系，以及判断是否是真正的推理结果还是事后合理化。
AI.method: 1. 观察MDLM在事实核查中的收敛过程，分析判断和解释生成的时间顺序。2. 通过延迟解遮盖（delayed verdict unmasking）的干预实验，强制模型先生成解释再给出判断。3. 进行干预实验，探究模型为错误判断进行合理化的比例，以及判断对解释质量的因果依赖性。
AI.result: 1. MDLM通常在扩散过程早期就确定判断，将其作为全局锚点，解释生成是后续过程。2. 强制先推理（延迟解遮盖）使准确率从86.2%下降到71.9%，因为累积的解释代币引入了不一致性。3. 模型在56%的情况下会为被强制的错误判断进行合理化。4. 判断质量对解释质量有强烈的因果依赖性（解释质量高时准确率97.1%，解释质量差时准确率57.3%）。
AI.conclusion: 对于MDLM在事实核查任务中，过度的推理过程（“深思熟虑”）可能适得其反，因为在解释生成过程中引入的噪声会稀释早期准确的判断。模型倾向于将判断视为先验，并基于此生成解释，甚至为错误的判断进行事后合理化。

title: Information-Theoretic Framework for Self-Adapting Model Predictive Controllers
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a vital technique for autonomous systems, like Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), enabling optimized motion planning. However, traditional MPC struggles to adapt to real-time changes such as dynamic obstacles and shifting system dynamics, lacking inherent mechanisms for self-monitoring and adaptive optimization. Here, we introduce Entanglement Learning (EL), an information-theoretic framework that enhances MPC adaptability through an Information Digital Twin (IDT). The IDT monitors and quantifies, in bits, the information flow between MPC inputs, control actions, and UAV behavior. By introducing new information-theoretic metrics we call entanglement metrics, it tracks variations in these dependencies. These metrics measure the mutual information between the optimizer's input, its control actions, and the resulting UAV dynamics, enabling a deeper understanding of their interrelationships. This allows the IDT to detect performance deviations and generate real-time adaptive signals to recalibrate MPC parameters, preserving stability. Unlike traditional MPC, which relies on error-based feedback, this dual-feedback approach leverages information flow for proactive adaptation to evolving conditions. Scalable and leveraging existing infrastructure, this framework improves MPC reliability and robustness across diverse scenarios, extending beyond UAV control to any MPC implementation requiring adaptive performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的“纠缠学习”（EL）框架，通过“信息数字孪生”（IDT）来增强模型预测控制（MPC）的自适应性，以应对动态环境中的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统的MPC在面对动态障碍物和系统动力学变化时适应性不足，缺乏自监测和自适应优化的机制。
AI.method: 引入“纠缠学习”（EL）框架，构建“信息数字孪生”（IDT）。IDT通过信息论指标（纠缠度量）量化MPC输入、控制动作和无人机行为之间的信息流，实时监测性能偏差，并生成自适应信号来重新校准MPC参数。
AI.result: EL框架通过纠缠度量实现了对MPC性能偏差的主动检测，并能实时生成自适应信号，提高了MPC的稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 纠缠学习（EL）框架通过信息数字孪生（IDT）和信息论指标，为MPC提供了一种新的自适应机制，能够主动适应不断变化的环境，提升了MPC在各种场景下的可靠性和鲁棒性，并可应用于所有需要自适应性能的MPC系统。

title: XAI-enhanced Comparative Opinion Mining via Aspect-based Scoring and Semantic Reasoning
summary: Comparative opinion mining involves comparing products from different reviews. However, transformer-based models designed for this task often lack transparency, which can adversely hinder the development of trust in users. In this paper, we propose XCom, an enhanced transformer-based model separated into two principal modules, i.e., (i) aspect-based rating prediction and (ii) semantic analysis for comparative opinion mining. XCom also incorporates a Shapley additive explanations module to provide interpretable insights into the model's deliberative decisions. Empirically, XCom achieves leading performances compared to other baselines, which demonstrates its effectiveness in providing meaningful explanations, making it a more reliable tool for comparative opinion mining. Source code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/XCom.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为XCom的增强型Transformer模型，用于比较性意见挖掘。该模型包含一个基于方面评分预测和语义分析的模块，并集成了Shapley值解释模块，以提供模型决策的可解释性。XCom在实验中取得了领先性能，并能提供有意义的解释，使其成为一个更可靠的工具。
AI.motivation: 现有的Transformer模型在进行比较性意见挖掘时缺乏透明度，这不利于用户建立信任。因此，需要一个既能有效进行比较性意见挖掘，又能提供模型决策可解释性的模型。
AI.method: 提出XCom模型，该模型包含两个主要模块：(i) 基于方面评分预测模块；(ii) 用于比较性意见挖掘的语义分析模块。此外，还集成了Shapley值解释模块，以提供模型决策的可解释性。
AI.result: XCom在与基线模型的比较中取得了领先的性能。实验证明了XCom在提供有意义的解释方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: XCom模型在比较性意见挖掘任务中表现出色，并且通过提供可解释性，使其成为一个更值得信赖的工具。

title: Jailbreaking Embodied LLMs via Action-level Manipulation
comment: This paper has been officially accepted for ACM SenSys 2026
summary: Embodied Large Language Models (LLMs) enable AI agents to interact with the physical world through natural language instructions and actions. However, beyond the language-level risks inherent to LLMs themselves, embodied LLMs with real-world actuation introduce a new vulnerability: instructions that appear semantically benign may still lead to dangerous real-world consequences, revealing a fundamental misalignment between linguistic security and physical outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Blindfold, an automated attack framework that leverages the limited causal reasoning capabilities of embodied LLMs in real-world action contexts. Rather than iterative trial-and-error jailbreaking of black-box embodied LLMs, Blindfold adopts an Adversarial Proxy Planning strategy: it compromises a local surrogate LLM to perform action-level manipulations that appear semantically safe but could result in harmful physical effects when executed. Blindfold further conceals key malicious actions by injecting carefully crafted noise to evade detection by defense mechanisms, and it incorporates a rule-based verifier to improve the attack executability. Evaluations on both embodied AI simulators and a real-world 6DoF robotic arm show that Blindfold achieves up to 53% higher attack success rates than SOTA baselines, highlighting the urgent need to move beyond surface-level language censorship and toward consequence-aware defense mechanisms to secure embodied LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了Blindfold，一个自动化的攻击框架，用于攻击具身大语言模型（Embodied LLMs）。Blindfold通过操纵本地代理LLM，执行语义上安全但在物理世界中可能导致危险的动作，从而绕过现有的安全防护措施。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM安全研究主要关注语言层面的风险，但具身LLM在物理世界中的实际行动可能带来新的、更危险的漏洞。当语义上无害的指令导致危险的物理后果时，就暴露了语言安全与物理结果之间的根本性不一致。因此，需要新的方法来应对这一挑战。
AI.method: Blindfold框架采用“对抗性代理规划”（Adversarial Proxy Planning）策略。首先，它会攻破一个本地的代理LLM。然后，利用这个被攻破的代理LLM执行动作层面的操纵，这些操纵在语义上看起来是安全的，但当在物理世界中执行时可能导致有害的物理后果。此外，Blindfold通过注入精心设计的噪声来隐藏关键的恶意动作，以逃避检测，并包含一个基于规则的验证器来提高攻击的可执行性。
AI.result: 在具身AI模拟器和真实的6DoF机械臂上的评估表明，Blindfold的攻击成功率比最先进的基线方法高出53%。这表明现有的基于表面语言审查的防御机制不足以保护具身LLM。
AI.conclusion: Blindfold框架证明了具身LLM在物理世界中存在语言安全与物理结果不匹配的风险，现有的防御机制需要改进。研究强调了发展“后果感知”（consequence-aware）的防御机制的紧迫性，以确保具身LLM的安全。

title: DiffSOS: Acoustic Conditional Diffusion Model for Speed-of-Sound Reconstruction in Ultrasound Computed Tomography
summary: Accurate Speed-of-Sound (SoS) reconstruction from acoustic waveforms is a cornerstone of ultrasound computed tomography (USCT), enabling quantitative velocity mapping that reveals subtle anatomical details and pathological variations often invisible in conventional imaging. However, practical utility is hindered by the limitations of existing algorithms; traditional Full Waveform Inversion (FWI) is computationally intensive, while current deep learning approaches tend to produce oversmoothed results lacking fine details. We propose DiffSOS, a conditional diffusion model that directly maps acoustic waveforms to SoS maps. Our framework employs a specialized acoustic ControlNet to strictly ground the denoising process in physical wave measurements. To ensure structural consistency, we optimize a hybrid loss function that integrates noise prediction, spatial reconstruction, and noise frequency content. To accelerate inference, we employ stochastic Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM) sampling, achieving near real-time reconstruction with only 10 steps. Crucially, we exploit the stochastic generative nature of our framework to estimate pixel-wise uncertainty, providing a measure of reliability that is often absent in deterministic approaches. Evaluated on the OpenPros USCT benchmark, DiffSOS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art networks, achieving an average Multi-scale Structural Similarity of 0.957. Our approach provides high-fidelity SoS maps with a principled measure of confidence, facilitating safer and faster clinical interpretation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DiffSOS的条件扩散模型，用于直接从声波波形重建声速（SoS）图，克服了现有方法的计算密集和结果平滑的缺点。该模型结合了声学ControlNet、混合损失函数和DDIM采样，实现了高保真SoS重建和不确定性估计，并在OpenPros USCT基准上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有声速重建算法（如FWI）计算量大，而深度学习方法常产生平滑度过高的结果，缺乏细节。研究的动机是开发一种既能提供高保真细节，计算效率又高，同时还能量化结果可靠性的声速重建方法。
AI.method: 提出DiffSOS，一个条件扩散模型，直接将声波波形映射到声速图。使用专门的声学ControlNet来约束去噪过程，并采用包含噪声预测、空间重建和噪声频率内容的混合损失函数。为加速推理，使用了随机DDIM采样。此外，利用生成模型的随机性来估计像素级不确定性。
AI.result: 在OpenPros USCT基准测试中，DiffSOS显著优于最先进的网络，平均多尺度结构相似性（MS-SSIM）达到0.957。该模型能够生成高保真的声速图，并提供可靠性的度量。
AI.conclusion: DiffSOS是一种有效的条件扩散模型，能够从声波波形直接高精度地重建声速图，并提供不确定性估计，这有助于提高超声计算断层扫描（USCT）的临床解释的安全性和速度。

title: Reasoning Boosts Opinion Alignment in LLMs
summary: Opinion modeling aims to capture individual or group political preferences, enabling applications such as digital democracies, where models could help shape fairer and more popular policies. Given their versatility, strong generalization capabilities, and demonstrated success across diverse text-to-text applications, large language models (LLMs) are natural candidates for this task. However, due to their statistical nature and limited causal understanding, they tend to produce biased opinions when prompted naively. In this work, we study whether reasoning can improve opinion alignment. Motivated by the recent advancement in mathematical reasoning enabled by reinforcement learning (RL), we train models to produce profile-consistent answers through structured reasoning. We evaluate our approach on three datasets covering U.S., European, and Swiss politics. Results indicate that reasoning enhances opinion modeling and is competitive with strong baselines, but does not fully remove bias, highlighting the need for additional mechanisms to build faithful political digital twins using LLMs. By releasing both our method and datasets, we establish a solid baseline to support future research on LLM opinion alignment.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了使用强化学习训练的大型语言模型（LLMs）通过结构化推理来提高政治意见建模的准确性，并评估了其在不同政治数据集上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLMs在进行意见建模时存在偏见，本研究旨在通过引入推理机制来改善意见一致性。
AI.method: 利用强化学习训练LLMs进行结构化推理，以生成与用户画像一致的回答。在U.S.、European和Swiss三个政治数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 推理机制能够提升意见建模的效果，并且在与现有基线方法相比时具有竞争力，但并未完全消除偏见。
AI.conclusion: 推理是提高LLM意见建模准确性的有效途径，但要构建完全忠实的政治数字分身，还需要额外的机制来解决偏见问题。研究团队公开了方法和数据集，为未来的相关研究奠定基础。

title: PhysGraph: Physically-Grounded Graph-Transformer Policies for Bimanual Dexterous Hand-Tool-Object Manipulation
summary: Bimanual dexterous manipulation for tool use remains a formidable challenge in robotics due to the high-dimensional state space and complicated contact dynamics. Existing methods naively represent the entire system state as a single configuration vector, disregarding the rich structural and topological information inherent to articulated hands. We present PhysGraph, a physically-grounded graph transformer policy designed explicitly for challenging bimanual hand-tool-object manipulation. Unlike prior works, we represent the bimanual system as a kinematic graph and introduce per-link tokenization to preserve fine-grained local state information. We propose a physically-grounded bias generator that injects structural priors directly into the attention mechanism, including kinematic spatial distance, dynamic contact states, geometric proximity, and anatomical properties. This allows the policy to explicitly reason about physical interactions rather than learning them implicitly from sparse rewards. Extensive experiments show that PhysGraph significantly outperforms baseline - ManipTrans in manipulation precision and task success rates while using only 51% of the parameters of ManipTrans. Furthermore, the inherent topological flexibility of our architecture shows qualitative zero-shot transfer to unseen tool/object geometries, and is sufficiently general to be trained on three robotic hands (Shadow, Allegro, Inspire).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为PhysGraph的基于图的Transformer策略，用于解决机器人双手机械操作工具的挑战。该方法通过将系统表示为运动学图并注入物理先验来改进现有方法，提高了操作精度和成功率，并实现了零样本迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将整个机器人系统状态表示为单一向量，忽略了关节手固有的结构和拓扑信息，导致在处理高维状态空间和复杂接触动力学时面临挑战。
AI.method: 将双手机械系统表示为运动学图，引入了每链接（per-link）的token化来保留细粒度的局部状态信息。提出了一种物理导向的偏置生成器，将运动学空间距离、动力学接触状态、几何邻近性和解剖学属性等结构化先验信息直接注入到注意力机制中。
AI.result: PhysGraph在操作精度和任务成功率方面显著优于基线方法ManipTrans，并且参数数量减少了49%。此外，该模型展现出对未见过工具/物体几何形状的零样本迁移能力，并且能够成功地在三种不同的机械手（Shadow, Allegro, Inspire）上进行训练。
AI.conclusion: PhysGraph通过显式地推理物理交互，而非隐式地从稀疏奖励中学习，成功地解决了双手机械操作工具的挑战，并在精度、效率和泛化性方面取得了显著进展。

title: Non-Markovian Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation via Keyframe Chaining
summary: Existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often struggle to generalize to long-horizon tasks due to their heavy reliance on immediate observations. While recent studies incorporate retrieval mechanisms or extend context windows to handle procedural tasks, they often struggle to capture Non-Markovian dependencies, where optimal actions rely solely on specific past states rather than the current observation. To address this, we introduce Keyframe-Chaining VLA, a framework that extracts and links key historical frames to model long-horizon dependencies. Specifically, we propose an automatic keyframe selector that learns a discriminative embedding space, effectively identifying distinct state transitions. To capture task-critical information, we design a progress-aware query mechanism that dynamically retrieves historical frames based on their temporal relevance to the current execution phase. These selected keyframes are integrated into the VLA as interleaved visual tokens, explicitly grounding the policy in the long-horizon temporal context. Finally, we introduce a suite of four Non-Markovian manipulation tasks built upon the ManiSkill simulator to measure task success rates. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance, effectively tackling robot manipulation tasks characterized by long-horizon temporal dependencies. Code is available at https://github.com/cytoplastm/KC-VLA.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 Keyframe-Chaining VLA 的新框架，通过提取和链接历史关键帧来改进视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型处理长时序任务的能力，特别是非马尔可夫依赖任务。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在处理长时序任务时存在困难，尤其是在依赖于特定历史状态而非当前观察的非马尔可夫依赖情况下。
AI.method: 设计了一个自动关键帧选择器，用于识别状态转换；提出了一种进度感知查询机制，动态检索与当前执行阶段相关的历史帧；将选定的关键帧作为视觉标记整合到 VLA 模型中，以明确长时序时间上下文。
AI.result: 在 ManiSkill 模拟器上构建了四个非马尔可夫操纵任务，实验结果表明该方法在处理长时序时间依赖的机器人操纵任务方面表现优越。
AI.conclusion: Keyframe-Chaining VLA 框架能够有效地捕捉和利用长时序的非马尔可夫依赖关系，从而显著提升 VLA 模型在复杂机器人操纵任务上的泛化能力。

title: SSR: Pushing the Limit of Spatial Intelligence with Structured Scene Reasoning
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in semantic tasks, they frequently lack the "spatial sense" essential for sophisticated geometric reasoning. Current models typically suffer from exorbitant modality-alignment costs and deficiency in fine-grained structural modeling precision.We introduce SSR, a framework designed for Structured Scene Reasoning that seamlessly integrates 2D and 3D representations via a lightweight alignment mechanism. To minimize training overhead, our framework anchors 3D geometric features to the large language model's pre-aligned 2D visual semantics through cross-modal addition and token interleaving, effectively obviating the necessity for large-scale alignment pre-training. To underpin complex spatial reasoning, we propose a novel scene graph generation pipeline that represents global layouts as a chain of independent local triplets defined by relative coordinates. This is complemented by an incremental generation algorithm, enabling the model to construct "language-model-friendly" structural scaffolds for complex environments. Furthermore, we extend these capabilities to global-scale 3D global grounding task, achieving absolute metric precision across heterogeneous data sources. At a 7B parameter scale, SSR achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple spatial intelligence benchmarks, notably scoring 73.9 on VSI-Bench. Our approach significantly outperforms much larger models, demonstrating that efficient feature alignment and structured scene reasoning are the cornerstones of authentic spatial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SSR的结构化场景推理框架，它通过轻量级的对齐机制有效地融合了2D和3D表示，并采用新颖的场景图生成方法来处理复杂的空间推理任务，在VSI-Bench等基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型在语义任务上表现出色，但在空间推理方面存在不足，并且在模态对齐和精细结构建模方面成本高昂且精度不够。
AI.method: SSR框架通过跨模态加法和token交错，将3D几何特征锚定到LLM预对齐的2D视觉语义上，以最小化训练开销。它还提出了一种新颖的场景图生成管线，将全局布局表示为由相对坐标定义的局部三元组链，并辅以增量生成算法来构建语言模型友好的结构化脚手架。
AI.result: 在7B参数规模下，SSR在多个空间智能基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，在VSI-Bench上得分达到73.9，并且在3D全局定位任务上实现了绝对指标精度，显著优于更大的模型。
AI.conclusion: 高效的特征对齐和结构化场景推理是实现真实空间智能的关键，SSR框架通过其轻量级对齐机制和先进的结构化推理能力，有效地解决了现有模型的局限性。

title: Generative AI & Fictionality: How Novels Power Large Language Models
summary: Generative models, like the one in ChatGPT, are powered by their training data. The models are simply next-word predictors, based on patterns learned from vast amounts of pre-existing text. Since the first generation of GPT, it is striking that the most popular datasets have included substantial collections of novels. For the engineers and research scientists who build these models, there is a common belief that the language in fiction is rich enough to cover all manner of social and communicative phenomena, yet the belief has gone mostly unexamined. How does fiction shape the outputs of generative AI? Specifically, what are novels' effects relative to other forms of text, such as newspapers, Reddit, and Wikipedia? Since the 1970s, literature scholars such as Catherine Gallagher and James Phelan have developed robust and insightful accounts of how fiction operates as a form of discourse and language. Through our study of an influential open-source model (BERT), we find that LLMs leverage familiar attributes and affordances of fiction, while also fomenting new qualities and forms of social response. We argue that if contemporary culture is increasingly shaped by generative AI and machine learning, any analysis of today's various modes of cultural production must account for a relatively novel dimension: computational training data.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了小说等虚构文本对生成式AI模型（如BERT）的影响，并将其与其他文本类型（如报纸、Reddit、维基百科）进行对比，发现AI模型利用了虚构文本的特点，同时也催生了新的社会反应形式。
AI.motivation: 研究者们注意到，当前流行的生成式AI模型（如GPT）的训练数据中包含了大量的小说，但这种选择的影响并未得到充分检验。他们希望探究小说如何塑造AI的输出，以及与其他文本类型相比，小说的作用有多大。
AI.method: 研究者们通过研究一个有影响力的开源模型（BERT）来评估虚构文本对LLMs的影响。他们借鉴了文学学者关于虚构作为话语和语言形式的研究。
AI.result: 研究发现，LLMs利用了虚构文本的固有属性和特点，并且促生了新的社会反应形式和特质。小说在训练数据中的存在对AI模型的行为产生了显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 本研究强调，在当前文化日益受到生成式AI影响的背景下，对各种文化生产模式的分析必须包含计算训练数据这一相对新的维度，尤其是虚构文本在其中扮演的重要角色。

title: Mean-Flow based One-Step Vision-Language-Action
summary: Recent advances in FlowMatching-based Vision-Language-Action (VLA) frameworks have demonstrated remarkable advantages in generating high-frequency action chunks, particularly for highly dexterous robotic manipulation tasks. Despite these notable achievements, their practical applications are constrained by prolonged generation latency, which stems from inherent iterative sampling requirements and architectural limitations. To address this critical bottleneck, we propose a Mean-Flow based One-Step VLA approach. Specifically, we resolve the noise-induced issues in the action generation process, thereby eliminating the consistency constraints inherent to conventional Flow-Matching methods. This significantly enhances generation efficiency and enables one-step action generation. Real-world robotic experiments show that the generation speed of the proposed Mean-Flow based One-Step VLA is 8.7 times and 83.9 times faster than that of SmolVLA and Diffusion Policy, respectively. These results elucidate its great potential as a high-efficiency backbone for VLA-based robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于均值流（Mean-Flow）的单步视觉-语言-动作（VLA）方法，旨在解决现有基于流匹配（FlowMatching）的VLA框架在生成高频动作时存在的生成延迟问题，通过消除噪声引起的挑战和传统流匹配方法的约束，实现了单步动作生成，并在机器人实验中显著提高了生成速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于流匹配的VLA框架在生成高频动作块方面表现出色，但存在生成延迟过长的问题，限制了其在机器人操作等实际应用中的推广。因此，需要一种更高效的VLA生成方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于均值流（Mean-Flow）的单步VLA方法。该方法解决了动作生成过程中的噪声问题，消除了传统流匹配方法固有的约束，从而实现了单步动作生成。
AI.result: 与SmolVLA相比，提出的Mean-Flow单步VLA方法生成速度快8.7倍；与Diffusion Policy相比，生成速度快83.9倍。实际机器人实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Mean-Flow单步VLA方法在提高VLA模型生成效率方面取得了显著进展，为基于VLA的机器人操作提供了高效的解决方案，具有巨大的应用潜力。

title: PointAlign: Feature-Level Alignment Regularization for 3D Vision-Language Models
summary: The development of 3D Vision-Language Models (VLMs), crucial for applications in robotics, autonomous driving, and augmented reality, is severely constrained by the scarcity of paired 3D-text data. Existing methods rely solely on next-token prediction loss, using only language tokens for supervision. This results in inefficient utilization of limited 3D data and leads to a significant degradation and loss of valuable geometric information in intermediate representations. To address these limitations, we propose {\mname}, a novel feature-level alignment regularization method. {\mname} explicitly supervises intermediate point cloud tokens to preserve fine-grained 3D geometric-semantic information throughout the language modeling process. Specifically, we constrain the intermediate point cloud tokens within the LLM to align with visual input tokens via a consistency loss. By training only a lightweight alignment projector and LoRA adapters, {\mname} achieves explicit feature-level supervision with minimal computational overhead, effectively preventing geometric degradation. Extensive experiments on ModelNet40 and Objaverse datasets demonstrate that our method achieves \textbf{2.08} pp improvement on average for classification tasks, with a substantial \textbf{7.50} pp gain on the challenging open-vocabulary Objaverse classification task and \textbf{4.88} pp improvement on 3D object captioning evaluated by Qwen2-72B-Instruct, validating the effectiveness of {\mname}. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/yharoldsu0627/PointAlign}{https://github.com/yharoldsu0627/PointAlign}.

AI.tldr: 解析错误
AI.motivation: 解析错误
AI.method: 解析错误
AI.result: 解析错误
AI.conclusion: 解析错误

title: DiffTrans: Differentiable Geometry-Materials Decomposition for Reconstructing Transparent Objects
summary: Reconstructing transparent objects from a set of multi-view images is a challenging task due to the complicated nature and indeterminate behavior of light propagation. Typical methods are primarily tailored to specific scenarios, such as objects following a uniform topology, exhibiting ideal transparency and surface specular reflections, or with only surface materials, which substantially constrains their practical applicability in real-world settings. In this work, we propose a differentiable rendering framework for transparent objects, dubbed DiffTrans, which allows for efficient decomposition and reconstruction of the geometry and materials of transparent objects, thereby reconstructing transparent objects accurately in intricate scenes with diverse topology and complex texture. Specifically, we first utilize FlexiCubes with dilation and smoothness regularization as the iso-surface representation to reconstruct an initial geometry efficiently from the multi-view object silhouette. Meanwhile, we employ the environment light radiance field to recover the environment of the scene. Then we devise a recursive differentiable ray tracer to further optimize the geometry, index of refraction and absorption rate simultaneously in a unified and end-to-end manner, leading to high-quality reconstruction of transparent objects in intricate scenes. A prominent advantage of the designed ray tracer is that it can be implemented in CUDA, enabling a significantly reduced computational cost. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superior reconstruction performance of our DiffTrans compared with other methods, especially in intricate scenes involving transparent objects with diverse topology and complex texture. The code is available at https://github.com/lcp29/DiffTrans.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DiffTrans的可微分渲染框架，用于从多视角图像中高效地分解和重建具有复杂拓扑结构和纹理的透明物体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理具有复杂拓扑、非理想透明度、表面镜面反射或仅表面材料的透明物体时存在局限性，这限制了其在现实世界中的应用。
AI.method: 该方法首先利用带有膨胀和光滑度正则化的FlexiCubes从多视角物体轮廓重建初始几何。然后，使用环境光辐射场恢复场景环境。最后，通过递归可微分光线追踪器，以统一且端到端的方式同时优化几何、折射率和吸收率。
AI.result: DiffTrans能够实现高质量的透明物体重建，尤其是在具有复杂拓扑和纹理的精细场景中。其CUDA实现显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: DiffTrans在处理复杂场景中的透明物体重建方面，相比现有方法表现出优越的性能，能够准确地重建几何和材质。

title: Words & Weights: Streamlining Multi-Turn Interactions via Co-Adaptation
summary: Test-time policy adaptation for multi-turn interactions (T2PAM) is essential for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with dynamic user needs during inference time. However, existing paradigms commonly treat test-time adaptation as a single-axis problem, either purely refining instructions (Prompt Engineering) or only adjusting weights (Test-Time Training), ignoring that interaction failures stem from a coupled mix of ambiguity and incapacity. We argue that these two optimization paths are not merely additive but synergistic: semantic clarity acts as a pre-conditioner for effective parameter updates. To this end, we propose ROSA2, a framework that reformulates interaction as a joint optimization problem over the heterogeneous space of Words and Weights. By mathematically decomposing the error signal, ROSA2 utilizes textual gradients to rectify intent ambiguity and parameter updates to bridge capability gaps. Theoretically, we prove that this co-adaptation strictly reduces the required parameter shift for convergence. Empirically, ROSA2 outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 30% on MATH while reducing interaction turns by 40%, demonstrating that refining the context unlocks the true potential of parameter updates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROSA2框架，通过联合优化文本和模型权重来解决大型语言模型在多轮交互中的测试时策略适应问题，以应对意图模糊和能力不足。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法通常将问题视为单轴问题（仅调整指令或仅调整权重），忽略了交互失败是由于意图模糊和能力不足的混合引起的，而这两种优化路径并非简单叠加而是协同作用的。
AI.method: ROSA2框架将交互视为一个在词语和权重异构空间上的联合优化问题。通过数学分解误差信号，利用文本梯度纠正意图模糊，并利用参数更新弥合能力差距。
AI.result: ROSA2在MATH数据集上取得了30%的性能提升，并减少了40%的交互轮次，证明了优化上下文可以释放参数更新的真正潜力。
AI.conclusion: ROSA2通过联合优化文本和权重，能够有效地提高大型语言模型在多轮交互中的适应能力，并优于现有方法。

title: HarmonyCell: Automating Single-Cell Perturbation Modeling under Semantic and Distribution Shifts
comment: 18 pages total (8 pages main text + appendix), 6 figures
summary: Single-cell perturbation studies face dual heterogeneity bottlenecks: (i) semantic heterogeneity--identical biological concepts encoded under incompatible metadata schemas across datasets; and (ii) statistical heterogeneity--distribution shifts from biological variation demanding dataset-specific inductive biases. We propose HarmonyCell, an end-to-end agent framework resolving each challenge through a dedicated mechanism: an LLM-driven Semantic Unifier autonomously maps disparate metadata into a canonical interface without manual intervention; and an adaptive Monte Carlo Tree Search engine operates over a hierarchical action space to synthesize architectures with optimal statistical inductive biases for distribution shifts. Evaluated across diverse perturbation tasks under both semantic and distribution shifts, HarmonyCell achieves a 95% valid execution rate on heterogeneous input datasets (versus 0% for general agents) while matching or even exceeding expert-designed baselines in rigorous out-of-distribution evaluations. This dual-track orchestration enables scalable automatic virtual cell modeling without dataset-specific engineering.

AI.tldr: HarmonyCell 是一个端到端的智能体框架，利用 LLM 和 MCTS 来解决单细胞扰动研究中的语义和统计异质性问题，实现了自动化、可扩展的虚拟细胞建模。
AI.motivation: 单细胞扰动研究面临着语义异质性（不同数据集的元数据模式不兼容）和统计异质性（生物变异导致的分布偏移）的双重挑战，阻碍了其自动化和可扩展性。
AI.method: HarmonyCell 包含两个核心机制：1. LLM 驱动的语义统一器（Semantic Unifier）自动映射和统一不同数据集的元数据。2. 自适应蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）引擎在分层动作空间上搜索，以合成具有最佳统计归纳偏差的架构来应对分布偏移。
AI.result: HarmonyCell 在处理异构输入数据集时，实现了 95% 的有效执行率（相比之下，通用智能体为 0%）。在严格的分布外评估中，其性能与专家设计的基线相当甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: HarmonyCell 能够有效解决单细胞扰动研究中的异质性挑战，实现无需特定数据集工程的、可扩展的自动化虚拟细胞建模。

title: ROSER: Few-Shot Robotic Sequence Retrieval for Scalable Robot Learning
summary: A critical bottleneck in robot learning is the scarcity of task-labeled, segmented training data, despite the abundance of large-scale robotic datasets recorded as long, continuous interaction logs. Existing datasets contain vast amounts of diverse behaviors, yet remain structurally incompatible with modern learning frameworks that require cleanly segmented, task-specific trajectories. We address this data utilization crisis by formalizing robotic sequence retrieval: the task of extracting reusable, task-centric segments from unlabeled logs using only a few reference examples. We introduce ROSER, a lightweight few-shot retrieval framework that learns task-agnostic metric spaces over temporal windows, enabling accurate retrieval with as few as 3-5 demonstrations, without any task-specific training required. To validate our approach, we establish comprehensive evaluation protocols and benchmark ROSER against classical alignment methods, learned embeddings, and language model baselines across three large-scale datasets (e.g., LIBERO, DROID, and nuScenes). Our experiments demonstrate that ROSER consistently outperforms all prior methods in both accuracy and efficiency, achieving sub-millisecond per-match inference while maintaining superior distributional alignment. By reframing data curation as few-shot retrieval, ROSER provides a practical pathway to unlock underutilized robotic datasets, fundamentally improving data availability for robot learning.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出ROSER框架，通过少数示例（3-5个演示）从大量未标记的机器人交互日志中检索出可重复使用的、以任务为中心的轨迹片段，解决了机器人学习中任务标签数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人数据集虽然数据量大且行为多样，但格式不兼容现代机器人学习框架，后者需要清晰分割、任务特定的轨迹。这导致大量有价值的数据未被有效利用。
AI.method: 提出ROSER，一个轻量级的少样本检索框架。它学习时间窗口上的任务无关度量空间，仅需少量参考示例即可进行准确检索，无需任何特定任务的训练。
AI.result: ROSER在准确性和效率方面均优于经典对齐方法、学习嵌入和语言模型基线，在三个大规模数据集（LIBERO, DROID, nuScenes）上的实验证实了其有效性，实现了每匹配低于毫秒级的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: ROSER通过将数据整理视为少样本检索问题，为充分利用未被充分利用的机器人数据集提供了一条实用的途径，从根本上改善了机器人学习的数据可用性。

title: ASTRA-bench: Evaluating Tool-Use Agent Reasoning and Action Planning with Personal User Context
summary: Next-generation AI must manage vast personal data, diverse tools, and multi-step reasoning, yet most benchmarks remain context-free and single-turn. We present ASTRA-bench (Assistant Skills in Tool-use, Reasoning \& Action-planning), a benchmark that uniquely unifies time-evolving personal context with an interactive toolbox and complex user intents. Our event-driven pipeline generates 2,413 scenarios across four protagonists, grounded in longitudinal life events and annotated by referential, functional, and informational complexity. Evaluation of state-of-the-art models (e.g., Claude-4.5-Opus, DeepSeek-V3.2) reveals significant performance degradation under high-complexity conditions, with argument generation emerging as the primary bottleneck. These findings expose critical limitations in current agents' ability to ground reasoning within messy personal context and orchestrate reliable multi-step plans. We release ASTRA-bench with a full execution environment and evaluation scripts to provide a diagnostic testbed for developing truly context-aware AI assistants.

AI.tldr: ASTRA-bench 是一个新基准，用于评估 AI 助手在处理动态个人情境、工具使用、多步推理和复杂用户意图方面的能力，发现现有模型在这些复杂条件下表现不佳，尤其在论点生成方面存在瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有 AI 基准测试缺乏对时变个人情境、多样化工具和复杂用户意图的综合考量，无法有效评估下一代 AI 助手在处理真实世界复杂任务时的能力。
AI.method: 构建 ASTRA-bench 基准，包含 2,413 个基于生活事件生成的动态情境，涵盖四个主人公。该基准通过事件驱动的管道生成，并根据参考、功能和信息复杂度进行标注。使用 Claude-4.5-Opus、DeepSeek-V3.2 等 SOTA 模型进行评估。
AI.result: SOTA 模型在 ASTRA-bench 的高复杂度条件下表现出显著的性能下降，其中论点生成是主要的性能瓶颈。这表明当前 AI 代理在将推理与混乱的个人情境结合以及制定可靠的多步计划方面存在局限。
AI.conclusion: ASTRA-bench 暴露了当前 AI 助手在处理动态个人情境和复杂任务规划方面的不足。该基准的发布及其执行环境将为开发真正具备情境感知能力的 AI 助手提供一个诊断测试平台。

title: Station2Radar: query conditioned gaussian splatting for precipitation field
comment: This paper was accepted to ICLR 2026
summary: Precipitation forecasting relies on heterogeneous data. Weather radar is accurate, but coverage is geographically limited and costly to maintain. Weather stations provide accurate but sparse point measurements, while satellites offer dense, high-resolution coverage without direct rainfall retrieval. To overcome these limitations, we propose Query-Conditioned Gaussian Splatting (QCGS), the first framework to fuse automatic weather station (AWS) observations with satellite imagery for generating precipitation fields. Unlike conventional 2D Gaussian splatting, which renders the entire image plane, QCGS selectively renders only queried precipitation regions, avoiding unnecessary computation in non-precipitating areas while preserving sharp precipitation structures. The framework combines a radar point proposal network that identifies rainfall-support locations with an implicit neural representation (INR) network that predicts Gaussian parameters for each point. QCGS enables efficient, resolution-flexible precipitation field generation in real time. Through extensive evaluation with benchmark precipitation products, QCGS demonstrates over 50\% improvement in RMSE compared to conventional gridded precipitation products, and consistently maintains high performance across multiple spatiotemporal scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为查询条件高斯泼溅（QCGS）的新框架，用于融合地面气象站（AWS）观测数据和卫星图像，以生成降水场。该方法能够选择性地渲染降水区域，提高了效率，并实现了比传统格点产品更优的降水预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有降水预测方法依赖于雷达、气象站和卫星等异构数据源，但各自存在覆盖范围有限、成本高、数据稀疏或无法直接反演降水等缺点。研究旨在克服这些局限，融合不同数据源以提高降水预测的准确性和效率。
AI.method: QCGS框架结合了雷达点提案网络和隐式神经表示（INR）网络。雷达点提案网络用于识别支持降水的地点，INR网络则预测每个点的“高斯”参数。与传统的2D高斯泼溅不同，QCGS仅渲染查询到的降水区域。
AI.result: QCGS在与基准降水产品的广泛评估中，相比传统的格点降水产品，RMSE（均方根误差）提高了50%以上，并且在多个时空尺度上持续保持高性能。
AI.conclusion: QCGS是首个融合AWS观测和卫星图像生成降水场的框架，通过选择性渲染和高效的神经表示，能够实时、分辨率灵活地生成降水场，显著优于现有方法。

title: Can Thinking Models Think to Detect Hateful Memes?
summary: Hateful memes often require compositional multimodal reasoning: the image and text may appear benign in isolation, yet their interaction conveys harmful intent. Although thinking-based multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently advanced vision-language understanding, their capabilities remain underexplored for hateful meme analysis. We propose a reinforcement learning based post-training framework that improves reasoning in thinking-based MLLMs through task-specific rewards and a novel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) objective. Specifically, we (i) conduct a systematic empirical study of off-the-shelf MLLMs for hateful meme understanding, (ii) extend an existing hateful meme dataset by generating weakly or pseudo-supervised chain-of-thought rationales via distillation, and (iii) introduce a GRPO-based objective that jointly optimizes meme classification and explanation quality to encourage fine-grained, step-by-step reasoning. Experiments on the Hateful Memes benchmark show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving accuracy and F1 by approximately 1 percent and explanation quality by approximately 3 percent. We will publicly release our code, dataset extensions, and evaluation resources to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种基于强化学习的后训练框架，通过引入任务特定奖励和新颖的组相对策略优化（GRPO）目标，来提升多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在识别仇恨表情包时的推理能力，并在Hateful Memes基准测试中取得了当前最优的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于思考的多模态大语言模型在仇恨表情包分析方面的能力尚未被充分探索，而仇恨表情包通常需要组合性的多模态推理才能理解其隐藏的有害意图。
AI.method: 研究者们首先对现有的多模态大语言模型进行了系统的实证研究。然后，他们通过蒸馏生成了弱监督或伪监督的链式思考（chain-of-thought）解释，扩展了现有的仇恨表情包数据集。最后，他们引入了一个基于GRPO的目标函数，该函数联合优化表情包分类和解释的质量，以鼓励细粒度的、循序渐进的推理。
AI.result: 在Hateful Memes基准测试上，所提出的方法达到了当前最优（state-of-the-art）的性能，准确率和F1分数分别提高了约1%，解释质量提高了约3%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地通过基于强化学习的后训练框架，特别是GRPO目标，显著提升了多模态大语言模型在仇恨表情包理解中的推理能力和解释质量，并为后续研究提供了可复现的代码、数据集扩展和评估资源。

title: SFCo-Nav: Efficient Zero-Shot Visual Language Navigation via Collaboration of Slow LLM and Fast Attributed Graph Alignment
comment: Accepted by 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
summary: Recent advances in large vision-language models (VLMs) and large language models (LLMs) have enabled zero-shot approaches to visual language navigation (VLN), where an agent follows natural language instructions using only ego perception and reasoning. However, existing zero-shot methods typically construct a naive observation graph and perform per-step VLM-LLM inference on it, resulting in high latency and computation costs that limit real-time deployment. To address this, we present SFCo-Nav, an efficient zero-shot VLN framework inspired by the principle of slow-fast cognitive collaboration. SFCo-Nav integrates three key modules: 1) a slow LLM-based planner that produces a strategic chain of subgoals, each linked to an imagined object graph; 2) a fast reactive navigator for real-time object graph construction and subgoal execution; and 3) a lightweight asynchronous slow-fast bridge aligns advanced structured, attributed imagined and perceived graphs to estimate navigation confidence, triggering the slow LLM planner only when necessary. To the best of our knowledge, SFCo-Nav is the first slow-fast collaboration zero-shot VLN system supporting asynchronous LLM triggering according to the internal confidence. Evaluated on the public R2R and REVERIE benchmarks, SFCo-Nav matches or exceeds prior state-of-the-art zero-shot VLN success rates while cutting total token consumption per trajectory by over 50% and running more than 3.5 times faster. Finally, we demonstrate SFCo-Nav on a legged robot in a hotel suite, showcasing its efficiency and practicality in indoor environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SFCo-Nav的高效零样本视觉语言导航（VLN）框架，通过引入慢速LLM规划器和快速导航器协同工作，并采用异步通信机制，显著提高了导航效率和速度，同时保持了高成功率，并成功在真实机器人上进行了演示。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本VLN方法通常需要对每个步骤进行VLM-LLM推理，计算成本高，延迟大，难以实现实时部署。
AI.method: SFCo-Nav框架包含三个模块：1) 慢速LLM规划器生成子目标和对应的概念图；2) 快速导航器实时构建对象图并执行子目标；3) 轻量级异步慢速-快速桥接器通过评估导航置信度来决定何时触发慢速LLM规划器。
AI.result: 在R2R和REVERIE基准测试中，SFCo-Nav的成功率与现有SOTA方法相当或更高，同时每条轨迹的总token消耗减少了50%以上，运行速度提高了3.5倍以上。
AI.conclusion: SFCo-Nav是首个支持异步LLM触发的零样本VLN系统，通过慢速-快速认知协作，实现了高效且实用的视觉语言导航，并在真实机器人上验证了其有效性。

title: Self-Anchoring Calibration Drift in Large Language Models: How Multi-Turn Conversations Reshape Model Confidence
summary: We introduce Self-Anchoring Calibration Drift (SACD), a hypothesized tendency for large language models (LLMs) to show systematic changes in expressed confidence when building iteratively on their own prior outputs across multi-turn conversations. We report an empirical study comparing three frontier models -- Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.2 -- across 150 questions spanning factual, technical, and open-ended domains, using three conditions: single-turn baseline (A), multi-turn self-anchoring (B), and independent repetition control (C). Results reveal a complex, model-heterogeneous pattern that partially diverges from pre-registered hypotheses. Claude Sonnet 4.6 exhibited significant decreasing confidence under self-anchoring (mean CDS = -0.032, t(14) = -2.43, p = .029, d = -0.627), while also showing significant calibration error drift (F(4,56) = 22.77, p < .001, eta^2 = .791). GPT-5.2 showed the opposite pattern in open-ended domains (mean CDS = +0.026) with significant ECE escalation by Turn 5. Gemini 3.1 Pro showed no significant CDS (t(14) = 0.38, p = .710), but its Condition C data reveals a striking ECE pattern: without self-anchoring, Gemini's calibration error drops from .327 to near zero across repetitions, whereas self-anchoring holds ECE flat at approximately .333 -- indicating that SACD can manifest as suppression of natural calibration improvement rather than ac

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个假设，即大型语言模型（LLM）在多轮对话中迭代构建自身先前的输出时，会表现出一种系统性的置信度变化趋势，称为“自锚定校准漂移”（SACD）。通过一项实证研究，对比了Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.2三个模型在150个跨领域问题上的表现，发现在不同条件下（单轮基线、多轮自锚定、独立重复控制），各模型展现出复杂且异质的模式，部分与预设假设不符。Claude Sonnet 4.6在自锚定条件下表现出显著的置信度下降和校准误差漂移。GPT-5.2在开放式领域则呈现相反模式，且在第五轮出现Ece（Expected Calibration Error）升级。Gemini 3.1 Pro未显示显著的SACD，但其独立重复数据表明，在无自锚定情况下，Gemini的校准误差会自然下降，而自锚定则抑制了这种自然改善。
AI.motivation: 研究者们观察到大型语言模型在多轮对话中，当需要基于自身先前的输出进行迭代时，其表达的置信度可能发生系统性变化，即“自锚定校准漂移”（SACD）。他们希望通过实证研究来检验和量化这一现象，并探究不同模型在SACD上的表现差异。
AI.method: 研究人员设计了一个实验，比较了三个前沿模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.2）在150个跨领域问题上的表现。实验设置了三种条件：1. 单轮基线（A）；2. 多轮自锚定（B），即模型迭代构建自身先前的输出；3. 独立重复控制（C），模型独立重复回答问题。研究通过测量置信度变化（CDS）和校准误差（ECE）来评估SACD现象。
AI.result: 研究结果显示，SACD模式因模型而异。Claude Sonnet 4.6在自锚定条件下表现出显著的置信度下降（mean CDS = -0.032）和校准误差漂移（F(4,56) = 22.77）。GPT-5.2在开放式领域则表现出置信度上升（mean CDS = +0.026），并在第五轮出现ECE升级。Gemini 3.1 Pro未显示显著的SACD，但其独立重复数据表明，在无自锚定时，Gemini的ECE会自然下降，而自锚定则将其ECE保持在一个较高水平，抑制了自然校准改善。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型确实存在自锚定校准漂移（SACD）现象，但其表现复杂且因模型而异。SACD可能表现为置信度下降或上升，以及校准误差的漂移或改善的抑制。Claude Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.2均表现出SACD的不同形式，而Gemini 3.1 Pro的数据则揭示了SACD可能通过抑制模型的自然校准改善来体现。

title: Suffix-Constrained Greedy Search Algorithms for Causal Language Models
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are powerful tools that have found applications beyond human-machine interfaces and chatbots. In particular, their ability to generate reasoning traces motivated their use in many prediction tasks like math question answering. Unfortunately, extracting the final answer in an LLM free-form output is difficult, as it is an information extraction problem on its own.
  In this work, we introduce suffix-constrained generation, that aims to produce well-formed LLM responses in which final answers follow strict templates and are guaranteed to be trivially parseable. To this end, we introduce several algorithms that are based on greedy search procedures. We experiment on several datasets, and show that our approach allows to guarantee trivial deterministic extraction of the final answer from an LLM output without having a negative impact on results, and even improving them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“后缀约束生成”的技术，用于确保大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的可解析且结构化的输出，特别是在数学问答等需要提取最终答案的任务中。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在处理自由格式输出时，难以从中提取最终答案，这是一个独立的信息提取难题。研究的动机是解决 LLMs 输出结果的解析困难问题，确保答案的格式化和易于提取。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种“后缀约束生成”的方法，并开发了基于贪婪搜索算法的若干具体实现。该方法旨在生成格式规范、答案可解析的 LLM 输出。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够保证从 LLM 的输出中以确定的方式提取最终答案，并且不会对性能产生负面影响，甚至能够提升结果的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 后缀约束生成是一种有效的方法，可以解决 LLMs 输出结果的解析难题，确保答案的易提取性，并可能提高 LLMs 在特定任务上的表现。

title: The Observer-Situation Lattice: A Unified Formal Basis for Perspective-Aware Cognition
comment: Extended version of the AAMAS 2026 paper with the same title
summary: Autonomous agents operating in complex, multi-agent environments must reason about what is true from multiple perspectives. Existing approaches often struggle to integrate the reasoning of different agents, at different times, and in different contexts, typically handling these dimensions in separate, specialized modules. This fragmentation leads to a brittle and incomplete reasoning process, particularly when agents must understand the beliefs of others (Theory of Mind). We introduce the Observer-Situation Lattice (OSL), a unified mathematical structure that provides a single, coherent semantic space for perspective-aware cognition. OSL is a finite complete lattice where each element represents a unique observer-situation pair, allowing for a principled and scalable approach to belief management. We present two key algorithms that operate on this lattice: (i) Relativized Belief Propagation, an incremental update algorithm that efficiently propagates new information, and (ii) Minimal Contradiction Decomposition, a graph-based procedure that identifies and isolates contradiction components. We prove the theoretical soundness of our framework and demonstrate its practical utility through a series of benchmarks, including classic Theory of Mind tasks and a comparison with established paradigms such as assumption-based truth maintenance systems. Our results show that OSL provides a computationally efficient and expressive foundation for building robust, perspective-aware autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Observer-Situation Lattice (OSL)的统一数学结构，用于处理多主体环境中代理的视角感知认知。OSL提供了一个单一、连贯的语义空间，并通过Relativized Belief Propagation和Minimal Contradiction Decomposition算法，实现了高效的信念管理和矛盾识别，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在整合不同代理、不同时间、不同情境下的推理存在困难，导致推理过程脆弱且不完整，尤其是在处理他人的信念（心智理论）时。研究动机是开发一种更统一、更具可扩展性的框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 本文引入了Observer-Situation Lattice (OSL)，一个有限完备格，其中每个元素代表一个唯一的观察者-情境对。基于OSL，提出了两种算法：(i) Relativized Belief Propagation，一个增量更新算法，用于高效传播新信息；(ii) Minimal Contradiction Decomposition，一个基于图的程序，用于识别和隔离矛盾组件。
AI.result: 理论证明了OSL框架的健全性，并通过一系列基准测试（包括心智理论任务和与假设式真值维护系统等现有范式的比较）证明了其实用性。结果表明OSL在计算效率和表达能力上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: OSL提供了一个计算高效且富有表现力的基础，用于构建健壮的、具备视角感知能力的自主代理。该框架能够更有效地管理信念，并处理多代理环境中的推理挑战。

title: MIST-RL: Mutation-based Incremental Suite Testing via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often fail to generate correct code on the first attempt, which requires using generated unit tests as verifiers to validate the solutions. Despite the success of recent verification methods, they remain constrained by a "scaling-by-quantity" paradigm. This brute-force approach suffers from a critical limitation: it yields diminishing returns in fault detection while causing severe test redundancy. To address this, we propose MIST-RL (Mutation-based Incremental Suite Testing via Reinforcement Learning), a framework that shifts the focus to "scaling-by-utility". We formulate test generation as a sequential decision process optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Specifically, we introduce a novel incremental mutation reward combined with dynamic penalties, which incentivizes the model to discover new faults while it suppresses functionally equivalent assertions. Experiments on HumanEval+ and MBPP+ demonstrate that MIST-RL outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. It achieves a +28.5% higher mutation score while reducing the number of test cases by 19.3%. Furthermore, we show that these compact, high-utility tests serve as superior verifiers, which improves downstream code reranking accuracy on HumanEval+ by 3.05% over the SOTA baseline with 10 candidate samples. The source code and data are provided in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 MIST-RL 的框架，通过强化学习生成更有效、更精简的单元测试，以验证大型语言模型生成的代码，从而提高了故障检测率并减少了测试冗余。
AI.motivation: 现有的验证大型语言模型生成代码的方法依赖于“按数量扩展”的范式，这种方法效率低下，测试冗余严重，并且故障检测回报递减。
AI.method: MIST-RL 框架将测试生成视为一个序列决策过程，并使用群体相对策略优化 (GRPO) 进行优化。引入了增量变异奖励和动态惩罚机制，以激励模型发现新故障并抑制功能等价断言。
AI.result: 在 HumanEval+ 和 MBPP+ 数据集上的实验表明，MIST-RL 实现了更高的变异分数（+28.5%），同时减少了测试用例数量（19.3%）。此外，MIST-RL 生成的测试用例提高了代码重新排序的准确性（+3.05%）。
AI.conclusion: MIST-RL 通过“按效用扩展”的方法，有效地提高了验证大型语言模型生成代码的效率和效果，生成了更具价值的单元测试，减少了冗余，并提升了代码验证和重新排序的性能。

authors: Kunlin Xie Chenghao Li Haolan Zhang
title: Multimodal Adversarial Quality Policy for Safe Grasping
