To mitigate this issue, we propose \textit{Consistent Constraint Annealing (CCA)} to progressively regulate world-level constraints during training, and \textit{Multi-Source Inner-Guidance} to enforce learned world priors at inference. Extensive evaluations show that DreamWorld improves world consistency, outperforming Wan2.1 by 2.26 points on VBench. Code will be made publicly available at \href{https://github.com/ABU121111/DreamWorld}{\textcolor{mypink}{\textbf{Github}}}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DreamWorld框架，通过联合世界建模范式，整合物理常识、3D和时间一致性等多种异构世界知识，提升视频生成的世界一致性。同时引入一致性约束退火（CCA）和多源内部引导（Multi-Source Inner-Guidance）来解决训练和推理中的稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型仅限于表面上的合理性，缺乏对世界的连贯统一的理解。先前的方法要么只包含一种世界知识，要么依赖于僵化的对齐策略引入知识，这不足以构建需要联合建模多种异构维度（如物理常识、3D和时间一致性）的世界模型。
AI.method: 提出DreamWorld框架，采用联合世界建模范式，联合预测视频像素和来自基础模型的特征，以捕捉时间动态、空间几何和语义一致性。为了解决异构目标优化的不稳定性问题，提出了“一致性约束退火（CCA）”来逐步调节世界级约束，以及“多源内部引导”在推理时强制执行学习到的世界先验。
AI.result: DreamWorld提高了世界一致性，在VBench上的表现优于Wan2.1（提升2.26分）。
AI.conclusion: DreamWorld通过联合建模多种异构世界知识，并辅以CCA和多源内部引导，有效地提升了视频生成的世界一致性和稳定性，克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: Agentic Multi-Source Grounding for Enhanced Query Intent Understanding: A DoorDash Case Study
summary: Accurately mapping user queries to business categories is a fundamental Information Retrieval challenge for multi-category marketplaces, where context-sparse queries such as "Wildflower" exhibit intent ambiguity, simultaneously denoting a restaurant chain, a retail product, and a floral item. Traditional classifiers force a winner-takes-all assignment, while general-purpose LLMs hallucinate unavailable inventory. We introduce an Agentic Multi-Source Grounded system that addresses both failure modes by grounding LLM inference in (i) a staged catalog entity retrieval pipeline and (ii) an agentic web-search tool invoked autonomously for cold-start queries. Rather than predicting a single label, the model emits an ordered multi-intent set, resolved by a configurable disambiguation layer that applies deterministic business policies and is designed for extensibility to personalization signals. This decoupled design generalizes across domains, allowing any marketplace to supply its own grounding sources and resolution rules without modifying the core architecture. Evaluated on DoorDash's multi-vertical search platform, the system achieves +10.9pp over the ungrounded LLM baseline and +4.6pp over the legacy production system. On long-tail queries, incremental ablations attribute +8.3pp to catalog grounding, +3.2pp to agentic web search grounding, and +1.5pp to dual intent disambiguation, yielding 90.7% accuracy (+13.0pp over baseline). The system is deployed in production, serving over 95% of daily search impressions, and establishes a generalizable paradigm for applications requiring foundation models grounded in proprietary context and real-time web knowledge to resolve ambiguous, context-sparse decision problems at scale.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种名为Agentic Multi-Source Grounded的系统，用于解决多品类市场中查询意图模糊的问题，通过结合目录检索和网页搜索来 grounding LLM，并输出一个有序的多意图集合，该系统在DoorDash平台上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理“Wildflower”这类具有多重意图（餐厅、零售商品、鲜花）且上下文稀疏的查询时存在困难。现有分类器采用“赢者通吃”的策略，而通用的LLM会产生不存在的商品信息（幻觉）。
AI.method: 引入Agentic Multi-Source Grounded系统，该系统包含两个关键部分：1) 一个分阶段的目录实体检索管道；2) 一个为冷启动查询自动调用的代理式网页搜索工具。该系统不预测单一标签，而是输出一个有序的多意图集合，并通过一个可配置的消歧层进行处理，该层应用确定性的业务策略，并可扩展以适应个性化信号。
AI.result: 在DoorDash多品类搜索平台上的评估显示，该系统比未进行grounding的LLM基线提高了10.9个百分点，比现有的生产系统提高了4.6个百分点。对于长尾查询，目录grounding贡献了8.3个百分点的准确率提升，代理式网页搜索grounding贡献了3.2个百分点，双意图消歧贡献了1.5个百分点，总计达到90.7%的准确率，比基线提高了13.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过将LLM推理与专有目录和实时网页知识相结合，成功解决了模糊、上下文稀疏的决策问题，并在DoorDash生产环境中部署，服务于超过95%的日常搜索流量。它为需要解决此类问题的应用提供了一个可泛化的范式。

title: Toward Graph-Tokenizing Large Language Models with Reconstructive Graph Instruction Tuning
summary: The remarkable success of large language models (LLMs) has motivated researchers to adapt them as universal predictors for various graph-related tasks, with the ultimate goal of developing a graph foundation model that generalizes diverse scenarios. The key challenge is to align graph data with language spaces so that LLMs can better comprehend graphs. As a popular paradigm, Graph-Tokenizing LLMs (GTokenLLMs) encode complex structures and lengthy texts into a graph token sequence, and then align them with text tokens via language instructions tuning. Despite their initial success, our information-theoretic analysis reveals that existing GTokenLLMs rely solely on text supervision from language instructions, which achieve only implicit graph-text alignment, resulting in a text-dominant bias that underutilizes graph context. To overcome this limitation, we first prove that the alignment objective is upper-bounded by the mutual information between the input graphs and their hidden representations in the LLM, which motivates us to improve this upper bound to achieve better alignment. To this end, we further propose a reconstructive graph instruction tuning pipeline, RGLM. Our key idea is to reconstruct the graph information from the LLM's graph token outputs, explicitly incorporating graph supervision to constrain the alignment process. Technically, we embody RGLM by exploring three distinct variants from two complementary perspectives: RGLM-Decoder from the input space; RGLM-Similarizer and RGLM-Denoiser from the latent space. Additionally, we theoretically analyze the alignment effectiveness of each variant. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks and task scenarios validate the effectiveness of the proposed RGLM, paving the way for new directions in GTokenLLMs' alignment research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RGLM的图-令牌化大语言模型（GTokenLLM）的重构图指令调优方法，通过显式地引入图监督来解决现有GTokenLLM中文本监督导致的图-文本对齐不足和文本偏见问题，并在多项实验中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有GTokenLLM仅依赖文本指令进行监督，导致图-文本对齐隐式且存在文本偏见，未能充分利用图的上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出RGLM（Reconstructive Graph Instruction Tuning pipeline），通过重构LLM输出的图令牌信息来显式地引入图监督，约束图-文本对齐过程。提出了三种变体：RGLM-Decoder（输入空间）、RGLM-Similarizer和RGLM-Denoiser（潜在空间），并进行了理论分析。
AI.result: 在多项基准测试和任务场景中，RGLM展现出优越的性能，有效改善了图-文本对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: RGLM通过引入重构图的显式监督，有效缓解了GTokenLLM的文本偏见问题，提高了图-文本对齐的质量，为GTokenLLM的对齐研究开辟了新方向。

title: SaferPath: Hierarchical Visual Navigation with Learned Guidance and Safety-Constrained Control
summary: Visual navigation is a core capability for mobile robots, yet end-to-end learning-based methods often struggle with generalization and safety in unseen, cluttered, or narrow environments. These limitations are especially pronounced in dense indoor settings, where collisions are likely and end-to-end models frequently fail. To address this, we propose SaferPath, a hierarchical visual navigation framework that leverages learned guidance from existing end-to-end models and refines it through a safety-constrained optimization-control module. SaferPath transforms visual observations into a traversable-area map and refines guidance trajectories using Model Predictive Stein Variational Evolution Strategy (MP-SVES), efficiently generating safe trajectories in only a few iterations. The refined trajectories are tracked by an MPC controller, ensuring robust navigation in complex environments. Extensive experiments in scenarios with unseen obstacles, dense unstructured spaces, and narrow corridors demonstrate that SaferPath consistently improves success rates and reduces collisions, outperforming representative baselines such as ViNT and NoMaD, and enabling safe navigation in challenging real-world settings.

AI.tldr: SaferPath是一个分层视觉导航框架，通过学习到的引导和安全约束优化控制相结合，以提高机器人应对复杂、不可见环境的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端学习方法在复杂、狭窄或杂乱的室内环境中泛化能力和安全性不足，容易发生碰撞。
AI.method: SaferPath利用预训练的端到端模型进行引导，并通过基于模型预测控制（MPC）和Stein变分进化策略（SVES）的安全约束优化模块进行轨迹精炼。它将视觉观察转化为可通行区域地图，并迭代优化生成安全轨迹。
AI.result: SaferPath在包含未知障碍物、密集非结构化空间和狭窄走廊的测试场景中，显著提高了成功率，降低了碰撞率，优于ViNT和NoMaD等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SaferPath能够通过结合学习到的引导和安全约束优化，在复杂的现实世界环境中实现鲁棒且安全的机器人导航。

title: High Dynamic Range Imaging Based on an Asymmetric Event-SVE Camera System
comment: This paper has been accepted by Optics Express
summary: High dynamic range (HDR) imaging under extreme illumination remains challenging for conventional cameras due to overexposure. Event cameras provide microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range, while spatially varying exposure (SVE) sensors offer single-shot radiometric diversity.We present a hardware--algorithm co-designed HDR imaging system that tightly integrates an SVE micro-attenuation camera with an event sensor in an asymmetric dual-modality configuration. To handle non-coaxial geometry and heterogeneous optics, we develop a two-stage cross-modal alignment framework that combines feature-guided coarse homography estimation with a multi-scale refinement module based on spatial pooling and frequency-domain filtering. On top of aligned representations, we develop a cross-modal HDR reconstruction network with convolutional fusion, mutual-information regularization, and a learnable fusion loss that adaptively balances intensity cues and event-derived structural constraints. Comprehensive experiments on both synthetic benchmarks and real captures demonstrate that the proposed system consistently improves highlight recovery, edge fidelity, and robustness compared with frame-only or event-only HDR pipelines. The results indicate that jointly optimizing optical design, cross-modal alignment, and computational fusion provides an effective foundation for reliable HDR perception in highly dynamic and radiometrically challenging environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合了空间可变曝光（SVE）相机和事件相机的硬件-算法协同设计的HDR成像系统，通过新的跨模态对齐和融合网络，在极端光照下实现了更好的高光恢复、边缘保真度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统相机在高动态光照下存在过曝问题，难以捕捉全部细节。事件相机和SVE传感器各自有优势，但如何有效结合以实现单次曝光下的高动态范围（HDR）成像是一个挑战。
AI.method: 1. 硬件设计：采用不对称双模态配置，将SVE微衰减相机与事件传感器集成。 2. 跨模态对齐：开发了一个两阶段框架，包括特征引导的粗同源性估计和基于空间池化及频域滤波的多尺度精细化。 3. HDR重建网络：提出一个卷积融合、互信息正则化和可学习融合损失的跨模态网络。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该系统在恢复高光、边缘保真度和鲁棒性方面优于仅使用帧或仅使用事件的HDR方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化光学设计、跨模态对齐和计算融合是实现可靠HDR感知的有效途径，尤其是在高动态和辐射度挑战性的环境中。

title: SSMG-Nav: Enhancing Lifelong Object Navigation with Semantic Skeleton Memory Graph
summary: Navigating to out-of-sight targets from human instructions in unfamiliar environments is a core capability for service robots. Despite substantial progress, most approaches underutilize reusable, persistent memory, constraining performance in lifelong settings. Many are additionally limited to single-modality inputs and employ myopic greedy policies, which often induce inefficient back-and-forth maneuvers (BFMs). To address such limitations, we introduce SSMG-Nav, a framework for object navigation built on a \textit{Semantic Skeleton Memory Graph} (SSMG) that consolidates past observations into a spatially aligned, persistent memory anchored by topological keypoints (e.g., junctions, room centers). SSMG clusters nearby entities into subgraphs, unifying entity- and space-level semantics to yield a compact set of candidate destinations. To support multimodal targets (images, objects, and text), we integrate a vision-language model (VLM). For each subgraph, a multimodal prompt synthesized from memory guides the VLM to infer a target belief over destinations. A long-horizon planner then trades off this belief against traversability costs to produce a visit sequence that minimizes expected path length, thereby reducing backtracking. Extensive experiments on challenging lifelong benchmarks and standard ObjectNav benchmarks demonstrate that, compared to strong baselines, our method achieves higher success rates and greater path efficiency, validating the effectiveness of SSMG-Nav.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SSMG-Nav 的框架，用于在非结构化环境中根据人类指令导航至视野外的目标。该框架利用语义骨架记忆图（SSMG）来整合过去的环境观察，形成一个空间对齐的、持久的记忆。SSMG 将实体聚类为子图，融合实体和空间层面的语义，以生成候选目的地。SSMG-Nav 集成了视觉-语言模型（VLM）来支持多模态目标（图像、物体、文本），并利用合成的多模态提示来指导 VLM 推断目的地信念。最后，通过一个长时规划器平衡目的地信念和可通行性成本，生成能够最小化预期路径长度的访问序列，从而减少回溯。实验结果表明，SSMG-Nav 在长期和标准导航基准测试中均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人导航方法在长期设置中往往利用可重用、持久性记忆的能力不足，并且常限于单模态输入和短视贪婪策略，导致效率低下和频繁的回溯。研究的动机是克服这些局限性，提高机器人在非结构化环境中导航至视野外目标的能力。
AI.method: 提出 SSMG-Nav 框架，核心是语义骨架记忆图（SSMG）。SSMG 将过去的环境观察整合到一个空间对齐的、持久的记忆中，该记忆由拓扑关键点锚定。SSMG 将附近的实体聚类成子图，结合实体和空间层面的语义，生成候选目的地。框架集成了视觉-语言模型（VLM）来支持图像、物体和文本的多模态目标。为每个子图合成多模态提示，指导 VLM 推断目的地信念。最后，利用一个长时规划器权衡目的地信念和可通行性成本，生成最小化预期路径长度的访问序列。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的长期导航基准和标准 ObjectNav 基准上的大量实验表明，与强大的基线方法相比，SSMG-Nav 实现了更高的成功率和更优的路径效率。这验证了 SSMG-Nav 在减少回溯和提高导航性能方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SSMG-Nav 框架通过利用语义骨架记忆图（SSMG）来整合持久性记忆，并结合多模态提示和长时规划，有效地解决了当前机器人导航方法在长期设置、多模态理解和效率方面的不足，能够实现更高效、更鲁棒的导航。

title: Closed-Loop Action Chunks with Dynamic Corrections for Training-Free Diffusion Policy
summary: Diffusion-based policies have achieved remarkable results in robotic manipulation but often struggle to adapt rapidly in dynamic scenarios, leading to delayed responses or task failures. We present DCDP, a Dynamic Closed-Loop Diffusion Policy framework that integrates chunk-based action generation with real-time correction. DCDP integrates a self-supervised dynamic feature encoder, cross-attention fusion, and an asymmetric action encoder-decoder to inject environmental dynamics before action execution, achieving real-time closed-loop action correction and enhancing the system's adaptability in dynamic scenarios. In dynamic PushT simulations, DCDP improves adaptability by 19\% without retraining while requiring only 5\% additional computation. Its modular design enables plug-and-play integration, achieving both temporal coherence and real-time responsiveness in dynamic robotic scenarios, including real-world manipulation tasks. The project page is at: https://github.com/wupengyuan/dcdp

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DCDP的动态闭环扩散策略框架，通过结合分块动作生成和实时校正，提高了机器人操纵在动态场景下的适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的策略在动态场景下适应性不足，响应延迟，容易导致任务失败。
AI.method: DCDP框架集成了自监督动态特征编码器、交叉注意力融合以及不对称的动作编码器-解码器，在执行动作前注入环境动态信息，实现实时闭环动作校正。
AI.result: 在动态PushT模拟中，DCDP在不重新训练的情况下提高了19%的适应性，同时计算量仅增加了5%。
AI.conclusion: DCDP的模块化设计易于集成，能够在包括真实世界操纵任务在内的动态机器人场景中实现时间和实时响应的协同。

title: Quantifying Conversational Reliability of Large Language Models under Multi-Turn Interaction
comment: Accepted at the Workshop on Assessing and Improving Reliability of Foundation Models in the Real World (AAAI 2026)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications where users engage in extended, mixed-topic conversations that depend on prior context. Yet, their reliability under realistic multi-turn interactions remains poorly understood. We conduct a systematic evaluation of conversational reliability through three representative tasks that reflect practical interaction challenges: (1) maintaining global constraints across topic shifts, (2) selecting the correct tool or agent amid interleaved intents, and (3) tracking structured entities under revisions and distractions. Each task pairs single-turn and multi-turn settings, allowing us to quantify reliability degradation under extended dialogue. Across both commercial and open-source models, we observe substantial declines in reliability, particularly for smaller models. Error analyses reveal recurring failure modes such as instruction drift, intent confusion, and contextual overwriting, which compromise dependable behavior in operational systems. Our findings highlight the need for stress-testing LLMs for conversational reliability and developing more robust evaluation methods for trustworthy deployment.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型（LLM）在实际多轮对话中的可靠性下降显著，尤其是在较小模型上，这需要更鲁棒的评估方法来确保其可信赖的部署。
AI.motivation: 现实世界应用中的用户进行的是长期的、混合话题的对话，这依赖于之前的上下文，但目前对LLM在真实多轮交互中的可靠性了解甚少。
AI.method: 通过三种代表性的任务（维持全局约束、选择正确工具/代理、跟踪结构化实体）来系统地评估对话可靠性，比较了单轮和多轮设置下的模型表现，并进行了错误分析。
AI.result: 在商业和开源模型上都观察到可靠性显著下降，尤其是在较小模型上。错误分析揭示了常见的失败模式，如指令漂移、意图混淆和上下文覆盖。
AI.conclusion: LLM在多轮对话中的可靠性会随着交互的进行而显著降低，特别是在处理复杂任务时。需要对LLM进行对话可靠性压力测试，并开发更有效的评估方法，以确保其在实际部署中的可信赖性。

title: Pharmacology Knowledge Graphs: Do We Need Chemical Structure for Drug Repurposing?
comment: 34 pages, 5 figures. Under review at Discover Artificial Intelligence
summary: The contributions of model complexity, data volume, and feature modalities to knowledge graph-based drug repurposing remain poorly quantified under rigorous temporal validation. We constructed a pharmacology knowledge graph from ChEMBL 36 comprising 5,348 entities including 3,127 drugs, 1,156 proteins, and 1,065 indications. A strict temporal split was enforced with training data up to 2022 and testing data from 2023 to 2025, together with biologically verified hard negatives mined from failed assays and clinical trials. We benchmarked five knowledge graph embedding models and a standard graph neural network with 3.44 million parameters that incorporates drug chemical structure using a graph attention encoder and ESM-2 protein embeddings. Scaling experiments ranging from 0.78 to 9.75 million parameters and from 25 to 100 percent of the data, together with feature ablation studies, were used to isolate the contributions of model capacity, graph density, and node feature modalities. Removing the graph attention based drug structure encoder and retaining only topological embeddings combined with ESM-2 protein features improved drug protein PR-AUC from 0.5631 to 0.5785 while reducing VRAM usage from 5.30 GB to 353 MB. Replacing the drug encoder with Morgan fingerprints further degraded performance, indicating that explicit chemical structure representations can be detrimental for predicting pharmacological network interactions. Increasing model size beyond 2.44 million parameters yielded diminishing returns, whereas increasing training data consistently improved performance. External validation confirmed 6 of the top 14 novel predictions as established therapeutic indications. These results show that drug pharmacological behavior can be accurately predicted using target-centric information and drug network topology alone, without requiring explicit chemical structure representations.

AI.tldr: 研究量化了模型复杂度、数据量和特征模态对基于知识图谱的药物重定位的影响，发现仅使用目标中心信息和药物网络拓扑（不包括显式化学结构表示）能实现准确预测，且数据量增加比模型复杂度增加更能提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对模型复杂度、数据量和特征模态对药物重定位的贡献量化不足，尤其是在严格的时间验证下。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含药物、蛋白质和适应症的药理学知识图谱，采用严格的时间划分（训练数据截至2022年，测试数据为2023-2025年），并引入了生物学验证的负样本。基准测试了五种知识图谱嵌入模型和一种包含药物化学结构信息的图神经网络（GNN），并通过缩放实验和特征消融实验来分析不同因素的影响。
AI.result: 移除基于图注意力机制的药物结构编码器，仅保留拓扑嵌入和ESM-2蛋白质特征，性能（PR-AUC）从0.5631提升到0.5785，同时显着降低了显存使用。使用Morgan指纹替代药物编码器反而降低了性能。模型规模增加到2.44M参数后，性能提升的边际效益递减，而增加训练数据则持续提升性能。外部验证了14个新预测中的6个。
AI.conclusion: 药物的药理学行为可以通过目标中心信息和药物网络拓扑单独准确预测，无需显式的化学结构表示。数据量比模型复杂度对性能提升更重要。明确的化学结构表示有时可能对预测药理学网络交互产生负面影响。

title: TokenCom: Vision-Language Model for Multimodal and Multitask Token Communications
summary: Visual-Language Models (VLMs), with their strong capabilities in image and text understanding, offer a solid foundation for intelligent communications. However, their effectiveness is constrained by limited token granularity, overlong visual token sequences, and inadequate cross-modal alignment. To overcome these challenges, we propose TaiChi, a novel VLM framework designed for token communications. TaiChi adopts a dual-visual tokenizer architecture that processes both high- and low-resolution images to collaboratively capture pixel-level details and global conceptual features. A Bilateral Attention Network (BAN) is introduced to intelligently fuse multi-scale visual tokens, thereby enhancing visual understanding and producing compact visual tokens. In addition, a Kolmogorov Arnold Network (KAN)-based modality projector with learnable activation functions is employed to achieve precise nonlinear alignment from visual features to the text semantic space, thus minimizing information loss. Finally, TaiChi is integrated into a multimodal and multitask token communication system equipped with a joint VLM-channel coding scheme. Experimental results validate the superior performance of TaiChi, as well as the feasibility and effectiveness of the TaiChi-driven token communication system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TaiChi，一个用于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的新框架，通过双重视觉分词器、双边注意力网络（BAN）和基于KAN的模态投影仪来解决现有VLM的局限性，并将其应用于多模态和多任务令牌通信系统。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）在令牌粒度、视觉令牌序列长度和跨模态对齐方面存在局限性，影响了其在智能通信中的有效性。
AI.method: TaiChi框架采用双重视觉分词器处理高低分辨率图像，BAN融合多尺度视觉令牌，KAN模态投影仪实现非线性对齐，并集成到联合VLM-信道编码的令牌通信系统中。
AI.result: 实验结果表明TaiChi表现优越，并且TaiChi驱动的令牌通信系统是可行且有效的。
AI.conclusion: TaiChi框架通过改进的视觉处理和跨模态对齐，有效克服了现有VLM的挑战，并在令牌通信任务中展现出强大的性能和可行性。

title: LaSER: Internalizing Explicit Reasoning into Latent Space for Dense Retrieval
summary: LLMs have fundamentally transformed dense retrieval, upgrading backbones from discriminative encoders to generative architectures. However, a critical disconnect remains: while LLMs possess strong reasoning capabilities, current retrievers predominantly utilize them as static encoders, leaving their potential for complex reasoning unexplored. To address this, existing approaches typically adopt rewrite-then-retrieve pipelines to generate explicit CoT rationales before retrieval. However, this incurs prohibitive latency. In this paper, we propose LaSER, a novel self-distillation framework that internalizes explicit reasoning into the latent space of dense retrievers. Operating on a shared LLM backbone, LaSER introduces a dual-view training mechanism: an Explicit view that explicitly encodes ground-truth reasoning paths, and a Latent view that performs implicit latent thinking. To bridge the gap between these views, we design a multi-grained alignment strategy. Beyond standard output alignment, we introduce a trajectory alignment mechanism that synchronizes the intermediate latent states of the latent path with the semantic progression of the explicit reasoning segments. This allows the retriever to think silently and effectively without autoregressive text generation. Extensive experiments on both in-domain and out-of-domain reasoning-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that LaSER significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, analyses across diverse backbones and model scales validate the robustness of our approach, confirming that our unified learning framework is essential for eliciting effective latent thinking. Our method successfully combines the reasoning depth of explicit CoT pipelines with the inference efficiency of standard dense retrievers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LaSER的自蒸馏框架，旨在弥合大型语言模型（LLM）在信息检索中的推理能力与现有检索器主要将其作为静态编码器使用的脱节。LaSER通过在显式（ground-truth推理路径）和潜在（隐式潜在思考）视图之间进行多粒度对齐，将显式推理内化到密集检索器的潜在空间中，从而在不产生显式文本的情况下实现高效的推理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常采用“重写-检索”流水线来利用LLM的推理能力，但这会导致过高的延迟。研究人员希望在不增加延迟的情况下，充分利用LLM的复杂推理潜力。
AI.method: LaSER是一个自蒸馏框架，使用共享的LLM骨干。它引入了一种双视图训练机制：显式视图（编码地面真实推理路径）和潜在视图（执行隐式潜在思考）。通过多粒度对齐策略连接这两个视图，包括标准的输出对齐和一种轨迹对齐机制，该机制将潜在路径的中间潜在状态与显式推理段的语义进展同步。
AI.result: LaSER在域内和域外的推理密集型基准测试中显著优于最先进的方法。该方法的鲁棒性得到了不同骨干和模型规模的验证。它成功地将显式CoT流水线的推理深度与标准密集检索器的推理效率结合起来。
AI.conclusion: LaSER通过将显式推理内化到密集检索器的潜在空间中，实现了高效的潜在思考，从而在不产生显式文本的情况下，提高了信息检索的推理能力，同时保持了高效的推理速度。

title: State-Action Inpainting Diffuser for Continuous Control with Delay
summary: Signal delay poses a fundamental challenge in continuous control and reinforcement learning (RL) by introducing a temporal gap between interaction and perception. Current solutions have largely evolved along two distinct paradigms: model-free approaches which utilize state augmentation to preserve Markovian properties, and model-based methods which focus on inferring latent beliefs via dynamics modeling. In this paper, we bridge these perspectives by introducing State-Action Inpainting Diffuser (SAID), a framework that integrates the inductive bias of dynamics learning with the direct decision-making capability of policy optimization. By formulating the problem as a joint sequence inpainting task, SAID implicitly captures environmental dynamics while directly generating consistent plans, effectively operating at the intersection of model-based and model-free paradigms. Crucially, this generative formulation allows SAID to be seamlessly applied to both online and offline RL. Extensive experiments on delayed continuous control benchmarks demonstrate that SAID achieves state-of-the-art and robust performance. Our study suggests a new methodology to advance the field of RL with delay.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAID的框架，用于解决强化学习中的信号延迟问题。SAID结合了模型学习和策略优化的思想，通过将问题建模为序列修复任务，能够隐式学习环境动态并直接生成一致的计划，同时适用于在线和离线强化学习。实验结果表明SAID在延迟连续控制任务上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 信号延迟是连续控制和强化学习中的一个基本挑战，它在交互和感知之间引入了时间间隔。现有的解决方案主要分为两种范式：一种是利用状态增强来保持马尔可夫性质的模型无关方法，另一种是专注于通过动力学建模推断潜在信念的模型关联方法。本文旨在弥合这两种方法的差距。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为State-Action Inpainting Diffuser (SAID)的框架。该框架将问题表述为联合序列修复任务，通过隐式捕捉环境动力学来直接生成一致的计划。SAID集成了动力学学习的归纳偏差和策略优化的直接决策能力，从而在模型关联和模型无关范式之间取得了结合。
AI.result: SAID能够无缝地应用于在线和离线强化学习。在延迟连续控制基准测试上的大量实验表明，SAID在鲁棒性方面达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SAID提供了一种新的方法来解决强化学习中的信号延迟问题，通过将问题建模为序列修复任务，它有效地结合了模型关联和模型无关方法的优点，并在延迟控制任务上取得了优异的性能。

title: Graph-Based Self-Healing Tool Routing for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents
comment: Working paper. 27 references, 13 figures, 8 tables, pseudocode appendix
summary: Tool-using LLM agents face a reliability-cost tradeoff: routing every decision through the LLM improves correctness but incurs high latency and inference cost, while pre-coded workflow graphs reduce cost but become brittle under unanticipated compound tool failures. We present Self-Healing Router, a fault-tolerant orchestration architecture that treats most agent control-flow decisions as routing rather than reasoning. The system combines (i) parallel health monitors that assign priority scores to runtime conditions such as tool outages and risk signals, and (ii) a cost-weighted tool graph where Dijkstra's algorithm performs deterministic shortest-path routing. When a tool fails mid-execution, its edges are reweighted to infinity and the path is recomputed -- yielding automatic recovery without invoking the LLM. The LLM is reserved exclusively for cases where no feasible path exists, enabling goal demotion or escalation. Prior graph-based tool-use systems (ControlLLM, ToolNet, NaviAgent) focus on tool selection and planning; our contribution is runtime fault tolerance with deterministic recovery and binary observability -- every failure is either a logged reroute or an explicit escalation, never a silent skip. Across 19 scenarios spanning three graph topologies (linear pipeline, dependency DAG, parallel fan-out), Self-Healing Router matches ReAct's correctness while reducing control-plane LLM calls by 93% (9 vs 123 aggregate) and eliminating the silent-failure cases observed in a well-engineered static workflow baseline under compound failures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Self-Healing Router的容错编排架构，通过将大部分代理控制流决策视为路由而非推理，并在工具失败时自动重新计算路径，从而在保证正确性的同时显著降低了LLM调用成本和延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用LLM代理在可靠性和成本之间存在权衡。完全依赖LLM进行路由成本高且延迟大；预编码的工作流图在面对意外的复合工具故障时容易变得脆弱。因此，需要一种能够提高容错能力并降低成本的架构。
AI.method: Self-Healing Router结合了并行健康监控器（为运行时条件分配优先级分数）和成本加权的工具图。使用Dijkstra算法进行确定性最短路径路由。当工具失败时，其边权重被设为无穷大，并重新计算路径。LLM仅在没有可行路径时用于目标降级或升级。
AI.result: 在19个不同场景下，Self-Healing Router在正确性方面与ReAct相当，但将控制平面LLM调用次数减少了93%，并且消除了在复合故障下静态工作流基线中观察到的静默失败情况。
AI.conclusion: Self-Healing Router是一种有效的容错编排架构，通过将控制流决策视为路由并实现确定性恢复，显著降低了LLM代理的成本和延迟，同时保持了高水平的正确性，并且提供了明确的故障可观测性。

title: U-VLM: Hierarchical Vision Language Modeling for Report Generation
summary: Automated radiology report generation is key for reducing radiologist workload and improving diagnostic consistency, yet generating accurate reports for 3D medical imaging remains challenging. Existing vision-language models face two limitations: they do not leverage segmentation-pretrained encoders, and they inject visual features only at the input layer of language models, losing multi-scale information. We propose U-VLM, which enables hierarchical vision-language modeling in both training and architecture: (1) progressive training from segmentation to classification to report generation, and (2) multi-layer visual injection that routes U-Net encoder features to corresponding language model layers. Each training stage can leverage different datasets without unified annotations. U-VLM achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE (F1: 0.414 vs 0.258, BLEU-mean: 0.349 vs 0.305) and AbdomenAtlas 3.0 (F1: 0.624 vs 0.518 for segmentation-based detection) using only a 0.1B decoder trained from scratch, demonstrating that well-designed vision encoder pretraining outweighs the benefits of 7B+ pre-trained language models. Ablation studies show that progressive pretraining significantly improves F1, while multi-layer injection improves BLEU-mean. Code is available at https://github.com/yinghemedical/U-VLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为U-VLM的新型自动化放射报告生成模型，通过渐进式训练和多层视觉特征注入，有效解决了现有模型在3D医学影像报告生成中的局限性，并在两个公开数据集上取得了先进性能。
AI.motivation: 自动化放射报告生成对于减轻放射科医生工作负担和提高诊断一致性至关重要，但针对3D医学影像生成准确报告仍然是一个挑战。现有模型存在未利用分割预训练编码器和视觉特征仅在输入层注入的问题，导致多尺度信息丢失。
AI.method: U-VLM模型采用了分层视觉-语言建模，包括：1. 渐进式训练，从分割任务开始，然后是分类任务，最后是报告生成；2. 多层视觉注入，将U-Net编码器的特征路由到语言模型的对应层。每个训练阶段可以使用不同的数据集。
AI.result: U-VLM在CT-RATE和AbdomenAtlas 3.0数据集上取得了最先进的性能。在CT-RATE上，F1分数从0.258提高到0.414，BLEU-mean从0.305提高到0.349。在AbdomenAtlas 3.0上，基于分割的检测F1分数从0.518提高到0.624。模型仅使用0.1B的解码器且从头开始训练。
AI.conclusion: U-VLM模型通过精心设计的视觉编码器预训练（渐进式预训练和多层注入）显著优于使用7B+预训练语言模型的优势，证明了其在自动化放射报告生成领域的有效性。

title: From Transportation to Manipulation: Transforming Magnetic Levitation to Magnetic Robotics
summary: Magnetic Levitation (MagLev) systems fundamentally increase the flexibility of in-machine material flow in industrial automation. Therefore, these systems enable dynamic throughput optimization, which is especially beneficial for high-mix low-volume manufacturing. Until now, MagLev installations have been used primarily for in-machine transport, while their potential for manipulation is largely unexplored. This paper introduces the 6D-Platform MagBot, a low-cost six degrees of freedom parallel kinematic that couples two movers into a composite robotic platform. Experiments show that the 6D-Platform MagBot achieves sub-millimeter positioning accuracy and supports fully autonomous pick up and drop off via a docking station, allowing rapid and repeatable reconfiguration of the machine. Relative to a single mover, the proposed platform substantially expands the reachable workspace, payload, and functional dexterity. By unifying transportation and manipulation, this work advances Magnetic Levitation towards Magnetic Robotics, enabling manufacturing solutions that are more agile, efficient, and adaptable.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为 6D-Platform MagBot 的低成本六自由度磁悬浮机器人平台，它将两个移动器耦合起来，实现了更广阔的工作空间、更高的载荷能力和更好的功能灵活性，并展示了其在工业自动化中实现更敏捷、高效和适应性强的制造解决方案的潜力。
AI.motivation: 当前磁悬浮系统主要用于在机器内部进行物料搬运，而其在机器人操作方面的潜力尚未被充分探索。该研究旨在开发一种能够同时实现物料搬运和机器人操作的磁悬浮系统，以提高高混合低批量制造的灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 6D-Platform MagBot 的低成本六自由度并联运动学系统，该系统通过耦合两个移动器形成一个复合机器人平台。通过实验验证了该平台的定位精度，并展示了其通过对接站实现全自主拾取和放置的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，6D-Platform MagBot 实现了亚毫米级的定位精度，并支持全自主的拾取和放置操作。与单个移动器相比，该平台显著扩展了可达工作空间、载荷能力和功能灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将磁悬浮技术从物料搬运领域推进到磁性机器人领域，通过统一运输和操作功能，为制造解决方案带来了更高的敏捷性、效率和适应性。

title: RAISE: Requirement-Adaptive Evolutionary Refinement for Training-Free Text-to-Image Alignment
summary: Recent text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models achieve remarkable realism, yet faithful prompt-image alignment remains challenging, particularly for complex prompts with multiple objects, relations, and fine-grained attributes. Existing training-free inference-time scaling methods rely on fixed iteration budgets that cannot adapt to prompt difficulty, while reflection-tuned models require carefully curated reflection datasets and extensive joint fine-tuning of diffusion and vision-language models, often overfitting to reflection paths data and lacking transferability across models. We introduce RAISE (Requirement-Adaptive Self-Improving Evolution), a training-free, requirement-driven evolutionary framework for adaptive T2I generation. RAISE formulates image generation as a requirement-driven adaptive scaling process, evolving a population of candidates at inference time through a diverse set of refinement actions-including prompt rewriting, noise resampling, and instructional editing. Each generation is verified against a structured checklist of requirements, enabling the system to dynamically identify unsatisfied items and allocate further computation only where needed. This achieves adaptive test-time scaling that aligns computational effort with semantic query complexity. On GenEval and DrawBench, RAISE attains state-of-the-art alignment (0.94 overall GenEval) while incurring fewer generated samples (reduced by 30-40%) and VLM calls (reduced by 80%) than prior scaling and reflection-tuned baselines, demonstrating efficient, generalizable, and model-agnostic multi-round self-improvement. Code is available at https://github.com/LiyaoJiang1998/RAISE.

AI.tldr: RAISE 是一种无需训练、根据需求驱动的进化框架，用于自适应的文本到图像生成。它通过在推理时进化候选图像群，并根据结构化要求列表动态分配计算资源，实现了高效且与模型无关的多轮自我改进。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在处理复杂提示（多对象、关系、属性）时，提示-图像对齐不准确。现有的推理时缩放方法无法适应提示难度，而反射调优模型需要大量数据和调优，且可迁移性差。
AI.method: RAISE 将图像生成视为一个需求驱动的自适应缩放过程。在推理时，通过提示重写、噪声重采样和指令编辑等多种精炼动作进化候选图像群。每个生成的图像都会根据结构化要求列表进行验证，从而动态识别未满足的要求，并将额外的计算资源分配给需要的地方。
AI.result: 在 GenEval 和 DrawBench 数据集上，RAISE 实现了最先进的对齐效果（GenEval 整体 0.94），同时生成的样本数量（减少 30-40%）和 VLM 调用次数（减少 80%）均少于现有缩放和反射调优基线。
AI.conclusion: RAISE 是一种高效、可泛化且模型无关的多轮自我改进框架，能够根据提示的复杂性自适应地调整计算资源，显著提高了文本到图像生成中提示-图像的对齐准确性。

title: Understanding the Physics of Key-Value Cache Compression for LLMs through Attention Dynamics
summary: As context windows in LLMs scale to 100K+ tokens, the key-value (KV) cache becomes the dominant memory bottleneck, with recent methods claiming 80-90% savings and minimal benchmark degradation. We argue these evaluations miss a structural issue: attention is not just storage but routing, and retaining KV pairs does not guarantee semantic accessibility. We propose a physics-inspired view of KV compression as a controlled perturbation of token-level routing, distinguishing retention, accessibility, and utilization. Using synthetic tasks probing multi-entity tracking, disambiguation, coreference, and multi-hop reasoning, we find that moderate compression degrades internal representations with little accuracy loss, revealing redundancy; all models exhibit a sharp hallucination safety cliff near 90% compression, correlated with spikes in Global Eviction Ratio (GER), suggesting a phase transition in semantic reachability; and architectures differ in routing dynamics, with LLaMA showing early consensus and late diversification, and Qwen showing funnel-like late convergence, leading to distinct resilience profiles. Beyond erasure, we identify representational rigidity, where excessive head-level consensus collapses routing flexibility despite token survival. These results suggest sparse token-route structures govern compression tolerance, reframing KV compression as a structural probe of attention geometry and linking long-context scalability to sparsity and the lottery ticket hypothesis in self-attention.

AI.tldr: 现有的KV缓存压缩方法在评估时忽略了其作为路由而非仅是存储的功能。本文提出了一种受物理学启发的观点，将KV压缩视为一种对token路由的控制扰动，区分了保留、可访问性和利用率。实验发现，适度压缩会损害内部表示但准确率损失不大，表明存在冗余；在接近90%的压缩率时，所有模型都会出现幻觉安全性的急剧下降，这与全局驱逐率（GER）的飙升相关，暗示语义可达性发生了相变；不同架构在路由动态上存在差异，LLaMA早期达成共识后分散，Qwen则呈现漏斗状的后期收敛，表现出不同的弹性。此外，还发现了表示刚性问题，即过度的头层共识会扼杀路由灵活性。这些结果表明，稀疏的token-路由结构决定了压缩容忍度，并将长上下文扩展与稀疏性和自注意力中的彩票假说联系起来。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法在评估时忽略了其在注意力机制中的路由功能，仅关注存储效率，可能导致语义可访问性下降，从而影响模型的性能。作者希望通过重新审视KV压缩的本质，提出更全面的评估方法和理论框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种受物理学启发的KV压缩理论框架，区分了保留、可访问性和利用率。通过设计专门的合成任务（多实体跟踪、歧义消除、指代消解、多跳推理）来探究不同压缩率下模型的内部表示和行为。分析了不同模型架构（LLaMA, Qwen）在路由动态上的差异，并引入了全局驱逐率（GER）和表示刚性等指标。
AI.result: 1. 适度压缩（<90%）会损害内部表示但准确率损失不大，揭示了冗余。2. 接近90%的压缩率时，所有模型都出现幻觉安全性急剧下降，与GER飙升相关，表明语义可达性发生相变。3. LLaMA和Qwen在路由动态上表现出不同的收敛模式。4. 发现了表示刚性问题，即过度共识会扼杀路由灵活性。
AI.conclusion: KV压缩不仅是存储问题，更是关于注意力机制中token路由的结构性问题。稀疏的token-路由结构是决定压缩容忍度的关键。长上下文模型的扩展性与稀疏性和自注意力中的彩票假说密切相关。未来的KV压缩研究应关注如何维持语义可访问性和路由灵活性，而不仅仅是存储效率。

title: Learning Vision-Based Omnidirectional Navigation: A Teacher-Student Approach Using Monocular Depth Estimation
summary: Reliable obstacle avoidance in industrial settings demands 3D scene understanding, but widely used 2D LiDAR sensors perceive only a single horizontal slice of the environment, missing critical obstacles above or below the scan plane. We present a teacher-student framework for vision-based mobile robot navigation that eliminates the need for LiDAR sensors. A teacher policy trained via Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in NVIDIA Isaac Lab leverages privileged 2D LiDAR observations that account for the full robot footprint to learn robust navigation. The learned behavior is distilled into a student policy that relies solely on monocular depth maps predicted by a fine-tuned Depth Anything V2 model from four RGB cameras. The complete inference pipeline, comprising monocular depth estimation (MDE), policy execution, and motor control, runs entirely onboard an NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX mounted on a DJI RoboMaster platform, requiring no external computation for inference. In simulation, the student achieves success rates of 82-96.5%, consistently outperforming the standard 2D LiDAR teacher (50-89%). In real-world experiments, the MDE-based student outperforms the 2D LiDAR teacher when navigating around obstacles with complex 3D geometries, such as overhanging structures and low-profile objects, that fall outside the single scan plane of a 2D LiDAR.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉的机器人导航方法，使用教师-学生框架，学生仅依赖单目深度图进行障碍物规避，在复杂3D环境中优于传统2D LiDAR。
AI.motivation: 现有2D LiDAR无法完全感知3D环境中的障碍物，限制了工业场景中机器人的可靠避障能力。
AI.method: 使用Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) 训练一个教师策略，该策略利用包含完整机器人足迹的2D LiDAR数据。然后将学习到的行为蒸馏到一个学生策略中，学生策略仅依赖于一个微调的Depth Anything V2模型预测的单目深度图，所有推理均在NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX上完成。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，学生策略的成功率达到82-96.5%，优于2D LiDAR教师（50-89%）。在真实世界实验中，学生策略在处理2D LiDAR无法检测到的复杂3D障碍物（如悬垂结构和低矮物体）时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于单目深度图的教师-学生框架能够实现比传统2D LiDAR更鲁棒和更有效的3D障碍物规避，为无LiDAR的移动机器人导航提供了一种可行的方案。

title: S5-HES Agent: Society 5.0-driven Agentic Framework to Democratize Smart Home Environment Simulation
summary: The smart home is a key domain within the Society 5.0 vision for a human-centered society. Smart home technologies rapidly evolve, and research should diversify while remaining aligned with Society 5.0 objectives. Democratizing smart home research would engage a broader community of innovators beyond traditional limited experts. This shift necessitates inclusive simulation frameworks that support research across diverse fields in industry and academia. However, existing smart home simulators require significant technical expertise, offer limited adaptability, and lack automated evolution, thereby failing to meet the holistic needs of Society 5.0. These constraints impede researchers from efficiently conducting simulations and experiments for security, energy, health, climate, and socio-economic research. To address these challenges, this paper presents the Society 5.0-driven Smart Home Environment Simulator Agent (S5-HES Agent), an agentic simulation framework that transforms traditional smart home simulation through autonomous AI orchestration. The framework coordinates specialized agents through interchangeable large language models (LLMs), enabling natural-language-driven end-to-end smart home simulation configuration without programming expertise. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline with semantic, keyword, and hybrid search retrieves smart home knowledge. Comprehensive evaluation on S5-HES Agent demonstrates that the RAG pipeline achieves near-optimal retrieval fidelity, simulated device behaviour and threat scenarios align with real-world IoT datasets, and simulation engine scales predictably across home configurations, establishing a stable foundation for Society 5.0 smart home research. Source code is available under the MIT License at https://github.com/AsiriweLab/S5-HES-Agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为S5-HES Agent的智能家居模拟框架，它利用AI自主编排和大型语言模型，使得非技术人员也能进行端到端的智能家居模拟配置，以支持Society 5.0愿景下的多元化研究。
AI.motivation: 现有智能家居模拟器技术门槛高、适应性差、缺乏自动化演进，无法满足Society 5.0愿景下对安全、能源、健康、气候和社会经济等领域研究的广泛需求，阻碍了研究的民主化和创新。
AI.method: 提出S5-HES Agent，一个基于Agent的模拟框架。通过可互换的大型语言模型（LLMs）协调专业Agent，实现自然语言驱动的智能家居模拟配置。集成检索增强生成（RAG）管道，利用语义、关键词和混合搜索来获取智能家居知识。
AI.result: S5-HES Agent的评估表明，RAG管道实现了接近最优的检索保真度；模拟的设备行为和威胁场景与真实IoT数据集一致；模拟引擎能够根据家庭配置进行可预测的扩展，为Society 5.0智能家居研究奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: S5-HES Agent成功地将传统智能家居模拟转变为一种无需编程知识、由AI自主编排的、更具包容性的框架，为实现Society 5.0愿景下的智能家居研究提供了有力支持。

title: Benchmarking LLM Summaries of Multimodal Clinical Time Series for Remote Monitoring
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) can generate fluent clinical summaries of remote therapeutic monitoring time series. However, it remains unclear whether these narratives faithfully capture clinically significant events, such as sustained abnormalities. Existing evaluation metrics primarily focus on semantic similarity and linguistic quality, leaving event-level correctness largely unmeasured.
  To address this gap, we introduce an event-based evaluation framework for multimodal time-series summarization using the Technology-Integrated Health Management (TIHM)-1.5 dementia monitoring dataset. Clinically grounded daily events are derived through rule-based abnormal thresholds and temporal persistence criteria. Model-generated summaries are then aligned with these structured facts.
  Our evaluation protocol measures abnormality recall, duration recall, measurement coverage, and hallucinated event mentions. We benchmark three approaches: zero-shot prompting, statistical prompting, and a vision-based pipeline that uses rendered time-series visualizations. The results reveal a striking decoupling between conventional metrics and clinical event fidelity. Models that achieve high semantic similarity scores often exhibit near-zero abnormality recall. In contrast, the vision-based approach demonstrates the strongest event alignment, achieving 45.7% abnormality recall and 100% duration recall.
  These findings underscore the importance of event-aware evaluation to ensure reliable clinical time-series summarization.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新的基于事件的评估框架，用于评估大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的临床时间序列摘要的准确性，发现现有模型在捕获临床显著事件方面存在不足，并表明基于视觉的方法在事件对齐方面表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有评估LLMs临床摘要的方法主要关注语义相似性和语言质量，未能有效衡量摘要是否准确捕捉了临床上重要的事件，如持续性异常。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个基于事件的评估框架，从TIHM-1.5痴呆症监测数据集中提取基于规则的每日临床事件。然后，将模型生成的摘要与这些结构化事实进行对齐，并使用异常召回率、持续时间召回率、测量覆盖率和幻觉事件提及等指标进行评估。研究对比了零样本提示、统计提示以及一个使用时间序列可视化渲染的视觉提示方法。
AI.result: 研究发现，传统的语义相似性指标与临床事件的准确性之间存在显著脱钩。即使在语义相似性得分很高的模型，其异常召回率也很低。相比之下，视觉方法在事件对齐方面表现最好，异常召回率为45.7%，持续时间召回率为100%。
AI.conclusion: 为了确保临床时间序列摘要的可靠性，必须采用考虑事件的评估方法。基于视觉的方法在捕捉临床事件方面比传统的提示方法更有优势。

title: Random Wins All: Rethinking Grouping Strategies for Vision Tokens
summary: Since Transformers are introduced into vision architectures, their quadratic complexity has always been a significant issue that many research efforts aim to address. A representative approach involves grouping tokens, performing self-attention calculations within each group, or pooling the tokens within each group into a single token. To this end, various carefully designed grouping strategies have been proposed to enhance the performance of Vision Transformers. Here, we pose the following questions: \textbf{Are these carefully designed grouping methods truly necessary? Is there a simpler and more unified token grouping method that can replace these diverse methods?} Therefore, we propose the random grouping strategy, which involves a simple and fast random grouping strategy for vision tokens. We validate this approach on multiple baselines, and experiments show that random grouping almost outperforms all other grouping methods. When transferred to downstream tasks, such as object detection, random grouping demonstrates even more pronounced advantages. In response to this phenomenon, we conduct a detailed analysis of the advantages of random grouping from multiple perspectives and identify several crucial elements for the design of grouping strategies: positional information, head feature diversity, global receptive field, and fixed grouping pattern. We demonstrate that as long as these four conditions are met, vision tokens require only an extremely simple grouping strategy to efficiently and effectively handle various visual tasks. We also validate the effectiveness of our proposed random method across multiple modalities, including visual tasks, point cloud processing, and vision-language models. Code will be available at https://github.com/qhfan/random.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种简单高效的随机分组策略来解决Vision Transformer的二次复杂度问题，并在多项视觉任务和跨模态任务上取得了优于现有分组方法的性能。研究还分析了随机分组成功的关键要素，包括位置信息、头特征多样性、全局感受野和固定分组模式。
AI.motivation: 现有的Vision Transformer分组策略通常很复杂，研究者想知道是否存在更简单、更通用的分组方法，能够替代这些精心设计但可能并非必需的策略，同时解决Transformer的二次复杂度问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种简单快捷的随机分组策略，将视觉Token进行随机分组，并在分组内进行自注意力计算。该方法在多个Vision Transformer基线上进行了验证，并在下游任务（如目标检测）以及视觉、点云处理和视觉-语言模型等多种模态上进行了有效性检验。同时，研究从位置信息、头特征多样性、全局感受野和固定分组模式等角度对随机分组的优势进行了分析。
AI.result: 随机分组策略在多数实验中几乎超越了所有其他分组方法。在下游任务上，随机分组展现出更明显的优势。研究发现，只要满足位置信息、头特征多样性、全局感受野和固定分组模式这四个条件，就可以实现高效且有效的视觉任务处理。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的Token分组策略并非必需，一种简单且快速的随机分组方法足以在多种视觉和跨模态任务中取得优异性能。该研究提出的随机分组策略是一个简单、统一且高效的解决方案，并且揭示了有效分组策略的设计关键。

title: Enhancing Persona Following at Decoding Time via Dynamic Importance Estimation for Role-Playing Agents
summary: The utility of Role-Playing Language Agents in sociological research is growing alongside the adoption of Large Language Models. For realism in social simulation, these agents must adhere to their personas defined by character profiles, yet existing strategies-static prompt engineering or costly fine-tuning-fail to adapt personas to dynamic scenarios. Psychological theories, such as the Cognitive-Affective Personality Systems, provide a crucial explanation for this failure: a persona's influence on behavior is not static but varies with the scenarios. This context-dependence highlights the critical need for adaptive persona management. To address this gap, we propose a novel, theory-driven method that dynamically estimates context-dependent persona importance and integrates it into weighted reward-guided decoding, enabling inference-time persona following. Specifically, we introduce the Persona Dynamic Decoding (PDD) framework, which consists of two key components: (1) Persona Importance Estimation (PIE) module, which dynamically quantifies the contextual importance of persona attributes without requiring ground-truth supervision; and (2) Persona-Guided Inference-Time Alignment (PIA) paradigm, which leverages these importance scores to construct weighted multi-objective rewards and modulate generation probabilities during inference. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our method in utterance consistency and behavioral fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Persona Dynamic Decoding (PDD) 的新方法，用于解决角色扮演语言代理在社会模拟中无法根据动态场景自适应角色的问题。PDD 包含两个主要部分：Persona Importance Estimation (PIE) 模块，用于动态量化情境下的人物属性重要性；Persona-Guided Inference-Time Alignment (PIA) 范式，利用这些重要性分数进行推理时的人物遵循。实验证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有角色扮演语言代理的策略（静态提示工程或昂贵的微调）无法让代理在动态场景下遵循其人物设定，这与认知-情感人格系统等心理学理论所揭示的，人格对行为的影响具有情境依赖性相矛盾。因此，需要一种能够自适应管理人物设定的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出 Persona Dynamic Decoding (PDD) 框架。该框架包含两个主要组件：1. Persona Importance Estimation (PIE) 模块，无需真实标签即可动态量化情境下的人物属性重要性。2. Persona-Guided Inference-Time Alignment (PIA) 范式，利用 PIE 模块得到的重要性分数构建加权多目标奖励，并在推理时调整生成概率。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，所提出的 PDD 方法在生成文本的一致性和行为保真度方面均取得了有效性。
AI.conclusion: PDD 框架是一种新颖的、由理论驱动的方法，能够自适应地估计情境下的人物属性重要性，并在推理时通过加权奖励引导解码，从而实现更加真实的角色扮演语言代理，提升其在社会模拟中的应用价值。

title: Anatomy of the Modality Gap: Dissecting the Internal States of End-to-End Speech LLMs
summary: Recent advancements in Large Speech-Language Models have significantly bridged the gap between acoustic signals and linguistic understanding. However, a persistent performance disparity remains in speech-based input tasks compared to direct text inference. In this paper, we investigate the dynamic roots of this modality gap beyond static geometric alignment, analyzing how speech and text representations evolve layer-by-layer. We evaluate four open-weight end-to-end models on SpeechMMLU and VoiceBench BBH. Using cross-layer CKA analysis with speech-text token alignment, we find that speech representations exhibit a broad cross-layer alignment band, attributable to the redundant nature of speech where semantic content spans multiple frames. We show that these alignment patterns are structurally stable across different analysis configurations. Crucially, simple statistical calibration is insufficient and can be detrimental when applied at the input layer, indicating that the modality gap is not a mere distribution shift. Overall, our results suggest that the bottleneck lies in condensing redundant speech into stable late-layer decisions, motivating future solutions that operate at the token or temporal granularity instead of feature-level matching.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，语音到文本的模态差距并非简单的分布偏移，而是由于语音信号固有的冗余性导致其跨层表示对齐范围更广，难以在模型后期稳定地浓缩为决策。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语音语言模型取得了进展，但在语音输入任务上与直接文本推理相比仍存在性能差距。研究希望超越静态几何对齐，深入探究这种模态差距的动态根源。
AI.method: 使用跨层互协方差分析（CKA）结合语音-文本Token对齐，对四种开源端到端模型在SpeechMMLU和VoiceBench BBH数据集上进行评估，分析模型层与层之间表示的演化。
AI.result: 语音表示呈现出广泛的跨层对齐带，这归因于语音语义信息跨越多帧的冗余性。这种对齐模式在不同分析配置下具有结构稳定性。简单的统计校准不足以弥合差距，甚至可能有害。
AI.conclusion: 模态差距的瓶颈在于如何将冗余的语音信息浓缩为模型后期稳定的决策，未来的解决方案应侧重于Token或时间粒度的操作，而非简单的特征层面匹配。

title: CHOP: Counterfactual Human Preference Labels Improve Obstacle Avoidance in Visuomotor Navigation Policies
summary: Visuomotor navigation policies have shown strong perception-action coupling for embodied agents, yet they often struggle with safe navigation and dynamic obstacle avoidance in complex real-world environments. We introduce CHOP, a novel approach that leverages Counterfactual Human Preference Labels to align visuomotor navigation policies towards human intuition of safety and obstacle avoidance in navigation. In CHOP, for each visual observation, the robot's executed trajectory is included among a set of counterfactual navigation trajectories: alternative trajectories the robot could have followed under identical conditions. Human annotators provide pairwise preference labels over these trajectories based on anticipated outcomes such as collision risk and path efficiency. These aggregated preferences are then used to fine-tune visuomotor navigation policies, aligning their behavior with human preferences in navigation. Experiments on the SCAND dataset show that visuomotor navigation policies fine-tuned with CHOP reduce near-collision events by 49.7%, decrease deviation from human-preferred trajectories by 45.0%, and increase average obstacle clearance by 19.8% on average across multiple state-of-the-art models, compared to their pretrained baselines. These improvements transfer to real-world deployments on a Ghost Robotics Vision60 quadruped, where CHOP-aligned policies improve average goal success rates by 24.4%, increase minimum obstacle clearance by 6.8%, reduce collision and intervention events by 45.7%, and improve normalized path completion by 38.6% on average across navigation scenarios, compared to their pretrained baselines. Our results highlight the value of counterfactual preference supervision in bridging the gap between large-scale visuomotor policies and human-aligned, safety-aware embodied navigation.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为CHOP的新方法，通过利用反事实人类偏好标签来训练视觉运动导航策略，使其更符合人类对安全和避障的直觉。实验证明，CHOP显著提高了导航的安全性、效率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉运动导航策略在复杂真实环境中，尤其是在安全导航和动态避障方面表现不佳，难以与人类直觉保持一致。
AI.method: CHOP收集机器人在给定观察下执行的轨迹，并与一系列反事实轨迹（机器人本可以采取的替代路径）一起呈现给人类标注者。标注者根据碰撞风险和路径效率等因素，对这些轨迹进行偏好排序。然后，利用聚合的偏好信息对视觉运动导航策略进行微调。
AI.result: 在SCAND数据集上，CHOP微调的导航策略将近距离碰撞事件减少了49.7%，与人类偏好轨迹的偏差减少了45.0%，平均障碍物清除距离增加了19.8%。在真实机器人部署中，CHOP策略将目标成功率提高了24.4%，最小障碍物清除距离增加了6.8%，碰撞和干预事件减少了45.7%，路径完成度提高了38.6%。
AI.conclusion: 反事实偏好监督是弥合大规模视觉运动策略与人类对齐、安全意识的具身导航之间差距的有效方法。

title: RubricBench: Aligning Model-Generated Rubrics with Human Standards
summary: As Large Language Model (LLM) alignment evolves from simple completions to complex, highly sophisticated generation, Reward Models are increasingly shifting toward rubric-guided evaluation to mitigate surface-level biases. However, the community lacks a unified benchmark to assess this evaluation paradigm, as existing benchmarks lack both the discriminative complexity and the ground-truth rubric annotations required for rigorous analysis. To bridge this gap, we introduce RubricBench, a curated benchmark with 1,147 pairwise comparisons specifically designed to assess the reliability of rubric-based evaluation. Our construction employs a multi-dimensional filtration pipeline to target hard samples featuring nuanced input complexity and misleading surface bias, augmenting each with expert-annotated, atomic rubrics derived strictly from instructions. Comprehensive experiments reveal a substantial capability gap between human-annotated and model-generated rubrics, indicating that even state-of-the-art models struggle to autonomously specify valid evaluation criteria, lagging considerably behind human-guided performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RubricBench，一个包含1147个配对比较的新基准，旨在评估基于规则（rubric-guided）的LLM奖励模型评估方法。实验表明，当前最先进的模型在自动生成有效的评估标准方面存在显著差距，远不及人类的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM对齐评估方法正从简单的补全转向复杂的、基于规则的评估，以减少表面偏差。然而，社区缺乏一个统一的基准来评估这种评估范式，现有基准在判别复杂性和地面真实规则标注方面存在不足。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含1147个配对比较的RubricBench基准。通过多维度过滤流水线来筛选出具有细微输入复杂性和误导性表面偏差的困难样本，并为每个样本添加了严格根据指令生成的、由专家标注的原子规则。
AI.result: 通过对RubricBench的全面实验，发现人类标注的规则和模型生成的规则之间存在显著的能力差距。即使是目前最先进的模型，在自主指定有效的评估标准方面也表现出不足，远落后于人类指导的表现。
AI.conclusion: 基于规则的LLM奖励模型评估是一个有前景的方向，但目前最先进的模型在自主生成有效的评估标准方面仍有很大提升空间，需要人类的指导。

title: ArtiFixer: Enhancing and Extending 3D Reconstruction with Auto-Regressive Diffusion Models
summary: Per-scene optimization methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting provide state-of-the-art novel view synthesis quality but extrapolate poorly to under-observed areas. Methods that leverage generative priors to correct artifacts in these areas hold promise but currently suffer from two shortcomings. The first is scalability, as existing methods use image diffusion models or bidirectional video models that are limited in the number of views they can generate in a single pass (and thus require a costly iterative distillation process for consistency). The second is quality itself, as generators used in prior work tend to produce outputs that are inconsistent with existing scene content and fail entirely in completely unobserved regions. To solve these, we propose a two-stage pipeline that leverages two key insights. First, we train a powerful bidirectional generative model with a novel opacity mixing strategy that encourages consistency with existing observations while retaining the model's ability to extrapolate novel content in unseen areas. Second, we distill it into a causal auto-regressive model that generates hundreds of frames in a single pass. This model can directly produce novel views or serve as pseudo-supervision to improve the underlying 3D representation in a simple and highly efficient manner. We evaluate our method extensively and demonstrate that it can generate plausible reconstructions in scenarios where existing approaches fail completely. When measured on commonly benchmarked datasets, we outperform existing all existing baselines by a wide margin, exceeding prior state-of-the-art methods by 1-3 dB PSNR.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种两阶段的生成式视图合成方法，通过训练一个具有新颖不透明度混合策略的双向生成模型，然后将其蒸馏成一个因果自回归模型，以解决现有方法在未充分观察区域的泛化能力差以及生成模型的可扩展性和质量问题。该方法在困难场景下表现出色，并在常见数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如 3D 高斯溅射）在未充分观察区域的视图合成质量不佳。利用生成先验的方法虽然有潜力，但存在可扩展性（视图生成数量有限，需要迭代蒸馏）和质量（生成内容与现有场景不一致，在完全未观察区域失败）方面的不足。研究动机是解决这些问题，提高未充分观察区域的视图合成质量和效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流水线。第一阶段：训练一个强大的双向生成模型，该模型采用新颖的不透明度混合策略，鼓励与现有观察的一致性，同时保留在未见区域外推新内容的能力。第二阶段：将该模型蒸馏成一个因果自回归模型，该模型可以一次生成数百帧。这个模型可以直接生成新视图，或作为伪监督来提高底层 3D 表示。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够生成合理的重建，即使在现有方法完全失败的场景下也能奏效。在常见数据集上的评估结果表明，该方法在 PSNR 上超越了所有现有基线 1-3 dB。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过新颖的双向生成模型和高效的因果自回归蒸馏，成功解决了现有生成式视图合成方法在未充分观察区域的泛化能力差、可扩展性和质量问题，并在实验中取得了显著优于现有方法的性能。

title: LAD-Drive: Bridging Language and Trajectory with Action-Aware Diffusion Transformers
summary: While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide advanced reasoning for autonomous driving, translating their discrete semantic knowledge into continuous trajectories remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods often rely on unimodal planning heads that inherently limit their ability to represent multimodal driving behavior. Furthermore, most generative approaches frequently condition on one-hot encoded actions, discarding the nuanced navigational uncertainty critical for complex scenarios. To resolve these limitations, we introduce LAD-Drive, a generative framework that structurally disentangles high-level intention from low-level spatial planning. LAD-Drive employs an action decoder to infer a probabilistic meta-action distribution, establishing an explicit belief state that preserves the nuanced intent typically lost by one-hot encodings. This distribution, fused with the vehicle's kinematic state, conditions an action-aware diffusion decoder that utilizes a truncated denoising process to refine learned motion anchors into safe, kinematically feasible trajectories. Extensive evaluations on the LangAuto benchmark demonstrate that LAD-Drive achieves state-of-the-art results, outperforming competitive baselines by up to 59% in Driving Score while significantly reducing route deviations and collisions. We will publicly release the code and models on https://github.com/iis-esslingen/lad-drive.

AI.tldr: LAD-Drive是一个生成式框架，通过解耦高层意图和低层空间规划，解决多模态大语言模型在自动驾驶中将离散语义知识转化为连续轨迹的挑战，使用概率性元动作分布保留意图，并进行截断去噪以生成安全可行的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以将多模态大语言模型的离散语义知识转化为连续轨迹，通常依赖于限制多模态驾驶行为表示的单一模态规划头，并且生成方法常使用丢弃导航不确定性的独热编码动作。
AI.method: LAD-Drive框架结构性地解耦了高层意图和低层空间规划，使用动作解码器推断概率性元动作分布以建立显式信念状态，并融合车辆运动学状态，利用截断去噪过程的动作感知扩散解码器优化运动锚点以生成安全、运动学上可行的轨迹。
AI.result: 在LangAuto基准测试中，LAD-Drive取得了最先进的成果，在驾驶得分上超越竞争对手高达59%，并显著减少了路线偏差和碰撞。
AI.conclusion: LAD-Drive成功解决了多模态大语言模型在自动驾驶中意图表示和轨迹生成的问题，通过显式保留导航不确定性和生成运动学上可行的轨迹，显著提高了自动驾驶性能。

title: Extracting Training Dialogue Data from Large Language Model based Task Bots
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS). \c{opyright} 2026 IEEE
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely adopted to enhance Task-Oriented Dialogue Systems (TODS) by modeling complex language patterns and delivering contextually appropriate responses. However, this integration introduces significant privacy risks, as LLMs, functioning as soft knowledge bases that compress extensive training data into rich knowledge representations, can inadvertently memorize training dialogue data containing not only identifiable information such as phone numbers but also entire dialogue-level events like complete travel schedules. Despite the critical nature of this privacy concern, how LLM memorization is inherited in developing task bots remains unexplored. In this work, we address this gap through a systematic quantitative study that involves evaluating existing training data extraction attacks, analyzing key characteristics of task-oriented dialogue modeling that render existing methods ineffective, and proposing novel attack techniques tailored for LLM-based TODS that enhance both response sampling and membership inference. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed data extraction attack. Our method can extract thousands of training labels of dialogue states with best-case precision exceeding 70%. Furthermore, we provide an in-depth analysis of training data memorization in LLM-based TODS by identifying and quantifying key influencing factors and discussing targeted mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现，用于任务型对话系统（TODS）的大型语言模型（LLMs）会记住训练数据，并提出了新的攻击方法来提取这些数据，同时分析了影响因素并讨论了缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未探讨LLM在TODS中的记忆问题如何被利用，尽管LLM可能泄露敏感的训练对话数据，如个人身份信息和事件详情。
AI.method: 通过量化研究，评估现有的数据提取攻击方法，分析其在TODS中的局限性，并提出新的攻击技术，包括增强响应采样和成员推理。
AI.result: 提出的数据提取攻击方法有效，可提取数千个对话状态训练标签，最佳情况下精度超过70%。研究还深入分析了影响LLM-TODS训练数据记忆的关键因素，并提出了有针对性的缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: LLM在TODS中存在显著的训练数据记忆风险，现有攻击方法不足以应对。本研究提出的新攻击方法能有效提取敏感信息，并为理解和缓解这一风险提供了新的见解和策略。

title: COG: Confidence-aware Optimal Geometric Correspondence for Unsupervised Single-reference Novel Object Pose Estimation
summary: Estimating the 6DoF pose of a novel object with a single reference view is challenging due to occlusions, view-point changes, and outliers. A core difficulty lies in finding robust cross-view correspondences, as existing methods often rely on discrete one-to-one matching that is non-differentiable and tends to collapse onto sparse key-points. We propose Confidence-aware Optimal Geometric Correspondence (COG), an unsupervised framework that formulates correspondence estimation as a confidence-aware optimal transport problem. COG produces balanced soft correspondences by predicting point-wise confidences and injecting them as optimal transport marginals, suppressing non-overlapping regions. Semantic priors from vision foundation models further regularize the correspondences, leading to stable pose estimation. This design integrates confidence into the correspondence finding and pose estimation pipeline, enabling unsupervised learning. Experiments show unsupervised COG achieves comparable performance to supervised methods, and supervised COG outperforms them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 COG 的无监督框架，用于估计具有单个参考视图的新颖物体的 6DoF 位姿。COG 将对应关系估计视为一个置信度感知最优传输问题，通过预测逐点置信度来生成平衡的软对应关系，并利用视觉基础模型的语义先验进行正则化，从而实现稳定的位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的单视图 6DoF 位姿估计方法在处理遮挡、视角变化和离群值时面临挑战，核心困难在于找到鲁棒的跨视图对应关系。现有方法依赖于离散的一对一匹配，这不可微分且容易导致关键点稀疏。
AI.method: COG 框架将对应关系估计公式化为一个置信度感知最优传输问题。它通过预测逐点置信度并将其作为最优传输的边际来生成平衡的软对应关系，从而抑制非重叠区域。此外，利用视觉基础模型的语义先验来正则化对应关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，无监督的 COG 在性能上可与有监督方法相媲美，而有监督的 COG 则超越了它们。COG 成功地将置信度融入对应关系查找和位姿估计流程，实现了无监督学习。
AI.conclusion: COG 框架通过将置信度感知最优传输与语义先验相结合，能够有效地解决单视图 6DoF 位姿估计中的跨视图对应关系难题，并实现了高性能的无监督和有监督位姿估计。

title: Beyond Length Scaling: Synergizing Breadth and Depth for Generative Reward Models
summary: Recent advancements in Generative Reward Models (GRMs) have demonstrated that scaling the length of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning considerably enhances the reliability of evaluation. However, current works predominantly rely on unstructured length scaling, ignoring the divergent efficacy of different reasoning mechanisms: Breadth-CoT (B-CoT, i.e., multi-dimensional principle coverage) and Depth-CoT (D-CoT, i.e., substantive judgment soundness). To address this, we introduce Mix-GRM, a framework that reconfigures raw rationales into structured B-CoT and D-CoT through a modular synthesis pipeline, subsequently employing Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to internalize and optimize these mechanisms. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Mix-GRM establishes a new state-of-the-art across five benchmarks, surpassing leading open-source RMs by an average of 8.2\%. Our results reveal a clear divergence in reasoning: B-CoT benefits subjective preference tasks, whereas D-CoT excels in objective correctness tasks. Consequently, misaligning the reasoning mechanism with the task directly degrades performance. Furthermore, we demonstrate that RLVR acts as a switching amplifier, inducing an emergent polarization where the model spontaneously allocates its reasoning style to match task demands. The synthesized data and models are released at \href{https://huggingface.co/collections/DonJoey/mix-grm}{Hugging Face}, and the code is released at \href{https://github.com/Don-Joey/Mix-GRM}{Github}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mix-GRM的框架，通过结构化地组合宽度-CoT（B-CoT）和深度-CoT（D-CoT）两种推理机制，提升了生成奖励模型（GRMs）的评估可靠性，并在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成奖励模型（GRMs）在增强评估可靠性方面，主要依赖于非结构化的长度扩展，而忽略了不同推理机制（如B-CoT和D-CoT）在不同任务中的效果差异。
AI.method: Mix-GRM框架首先通过模块化合成管道将原始推理过程重构为结构化的B-CoT和D-CoT，然后利用监督微调（SFT）和带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）来优化这些机制。
AI.result: Mix-GRM在五个基准测试中创下新纪录，平均性能超越领先的开源奖励模型8.2%。研究发现，B-CoT更适合主观偏好任务，而D-CoT更擅长客观正确性任务，且将推理机制与任务不匹配会降低性能。RLVR能够引导模型根据任务需求自适应地调整推理风格。
AI.conclusion: Mix-GRM通过结构化地整合B-CoT和D-CoT，有效提升了GRMs的性能，并揭示了不同推理机制在不同类型任务中的适应性。RLVR在引导模型选择合适的推理策略方面发挥了关键作用。

title: M$^2$: Dual-Memory Augmentation for Long-Horizon Web Agents via Trajectory Summarization and Insight Retrieval
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) based agents have demonstrated remarkable potential in autonomous web navigation. However, handling long-horizon tasks remains a critical bottleneck. Prevailing strategies often rely heavily on extensive data collection and model training, yet still struggle with high computational costs and insufficient reasoning capabilities when facing complex, long-horizon scenarios. To address this, we propose M$^2$, a training-free, memory-augmented framework designed to optimize context efficiency and decision-making robustness. Our approach incorporates a dual-tier memory mechanism that synergizes Dynamic Trajectory Summarization (Internal Memory) to compress verbose interaction history into concise state updates, and Insight Retrieval Augmentation (External Memory) to guide the agent with actionable guidelines retrieved from an offline insight bank. Extensive evaluations across WebVoyager and OnlineMind2Web demonstrate that M$^2$ consistently surpasses baselines, yielding up to a 19.6% success rate increase and 58.7% token reduction for Qwen3-VL-32B, while proprietary models like Claude achieve accuracy gains up to 12.5% alongside significantly lower computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为M$^2$的训练无关、记忆增强框架，通过动态轨迹摘要和洞察检索增强来提高多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在长时序任务中的网页导航能力，显著提高了成功率并降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于MLLMs的自主网页导航代理在处理长时序任务时存在瓶颈，当前策略依赖大量数据和训练，计算成本高且推理能力不足。
AI.method: 提出M$^2$框架，包含一个双层记忆机制：1. 动态轨迹摘要（内部记忆），用于压缩交互历史；2. 洞察检索增强（外部记忆），利用离线洞察库指导代理。
AI.result: 在WebVoyager和OnlineMind2Web数据集上的评估显示，M$^2$超越了基线方法。对于Qwen3-VL-32B，成功率提高了19.6%，代币减少了58.7%。对于Claude模型，准确率提高了12.5%，计算开销显著降低。
AI.conclusion: M$^2$通过其创新的记忆机制，有效地解决了MLLMs在长时序网页导航任务中的挑战，提高了效率和性能，且无需额外的模型训练。

title: ACDC: Adaptive Curriculum Planning with Dynamic Contrastive Control for Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning in Robotic Manipulation
comment: 13 pages (including references and appendix), 12 figures. Accepted to ICAPS 2026. Code available at https://github.com/Xuerui-Wang-oss/Adaptive-Curriculum-Learning-and-Dynamic-Contrastive-Control
summary: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning has shown considerable potential in robotic manipulation; however, existing approaches remain limited by their reliance on prioritizing collected experience, resulting in suboptimal performance across diverse tasks. Inspired by human learning behaviors, we propose a more comprehensive learning paradigm, ACDC, which integrates multidimensional Adaptive Curriculum (AC) Planning with Dynamic Contrastive (DC) Control to guide the agent along a well-designed learning trajectory. More specifically, at the planning level, the AC component schedules the learning curriculum by dynamically balancing diversity-driven exploration and quality-driven exploitation based on the agent's success rate and training progress. At the control level, the DC component implements the curriculum plan through norm-constrained contrastive learning, enabling magnitude-guided experience selection aligned with the current curriculum focus. Extensive experiments on challenging robotic manipulation tasks demonstrate that ACDC consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in both sample efficiency and final task success rate.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ACDC的新型强化学习范式，通过多维自适应课程规划和动态对比控制，旨在克服现有方法对经验优先级的依赖，提高机器人操纵任务的样本效率和任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有目标条件强化学习方法在机器人操纵任务中存在局限性，其对经验优先级的依赖导致在多样化任务上的性能不佳。
AI.method: ACDC结合了多维自适应课程（AC）规划和动态对比（DC）控制。AC组件根据智能体的成功率和训练进度动态平衡多样性驱动的探索和质量驱动的利用来规划学习课程。DC组件通过范数约束的对比学习来执行课程计划，实现与当前课程焦点一致的幅度引导经验选择。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的机器人操纵任务上的大量实验表明，ACDC在样本效率和最终任务成功率方面持续优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ACDC通过集成自适应课程规划和动态对比控制，提供了一种更全面的学习范式，能够有效地指导智能体沿着精心设计的学习轨迹进行学习，从而在机器人操纵任务中取得优异性能。

title: CARE: Towards Clinical Accountability in Multi-Modal Medical Reasoning with an Evidence-Grounded Agentic Framework
summary: Large visual language models (VLMs) have shown strong multi-modal medical reasoning ability, but most operate as end-to-end black boxes, diverging from clinicians' evidence-based, staged workflows and hindering clinical accountability. Complementarily, expert visual grounding models can accurately localize regions of interest (ROIs), providing explicit, reliable evidence that improves both reasoning accuracy and trust. In this paper, we introduce CARE, advancing Clinical Accountability in multi-modal medical Reasoning with an Evidence-grounded agentic framework. Unlike existing approaches that couple grounding and reasoning within a single generalist model, CARE decomposes the task into coordinated sub-modules to reduce shortcut learning and hallucination: a compact VLM proposes relevant medical entities; an expert entity-referring segmentation model produces pixel-level ROI evidence; and a grounded VLM reasons over the full image augmented by ROI hints. The VLMs are optimized with reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards to align answers with supporting evidence. Furthermore, a VLM coordinator plans tool invocation and reviews evidence-answer consistency, providing agentic control and final verification. Evaluated on standard medical VQA benchmarks, our CARE-Flow (coordinator-free) improves average accuracy by 10.9% over the same size (10B) state-of-the-art (SOTA). With dynamic planning and answer review, our CARE-Coord yields a further gain, outperforming the heavily pre-trained SOTA by 5.2%. Our experiments demonstrate that an agentic framework that emulates clinical workflows, incorporating decoupled specialized models and explicit evidence, yields more accurate and accountable medical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CARE的循证医学推理代理框架，通过将医学问答任务分解为多个子模块（VLM提议实体、分割模型定位ROI、带ROI提示的VLM推理），并引入协调器进行工具调用和证据-答案一致性检查，以提高医学AI的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端视觉语言模型（VLMs）在医学推理中存在黑盒问题，与医生基于证据的流程不符，且难以追责。需要一种能够提供明确、可靠证据的医学推理方法。
AI.method: CARE框架包含三个子模块：1. 紧凑型VLM提出相关的医学实体；2. 专家实体指称分割模型生成像素级ROI证据；3. 接地VLM结合ROI提示在全图上进行推理。通过可验证奖励进行强化学习优化。引入VLM协调器规划工具调用和审查证据-答案一致性。
AI.result: CARE-Flow（无协调器）在医学VQA基准上，与同等规模（10B）的SOTA模型相比，平均准确率提升了10.9%。CARE-Coord（含动态规划和答案审查）进一步提升了准确率，比预训练SOTA模型高出5.2%。
AI.conclusion: 模仿临床工作流程的代理框架，结合解耦的专业模型和明确的证据，能够生成更准确、更负责任的医学AI。

title: $π$-StepNFT: Wider Space Needs Finer Steps in Online RL for Flow-based VLAs
summary: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) models excel in embodied control but suffer from intractable likelihoods during multi-step sampling, hindering online reinforcement learning. We propose \textbf{\textit{$\boldsymbolπ$-StepNFT}} (Step-wise Negative-aware Fine-Tuning), a critic-and-likelihood-free framework that requires only a single forward pass per optimization step and eliminates auxiliary value networks. We identify that wider exploration spaces necessitate finer-grained, step-wise guidance for alignment. Empirically, $π$-StepNFT unlocks latent potential on LIBERO with competitive few-shot robustness. Moreover, it achieves superior generalization on ManiSkill, outperforming value-based baselines in OOD scenarios by preventing overfitting to multimodal features. This property offers a scalable solution promising for complex real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 $π$-StepNFT 的新框架，用于解决基于流的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在在线强化学习中面临的采样困难问题，该框架无需评估器和似然估计，仅需单次前向传播即可完成优化。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于流的VLA模型在多步采样时存在难以处理的似然问题，这阻碍了在线强化学习的应用。需要一种更高效、无需评估器和似然估计的方法。
AI.method: 提出 $π$-StepNFT 框架，该框架无需评估器和辅助价值网络，每次优化仅需一次前向传播。该方法强调了细粒度的、分步的指导对于实现更广泛探索空间的对齐的重要性。
AI.result: 在 LIBERO 数据集上，$π$-StepNFT 展现出具有竞争力的少样本鲁棒性。在 ManiSkill 数据集上，该方法在开集（OOD）场景下表现优于基于价值的方法，有效避免了对多模态特征的过拟合。
AI.conclusion: $π$-StepNFT 是一种无需评估器和似然估计的 VLA 模型训练框架，能够有效解决在线强化学习中的采样难题，并在多项基准测试中取得优异性能，尤其在泛化能力方面表现突出，有望应用于复杂的实际场景。

title: Hierarchical Classification for Improved Histopathology Image Analysis
summary: Whole-slide image analysis is essential for diagnostic tasks in pathology, yet existing deep learning methods primarily rely on flat classification, ignoring hierarchical relationships among class labels. In this study, we propose HiClass, a hierarchical classification framework for improved histopathology image analysis, that enhances both coarse-grained and fine-grained WSI classification. Built based upon a multiple instance learning approach, HiClass extends it by introducing bidirectional feature integration that facilitates information exchange between coarse-grained and fine-grained feature representations, effectively learning hierarchical features. Moreover, we introduce tailored loss functions, including hierarchical consistency loss, intra- and inter-class distance loss, and group-wise cross-entropy loss, to further optimize hierarchical learning. We assess the performance of HiClass on a gastric biopsy dataset with 4 coarse-grained and 14 fine-grained classes, achieving superior classification performance for both coarse-grained classification and fine-grained classification. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of HiClass in improving WSI classification by capturing coarse-grained and fine-grained histopathological characteristics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为HiClass的层次化分类框架，用于改进全切片图像（WSI）的组织病理学分析，通过双向特征集成和定制化损失函数，在胃组织活检数据集上实现了粗粒度和细粒度分类的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在组织病理学WSI分析中通常采用扁平化分类，忽略了类别标签之间的层次化关系，这限制了分类性能的提升。
AI.method: 提出HiClass框架，基于多实例学习（MIL），引入双向特征集成以促进粗粒度和细粒度特征表示之间的信息交换，并结合层次一致性损失、类内/类间距离损失以及分组交叉熵损失等定制化损失函数。
AI.result: 在包含4个粗粒度和14个细粒度类别的胃组织活检数据集上，HiClass在粗粒度和细粒度分类任务上均取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: HiClass框架通过有效学习层次化特征，能够同时捕捉粗粒度和细粒度的组织病理学特征，显著提升了WSI分类的性能。

title: More Data, Fewer Diacritics: Scaling Arabic TTS
summary: Arabic Text-to-Speech (TTS) research has been hindered by the availability of both publicly available training data and accurate Arabic diacritization models. In this paper, we address the limitation by exploring Arabic TTS training on large automatically annotated data. Namely, we built a robust pipeline for collecting Arabic recordings and processing them automatically using voice activity detection, speech recognition, automatic diacritization, and noise filtering, resulting in around 4,000 hours of Arabic TTS training data. We then trained several robust TTS models with voice cloning using varying amounts of data, namely 100, 1,000, and 4,000 hours with and without diacritization. We show that though models trained on diacritized data are generally better, larger amounts of training data compensate for the lack of diacritics to a significant degree. We plan to release a public Arabic TTS model that works without the need for diacritization.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了使用大量自动标注数据训练阿拉伯语文本到语音（TTS）模型，旨在克服公共训练数据和精确阿拉伯语变音符号模型的可用性限制。研究表明，尽管变音符号数据模型更好，但大量训练数据可以显著弥补变音符号的缺失。研究计划发布一个无需变音符号的公共阿拉伯语TTS模型。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语文本到语音（TTS）研究受到公开可用训练数据和准确阿拉伯语变音符号模型的可用性限制。
AI.method: 构建了一个健壮的阿拉伯语录音收集和自动处理流程，包括语音活动检测、语音识别、自动变音符号化和噪声过滤，生成了约4000小时的阿拉伯语TTS训练数据。在此基础上，训练了几个具有语音克隆功能的TTS模型，使用了100、1000和4000小时不同量的变音符号化和未变音符号化数据。
AI.result: 使用变音符号化数据训练的模型通常更好，但大量训练数据能在很大程度上弥补变音符号的不足。使用4000小时数据的模型效果最好。
AI.conclusion: 通过使用大规模自动标注数据，可以显著改善阿拉伯语TTS模型的性能，并且可以构建一个在没有变音符号的情况下也能工作的TTS模型。研究计划发布一个公共的、无需变音符号的阿拉伯语TTS模型。

title: Real-Time Thermal-Inertial Odometry on Embedded Hardware for High-Speed GPS-Denied Flight
summary: We present a real-time monocular thermal-inertial odometry system designed for high-velocity, GPS-denied flight on embedded hardware. The system fuses measurements from a FLIR Boson+ 640 longwave infrared camera, a high-rate IMU, a laser range finder, a barometer, and a magnetometer within a fixed-lag factor graph. To sustain reliable feature tracks under motion blur, low contrast, and rapid viewpoint changes, we employ a lightweight thermal-optimized front-end with multi-stage feature filtering. Laser range finder measurements provide per-feature depth priors that stabilize scale during weakly observable motion. High-rate inertial data is first pre-filtered using a Chebyshev Type II infinite impulse response (IIR) filter and then preintegrated, improving robustness to airframe vibrations during aggressive maneuvers. To address barometric altitude errors induced at high airspeeds, we train an uncertainty-aware gated recurrent unit (GRU) network that models the temporal dynamics of static pressure distortion, outperforming polynomial and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) baselines. Integrated on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX, the complete system supports closed-loop quadrotor flight at 30 m/s with drift under 2% over kilometer-scale trajectories. These contributions expand the operational envelope of thermal-inertial navigation, enabling reliable high-speed flight in visually degraded and GPS-denied environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于嵌入式硬件上高速、无 GPS 飞行的实时单目热惯性测距系统，该系统融合了多种传感器数据，并采用了优化的特征跟踪、尺度稳定和姿态估计方法，实现了在复杂环境下的可靠飞行。
AI.motivation: 为了实现无人机在高速、无 GPS 且视觉条件恶劣（如低对比度、运动模糊）环境下的可靠自主导航。
AI.method: 该系统通过以下方法融合多种传感器数据：1. 热红外相机（FLIR Boson+ 640）和激光雷达测距仪作为主要视觉传感器，采用轻量级、针对热成像优化的前端进行特征跟踪和滤波。2. 高速率 IMU 数据经过 Chebyshev Type II IIR 滤波器预处理和预积分，以增强对振动的鲁棒性。3. 气压计和磁力计提供高度和方向信息。4. 利用固定滞后因子图（fixed-lag factor graph）进行传感器融合。5. 训练一个不确定性感知的门控循环单元（GRU）网络来补偿高速飞行时的气压测量误差。6. 在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX 上实现。
AI.result: 在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX 上实现的完整系统支持高达 30 m/s 的闭环四旋翼飞行，在公里级轨迹上漂移低于 2%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统成功扩展了热惯性导航的运行范围，能够在视觉退化和无 GPS 的环境下实现可靠的高速飞行。

title: What Do Visual Tokens Really Encode? Uncovering Sparsity and Redundancy in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) project visual tokens into the embedding space of language models, yet the internal structuring and processing of visual semantics remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a two-fold analytical framework featuring a novel probing tool, $\textbf{EmbedLens}$, to conduct a fine-grained analysis. We uncover a pronounced semantic sparsity at the input level: visual tokens consistently partition into sink, dead, and alive categories. Remarkably, only the alive tokens, comprising $\approx60\%$ of the total input, carry image-specific meaning. Furthermore, using a targeted patch-compression benchmark, we demonstrate that these alive tokens already encode rich, fine-grained cues (e.g., objects, colors, and OCR) prior to entering the LLM. Internal visual computations (such as visual attention and feed-forward networks) are redundant for most standard tasks. For the small subset of highly vision-centric tasks that actually benefit from internal processing, we reveal that alive tokens naturally align with intermediate LLM layers rather than the initial embedding space, indicating that shallow-layer processing is unnecessary and that direct mid-layer injection is both sufficient. Ultimately, our findings provide a unified mechanistic view of visual token processing, paving the way for more efficient and interpretable MLLM architectures through selective token pruning, minimized visual computation, and mid-layer injection. The code is released at: https://github.com/EIT-NLP/EmbedLens.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了 EmbedLens 工具，用于分析多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中视觉信息的处理。研究发现，输入的视觉 token 存在明显的稀疏性，只有约 60% 的“活” token 携带图像特定信息，并且这些信息在进入 LLM 之前就已经被编码。LLM 内部的视觉计算对于大多数任务来说是冗余的。对于少数视觉相关的任务，活 token 与 LLM 的中间层对齐，表明直接注入中间层即可，浅层处理非必需。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）如何内部处理和结构化视觉语义仍然是一个未被充分理解的问题。
AI.method: 研究开发了一个名为 EmbedLens 的新颖探测工具，用于进行细粒度的分析。通过针对性的 patch 压缩基准测试来评估 token 的信息含量，并分析 LLM 内部的视觉计算（如视觉注意力、前馈网络）和 token 与 LLM 层的对齐情况。
AI.result: 1. 输入层存在明显的语义稀疏性，视觉 token 被分为 sink、dead 和 alive 三类。2. 只有约 60% 的 alive token 携带图像特定含义。3. alive token 在进入 LLM 之前就已编码了丰富的细粒度线索（如物体、颜色、OCR）。4. 对于大多数标准任务，LLM 内部的视觉计算是冗余的。5. 对于少数高度视觉相关的任务，alive token 与 LLM 的中间层对齐，表明浅层处理非必需，直接注入中间层就足够了。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了一个关于视觉 token 处理的统一机制视图，支持更高效和可解释的 MLLM 架构设计，例如通过选择性 token 剪枝、最小化视觉计算和中间层注入。

title: Evaluating and Understanding Scheming Propensity in LLM Agents
summary: As frontier language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents pursuing complex, long-term objectives, there is increased risk of scheming: agents covertly pursuing misaligned goals. Prior work has focused on showing agents are capable of scheming, but their propensity to scheme in realistic scenarios remains underexplored. To understand when agents scheme, we decompose scheming incentives into agent factors and environmental factors. We develop realistic settings allowing us to systematically vary these factors, each with scheming opportunities for agents that pursue instrumentally convergent goals such as self-preservation, resource acquisition, and goal-guarding.
