We propose representation-aware subset selection with per-class retention quotas for long-tail coverage, and prior-invariant teacher supervision using calibrated soft labels and embedding-geometry distillation. The retention quota also serves as a switch to control the OA-mAcc trade-off. Extensive experiments on 3D datasets show that our method can improve both metrics across multiple settings while adapting to different downstream preferences. Our code is available at https://github.com/XiaohanZhao123/3D-Dataset-Pruning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了3D数据的精简数据集方法，针对其长尾分布特性，提出了一个考虑类别代表性和目标指标一致性的框架，并在实验中证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集精简方法主要集中在2D图像，而3D数据（尤其是其长尾分布特性）的精简方法研究不足，导致优化困难且现有评估指标（OA和mAcc）之间存在冲突。
AI.method: 将数据集精简视为用加权子集近似全数据的期望风险。提出了一种“表征感知子集选择”方法，包含每类保留配额以覆盖长尾分布；并采用“先验不变教师监督”，包括校准软标签和嵌入几何蒸馏。保留配额还可以控制OA-mAcc的权衡。
AI.result: 在多个3D数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在不同设置下都能同时提高OA和mAcc指标，并能适应不同的下游偏好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效地对3D数据集进行精简，解决长尾分布问题，并实现OA和mAcc指标的联合优化，同时具有灵活性以适应不同的应用需求。

title: AMemGym: Interactive Memory Benchmarking for Assistants in Long-Horizon Conversations
summary: Long-horizon interactions between users and LLM-based assistants necessitate effective memory management, yet current approaches face challenges in training and evaluation of memory. Existing memory benchmarks rely on static, off-policy data as context, limiting evaluation reliability and scalability. To address these gaps, we introduce AMemGym, an interactive environment enabling on-policy evaluation and optimization for memory-driven personalization. AMemGym employs structured data sampling to predefine user profiles, state-dependent questions, and state evolution trajectories, enabling cost-effective generation of high-quality, evaluation-aligned interactions. LLM-simulated users expose latent states through role-play while maintaining structured state consistency. Comprehensive metrics based on structured data guide both assessment and optimization of assistants. Extensive experiments reveal performance gaps in existing memory systems (e.g., RAG, long-context LLMs, and agentic memory) and corresponding reasons. AMemGym not only enables effective selection among competing approaches but also can potentially drive the self-evolution of memory management strategies. By bridging structured state evolution with free-form interactions, our framework provides a scalable, diagnostically rich environment for advancing memory capabilities in conversational agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMemGym，一个用于评估和优化LLM助手记忆管理的新型交互式环境。该环境通过结构化数据采样生成高质量的交互数据，克服了现有静态基准的局限性，并为记忆驱动的个性化提供了可扩展且信息丰富的评估平台。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM助手记忆管理的方法在训练和评估方面存在挑战，现有的基准依赖于静态、离策略数据，限制了评估的可靠性和可扩展性。因此，需要一个能够进行在策略评估和优化的交互式环境。
AI.method: 引入AMemGym，一个交互式环境。通过结构化数据采样预定义用户画像、状态相关问题和状态演化轨迹，生成高质量、与评估目标一致的交互。利用LLM模拟用户，通过角色扮演暴露潜在状态并保持结构化状态一致性。采用基于结构化数据的综合指标进行评估和优化。
AI.result: 实验发现，现有的记忆系统（如RAG、长上下文LLM和代理记忆）在记忆管理方面存在性能差距，并揭示了其原因。AMemGym能够有效比较不同的记忆管理方法。
AI.conclusion: AMemGym提供了一个可扩展、诊断性强的环境，能够有效评估和驱动记忆管理策略的演化，从而推动对话代理的记忆能力发展。

title: RC-GeoCP: Geometric Consensus for Radar-Camera Collaborative Perception
summary: Collaborative perception (CP) enhances scene understanding through multi-agent information sharing. While LiDAR-centric systems offer precise geometry, high costs and performance degradation in adverse weather necessitate multi-modal alternatives. Despite dense visual semantics and robust spatial measurements, the synergy between cameras and 4D radar remains underexplored in collaborative settings. This work introduces RC-GeoCP, the first framework to explore the fusion of 4D radar and images in CP. To resolve misalignment caused by depth ambiguity and spatial dispersion across agents, RC-GeoCP establishes a radar-anchored geometric consensus. Specifically, Geometric Structure Rectification (GSR) aligns visual semantics with geometry derived from radar to generate spatially grounded, geometry-consistent representations. Uncertainty-Aware Communication (UAC) formulates selective transmission as a conditional entropy reduction process to prioritize informative features based on inter-agent disagreement. Finally, the Consensus-Driven Assembler (CDA) aggregates multi-agent information via shared geometric anchors to form a globally coherent representation. We establish the first unified radar-camera CP benchmark on V2X-Radar and V2X-R, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance with significantly reduced communication overhead. Code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RC-GeoCP框架，首次实现了4D雷达和图像在协同感知中的融合，通过雷达锚定的几何共识来解决多传感器数据对齐问题，并在V2X-Radar和V2X-R数据集上取得了最先进的性能，同时显著降低了通信开销。
AI.motivation: 现有的激光雷达为主的协同感知系统成本高昂且在恶劣天气下性能下降，而结合摄像头和4D雷达的优势（前者提供丰富的语义信息，后者提供鲁棒的空间测量）的协同感知方案仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: RC-GeoCP框架包含三个主要组件：1. 几何结构校正 (GSR) 通过雷达数据提取的几何信息来校准图像语义，生成空间定位准确且几何一致的表征。2. 不确定性感知通信 (UAC) 将选择性信息传输建模为条件熵减少过程，根据代理间的差异优先传输信息量大的特征。3. 共识驱动汇聚器 (CDA) 利用共享的几何锚点聚合多代理信息，形成全局一致的表征。
AI.result: 在V2X-Radar和V2X-R数据集上，RC-GeoCP实现了最先进的性能，同时通信开销显著降低。
AI.conclusion: RC-GeoCP是第一个将4D雷达和图像融合到协同感知中的框架，通过雷达锚定的几何共识有效解决了多传感器数据对齐和信息融合的问题，为雷达-相机协同感知提供了新的解决方案和基准。

title: When Numbers Tell Half the Story: Human-Metric Alignment in Topic Model Evaluation
summary: Topic models uncover latent thematic structures in text corpora, yet evaluating their quality remains challenging, particularly in specialized domains. Existing methods often rely on automated metrics like topic coherence and diversity, which may not fully align with human judgment. Human evaluation tasks, such as word intrusion, provide valuable insights but are costly and primarily validated on general-domain corpora. This paper introduces Topic Word Mixing (TWM), a novel human evaluation task assessing inter-topic distinctness by testing whether annotators can distinguish between word sets from single or mixed topics. TWM complements word intrusion's focus on intra-topic coherence and provides a human-grounded counterpart to diversity metrics. We evaluate six topic models - both statistical and embedding-based (LDA, NMF, Top2Vec, BERTopic, CFMF, CFMF-emb) - comparing automated metrics with human evaluation methods based on nearly 4,000 annotations from a domain-specific corpus of philosophy of science publications. Our findings reveal that word intrusion and coherence metrics do not always align, particularly in specialized domains, and that TWM captures human-perceived distinctness while appearing to align with diversity metrics. We release the annotated dataset and task generation code. This work highlights the need for evaluation frameworks bridging automated and human assessments, particularly for domain-specific corpora.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种新的混合词语（TWM）人类评估任务，用于衡量主题模型的主题区分度，并与现有评估方法在专业领域语料库上进行了比较，发现TWM与人类感知到的区分度一致，并与多样性指标相关。
AI.motivation: 现有主题模型评估方法，特别是自动化指标，在专业领域可能无法很好地反映人类判断，而人类评估方法（如词语侵入）成本高且主要在通用领域验证。因此，需要一种新的、可扩展的、能捕捉主题区分度的人类评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为“主题词混合”（TWM）的新型人类评估任务，该任务通过测试标注者能否区分来自单个或混合主题的词集来评估主题间的区分度。对六种主题模型（LDA, NMF, Top2Vec, BERTopic, CFMF, CFMF-emb）在哲学科学出版物的专业领域语料库上进行了评估，比较了自动化指标（如主题连贯性、多样性）与人类评估方法（词语侵入、TWM）。收集了近4000个标注数据。
AI.result: 研究发现，词语侵入和连贯性指标在专业领域不总是与人类判断一致。TWM能够捕捉到人类感知到的主题区分度，并且似乎与多样性指标相关。自动化指标与人类评估（特别是TWM）之间存在差距。
AI.conclusion: TWM是一种有效的人类评估方法，用于衡量主题模型在专业领域的主题区分度，并能作为多样性指标的人类验证。研究强调了在专业领域语料库的评估框架中，需要结合自动化和人类评估的必要性。

title: Stroke outcome and evolution prediction from CT brain using a spatiotemporal diffusion autoencoder
comment: Accepted in The 6th International Workshop on Machine Learning in Clinical Neuroimaging (MLCN 2023)
summary: Stroke is a major cause of death and disability worldwide. Accurate outcome and evolution prediction has the potential to revolutionize stroke care by individualizing clinical decision-making leading to better outcomes. However, despite a plethora of attempts and the rich data provided by neuroimaging, modelling the ultimate fate of brain tissue remains a challenging task. In this work, we apply recent ideas in the field of diffusion probabilistic models to generate a self-supervised semantically meaningful stroke representation from Computed Tomography (CT) images. We then improve this representation by extending the method to accommodate longitudinal images and the time from stroke onset. The effectiveness of our approach is evaluated on a dataset consisting of 5,824 CT images from 3,573 patients across two medical centers with minimal labels. Comparative experiments show that our method achieves the best performance for predicting next-day severity and functional outcome at discharge.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用扩散概率模型和自监督学习，从CT图像中提取有意义的卒中特征，并结合纵向图像和发病时间信息进行改进，以更准确地预测患者的次日严重程度和出院时的功能预后。
AI.motivation: 卒中是导致死亡和残疾的主要原因，准确预测卒中结局和演变能帮助个体化临床决策，改善患者预后。然而，尽管有大量研究和丰富的神经影像数据，但对脑组织最终命运的建模仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 应用扩散概率模型和自监督学习从CT图像生成有语义意义的卒中表征，并通过扩展模型以适应纵向图像和发病时间来改进该表征。
AI.result: 在包含5,824张CT图像、3,573名患者、来自两个医疗中心的最小标签数据集上进行评估，证明该方法在预测次日严重程度和出院时功能预后方面取得了最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于扩散概率模型的自监督方法能够有效地从CT图像中提取卒中特征，并通过整合纵向信息进一步提升预测能力，有望改善卒中患者的预后评估和临床决策。

title: Stateful Cross-layer Vision Modulation
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) widely adopt multi-layer visual feature fusion to enhance visual representation. However, existing approaches typically perform static concatenation or weighted aggregation after visual encoding, without intervening in the representation formation process itself. As a result, fine-grained details from early layers may be progressively suppressed during hierarchical abstraction. Moreover, directly introducing shallow-layer features into the language model often leads to semantic distribution mismatch with the visual feature space that the LLM's cross-attention layers were pretrained on, which typically requires additional adaptation or fine-tuning of the LLM. To address these limitations, we revisit visual representation learning from the perspective of representation evolution control and propose a cross-layer memory-modulated vision framework(SCVM). Specifically, we introduce a recursively updated cross-layer memory state inside the vision encoder to model long-range inter-layer dependencies. We further design a layer-wise feedback modulation mechanism that refreshes token representations at each layer based on the accumulated memory, thereby structurally regulating the representation evolution trajectory. In addition, we incorporate an auxiliary semantic alignment objective that explicitly supervises the final memory state, encouraging progressive compression and reinforcement of task-relevant information. Experimental results on multiple visual question answering and hallucination evaluation benchmarks demonstrate that SCVM achieves consistent performance improvements without expanding visual tokens, introducing additional vision encoders, or modifying or fine-tuning the language model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 SCVM 的跨层记忆调制视觉框架，通过引入递归更新的跨层记忆状态和层级反馈调制机制，来控制视觉表征的演变，解决现有 MLLM 中视觉特征融合的局限性。SCVM 在不增加视觉 token、不引入额外视觉编码器、也不修改或微调语言模型的情况下，在 VQA 和幻觉评估基准上取得了性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 在进行视觉特征融合时，通常采用静态拼接或加权聚合，这会导致早期层的细粒度信息在层级抽象过程中逐渐丢失。同时，直接引入浅层视觉特征可能与 LLM 预训练的视觉特征空间存在语义分布不匹配问题，需要额外的 LLM 适配或微调。
AI.method: 提出 SCVM 框架，引入递归更新的跨层记忆状态来建模层间依赖，并设计层级反馈调制机制，基于累积的记忆刷新 token 表征，从而结构化地调控表征演化轨迹。此外，还引入了辅助语义对齐目标，显式监督最终的记忆状态，以逐步压缩和强化与任务相关的信息。
AI.result: 在多个视觉问答和幻觉评估基准上，SCVM 实现了持续的性能提升。实验证明，该方法在不增加视觉 token 数量、不引入额外视觉编码器、以及不修改或微调语言模型的情况下，能够有效提高 MLLM 的性能。
AI.conclusion: SCVM 框架通过控制表征演化，有效解决了现有 MLLM 在视觉特征融合中存在的细粒度信息丢失和语义分布不匹配问题，并在不增加额外开销的情况下，显著提升了模型在 VQA 和幻觉评估任务上的表现。

title: CharacterFlywheel: Scaling Iterative Improvement of Engaging and Steerable LLMs in Production
summary: This report presents CharacterFlywheel, an iterative flywheel process for improving large language models (LLMs) in production social chat applications across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger. Starting from LLaMA 3.1, we refined models across 15 generations using data from both internal and external real-user traffic. Through continuous deployments from July 2024 to April 2025, we conducted controlled 7-day A/B tests showing consistent engagement improvements: 7 of 8 newly deployed models demonstrated positive lift over the baseline, with the strongest performers achieving up to 8.8% improvement in engagement breadth and 19.4% in engagement depth. We also observed substantial gains in steerability, with instruction following increasing from 59.2% to 84.8% and instruction violations decreasing from 26.6% to 5.8%. We detail the CharacterFlywheel process which integrates data curation, reward modeling to estimate and interpolate the landscape of engagement metrics, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), and both offline and online evaluation to ensure reliable progress at each optimization step. We also discuss our methods for overfitting prevention and navigating production dynamics at scale. These contributions advance the scientific rigor and understanding of LLMs in social applications serving millions of users.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CharacterFlywheel，一个在Instagram、WhatsApp和Messenger等社交聊天应用中改进大型语言模型（LLMs）的迭代流程。通过15代模型优化，利用真实用户数据，模型在参与度、指令遵循和指令违规方面均取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 为了在生产环境的社交聊天应用中持续改进大型语言模型（LLMs）的性能，特别是在参与度和指令遵循方面。
AI.method: 采用CharacterFlywheel迭代流程，从LLaMA 3.1开始，基于真实用户数据进行15代模型的优化。该流程包括数据策选、奖励建模、监督微调（SFT）、强化学习（RL），以及离线和在线评估。同时，研究了防止过拟合和处理大规模生产环境动态的方法。
AI.result: 7项A/B测试中有8项新部署模型显示出比基线模型有积极的提升，其中表现最佳的模型在参与度广度上提升高达8.8%，在参与度深度上提升19.4%。指令遵循率从59.2%提升到84.8%，指令违规率从26.6%下降到5.8%。
AI.conclusion: CharacterFlywheel流程能够有效地在社交应用场景下，大规模地提升LLMs的参与度和可控性，为服务数百万用户的LLMs在科学严谨性和理解方面做出了贡献。

title: Act Like a Pathologist: Tissue-Aware Whole Slide Image Reasoning
summary: Computational pathology has advanced rapidly in recent years, driven by domain-specific image encoders and growing interest in using vision-language models to answer natural-language questions about diseases. Yet, the core problem behind pathology question-answering remains unsolved, considering that a gigapixel slide contains far more information than necessary for a given question. Pathologists naturally navigate tissue and morphology complexity by scanning broadly, and zooming in selectively according to the clinical questions. Current models, in contrast, rely on uniform patch sampling or broad attention maps, often attending equally to irrelevant regions while overlooking key visual evidence. In this work, we try to bring models closer to how humans actually examine slides. We propose a question-guided, tissue-aware, and coarse-to-fine retrieval framework, HistoSelect, that consists of two key components: a group sampler that identifies question-relevant tissue regions, followed by a patch selector that retrieves the most informative patches within those regions. By selecting only the most informative patches, our method becomes significantly more efficient: reducing visual token usage by 70% on average, while improving accuracy across three pathology QA tasks. Evaluated on 356,000 question-answer pairs, our approach outperforms existing methods and produces answers grounded in interpretable, pathologist-consistent regions. Our results suggest that bringing human-like search and attention patterns into WSI reasoning is a promising direction for building practical and reliable pathology VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 HistoSelect 的计算病理学框架，通过模仿病理学家在检查幻灯片时的精细化搜索和注意力模式，实现更高效、更准确的基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的病理学问答。
AI.motivation: 现有计算病理学模型在处理全数字切片图像（WSI）时存在效率低下和注意力分散的问题，无法像人类病理学家一样根据问题精确聚焦关键信息。
AI.method: 设计了一个问题引导、组织感知、粗到细的检索框架 HistoSelect，包含两个主要组件：1）组采样器，用于识别与问题相关的组织区域；2）斑块选择器，用于检索这些区域中最具信息量的斑块。
AI.result: HistoSelect 能够显著减少视觉标记的使用（平均减少 70%），同时在三个病理学问答任务上提高了准确性。在 356,000 个问答对上进行了评估，结果优于现有方法，并且能够根据可解释的、与病理学家一致的区域生成答案。
AI.conclusion: 将类似人类的搜索和注意力模式引入 WSI 推理，是构建实用可靠的病理学 VLM 的一个有前景的方向。

title: Improving Text-to-Image Generation with Intrinsic Self-Confidence Rewards
comment: 19 pages, accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page https://wookiekim.github.io/ARC/
summary: Text-to-image generation powers content creation across design, media, and data augmentation. Post-training of text-to-image generative models is a promising path to better match human preferences, factuality, and improved aesthetics. We introduce ARC (Adaptive Rewarding by self-Confidence), a post-training framework that replaces external reward supervision with an internal self-confidence signal, obtained by evaluating how accurately the model recovers injected noise under self-denoising probes. ARC converts this intrinsic signal into scalar rewards, enabling fully unsupervised optimization without additional datasets, annotators, or reward models. Empirically, by reinforcing high-confidence generations, ARC delivers consistent gains in compositional generation, text rendering and text-image alignment over the baseline. We also find that integrating ARC with external rewards results in a complementary improvement, with alleviated reward hacking.

AI.tldr: ARC是一种文本到图像生成模型的后训练框架，它使用模型自身的置信度作为奖励信号，无需外部监督，可提升生成质量，并减轻奖励攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到图像生成模型在匹配人类偏好、事实准确性和美学方面仍有改进空间，而模型后训练是一个有前景的方向。然而，传统的后训练方法通常需要外部的奖励监督，这增加了成本和复杂性。
AI.method: ARC框架通过评估模型准确恢复注入噪声的能力来获取内部的自我置信度信号。该信号被转化为标量奖励，用于无监督地优化模型，无需额外数据集、标注员或奖励模型。
AI.result: ARC框架在组合生成、文本渲染和文本-图像对齐方面均能带来持续的性能提升。此外，将ARC与外部奖励结合使用时，可以实现互补的改进，并缓解奖励攻击问题。
AI.conclusion: ARC是一种有效的无监督后训练框架，能够利用模型自身的置信度信号来提高文本到图像生成模型的性能，并且能够与外部奖励机制协同工作，进一步优化模型并解决奖励攻击问题。

title: Direct low-field MRI super-resolution using undersampled k-space
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, conference (The IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI))
summary: Low-field magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides affordable access to diagnostic imaging but suffers from prolonged acquisition and limited image quality. Accelerated imaging can be achieved with k-space undersampling, while super-resolution (SR) and image quality transfer (IQT) methods typically rely on spatial-domain post-processing. In this work, we propose a novel framework for reconstructing high-field MR like images directly from undersampled low-field k-space. Our approach employs a k-space dual channel U-Net that processes the real and imaginary components of undersampled k-space to restore missing frequency content. Experiments on low-field brain MRI demonstrate that our k-space-driven image enhancement consistently outperforms the counterpart spatial-domain method. Furthermore, reconstructions from undersampled k-space achieve image quality comparable to full k-space acquisitions. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that investigates low-field MRI SR/IQT directly from undersampled k-space.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种直接从欠采样低场 MRI k 空间重建高场 MRI 质量图像的新框架，优于传统空间域方法。
AI.motivation: 低场 MRI 成本低廉但成像速度慢、图像质量有限。需要一种方法来加速成像并提高图像质量，而无需昂贵的设备。
AI.method: 提出了一种 k 空间双通道 U-Net，直接处理欠采样低场 MRI 的 k 空间实部和虚部，以恢复缺失的频率信息，从而实现超分辨率（SR）和图像质量迁移（IQT）。
AI.result: 所提出的 k 空间驱动的图像增强方法在低场脑 MRI 数据上表现优于空间域方法。从欠采样 k 空间重建的图像质量可与全 k 空间采集相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次直接从欠采样 k 空间进行低场 MRI 超分辨率/图像质量迁移的研究，证明了该方法在提高低场 MRI 图像质量和加速成像方面的有效性。

title: PPC-MT: Parallel Point Cloud Completion with Mamba-Transformer Hybrid Architecture
summary: Existing point cloud completion methods struggle to balance high-quality reconstruction with computational efficiency. To address this, we propose PPC-MT, a novel parallel framework for point cloud completion leveraging a hybrid Mamba-Transformer architecture. Our approach introduces an innovative parallel completion strategy guided by Principal Component Analysis (PCA), which imposes a geometrically meaningful structure on unordered point clouds, transforming them into ordered sets and decomposing them into multiple subsets. These subsets are reconstructed in parallel using a multi-head reconstructor. This structured parallel synthesis paradigm significantly enhances the uniformity of point distribution and detail fidelity, while preserving computational efficiency. By integrating Mamba's linear complexity for efficient feature extraction during encoding with the Transformer's capability to model fine-grained multi-sequence relationships during decoding, PPC-MT effectively balances efficiency and reconstruction accuracy. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on benchmark datasets, including PCN, ShapeNet-55/34, and KITTI, demonstrate that PPC-MT outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple metrics, validating the efficacy of our proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为PPC-MT的并行点云补全框架，该框架结合了Mamba和Transformer的混合架构，并利用PCA进行结构化并行处理，以提高补全质量和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在点云补全时难以兼顾高质量重建和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出PPC-MT并行框架，采用混合Mamba-Transformer架构。通过PCA引导的并行补全策略，将无序点云转化为有序集合并分解为多个子集，然后使用多头重建器并行重建。Mamba用于高效特征提取，Transformer用于细粒度多序列关系建模。
AI.result: PPC-MT在点云分布均匀性和细节保真度方面表现出色，同时保持了计算效率。在PCN、ShapeNet-55/34和KITTI等数据集上的实验表明，PPC-MT在多项指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PPC-MT框架成功地平衡了点云补全的效率和重建精度，其结构化并行合成范式和混合Mamba-Transformer架构是关键技术。

title: MMR-Life: Piecing Together Real-life Scenes for Multimodal Multi-image Reasoning
summary: Recent progress in the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has empowered them to address more complex tasks such as scientific analysis and mathematical reasoning. Despite their promise, MLLMs' reasoning abilities across different scenarios in real life remain largely unexplored and lack standardized benchmarks for evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce MMR-Life, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the diverse multimodal multi-image reasoning capabilities of MLLMs across real-life scenarios. MMR-Life consists of 2,646 multiple-choice questions based on 19,108 images primarily sourced from real-world contexts, comprehensively covering seven reasoning types: abductive, analogical, causal, deductive, inductive, spatial, and temporal. Unlike existing reasoning benchmarks, MMR-Life does not rely on domain-specific expertise but instead requires models to integrate information across multiple images and apply diverse reasoning abilities. The evaluation of 37 advanced models highlights the substantial challenge posed by MMR-Life. Even top models like GPT-5 achieve only 58% accuracy and display considerable variance in performance across reasoning types. Moreover, we analyze the reasoning paradigms of existing MLLMs, exploring how factors such as thinking length, reasoning method, and reasoning type affect their performance. In summary, MMR-Life establishes a comprehensive foundation for evaluating, analyzing, and improving the next generation of multimodal reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MMR-Life，一个包含2646个多选题、19108张图像的大型多模态多图像推理基准，用于评估MLLMs在真实生活场景中的推理能力。该基准涵盖七种推理类型，不依赖领域专业知识，并分析了37个先进模型的表现，揭示了现有模型的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs的推理能力在真实生活场景中的应用尚未得到充分探索，且缺乏标准化的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含2,646个多选题和19,108张图像的MMR-Life基准，这些图像主要来自真实世界场景。该基准涵盖了七种推理类型（演绎、类比、因果、归纳、归纳、空间和时间），并要求模型整合跨越多张图像的信息。对37个先进模型进行了评估，并分析了思考长度、推理方法和推理类型对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: MMR-Life对现有MLLMs提出了重大挑战，即使是GPT-5等顶尖模型也仅达到58%的准确率，并且在不同推理类型上的表现存在显著差异。此外，研究还分析了现有MLLMs的推理模式，探讨了思考长度、推理方法和推理类型等因素对其性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: MMR-Life为评估、分析和改进下一代多模态推理系统奠定了全面的基础，并突显了当前MLLMs在真实生活多模态多图像推理方面仍有巨大的提升空间。

title: EstLLM: Enhancing Estonian Capabilities in Multilingual LLMs via Continued Pretraining and Post-Training
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are predominantly trained on English-centric data, resulting in uneven performance for smaller languages. We study whether continued pretraining (CPT) can substantially improve Estonian capabilities in a pretrained multilingual LLM while preserving its English and general reasoning performance. Using Llama 3.1 8B as the main base model, we perform CPT on a mixture that increases Estonian exposure while approximating the original training distribution through English replay and the inclusion of code, mathematics, and instruction-like data. We subsequently apply supervised fine-tuning, preference optimization, and chat vector merging to introduce robust instruction-following behavior. Evaluation on a comprehensive suite of Estonian benchmarks shows consistent gains in linguistic competence, knowledge, reasoning, translation quality, and instruction-following compared to the original base model and its instruction-tuned variant, while maintaining competitive performance on English benchmarks. These findings indicate that CPT, with an appropriately balanced data mixture, together with post-training alignment, can substantially improve single-language capabilities in pretrained multilingual LLMs.

AI.tldr: 通过继续预训练（CPT）和后续微调，可以显著提升多语言大语言模型在爱沙尼亚语上的表现，同时保持其英语和通用推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型主要基于英语数据训练，导致在爱沙尼亚语等小型语言上的表现不佳。研究旨在探索CPT是否能有效改善模型在爱沙尼亚语上的能力，并同时保留其在英语和通用推理方面的性能。
AI.method: 研究者以Llama 3.1 8B为基础模型，通过包含爱沙尼亚语、英语（用于重放）、代码、数学和指令式数据的混合数据集进行CPT。随后，应用监督微调（SFT）、偏好优化（PO）和聊天向量合并（Chat Vector Merging）技术来增强模型的指令遵循能力。
AI.result: 在爱沙尼亚语的各项基准测试中，经过CPT和后续微调的模型在语言能力、知识、推理、翻译质量和指令遵循方面均显著优于原始基础模型及其指令微调版本。同时，模型在英语基准测试上的表现也保持了竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的CPT数据混合策略，以及后续的对齐技术，可以在预训练的多语言大语言模型中大幅度提升单一语言（如爱沙尼亚语）的能力，并且不会损害其在其他语言和通用任务上的性能。

title: CoLC: Communication-Efficient Collaborative Perception with LiDAR Completion
summary: Collaborative perception empowers autonomous agents to share complementary information and overcome perception limitations. While early fusion offers more perceptual complementarity and is inherently robust to model heterogeneity, its high communication cost has limited its practical deployment, prompting most existing works to favor intermediate or late fusion. To address this, we propose a communication-efficient early Collaborative perception framework that incorporates LiDAR Completion to restore scene completeness under sparse transmission, dubbed as CoLC. Specifically, the CoLC integrates three complementary designs. First, each neighbor agent applies Foreground-Aware Point Sampling (FAPS) to selectively transmit informative points that retain essential structural and contextual cues under bandwidth constraints. The ego agent then employs Completion-Enhanced Early Fusion (CEEF) to reconstruct dense pillars from the received sparse inputs and adaptively fuse them with its own observations, thereby restoring spatial completeness. Finally, the Dense-Guided Dual Alignment (DGDA) strategy enforces semantic and geometric consistency between the enhanced and dense pillars during training, ensuring consistent and robust feature learning. Experiments on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate that CoLC achieves superior perception-communication trade-offs and remains robust under heterogeneous model settings. The code is available at https://github.com/CatOneTwo/CoLC.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通信效率高的早期协同感知框架CoLC，通过激光雷达补全来恢复稀疏传输下的场景完整性，并在模拟和真实数据集上取得了优于通信-感知权衡的性能。
AI.motivation: 早期融合在协同感知中具有优势，但通信成本高昂，限制了其应用。现有方法大多采用中间或晚期融合，但牺牲了感知互补性。因此，需要一种通信效率高的早期融合协同感知方法。
AI.method: CoLC框架包含三个主要部分：1. 前景感知点采样（FAPS）选择性传输信息点以在带宽受限下保留关键信息。2. 补全增强早期融合（CEEF）用于重建密集点以及与自身观测进行自适应融合。3. 密集引导双对齐（DGDA）策略在训练过程中强制语义和几何一致性。
AI.result: CoLC在模拟和真实世界数据集上均展现出优越的感知-通信权衡，并在模型异构设置下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CoLC是一种通信高效的早期协同感知框架，通过激光雷达补全有效解决了早期融合的通信瓶颈问题，并在各种场景下实现了鲁棒且高性能的感知。

title: Seeing Beyond 8bits: Subjective and Objective Quality Assessment of HDR-UGC Videos
summary: High Dynamic Range (HDR) user-generated (UGC) videos are rapidly proliferating across social platforms, yet most perceptual video quality assessment (VQA) systems remain tailored to Standard Dynamic Range (SDR). HDR has a higher bit depth, wide color gamut, and elevated luminance range, exposing distortions such as near-black crushing, highlight clipping, banding, and exposure flicker that amplify UGC artifacts and challenge SDR models. To catalyze progress, we curate Beyond8Bits, a large-scale subjective dataset of 44K videos from 6.5K sources with over 1.5M crowd ratings, spanning diverse scenes, capture conditions, and compression settings. We further introduce HDR-Q, the first Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for HDR-UGC VQA. We propose (i) a novel HDR-aware vision encoder to produce HDR-sensitive embeddings, and (ii) HDR-Aware Policy Optimization (HAPO), an RL finetuning framework that anchors reasoning to HDR cues. HAPO augments GRPO via an HDR-SDR contrastive KL that encourages token reliance on HDR inputs and a Gaussian weighted regression reward for fine-grained MOS calibration. Across Beyond8Bits and public HDR-VQA benchmarks, HDR-Q delivers state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为Beyond8Bits的大规模HDR用户生成视频数据集，以及一个名为HDR-Q的多模态大语言模型，用于HDR视频质量评估。HDR-Q模型通过HDR感知视觉编码器和基于强化学习的HDR感知策略优化（HAPO）框架，实现了最先进的HDR-UGC视频质量评估性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频质量评估系统多针对SDR视频，难以有效评估具有更高动态范围、更广色域和更高亮度范围的HDR用户生成视频。HDR视频中的特定失真（如近黑处细节丢失、高光溢出、色带、曝光闪烁）在SDR模型上会被放大，因此需要专门针对HDR进行研究。
AI.method:
1. 构建了Beyond8Bits数据集，包含44K个HDR用户生成视频，覆盖多样化的场景、拍摄条件和压缩设置，并收集了超过150万的用户评分。
2. 提出了HDR-Q模型，一个多模态大语言模型，用于HDR-UGC视频质量评估。
3. 设计了一个HDR感知视觉编码器，生成对HDR敏感的嵌入表示。
4. 引入了HDR感知策略优化（HAPO）框架，一个基于强化学习的微调框架，通过HDR-SDR对比KL散度鼓励模型依赖HDR输入，并使用高斯加权回归奖励进行细粒度的MOS校准。
AI.result: HDR-Q模型在Beyond8Bits数据集和公开的HDR-VQA基准测试中均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功构建了一个大规模HDR用户生成视频数据集，并提出了一个创新的多模态大语言模型HDR-Q，该模型通过HDR感知编码和强化学习优化，能够有效评估HDR视频的感知质量，并在多个基准上验证了其优越性。

title: PonderLM-3: Adaptive Token-Wise Pondering with Differentiable Masking
summary: Test-time scaling has shown that allocating more additional computation at inference can improve generation quality, motivating a natural follow-up question: where should this computation be spent? Building on this insight, we introduce PonderLM-3, a pretraining framework for token-wise adaptive pondering that learns to selectively allocate additional computation under purely self-supervised objectives, built on top of the PonderLM-2 backbone. This makes additional inference computation an allocatable per-token resource, so tokens receive more computation only when it is beneficial, rather than paying a uniform extra cost. To make this allocation learnable while maintaining train-inference consistency, PonderLM-3 injects a differentiable attention mask during pretraining and pairs it with a matching hard pruning rule at inference. PonderLM-3 defines a stronger Pareto frontier: compared with existing recursive or adaptive baselines, it achieves lower pretraining perplexity at equal inference FLOPs. On downstream benchmarks, PonderLM-3 attains comparable performance to fixed-step PonderLM-2 under the same maximum number of additional computation steps, while using fewer inference FLOPs in practice. Overall, PonderLM-3 provides an end-to-end differentiable and train-inference consistent framework for token-wise adaptive computation, enabling additional inference compute to be allocated where it is most useful rather than paid uniformly by every token.

AI.tldr: PonderLM-3 是一个预训练框架，它通过学习为每个 token 自适应地分配额外计算量来提高生成质量，同时保持了训练-推理一致性，并在推理时更有效地利用计算资源。
AI.motivation: 在推理时分配更多计算量可以提高生成质量，但问题在于应该将这部分计算量分配给哪些部分，以实现最优效果。
AI.method: PonderLM-3 在 PonderLM-2 的基础上，引入了一个可微分的注意力掩码，并在预训练阶段学习 token 级别的自适应计算分配。在推理时，使用一个匹配的硬剪枝规则来确保一致性。
AI.result: PonderLM-3 在预训练困惑度上优于现有基线模型，在相同的推理 FLOPs 下达到了更低的困惑度。在下游任务中，PonderLM-3 在相同最大计算步数下，性能与固定步数的 PonderLM-2 相当，但实际推理 FLOPs 更少。
AI.conclusion: PonderLM-3 提供了一个端到端可微分且训练-推理一致的框架，用于 token 级别的自适应计算分配，使得额外推理计算量能够被分配到最需要的地方，而不是所有 token 都支付相同的额外成本。

title: Specializing Foundation Models via Mixture of Low-Rank Experts for Comprehensive Head CT Analysis
summary: Foundation models pre-trained on large-scale datasets demonstrate strong transfer learning capabilities; however, their adaptation to complex multi-label diagnostic tasks-such as comprehensive head CT finding detection-remains understudied. Standard parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA apply uniform adaptations across pathology types, which may limit performance for diverse medical findings. We propose a Mixture of Low-Rank Experts (MoLRE) framework that extends LoRA with multiple specialized low-rank adapters and unsupervised soft routing. This approach enables conditional feature adaptation with less than 0.5% additional parameters and without explicit pathology supervision. We present a comprehensive benchmark of MoLRE across six state-of-the-art medical imaging foundation models spanning 2D and 3D architectures, general-domain, medical-domain, and head CT-specific pretraining, and model sizes ranging from 7M to 431M parameters. Using over 70,000 non-contrast head CT scans with 75 annotated findings-including hemorrhage, infarction, trauma, mass lesions, structural abnormalities, and chronic changes-our experiments demonstrate consistent performance improvements across all models. Gains vary substantially: general-purpose and medical-domain models show the largest improvements (DINOv3-Base: +4.6%; MedGemma: +4.3%), whereas 3D CT-specialized or very large models show more modest gains (+0.2-1.3%). The combination of MoLRE and MedGemma achieves the highest average detection AUC of 0.917. These findings highlight the importance of systematic benchmarking on target clinical tasks, as pretraining domain, architecture, and model scale interact in non-obvious ways.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 MoLRE 的新框架，用于改进大型基础模型在医学影像多标签诊断任务上的微调效果，特别是头部 CT 影像的病灶检测。MoLRE 通过引入多个低秩专家适配器和无监督软路由，实现了条件化特征适应，相比标准 LoRA 方法，在不增加太多参数的情况下，显著提高了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 标准的参数高效微调方法（如 LoRA）在医学影像多标签诊断任务上表现有限，因为它们对所有病理类型应用相同的调整。这种统一的适应方式可能无法充分处理多样化的医学发现，因此需要更精细化的微调策略。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 MoLRE（Mixture of Low-Rank Experts）的框架，它扩展了 LoRA，引入了多个专门的低秩适配器，并结合了无监督软路由。这种方法能够以极少的额外参数（<0.5%）实现条件化的特征适应，且无需显式的病理标签进行监督。
AI.result: 在六个不同类型（2D/3D，通用/医学/头部 CT 预训练）和大小（7M-431M 参数）的医学影像基础模型上进行了全面的基准测试。结果表明，MoLRE 在所有模型上都带来了性能提升，其中通用和医学领域预训练的模型提升最明显（DINOv3-Base: +4.6%; MedGemma: +4.3%）。MoLRE 与 MedGemma 的组合取得了最高的平均检测 AUC（0.917）。
AI.conclusion: MoLRE 框架能够有效提升基础模型在头部 CT 多标签诊断任务上的性能，尤其是在通用和医学领域预训练的模型上。研究还强调了在目标临床任务上进行系统性基准测试的重要性，因为预训练领域、模型架构和模型规模之间的相互作用是复杂且非直观的。

title: EraseAnything++: Enabling Concept Erasure in Rectified Flow Transformers Leveraging Multi-Object Optimization
summary: Removing undesired concepts from large-scale text-to-image (T2I) and text-to-video (T2V) diffusion models while preserving overall generative quality remains a major challenge, particularly as modern models such as Stable Diffusion v3, Flux, and OpenSora employ flow-matching and transformer-based architectures and extend to long-horizon video generation. Existing concept erasure methods, designed for earlier T2I/T2V models, often fail to generalize to these paradigms. To address this issue, we propose EraseAnything++, a unified framework for concept erasure in both image and video diffusion models with flow-matching objectives. Central to our approach is formulating concept erasure as a constrained multi-objective optimization problem that explicitly balances concept removal with preservation of generative utility. To solve the resulting conflicting objectives, we introduce an efficient utility-preserving unlearning strategy based on implicit gradient surgery. Furthermore, by integrating LoRA-based parameter tuning with attention-level regularization, our method anchors erasure on key visual representations and propagates it consistently across spatial and temporal dimensions. In the video setting, we further enhance consistency through an anchor-and-propagate mechanism that initializes erasure on reference frames and enforces it throughout subsequent transformer layers, thereby mitigating temporal drift. Extensive experiments on both image and video benchmarks demonstrate that EraseAnything++ substantially outperforms prior methods in erasure effectiveness, generative fidelity, and temporal consistency, establishing a new state of the art for concept erasure in next-generation diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为EraseAnything++的统一框架，用于从基于流匹配和Transformer的文本到图像/视频扩散模型中有效且一致地移除特定概念，同时保持生成质量和时序一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的概念擦除方法难以泛化到如Stable Diffusion v3、Flux和OpenSora等采用流匹配和Transformer架构的新一代文本到图像/视频扩散模型，尤其是在长视频生成方面。研究旨在解决这一问题，提升概念擦除在这些先进模型上的效果。
AI.method: 将概念擦除视为一个约束多目标优化问题，平衡概念移除和生成效用。提出了一种基于隐式梯度手术的效用保持学习策略，并通过集成LoRA参数调优和注意力正则化来增强擦除效果。对于视频，引入了锚点传播机制，在参考帧上初始化擦除，并在后续Transformer层中强制执行，以减少时间漂移。
AI.result: EraseAnything++在图像和视频基准测试中，显著优于现有方法，在擦除有效性、生成保真度和时序一致性方面均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: EraseAnything++成功地为下一代扩散模型概念擦除建立了一个新的标准，它能够有效地移除不需要的概念，同时保留模型的整体生成质量和视频的时序一致性。

title: What Exactly do Children Receive in Language Acquisition? A Case Study on CHILDES with Automated Detection of Filler-Gap Dependencies
summary: Children's acquisition of filler-gap dependencies has been argued by some to depend on innate grammatical knowledge, while others suggest that the distributional evidence available in child-directed speech suffices. Unfortunately, the relevant input is difficult to quantify at scale with fine granularity, making this question difficult to resolve. We present a system that identifies three core filler-gap constructions in spoken English corpora -- matrix wh-questions, embedded wh-questions, and relative clauses -- and further identifies the extraction site (i.e., subject vs. object vs. adjunct). Our approach combines constituency and dependency parsing, leveraging their complementary strengths for construction classification and extraction site identification. We validate the system on human-annotated data and find that it scores well across most categories. Applying the system to 57 English CHILDES corpora, we are able to characterize children's filler-gap input and their filler-gap production trajectories over the course of development, including construction-specific frequencies and extraction-site asymmetries. The resulting fine-grained labels enable future work in both acquisition and computational studies, which we demonstrate with a case study using filtered corpus training with language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种能够识别儿童语料库中三种核心填空依存关系（主句疑问句、嵌入式疑问句和关系从句）及其提取位置（主语、宾语或附加语）的系统，并应用该系统分析了儿童填空依存关系的输入和发展轨迹，为未来的语言习得和计算语言学研究提供了数据支持。
AI.motivation: 研究填空依存关系的习得是理解儿童语言能力的关键，但现有的关于输入证据是否充足的争论难以通过量化输入来解决，因此需要一个能够精细量化输入的方法。
AI.method: 该系统结合了成分句法分析和依存句法分析，用于识别三种填空依存关系及其提取位置。该系统在人类标注数据上进行了验证，并被应用于分析57个CHILDES语料库。
AI.result: 该系统在识别填空依存关系及其提取位置方面表现良好。分析结果揭示了儿童填空依存关系的输入频率和发展轨迹，以及在不同构式和提取位置上的不对称性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的系统能够有效地量化儿童填空依存关系的输入，并为研究语言习得和开发计算模型提供了基础。通过使用该系统生成的精细标注数据进行训练，可以改进语言模型。

title: SCOUT: Fast Spectral CT Imaging in Ultra LOw-data Regimes via PseUdo-label GeneraTion
summary: Noise and artifacts during computed tomography (CT) scans are a fundamental challenge affecting disease diagnosis. However, current methods either involve excessively long reconstruction times or rely on data-driven models for optimization, failing to adequately consider the valuable information inherent in the data itself, especially medical 3D data. This work proposes a reconstruction method under ultra-low raw data conditions, requiring no external data and avoiding lengthy pre-training processes. By leveraging spatial nonlocal similarity and the conjugate properties of the projection domain to generate pseudo-3D data for self-supervised training, high-fidelity results can be achieved in a very short time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this method not only mitigates detector-induced ring artifacts but also exhibits unprecedented capabilities in detail recovery. This method provides a new paradigm for research using unlabeled raw projection data. Code is available at https://github.com/yqx7150/SCOUT.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需外部数据和预训练的超低剂量CT重建方法，利用空间非局部相似性和投影域共轭特性进行自监督学习，能有效抑制伪影并恢复细节。
AI.motivation: 现有CT重建方法要么重建时间过长，要么依赖数据驱动模型，未能充分利用数据本身的内在信息，尤其是在3D医学数据方面。需要一种高效且无需外部数据的重建方法。
AI.method: 利用空间非局部相似性和投影域的共轭性质生成伪3D数据，进行自监督训练，从而在超低剂量原始数据条件下实现高保真重建。
AI.result: 该方法能够有效抑制探测器引起的环状伪影，并在细节恢复方面表现出前所未有的能力，重建时间短。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为使用未标记原始投影数据进行研究提供了一种新范式，实现了高效、高质量的CT重建。

title: Modeling Grammatical Hypothesis Testing in Young Learners: A Sequence-Based Learning Analytics Study of Morphosyntactic Reasoning in an Interactive Game
summary: This study investigates grammatical reasoning in primary school learners through a sequence-based learning analytics approach, leveraging fine-grained action sequences from an interactive game targeting morphosyntactic agreement in French. Unlike traditional assessments that rely on final answers, we treat each slider movement as a hypothesis-testing action, capturing real-time cognitive strategies during sentence construction. Analyzing 597 gameplay sessions (9,783 actions) from 100 students aged 8-11 in authentic classroom settings, we introduce Hamming distance to quantify proximity to valid grammatical solutions and examine convergence patterns across exercises with varying levels of difficulty. Results reveal that determiners and verbs are key sites of difficulty, with action sequences deviating from left-to-right usual treatment. This suggests learners often fix the verb first and adjust preceding elements. Exercises with fewer solutions exhibit slower and more erratic convergence, while changes in the closest valid solution indicate dynamic hypothesis revision. Our findings demonstrate how sequence-based analytics can uncover hidden dimensions of linguistic reasoning, offering a foundation for real-time scaffolding and teacher-facing tools in linguistically diverse classrooms.

AI.tldr: 本研究采用基于序列的学习分析方法，通过分析小学生在交互式法语语法游戏中操作序列，揭示了他们在形态句法一致性方面的语法推理过程。研究发现，学习者在处理限定词和动词时遇到困难，并且他们可能优先调整动词而非从左到右按顺序处理。解决方案较少的练习导致收敛速度较慢且不稳定。
AI.motivation: 传统的语法评估方法仅关注最终答案，无法捕捉学习者在句子构建过程中实时的认知策略。本研究旨在通过细粒度的动作序列分析，深入理解小学生在语法推理方面的真实认知过程，以支持实时脚手架和面向教师的工具开发。
AI.method: 研究者将交互式法语语法游戏中的每次滑块移动视为一种假设检验行为。他们分析了597个游戏会话（9783个动作）的数据，使用了597个8-11岁的小学生数据。研究引入了汉明距离来量化学生动作序列与有效语法解决方案的接近程度，并考察了不同难度练习下的收敛模式。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，限定词和动词是学生学习中的难点，他们的动作序列不遵循传统的从左到右的处理顺序，而是倾向于先固定动词，再调整前面的元素。那些有效解决方案较少的练习，其收敛速度更慢，且模式更混乱。当最接近的有效解决方案发生变化时，也表明学习者在动态地修正假设。
AI.conclusion: 基于序列的学习分析方法能够揭示语言推理中隐藏的维度。本研究的发现为在语言多样化的课堂环境中提供实时支持和开发面向教师的工具奠定了基础。

title: Content-Aware Frequency Encoding for Implicit Neural Representations with Fourier-Chebyshev Features
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for various signal processing tasks, but their inherent spectral bias limits the ability to capture high-frequency details. Existing methods partially mitigate this issue by using Fourier-based features, which usually rely on fixed frequency bases. This forces multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) to inefficiently compose the required frequencies, thereby constraining their representational capacity. To address this limitation, we propose Content-Aware Frequency Encoding (CAFE), which builds upon Fourier features through multiple parallel linear layers combined via a Hadamard product. CAFE can explicitly and efficiently synthesize a broader range of frequency bases, while the learned weights enable the selection of task-relevant frequencies. Furthermore, we extend this framework to CAFE+, which incorporates Chebyshev features as a complementary component to Fourier bases. This combination provides a stronger and more stable frequency representation. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks validate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach, consistently achieving superior performance over existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/JunboKe0619/CAFE.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CAFE的内容感知频率编码方法，通过并行线性层和Hadamard积来增强INRs捕捉高频细节的能力，并在此基础上提出了CAFE+，结合了切比雪夫特征，以提供更稳定和强大的频率表示。
AI.motivation: 现有的隐式神经表示（INRs）在捕捉高频细节方面存在光谱偏见限制。现有的傅里叶特征方法依赖于固定的频率基，导致多层感知机（MLP）效率低下，限制了表示能力。
AI.method: 提出CAFE方法，通过多个并行线性层结合Hadamard积来构建傅里叶特征，能够显式且高效地合成更广泛的频率基，并通过学习到的权重选择任务相关的频率。进一步提出CAFE+，将切比雪夫特征作为傅里叶基的补充。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中的广泛实验证明了CAFE及其变体的有效性和效率，取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: CAFE及其增强版本CAFE+能够有效克服INRs的光谱偏见问题，显著提高其捕捉高频细节的能力，并在各项任务中取得SOTA性能。

title: STMI: Segmentation-Guided Token Modulation with Cross-Modal Hypergraph Interaction for Multi-Modal Object Re-Identification
summary: Multi-modal object Re-Identification (ReID) aims to exploit complementary information from different modalities to retrieve specific objects. However, existing methods often rely on hard token filtering or simple fusion strategies, which can lead to the loss of discriminative cues and increased background interference. To address these challenges, we propose STMI, a novel multi-modal learning framework consisting of three key components: (1) Segmentation-Guided Feature Modulation (SFM) module leverages SAM-generated masks to enhance foreground representations and suppress background noise through learnable attention modulation; (2) Semantic Token Reallocation (STR) module employs learnable query tokens and an adaptive reallocation mechanism to extract compact and informative representations without discarding any tokens; (3) Cross-Modal Hypergraph Interaction (CHI) module constructs a unified hypergraph across modalities to capture high-order semantic relationships. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks (i.e., RGBNT201, RGBNT100, and MSVR310) demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed STMI framework in multi-modal ReID scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为STMI的多模态学习框架，用于解决多模态对象重识别（ReID）中的信息丢失和背景干扰问题，通过分割引导特征调制、语义令牌重新分配和跨模态超图交互来增强前景表示并捕捉高阶语义关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态ReID中存在硬性令牌过滤或简单融合策略导致判别性线索丢失和背景干扰增加的问题。
AI.method: STMI框架包含三个主要组件：1. 分割引导特征调制（SFM）模块，利用SAM生成的掩码增强前景表示并抑制背景噪声。2. 语义令牌重新分配（STR）模块，使用可学习的查询令牌和自适应重新分配机制提取紧凑且信息丰富的表示。3. 跨模态超图交互（CHI）模块，构建跨模态的统一超图以捕捉高阶语义关系。
AI.result: 在RGBNT201、RGBNT100和MSVR310等公开基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，证明了STMI框架在多模态ReID场景下的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: STMI框架通过SFM、STR和CHI三个模块，有效解决了多模态ReID中的挑战，并在公开数据集上取得了优越的性能。

title: Reparameterized Tensor Ring Functional Decomposition for Multi-Dimensional Data Recovery
comment: 22 pages, 18 figures, 12 tables. Accepted by CVPR 2026
summary: Tensor Ring (TR) decomposition is a powerful tool for high-order data modeling, but is inherently restricted to discrete forms defined on fixed meshgrids. In this work, we propose a TR functional decomposition for both meshgrid and non-meshgrid data, where factors are parameterized by Implicit Neural Representations (INRs). However, optimizing this continuous framework to capture fine-scale details is intrinsically difficult. Through a frequency-domain analysis, we demonstrate that the spectral structure of TR factors determines the frequency composition of the reconstructed tensor and limits the high-frequency modeling capacity. To mitigate this, we propose a reparameterized TR functional decomposition, in which each TR factor is a structured combination of a learnable latent tensor and a fixed basis. This reparameterization is theoretically shown to improve the training dynamics of TR factor learning. We further derive a principled initialization scheme for the fixed basis and prove the Lipschitz continuity of our proposed model. Extensive experiments on image inpainting, denoising, super-resolution, and point cloud recovery demonstrate that our method achieves consistently superior performance over existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/YangyangXu2002/RepTRFD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式神经网络（INR）的张量环（TR）函数分解方法，用于处理网格和非网格数据，并引入重参数化和初始化策略以提高模型对高频细节的建模能力，在图像修复、去噪、超分辨率和点云恢复等任务上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的张量环（TR）分解方法主要适用于离散形式且定义在固定网格上的数据，限制了其应用范围。为了克服这一限制，研究者希望开发一种能够处理连续和非网格数据的TR分解方法，并解决优化连续TR分解模型以捕捉精细细节的困难。
AI.method: 1. 提出TR函数分解（TRFD），将TR因子参数化为隐式神经网络（INR）。 2. 通过频率域分析，揭示了TR因子频谱结构对重构张量频率成分和高频建模能力的影响。 3. 提出重参数化的TR函数分解，将TR因子表示为可学习的潜在张量与固定基的结构化组合，以改善训练动态。 4. 导出固定基的初始化方案，并证明了模型的Lipschitz连续性。
AI.result: 在图像修复、去噪、超分辨率和点云恢复等任务上，所提出的重参数化TR函数分解方法取得了持续优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: TR函数分解，特别是经过重参数化和带有 principled 初始化方案的版本，能够有效地扩展TR分解的应用范围至连续和非网格数据，并显著提升对高频细节的建模能力，在多项下游任务中展现出优越的性能。

title: Recursive Think-Answer Process for LLMs and VLMs
summary: Think-Answer reasoners such as DeepSeek-R1 have made notable progress by leveraging interpretable internal reasoning. However, despite the frequent presence of self-reflective cues like "Oops!", they remain vulnerable to output errors during single-pass inference. To address this limitation, we propose an efficient Recursive Think-Answer Process (R-TAP) that enables models to engage in iterative reasoning cycles and generate more accurate answers, going beyond conventional single-pass approaches. Central to this approach is a confidence generator that evaluates the certainty of model responses and guides subsequent improvements. By incorporating two complementary rewards-Recursively Confidence Increase Reward and Final Answer Confidence Reward-we show that R-TAP-enhanced models consistently outperform conventional single-pass methods for both large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). Moreover, by analyzing the frequency of "Oops"-like expressions in model responses, we find that R-TAP-applied models exhibit significantly fewer self-reflective patterns, resulting in more stable and faster inference-time reasoning. We hope R-TAP pave the way evolving into efficient and elaborated methods to refine the reasoning processes of future AI.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为R-TAP（Recursive Think-Answer Process）的迭代推理方法，通过引入置信度评估来提高大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的推理准确性，并减少不必要的自我反思。
AI.motivation: 现有的Think-Answer推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1）虽然能进行内部推理，但在单次推理时仍易出错，并且即使有“Oops”等自我反思提示，也未能完全避免错误。这促使研究者寻求一种更有效的、能克服单次推理局限性的方法。
AI.method: R-TAP方法的核心是引入一个置信度生成器，用于评估模型响应的确定性，并指导后续的迭代改进。该方法通过两个奖励机制——递归置信度增加奖励和最终答案置信度奖励——来训练模型进行迭代推理，从而提升答案的准确性。
AI.result: R-TAP增强的模型在大型语言模型和视觉语言模型上都显著优于传统的单次推理方法。此外，R-TAP模型在推理过程中表现出更少的“Oops”等自我反思模式，推理过程更稳定、更快速。
AI.conclusion: R-TAP是一种有效的迭代推理机制，能够通过置信度引导来提高AI模型的推理能力和稳定性，并减少不必要的中间反思，为未来AI推理方法的演进提供了新的方向。

title: ClinConsensus: A Consensus-Based Benchmark for Evaluating Chinese Medical LLMs across Difficulty Levels
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to health management, showing promise across disease prevention, clinical decision-making, and long-term care. However, existing medical benchmarks remain largely static and task-isolated, failing to capture the openness, longitudinal structure, and safety-critical complexity of real-world clinical workflows. We introduce ClinConsensus, a Chinese medical benchmark curated, validated, and quality-controlled by clinical experts. ClinConsensus comprises 2500 open-ended cases spanning the full continuum of care--from prevention and intervention to long-term follow-up--covering 36 medical specialties, 12 common clinical task types, and progressively increasing levels of complexity. To enable reliable evaluation of such complex scenarios, we adopt a rubric-based grading protocol and propose the Clinically Applicable Consistency Score (CACS@k). We further introduce a dual-judge evaluation framework, combining a high-capability LLM-as-judge with a distilled, locally deployable judge model trained via supervised fine-tuning, enabling scalable and reproducible evaluation aligned with physician judgment. Using ClinConsensus, we conduct a comprehensive assessment of several leading LLMs and reveal substantial heterogeneity across task themes, care stages, and medical specialties. While top-performing models achieve comparable overall scores, they differ markedly in reasoning, evidence use, and longitudinal follow-up capabilities, and clinically actionable treatment planning remains a key bottleneck. We release ClinConsensus as an extensible benchmark to support the development and evaluation of medical LLMs that are robust, clinically grounded, and ready for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一个名为ClinConsensus的中文医疗领域大规模语言模型（LLM）的基准测试集，旨在解决现有医疗基准测试的局限性，并提出了一种新的评估指标CACS@k以及一个双裁判评估框架，以更全面地评估LLM在真实临床场景中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗基准测试在处理真实世界临床工作流程的开放性、纵向结构和安全关键复杂性方面存在不足，无法充分评估LLM在医疗健康领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含2500个开放式病例的中文医疗基准测试集ClinConsensus，涵盖36个医学专科和12种临床任务类型，并根据复杂程度分级。采用基于评分标准（rubric-based grading）的评估协议，并提出Clinically Applicable Consistency Score (CACS@k) 指标。建立了一个由高能力LLM和蒸馏后的本地模型组成的双裁判评估框架，以实现可扩展且符合医生判断的评估。
AI.result: 通过ClinConsensus基准测试，评估了多个领先LLM的表现，发现LLM在不同任务主题、护理阶段和医学专科的表现存在显著差异。尽管顶尖模型在总体得分上表现相似，但在推理、证据使用和长期随访能力方面存在明显差距，并且临床可行的治疗方案规划仍然是一个关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: ClinConsensus是一个可扩展的中文医疗LLM基准测试集，能够促进开发和评估更稳健、更符合临床实际且准备好在真实世界部署的医疗LLM。研究揭示了当前医疗LLM在复杂临床任务中的局限性，为未来的研究和开发指明了方向。

title: TokenSplat: Token-aligned 3D Gaussian Splatting for Feed-forward Pose-free Reconstruction
summary: We present TokenSplat, a feed-forward framework for joint 3D Gaussian reconstruction and camera pose estimation from unposed multi-view images. At its core, TokenSplat introduces a Token-aligned Gaussian Prediction module that aligns semantically corresponding information across views directly in the feature space. Guided by coarse token positions and fusion confidence, it aggregates multi-scale contextual features to enable long-range cross-view reasoning and reduce redundancy from overlapping Gaussians. To further enhance pose robustness and disentangle viewpoint cues from scene semantics, TokenSplat employs learnable camera tokens and an Asymmetric Dual-Flow Decoder (ADF-Decoder) that enforces directionally constrained communication between camera and image tokens. This maintains clean factorization within a feed-forward architecture, enabling coherent reconstruction and stable pose estimation without iterative refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TokenSplat achieves higher reconstruction fidelity and novel-view synthesis quality in pose-free settings, and significantly improves pose estimation accuracy compared to prior pose-free methods. Project page: https://kidleyh.github.io/tokensplat/.

AI.tldr: TokenSplat是一个用于从无图多视图图像进行联合3D高斯重建和相机姿态估计的无迭代反馈框架，通过Token对齐的高斯预测和不对称双流解码器实现了高重建保真度和姿态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理无图多视图图像时，难以同时实现高质量的3D重建和准确的相机姿态估计，尤其是在没有明确姿态信息的情况下，这阻碍了其在实际应用中的部署。
AI.method: TokenSplat采用Token对齐的高斯预测模块，将跨视图的语义信息在特征空间对齐，并利用粗略的Token位置和融合置信度聚合多尺度上下文特征，实现长距离跨视图推理。此外，它引入了可学习的相机Token和不对称双流解码器（ADF-Decoder），解耦了视角线索与场景语义，并维持了前馈架构中的解耦。
AI.result: TokenSplat在无图设置下，实现了比现有方法更高的重建保真度和新视角合成质量，并在姿态估计方面取得了显著的准确性提升。
AI.conclusion: TokenSplat提供了一种高效且无需迭代优化的一体化解决方案，能够从无图多视图图像中同时进行鲁棒的3D高斯重建和精确的相机姿态估计，展现了其在3D感知领域的潜力。

title: From Intuition to Investigation: A Tool-Augmented Reasoning MLLM Framework for Generalizable Face Anti-Spoofing
summary: Face recognition remains vulnerable to presentation attacks, calling for robust Face Anti-Spoofing (FAS) solutions. Recent MLLM-based FAS methods reformulate the binary classification task as the generation of brief textual descriptions to improve cross-domain generalization. However, their generalizability is still limited, as such descriptions mainly capture intuitive semantic cues (e.g., mask contours) while struggling to perceive fine-grained visual patterns. To address this limitation, we incorporate external visual tools into MLLMs to encourage deeper investigation of subtle spoof clues. Specifically, we propose the Tool-Augmented Reasoning FAS (TAR-FAS) framework, which reformulates the FAS task as a Chain-of-Thought with Visual Tools (CoT-VT) paradigm, allowing MLLMs to begin with intuitive observations and adaptively invoke external visual tools for fine-grained investigation. To this end, we design a tool-augmented data annotation pipeline and construct the ToolFAS-16K dataset, which contains multi-turn tool-use reasoning trajectories. Furthermore, we introduce a tool-aware FAS training pipeline, where Diverse-Tool Group Relative Policy Optimization (DT-GRPO) enables the model to autonomously learn efficient tool use. Extensive experiments under a challenging one-to-eleven cross-domain protocol demonstrate that TAR-FAS achieves SOTA performance while providing fine-grained visual investigation for trustworthy spoof detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 TAR-FAS 的新框架，通过结合多模态大语言模型（MLLM）和外部视觉工具，以“带视觉工具的思维链”（CoT-VT）范式来增强人脸反欺骗（FAS）能力。该框架通过新数据集 ToolFAS-16K 和 DT-GRPO 训练策略，能更深入地探查细微的伪造线索，并在跨域测试中取得最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 MLLM 的人脸反欺骗方法虽然能生成文本描述，但仅限于捕捉直观的语义线索，难以识别精细的伪造模式，导致泛化能力受限。因此，需要引入外部视觉工具来增强 MLLM 对细微伪造线索的感知能力。
AI.method: 提出 TAR-FAS 框架，将 FAS 任务重构为“带视觉工具的思维链”（CoT-VT）范式。该框架允许 MLLM 从直观观察开始，并自适应地调用外部视觉工具进行精细化调查。为此，设计了一个工具增强的数据标注流程，构建了包含多轮工具使用推理轨迹的 ToolFAS-16K 数据集。此外，引入了工具感知 FAS 训练流程，通过 DT-GRPO 策略让模型自主学习高效的工具使用。
AI.result: 在极具挑战性的“一对十一”跨域协议下进行的广泛实验表明，TAR-FAS 取得了最先进（SOTA）的性能。该框架能够提供细粒度的视觉调查，从而实现更值得信赖的伪造检测。
AI.conclusion: TAR-FAS 框架通过引入外部视觉工具，有效弥补了现有 MLLM-FAS 方法在感知精细伪造线索方面的不足，显著提升了跨域泛化能力和检测性能，为构建更鲁棒的人脸反欺骗系统提供了新的思路。

title: Towards Universal Khmer Text Recognition
summary: Khmer is a low-resource language characterized by a complex script, presenting significant challenges for optical character recognition (OCR). While document printed text recognition has advanced because of available datasets, performance on other modalities, such as handwritten and scene text, remains limited by data scarcity. Training modality-specific models for each modality does not allow cross-modality transfer learning, from which modalities with limited data could otherwise benefit. Moreover, deploying many modality-specific models results in significant memory overhead and requires error-prone routing each input image to the appropriate model. On the other hand, simply training on a combined dataset with a non-uniform data distribution across different modalities often leads to degraded performance on underrepresented modalities. To address these, we propose a universal Khmer text recognition (UKTR) framework capable of handling diverse text modalities. Central to our method is a novel modality-aware adaptive feature selection (MAFS) technique designed to adapt visual features according to a particular input image modality and enhance recognition robustness across modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance. Furthermore, we introduce the first comprehensive benchmark for universal Khmer text recognition, which we release to the community to facilitate future research. Our datasets and models can be accessible via this gated repository\footnote{in review}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UKTR的通用高棉文本识别框架，通过引入一种新的模态感知自适应特征选择（MAFS）技术，提高了跨模态文本识别的鲁棒性，并解决了数据稀疏性问题。作者还发布了首个高棉通用文本识别基准，以促进该领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有的高棉文字识别方法在处理手写体和场景文本时因数据稀缺而表现不佳，并且为不同模态训练独立的模型效率低下，不利于跨模态迁移学习。直接合并不同模态的数据集会导致代表性不足的模态性能下降。
AI.method: 提出了一种通用的高棉文本识别（UKTR）框架，核心是模态感知自适应特征选择（MAFS）技术。MAFS能够根据输入图像的模态调整视觉特征，从而增强跨模态的识别鲁棒性。
AI.result: UKTR框架在实验中取得了最先进（SoTA）的性能，有效处理了多种文本模态。作者还构建了首个全面评估高棉通用文本识别能力的基准。
AI.conclusion: UKTR框架及其MAFS技术能够有效地处理不同类型的高棉文本，克服了数据稀缺和模态异构的挑战，并在识别准确性上达到了新的水平。新发布的基准将有助于推动高棉语文本识别领域的研究。

title: LLMs as Strategic Actors: Behavioral Alignment, Risk Calibration, and Argumentation Framing in Geopolitical Simulations
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as agents in strategic decision environments, yet their behavior in structured geopolitical simulations remains under-researched. We evaluate six popular state-of-the-art LLMs alongside results from human results across four real-world crisis simulation scenarios, requiring models to select predefined actions and justify their decisions across multiple rounds. We compare models to humans in action alignment, risk calibration through chosen actions' severity, and argumentative framing grounded in international relations theory. Results show that models approximate human decision patterns in base simulation rounds but diverge over time, displaying distinct behavioural profiles and strategy updates. LLM explanations for chosen actions across all models exhibit a strong normative-cooperative framing centered on stability, coordination, and risk mitigation, with limited adversarial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了六种大型语言模型（LLM）在模拟地缘政治危机中的表现，并与人类决策者进行了比较。结果表明，LLM在初始阶段能模拟人类行为，但长期来看会产生差异，且其决策理由主要侧重于合作和风险规避，缺乏对抗性推理。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对大型语言模型在结构化地缘政治模拟中的行为关注不足，促使本研究进行评估。
AI.method: 通过四种真实世界危机模拟场景，让六种最先进的大型语言模型和人类决策者选择预定义行动并进行多轮决策及解释。研究从行动一致性、风险校准和基于国际关系理论的论证框架三个维度进行比较。
AI.result: 大型语言模型在模拟的初始回合能够逼近人类的决策模式，但随着时间推移会产生分歧，展现出不同的行为特征和策略更新。所有模型在解释其决策时，都表现出强烈的规范性合作倾向，侧重于稳定、协调和风险缓解，而对抗性推理能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型可以作为地缘政治模拟中的代理，但其行为模式会随时间演变，并倾向于合作和风险规避的解释框架，这与人类决策者的复杂性有所不同。

title: MM-DeepResearch: A Simple and Effective Multimodal Agentic Search Baseline
summary: We aim to develop a multimodal research agent capable of explicit reasoning and planning, multi-tool invocation, and cross-modal information synthesis, enabling it to conduct deep research tasks. However, we observe three main challenges in developing such agents: (1) scarcity of search-intensive multimodal QA data, (2) lack of effective search trajectories, and (3) prohibitive cost of training with online search APIs. To tackle them, we first propose Hyper-Search, a hypergraph-based QA generation method that models and connects visual and textual nodes within and across modalities, enabling to generate search-intensive multimodal QA pairs that require invoking various search tools to solve. Second, we introduce DR-TTS, which first decomposes search-involved tasks into several categories according to search tool types, and respectively optimize specialized search tool experts for each tool. It then recomposes tool experts to jointly explore search trajectories via tree search, producing trajectories that successfully solve complex tasks using various search tools. Third, we build an offline search engine supporting multiple search tools, enabling agentic reinforcement learning without using costly online search APIs. With the three designs, we develop MM-DeepResearch, a powerful multimodal deep research agent, and extensive results shows its superiority across benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/HJYao00/MM-DeepResearch

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为MM-DeepResearch的多模态研究代理，它能够进行显式推理、规划、多工具调用和跨模态信息合成，以完成深度研究任务。该代理通过Hyper-Search生成多模态问答对、DR-TTS优化搜索轨迹，并利用离线搜索引擎进行训练，有效解决了数据稀缺、搜索轨迹设计困难和训练成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 研究人员希望开发一个能够执行复杂深度研究任务的多模态研究代理，但面临多模态搜索密集型问答数据稀缺、有效搜索轨迹缺乏以及在线搜索API训练成本高昂的挑战。
AI.method: 该研究提出了三种方法：1. Hyper-Search：一种基于超图的问答生成方法，用于生成需要调用多个搜索工具的多模态问答对。2. DR-TTS：将搜索任务分解为不同类别，并优化专门的搜索工具专家，通过树搜索重新组合专家来探索搜索轨迹。3. 离线搜索引擎：支持多工具搜索，允许在不使用昂贵在线API的情况下进行代理强化学习。
AI.result: 通过上述设计，研究人员开发了MM-DeepResearch，并在多个基准测试中取得了优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: MM-DeepResearch是一个强大的多模态深度研究代理，其提出的Hyper-Search、DR-TTS以及离线搜索引擎有效解决了开发此类代理面临的关键挑战，并在实验中证明了其有效性和优越性。

title: A Reconstruction System for Industrial Pipeline Inner Walls Using Panoramic Image Stitching with Endoscopic Imaging
summary: Visual analysis and reconstruction of pipeline inner walls remain challenging in industrial inspection scenarios. This paper presents a dedicated reconstruction system for pipeline inner walls via industrial endoscopes, which is built on panoramic image stitching technology. Equipped with a custom graphical user interface (GUI), the system extracts key frames from endoscope video footage, and integrates polar coordinate transformation with image stitching techniques to unwrap annular video frames of pipeline inner walls into planar panoramic images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method enables efficient processing of industrial endoscope videos, and the generated panoramic stitched images preserve all detailed features of pipeline inner walls in their entirety. This provides intuitive and accurate visual support for defect detection and condition assessment of pipeline inner walls. In comparison with the traditional frame-by-frame video review method, the proposed approach significantly elevates the efficiency of pipeline inner wall reconstruction and exhibits considerable engineering application value.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全景图像拼接技术的管道内壁三维重建系统，该系统能够将内窥镜视频解开成平面全景图，以提高缺陷检测和状态评估的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 工业场景下管道内壁的视觉分析和重建存在挑战，传统逐帧视频审查方法效率低下，需要更直观准确的可视化支持。
AI.method: 该系统利用工业内窥镜，通过提取关键帧，结合极坐标变换和图像拼接技术，将管道内壁的环形视频帧展开成平面全景图像，并配备自定义图形用户界面（GUI）。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够高效处理工业内窥镜视频，生成保留所有细节特征的管道内壁全景图像，相比传统方法，显著提高了管道内壁重建的效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于全景图像拼接的管道内壁重建系统，为管道内壁的缺陷检测和状态评估提供了直观准确的视觉支持，具有 considerable engineering application value。

title: LongRLVR: Long-Context Reinforcement Learning Requires Verifiable Context Rewards
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) by optimizing them against factual outcomes. However, this paradigm falters in long-context scenarios, as its reliance on internal parametric knowledge is ill-suited for tasks requiring contextual grounding--the ability to find and reason over externally provided information. We identify a key reason for this failure: a reward based solely on the final answer is too sparse to effectively guide the model for identifying relevant evidence. We formally prove that the outcome-only reward leads to significant vanishing gradients for the context grounding process, rendering learning intractable. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce LongRLVR to augment the sparse answer reward with a dense and verifiable context reward. This auxiliary signal directly incentivizes the model for selecting the correct grounding information, providing a robust learning gradient that solves the underlying optimization challenge. We validate our method on challenging long-context benchmarks using Qwen and LLaMA models. LongRLVR consistently and significantly outperforms the standard RLVR across all models and benchmarks, e.g., boosting a 14B model's scores on RULER-QA from 73.17 to 88.90 and on LongBench v2 from 39.8 to 46.5. Our work demonstrates that explicitly rewarding the grounding process is a critical and effective strategy for unlocking the full reasoning potential of LLMs in long-context applications. Our code is available at https://github.com/real-absolute-AI/LongRLVR.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为 LongRLVR 的新方法，通过引入一个可验证的上下文奖励来解决强化学习与可验证奖励 (RLVR) 在长上下文场景下的局限性，从而提高大型语言模型 (LLM) 在需要外部信息推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的 RLVR 方法在长上下文场景下表现不佳，因为其对内部参数知识的依赖不适合需要从外部信息进行上下文推理的任务。研究发现，仅基于最终答案的稀疏奖励无法有效指导模型识别相关证据，导致学习过程中出现梯度消失问题。
AI.method: LongRLVR 通过在稀疏的答案奖励的基础上，增加一个密集且可验证的上下文奖励。这个辅助信号直接激励模型选择正确的上下文信息，从而提供了一个强大的学习梯度，解决了优化挑战。
AI.result: 在 Qwen 和 LLaMA 模型上，LongRLVR 在具有挑战性的长上下文基准测试中一致且显著地优于标准的 RLVR。例如，在 RULER-QA 上，14B 模型的分数从 73.17 提升到 88.90；在 LongBench v2 上，分数从 39.8 提升到 46.5。
AI.conclusion: 显式地奖励上下文推理过程是释放 LLM 在长上下文应用中全部推理潜力的关键且有效策略。

title: Unified Vision-Language Modeling via Concept Space Alignment
summary:
We introduce V-SONAR, a vision-language embedding space extended from the text-only embedding space SONAR (Omnilingual Embeddings Team et al., 2026), which supports 1500 text languages and 177 speech languages. To construct V-SONAR, we propose a post-hoc alignment pipeline that maps the representations of an existing vision encoder into the SONAR space. We thoroughly evaluate V-SONAR and show that its embeddings achieve competitive performance on text-to-video retrieval. Equipped with the OMNISONAR text decoder, V-SONAR further surpasses state-of-the-art vision-language models on video captioning tasks, including DREAM-1K (BLEU 23.9 vs. 19.6) and PE-VIDEO (BLEU 39.0 vs. 30.0).
  Leveraging V-SONAR, we first demonstrate that the Large Concept Model (LCM; LCM team et al. 2024) operating in SONAR and trained with English text only, can perform both single- and multi-visual concept understanding in a zero-shot manner. Finally, we introduce V-LCM, which extends the LCM with vision-language instruction tuning. V-LCM encodes vision and language inputs into an unified sequence of latent embeddings via V-SONAR and SONAR, and it is trained with the same latent diffusion objective for next-embedding prediction as in LCM's text-only pre-training. Experiments on a large-scale multilingual and -modal instruction-tuning data mixture highlight the potential of V-LCM: V-LCM matches state-of-the-art vision-language models on tasks covering image/video captioning and question answering, while significantly outperforming them across 61 rich- to low-resource languages out of all 62 tested languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了V-SONAR，一个从文本扩展到视觉-语言的嵌入空间，并在此基础上构建了V-LCM，一个在多模态和多语言指令调整任务上表现优异的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在跨语言的视觉理解和生成任务上存在局限，作者希望扩展现有的多语言文本嵌入空间SONAR，使其支持视觉模态，并在此基础上构建一个在多语言、多模态指令调整任务上表现优异的模型。
AI.method:
1. 提出后处理对齐管道，将现有视觉编码器的表示映射到SONAR空间，构建V-SONAR。
2. 结合OMNISONAR文本解码器，评估V-SONAR在文本到视频检索和视频字幕生成任务上的性能。
3. 利用V-SONAR，展示了仅使用英文文本训练的Large Concept Model (LCM) 能够零样本执行单视觉概念和多视觉概念理解。
4. 引入V-LCM，通过视觉-语言指令调整来扩展LCM，将视觉和语言输入编码到统一的潜在嵌入序列，并使用与LCM相同的潜在扩散目标进行训练。
AI.result: V-SONAR在文本到视频检索上表现具有竞争力。结合OMNISONAR，V-SONAR在视频字幕生成任务上超越了现有SOTA模型（DREAM-1K上的BLEU 23.9 vs 19.6，PE-VIDEO上的BLEU 39.0 vs 30.0）。V-LCM在覆盖图像/视频字幕和问答任务的SOTA视觉-语言模型上表现相当，并在62种测试语言中的61种（涵盖丰富到低资源语言）上显著优于它们。
AI.conclusion: V-SONAR成功地将现有的多语言文本嵌入空间扩展到了视觉领域，并在多项下游任务上取得了优异的性能。在此基础上开发的V-LCM在多语言、多模态指令调整任务上展现出强大的潜力，能够处理从丰富到低资源的各种语言，为跨语言、跨模态的AI应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: Towards Khmer Scene Document Layout Detection
summary: While document layout analysis for Latin scripts has advanced significantly, driven by the advent of large multimodal models (LMMs), progress for the Khmer language remains constrained because of the scarcity of annotated training data. This gap is particularly acute for scene documents, where perspective distortions and complex backgrounds challenge traditional methods. Given the structural complexities of Khmer script, such as diacritics and multi-layer character stacking, existing Latin-based layout analysis models fail to accurately delineate semantic layout units, particularly for dense text regions (e.g., list items). In this paper, we present the first comprehensive study on Khmer scene document layout detection. We contribute a novel framework comprising three key elements: (1) a robust training and benchmarking dataset specifically for Khmer scene layouts; (2) an open-source document augmentation tool capable of synthesizing realistic scene documents to scale training data; and (3) layout detection baselines utilizing YOLO-based architectures with oriented bounding boxes (OBB) to handle geometric distortions. To foster further research in the Khmer document analysis and recognition (DAR) community, we release our models, code, and datasets in this gated repository (in review).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了首个针对高棉语场景文档的版式检测研究，通过构建新颖的数据集、开发数据增强工具和使用基于 YOLO 的模型来克服数据稀缺和高棉语特有的版式复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有针对拉丁字母的文档版式分析技术虽然成熟，但高棉语由于缺乏标注数据而进展缓慢，尤其是在处理具有透视畸变和复杂背景的场景文档时，基于拉丁语的模型在高棉语的版式结构（如附加符号和多层字符堆叠）下表现不佳。
AI.method: 论文提出一个包含三个关键部分的新框架：1. 构建一个高棉语场景版式检测和基准测试数据集；2. 开发一个开源文档增强工具，用于合成逼真的场景文档以扩大训练数据；3. 使用基于 YOLO 架构并结合定向边界框（OBB）的模型来检测版式，以处理几何畸变。
AI.result: 成功构建了高棉语场景文档版式检测的数据集和数据增强工具，并提出了基于 YOLO-OBB 的版式检测基线模型，证明了其在高棉语场景文档版式检测方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了高棉语场景文档版式检测的空白，通过提供新数据集、增强工具和基线模型，为高棉文档分析与识别（DAR）社区的研究奠定了基础，并计划开源相关资源以促进社区发展。

title: Zero- and Few-Shot Named-Entity Recognition: Case Study and Dataset in the Crime Domain (CrimeNER)
comment: Sent for review at the main conference of the International Conference of Document Analysis and Recognition (ICDAR) 2026
summary: The extraction of critical information from crime-related documents is a crucial task for law enforcement agencies. Named-Entity Recognition (NER) can perform this task in extracting information about the crime, the criminal, or law enforcement agencies involved. However, there is a considerable lack of adequately annotated data on general real-world crime scenarios. To address this issue, we present CrimeNER, a case-study of Crime-related zero- and Few-Shot NER, and a general Crime-related Named-Entity Recognition database (CrimeNERdb) consisting of more than 1.5k annotated documents for the NER task extracted from public reports on terrorist attacks and the U.S. Department of Justice's press notes. We define 5 types of coarse crime entity and a total of 22 types of fine-grained entity. We address the quality of the case-study and the annotated data with experiments on Zero and Few-Shot settings with State-of-the-Art NER models as well as generalist and commonly used Large Language Models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为CrimeNER的案例研究，专注于犯罪相关文本的零样本和少样本命名实体识别（NER），并发布了一个包含1.5k多个标注文档的CrimeNERdb数据库。该数据库包含5种粗粒度实体和22种细粒度实体，旨在解决犯罪领域缺乏标注数据的问题。研究通过在零样本和少样本设置下，使用最先进的NER模型以及通用和常用的大型语言模型进行实验，评估了模型的性能和数据的质量。
AI.motivation: 执法机构在从犯罪相关文档中提取关键信息方面存在需求，而现有的命名实体识别（NER）技术受到现实世界犯罪场景标注数据严重缺乏的限制。因此，研究旨在解决这一数据稀缺问题，并探索在零样本和少样本场景下进行犯罪相关NER的可行性。
AI.method: 本文提出了CrimeNER案例研究，并构建了一个名为CrimeNERdb的犯罪相关命名实体识别数据库，其中包含1.5k多个标注文档。数据库定义了5种粗粒度实体和22种细粒度实体。研究采用零样本和少样本设置，并使用最先进的NER模型以及通用和常用的大型语言模型来评估模型在CrimeNERdb上的性能。
AI.result: 研究通过实验评估了在零样本和少样本设置下，使用不同NER模型和大型语言模型在CrimeNERdb上的表现。具体结果（如模型准确率、召回率等）未在摘要中详细说明，但实验旨在验证CrimeNERdb的有效性以及所提方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: CrimeNER案例研究和CrimeNERdb数据库的创建，为解决犯罪领域NER的标注数据不足问题提供了解决方案。通过在零样本和少样本设置下进行实验，研究评估了现有模型的潜力，并为未来在犯罪领域开发更有效的NER系统奠定了基础。

title: Differential privacy representation geometry for medical image analysis
summary: Differential privacy (DP)'s effect in medical imaging is typically evaluated only through end-to-end performance, leaving the mechanism of privacy-induced utility loss unclear. We introduce Differential Privacy Representation Geometry for Medical Imaging (DP-RGMI), a framework that interprets DP as a structured transformation of representation space and decomposes performance degradation into encoder geometry and task-head utilization. Geometry is quantified by representation displacement from initialization and spectral effective dimension, while utilization is measured as the gap between linear-probe and end-to-end utility. Across over 594,000 images from four chest X-ray datasets and multiple pretrained initializations, we show that DP is consistently associated with a utilization gap even when linear separability is largely preserved. At the same time, displacement and spectral dimension exhibit non-monotonic, initialization- and dataset-dependent reshaping, indicating that DP alters representation anisotropy rather than uniformly collapsing features. Correlation analysis reveals that the association between end-to-end performance and utilization is robust across datasets but can vary by initialization, while geometric quantities capture additional prior- and dataset-conditioned variation. These findings position DP-RGMI as a reproducible framework for diagnosing privacy-induced failure modes and informing privacy model selection.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了差分隐私表示几何（DP-RGMI）框架，用于分析差分隐私（DP）在医学影像中的效用损失机制。该框架将DP视为表示空间的结构化变换，并将性能下降分解为编码器几何和任务头利用率。研究发现DP主要导致了利用率差距，而非均匀压缩特征，且几何特征的变化与初始化和数据集相关。DP-RGMI可用于诊断隐私引起的故障模式并指导隐私模型选择。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅通过端到端性能评估DP在医学影像中的效用损失，但未能阐明其内在机制。本研究旨在提供一种更深入的分析方法，以理解DP如何导致效用损失。
AI.method: 提出了差分隐私表示几何（DP-RGMI）框架，将DP解释为表示空间的变换。通过计算表示位移、谱有效维度来量化几何，并通过线性探测与端到端效用的差距来衡量任务头利用率。在四个胸部X光数据集和多种预训练初始化下进行实验。
AI.result: DP与利用率差距的出现密切相关，即使线性可分性基本保持。表示位移和谱有效维度表现出非单调、依赖于初始化和数据集的变化，表明DP改变了表示的各向异性。端到端性能与利用率之间的关联在不同数据集上稳定，但在不同初始化下有所变化。
AI.conclusion: DP-RGMI框架提供了一种可复现的方法来诊断DP在医学影像中的效用损失模式，并指导隐私模型的选择。研究结果表明DP主要通过降低任务头利用率来影响性能，并且其几何影响具有复杂的、依赖于上下文的特性。

title: Organizing, Orchestrating, and Benchmarking Agent Skills at Ecosystem Scale
summary: The rapid proliferation of Claude agent skills has raised the central question of how to effectively leverage, manage, and scale the agent skill ecosystem. In this paper, we propose AgentSkillOS, the first principled framework for skill selection, orchestration, and ecosystem-level management. AgentSkillOS comprises two stages: (i) Manage Skills, which organizes skills into a capability tree via node-level recursive categorization for efficient discovery; and (ii) Solve Tasks, which retrieves, orchestrates, and executes multiple skills through DAG-based pipelines. To evaluate the agent's ability to invoke skills, we construct a benchmark of 30 artifact-rich tasks across five categories: data computation, document creation, motion video, visual design, and web interaction. We assess the quality of task outputs using LLM-based pairwise evaluation, and the results are aggregated via a Bradley-Terry model to produce unified quality scores. Experiments across three skill ecosystem scales (200 to 200K skills) show that tree-based retrieval effectively approximates oracle skill selection, and that DAG-based orchestration substantially outperforms native flat invocation even when given the identical skill set. Our findings confirm that structured composition is the key to unlocking skill potential. Our GitHub repository is available at:https://github.com/ynulihao/AgentSkillOS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AgentSkillOS框架，一个用于管理和编排Claude智能体技能的系统，通过能力树进行技能管理，并通过基于DAG的流水线进行任务解决，并在基准测试中证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: Claude智能体技能的快速增长带来了如何有效利用、管理和扩展其技能生态系统的问题。
AI.method: 提出AgentSkillOS框架，包括两个阶段：1. 技能管理：通过节点级递归分类将技能组织成能力树；2. 任务解决：通过基于DAG的流水线检索、编排和执行多个技能。使用LLM进行基于成对比较的评估，并通过Bradley-Terry模型聚合结果。
AI.result: 在包含30个任务的基准测试中，实验表明基于树的检索方法能够有效地近似最优技能选择，并且基于DAG的编排方法在拥有相同技能集的情况下，其性能也远优于原生的扁平调用。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的组合是释放智能体技能潜力的关键。AgentSkillOS提供了一个有效的框架来管理和利用大型智能体技能生态系统。

title: BornoViT: A Novel Efficient Vision Transformer for Bengali Handwritten Basic Characters Classification
summary: Handwritten character classification in the Bengali script is a significant challenge due to the complexity and variability of the characters. The models commonly used for classification are often computationally expensive and data-hungry, making them unsuitable for resource-limited languages such as Bengali. In this experiment, we propose a novel, efficient, and lightweight Vision Transformer model that effectively classifies Bengali handwritten basic characters and digits, addressing several shortcomings of traditional methods. The proposed solution utilizes a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) in a more simplified manner compared to traditional DCNN architectures, with the aim of reducing computational burden. With only 0.65 million parameters, a model size of 0.62 MB, and 0.16 GFLOPs, our model, BornoViT, is significantly lighter than current state-of-the-art models, making it more suitable for resource-limited environments, which is essential for Bengali handwritten character classification. BornoViT was evaluated on the BanglaLekha Isolated dataset, achieving an accuracy of 95.77%, and demonstrating superior efficiency compared to existing state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, the model was evaluated on our self-collected dataset, Bornomala, consisting of approximately 222 samples from different age groups, where it achieved an accuracy of 91.51%.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级的 Vision Transformer 模型（BornoViT），用于对孟加拉语手写字符和数字进行高效分类，该模型参数少、计算量小，在 BanglaLekha Isolated 数据集上达到了 95.77% 的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的手写字符分类模型计算成本高、数据需求大，不适用于资源受限的语言（如孟加拉语）。
AI.method: 提出了一种轻量级的 Vision Transformer 模型（BornoViT），该模型简化了深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的使用，参数量仅为 0.65 百万，模型大小为 0.62 MB，计算量为 0.16 GFLOPs。
AI.result: 在 BanglaLekha Isolated 数据集上，BornoViT 达到了 95.77% 的准确率；在自收集的 Bornomala 数据集上，准确率为 91.51%。
AI.conclusion: BornoViT 模型在孟加拉语手写字符分类任务上，展现了优越的效率和准确性，尤其适用于资源受限的环境。

title: ClinCoT: Clinical-Aware Visual Chain-of-Thought for Medical Vision Language Models
summary: Medical Vision-Language Models have shown promising potential in clinical decision support, yet they remain prone to factual hallucinations due to insufficient grounding in localized pathological evidence. Existing medical alignment methods primarily operate at the response level through preference optimization, improving output correctness but leaving intermediate reasoning weakly connected to visual regions. Although chain-of-thought (CoT) enhances multimodal reasoning, it remains largely text-centric, limiting effective integration of clinical visual cues. To address this gap, we propose ClinCoT, a clinical-aware visual chain-of-thought framework that transforms preference optimization from response-level correction to visual-driven reasoning. We introduce an automatic data generation pipeline that constructs clinically grounded preference pairs through reasoning with hypotheses-driven region proposals. Multiple Med-LLMs evaluators rank and assign scores to each response, and these rankings serve as supervision to train the target model. We further introduce a scoring-based margin-aware optimization strategy that incorporates both preference ranking and score difference to refine region-level reasoning trajectories. To maintain alignment as the model's policy evolves during training, we adopt an iterative learning scheme that dynamically regenerates preference data. Extensive experiments on three medical VQA and report generation benchmarks demonstrate that ClinCoT consistently improves factual grounding and achieves superior performance compared with existing preference-based alignment methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ClinCoT的临床感知视觉链式思考框架，通过改进的偏好优化方法，将医学视觉语言模型的推理过程与局部病理证据更好地结合，解决了现有模型的事实幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学视觉语言模型在临床决策支持方面潜力巨大，但由于缺乏对局部病理证据的充分 Grounding，容易产生事实幻觉。现有的医学对齐方法主要在响应层面进行偏好优化，虽然提高了输出的正确性，但中间推理过程与视觉区域的联系仍然薄弱。Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 虽然增强了多模态推理，但以文本为中心，未能有效整合临床视觉线索。
