Existing methods rely on external decoders, require architectural modifications, and suffer from limited capacity, which makes them easily detectable. We propose a novel parameter-free 3D Cryptographic Steganography using Instant-NGP (StegoNGP), which leverages the Instant-NGP hash encoding function as a key-controlled scene switcher. By associating a default key with a cover scene and a secret key with a hidden scene, our method trains a single model to interweave both representations within the same network weights. The resulting model is indistinguishable from a standard Instant-NGP in architecture and parameter count. We also introduce an enhanced Multi-Key scheme, which assigns multiple independent keys across hash levels, dramatically expanding the key space and providing high robustness against partial key disclosure attacks. Experimental results demonstrated that StegoNGP can hide a complete high-quality 3D scene with strong imperceptibility and security, providing a new paradigm for high-capacity, undetectable information hiding in neural fields. The code can be found at https://github.com/jiang-wenxiang/StegoNGP.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为StegoNGP的新型无参数3D加密隐写术，利用Instant-NGP的哈希编码函数作为密钥控制的场景切换器，实现了无需外部解码器即可在单个Instant-NGP模型中安全地隐藏整个3D场景数据。
AI.motivation: 现有的Instant-NGP隐写方法存在依赖外部解码器、需要修改模型架构、容量有限且易被检测等问题，因此需要一种更安全、高容量且无需修改模型的新方法。
AI.method: 利用Instant-NGP的哈希编码函数，通过关联默认密钥和秘密密钥来切换场景。训练一个模型，将两个场景的表示交织在同一网络权重中。引入增强的多密钥方案，为哈希的不同层级分配独立密钥，以扩大密钥空间并提高对部分密钥泄露的鲁棒性。
AI.result: StegoNGP能够隐藏高质量的完整3D场景，具有很强的不可感知性和安全性，且模型在架构和参数数量上与标准Instant-NGP无异。增强的多密钥方案显著扩展了密钥空间，提高了安全性。
AI.conclusion: StegoNGP提供了一种新的高容量、不可检测的信息隐藏范例，能够安全地在神经场中隐藏3D场景数据，解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: Learning to Weigh Waste: A Physics-Informed Multimodal Fusion Framework and Large-Scale Dataset for Commercial and Industrial Applications
summary: Accurate weight estimation of commercial and industrial waste is important for efficient operations, yet image-based estimation remains difficult because similar-looking objects may have different densities, and the visible size changes with camera distance. Addressing this problem, we propose Multimodal Weight Predictor (MWP) framework that estimates waste weight by combining RGB images with physics-informed metadata, including object dimensions, camera distance, and camera height. We also introduce Waste-Weight-10K, a real-world dataset containing 10,421 synchronized image-metadata collected from logistics and recycling sites. The dataset covers 11 waste categories and a wide weight range from 3.5 to 3,450 kg. Our model uses a Vision Transformer for visual features and a dedicated metadata encoder for geometric and category information, combining them with Stacked Mutual Attention Fusion that allows visual and physical cues guide each other. This helps the model manage perspective effects and link objects to material properties. To ensure stable performance across the wide weight range, we train the model using Mean Squared Logarithmic Error. On the test set, the proposed method achieves 88.06 kg Mean Absolute Error (MAE), 6.39% Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE), and an R2 coefficient of 0.9548. The model shows strong accuracy for light objects in the 0-100 kg range with 2.38 kg MAE and 3.1% MAPE, maintaining reliable performance for heavy waste in the 1000-2000 kg range with 11.1% MAPE. Finally, we incorporate a physically grounded explanation module using Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) and a large language model to provide clear, human-readable explanations for each prediction.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一个结合RGB图像和物理信息（尺寸、相机距离等）的多模态权重预测（MWP）框架，用于准确估算工业和商业废弃物的重量，并发布了一个包含10,421个样本的大型数据集Waste-Weight-10K。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像的废弃物重量估算方法存在困难，因为外观相似的物体密度可能不同，且可见尺寸会随相机距离变化。因此，需要一种能够结合视觉信息和物理线索的方法来提高估算精度。
AI.method: 提出多模态权重预测（MWP）框架，使用Vision Transformer提取视觉特征，使用专门的元数据编码器处理尺寸、相机距离、高度等物理信息，并通过Stacked Mutual Attention Fusion机制融合视觉和物理线索。使用Mean Squared Logarithmic Error进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在Waste-Weight-10K数据集上，MWP模型取得了88.06 kg的平均绝对误差（MAE）、6.39%的平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）和0.9548的R2系数。模型在轻量级物体（0-100 kg）上表现尤为出色，MAE为2.38 kg，MAPE为3.1%；在重量级物体（1000-2000 kg）上也能保持11.1%的MAPE。此外，还引入了基于SHAP和大型语言模型的解释模块。
AI.conclusion: 多模态权重预测（MWP）框架能够有效结合视觉和物理信息，克服单凭图像估算废弃物重量的局限性，实现高精度的重量估算，并且在不同重量范围内均表现出鲁棒性。引入的解释模块能够提供可读的预测解释。

title: Towards Principled Dataset Distillation: A Spectral Distribution Perspective
summary: Dataset distillation (DD) aims to compress large-scale datasets into compact synthetic counterparts for efficient model training. However, existing DD methods exhibit substantial performance degradation on long-tailed datasets. We identify two fundamental challenges: heuristic design choices for distribution discrepancy measure and uniform treatment of imbalanced classes. To address these limitations, we propose Class-Aware Spectral Distribution Matching (CSDM), which reformulates distribution alignment via the spectrum of a well-behaved kernel function. This technique maps the original samples into frequency space, resulting in the Spectral Distribution Distance (SDD). To mitigate class imbalance, we exploit the unified form of SDD to perform amplitude-phase decomposition, which adaptively prioritizes the realism in tail classes. On CIFAR-10-LT, with 10 images per class, CSDM achieves a 14.0% improvement over state-of-the-art DD methods, with only a 5.7% performance drop when the number of images in tail classes decreases from 500 to 25, demonstrating strong stability on long-tailed data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CSDM的数据集蒸馏方法，通过频谱匹配来解决长尾数据集上的性能下降问题，并改进了对少数类数据的处理，显著提高了在长尾数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法在长尾数据集上表现不佳，主要由于分布差异衡量方式和对不平衡类别的处理不当。因此，需要一种能够更好处理长尾数据集的数据集蒸馏方法。
AI.method: CSDM方法将数据集蒸馏问题重新定义为频谱对齐问题，利用核函数的频谱来衡量数据分布的差异，得到频谱分布距离（SDD）。同时，通过幅度-相位分解来适应性地调整对少数类数据的侧重，以缓解类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-LT数据集上，CSDM比现有的最先进方法提升了14.0%的性能。当少数类别的图像数量从500减少到25时，性能下降仅为5.7%，显示出在长尾数据上的强大稳定性。
AI.conclusion: CSDM是一种有效的数据集蒸馏方法，通过频谱匹配和针对性地处理类别不平衡问题，显著提升了在长尾数据集上的性能和稳定性。

title: Decoupling Motion and Geometry in 4D Gaussian Splatting
summary: High-fidelity reconstruction of dynamic scenes is an important yet challenging problem. While recent 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) has demonstrated the ability to model temporal dynamics, it couples Gaussian motion and geometric attributes within a single covariance formulation, which limits its expressiveness for complex motions and often leads to visual artifacts. To address this, we propose VeGaS, a novel velocity-based 4D Gaussian Splatting framework that decouples Gaussian motion and geometry. Specifically, we introduce a Galilean shearing matrix that explicitly incorporates time-varying velocity to flexibly model complex non-linear motions, while strictly isolating the effects of Gaussian motion from the geometry-related conditional Gaussian covariance. Furthermore, a Geometric Deformation Network is introduced to refine Gaussian shapes and orientations using spatio-temporal context and velocity cues, enhancing temporal geometric modeling. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that VeGaS achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 VeGaS 的新型基于速度的 4D 高斯溅射框架，通过解耦高斯运动和几何形状来改善动态场景的重建。VeGaS 使用伽利略剪切矩阵来显式地纳入时间变化的速度，从而实现复杂的非线性运动建模，并使用几何变形网络来优化高斯形状。实验结果表明，VeGaS 在公共数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的 4D 高斯溅射（4DGS）方法将高斯运动和几何属性耦合在一起，限制了其对复杂运动的表达能力，并导致视觉伪影。因此，需要一种能够解耦运动和几何的新方法。
AI.method: 提出 VeGaS（Velocity-based 4D Gaussian Splatting）框架。关键创新点包括：1. 引入伽利略剪切矩阵，明确地纳入时变速度以建模复杂的非线性运动，并严格分离高斯运动和与几何相关的条件高斯协方差。2. 引入几何变形网络（Geometric Deformation Network），利用时空上下文和速度线索来优化高斯形状和方向。
AI.result: VeGaS 在公共数据集上的实验表明，其性能优于现有方法（state-of-the-art performance）。
AI.conclusion: VeGaS 通过解耦运动和几何，并引入速度和几何变形网络，能够更灵活、更准确地建模动态场景中的复杂运动，从而实现更高保真度的 4D 高斯溅射重建。

title: An Analysis of Multi-Task Architectures for the Hierarchic Multi-Label Problem of Vehicle Model and Make Classification
summary: Most information in our world is organized hierarchically; however, many Deep Learning approaches do not leverage this semantically rich structure. Research suggests that human learning benefits from exploiting the hierarchical structure of information, and intelligent models could similarly take advantage of this through multi-task learning. In this work, we analyze the advantages and limitations of multi-task learning in a hierarchical multi-label classification problem: car make and model classification. Considering both parallel and cascaded multi-task architectures, we evaluate their impact on different Deep Learning classifiers (CNNs, Transformers) while varying key factors such as dropout rate and loss weighting to gain deeper insight into the effectiveness of this approach. The tests are conducted on two established benchmarks: StanfordCars and CompCars. We observe the effectiveness of the multi-task paradigm on both datasets, improving the performance of the investigated CNN in almost all scenarios. Furthermore, the approach yields significant improvements on the CompCars dataset for both types of models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在汽车品牌和型号分类任务中，利用多任务学习（MTL）来利用信息的分层结构，并评估了不同深度学习模型（CNN、Transformer）和MTL架构（并行、级联）的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法未能充分利用信息的分层结构，而人类学习和智能模型有望从这种结构中获益，因此作者希望探索多任务学习在分层多标签分类问题中的优势。
AI.method: 研究人员在汽车品牌和型号分类任务中，对比了并行和级联的多任务学习架构，并评估了CNN和Transformer等不同深度学习分类器在不同超参数（如dropout率、损失权重）下的性能。实验在StanfordCars和CompCars两个数据集上进行。
AI.result: 在StanfordCars数据集上，多任务学习几乎在所有情况下都提升了CNN的性能。在CompCars数据集上，多任务学习对CNN和Transformer都带来了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习范式在利用分层信息结构方面是有效的，并且能够提升深度学习模型在汽车品牌和型号分类任务上的性能，尤其是在CompCars数据集上表现更为突出。

title: PreciseCache: Precise Feature Caching for Efficient and High-fidelity Video Generation
summary: High computational costs and slow inference hinder the practical application of video generation models. While prior works accelerate the generation process through feature caching, they often suffer from notable quality degradation. In this work, we reveal that this issue arises from their inability to distinguish truly redundant features, which leads to the unintended skipping of computations on important features. To address this, we propose \textbf{PreciseCache}, a plug-and-play framework that precisely detects and skips truly redundant computations, thereby accelerating inference without sacrificing quality. Specifically, PreciseCache contains two components: LFCache for step-wise caching and BlockCache for block-wise caching. For LFCache, we compute the Low-Frequency Difference (LFD) between the prediction features of the current step and those from the previous cached step. Empirically, we observe that LFD serves as an effective measure of step-wise redundancy, accurately detecting highly redundant steps whose computation can be skipped through reusing cached features. To further accelerate generation within each non-skipped step, we propose BlockCache, which precisely detects and skips redundant computations at the block level within the network. Extensive experiments on various backbones demonstrate the effectiveness of our PreciseCache, which achieves an average of 2.6x speedup without noticeable quality loss. Source code will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为PreciseCache的即插即用框架，通过精确识别和跳过冗余计算来加速视频生成模型的推理过程，同时不牺牲生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频生成模型计算成本高，推理速度慢，阻碍了实际应用。以往的加速方法（如特征缓存）常导致质量下降，因为它们无法区分真正冗余的特征，可能跳过重要特征的计算。
AI.method: PreciseCache框架包含两个组件：LFCache（用于逐步缓存）和BlockCache（用于块级缓存）。LFCache通过计算当前步预测特征与前一步缓存特征之间的低频差（LFD）来检测冗余步，从而判断是否可以重用缓存特征。BlockCache则在网络内部的块级别精确检测和跳过冗余计算，以进一步加速非跳过步骤的生成。
AI.result: 在多种骨干网络上的广泛实验表明，PreciseCache平均可实现2.6倍的速度提升，且没有明显的质量损失。
AI.conclusion: PreciseCache能够精确检测并跳过真正冗余的计算，有效解决了现有视频生成模型推理速度慢且质量易下降的问题，实现了在不牺牲质量的前提下加速推理。

title: Non-verbal Real-time Human-AI Interaction in Constrained Robotic Environments
summary: We study the ongoing debate regarding the statistical fidelity of AI-generated data compared to human-generated data in the context of non-verbal communication using full body motion. Concretely, we ask if contemporary generative models move beyond surface mimicry to participate in the silent, but expressive dialogue of body language. We tackle this question by introducing the first framework that generates a natural non-verbal interaction between Human and AI in real-time from 2D body keypoints. Our experiments utilize four lightweight architectures which run at up to 100 FPS on an NVIDIA Orin Nano, effectively closing the perception-action loop needed for natural Human-AI interaction. We trained on 437 human video clips and demonstrated that pretraining on synthetically-generated sequences reduces motion errors significantly, without sacrificing speed. Yet, a measurable reality gap persists. When the best model is evaluated on keypoints extracted from cutting-edge text-to-video systems, such as SORA and VEO, we observe that performance drops on SORA-generated clips. However, it degrades far less on VEO, suggesting that temporal coherence, not image fidelity, drives real-world performance. Our results demonstrate that statistically distinguishable differences persist between Human and AI motion.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了AI生成全身运动数据在非语言交流中的统计保真度，发现现有模型虽能实时生成交互式动作，但仍存在与人类动作的显著统计差异，且这种差异在视频生成模型上表现不同，表明时间连贯性比图像保真度对实际表现影响更大。
AI.motivation: AI生成数据在非语言交流（如肢体语言）方面的统计保真度存在争议，现有模型是否超越了表面模仿，能够参与到无声但富有表现力的身体语言交流中，这促使了本研究。
AI.method: 研究者提出了一个首创的框架，能够从2D身体关键点实时生成人与AI之间的自然非语言交互。使用了四种轻量级架构，在NVIDIA Orin Nano上最高可达100 FPS。在437个视频片段上进行训练，并评估了预训练和模型在不同视频生成系统（SORA, VEO）提取的关键点上的表现。
AI.result: 预训练在合成数据上显著减少了运动误差，且不牺牲速度。然而，AI生成动作与人类动作之间仍然存在可衡量的现实差距。在SORA生成的视频片段上，模型表现下降；而在VEO生成的视频片段上，性能下降幅度较小，这表明时间连贯性比图像保真度对真实世界性能的影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 目前AI生成的身体运动与人类的运动在统计上仍存在可区分的差异，尽管AI模型在实时非语言交互方面取得了进展。时间连贯性在影响AI动作的真实世界表现方面比图像保真度更为重要。

title: Fake It Right: Injecting Anatomical Logic into Synthetic Supervised Pre-training for Medical Segmentation
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) excel in 3D medical segmentation but require massive annotated datasets. While Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) mitigates this using unlabeled data, it still faces strict privacy and logistical barriers. Formula-Driven Supervised Learning (FDSL) offers a privacy-preserving alternative by pre-training on synthetic mathematical primitives. However, a critical semantic gap limits its efficacy: generic shapes lack the morphological fidelity, fixed spatial layouts, and inter-organ relationships of real anatomy, preventing models from learning essential global structural priors. To bridge this gap, we propose an Anatomy-Informed Synthetic Supervised Pre-training framework unifying FDSL's infinite scalability with anatomical realism. We replace basic primitives with a lightweight shape bank with de-identified, label-only segmentation masks from 5 subjects. Furthermore, we introduce a structure-aware sequential placement strategy to govern the patch synthesis process. Instead of random placement, we enforce physiological plausibility using spatial anchors for correct localization and a topological graph to manage inter-organ interactions (e.g., preventing impossible overlaps). Extensive experiments on BTCV and MSD datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art FDSL baselines and SSL methods by 1.74\% and up to 1.66\%, while exhibiting a robust scaling effect where performance improves with increased synthetic data volume. This provides a data-efficient, privacy-compliant solution for medical segmentation. The code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合公式驱动监督学习（FDSL）和解剖学信息的合成预训练框架，以解决3D医学图像分割中对大量标注数据和数据隐私的挑战。通过使用包含解剖学信息的形状库和结构感知序列放置策略，该方法弥合了现有FDSL的语义差距，并在公开数据集上取得了优于SOTA方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D医学图像分割方法（如Vision Transformers）需要大量标注数据，而自监督学习（SSL）虽然缓解了这一问题，但仍面临隐私和实际操作的障碍。公式驱动监督学习（FDSL）是一种隐私保护的替代方案，但其生成的通用形状与真实解剖结构在形态、空间布局和器官间关系上存在差距，限制了模型的性能。因此，研究动机是弥合这种语义差距，提高FDSL的有效性。
AI.method: 提出了一种解剖学信息驱动的合成监督预训练框架（Anatomy-Informed Synthetic Supervised Pre-training）。该框架将FDSL的可扩展性与解剖学真实性相结合。具体来说，它使用了一个包含去标识化、仅有标签的分割掩码的轻量级形状库来替代基础形状。此外，引入了一种结构感知序列放置策略，通过空间锚点和拓扑图来确保合成数据的生理合理性和器官间的正确空间关系，而非随机放置。
AI.result: 在BTCV和MSD数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于最先进的FDSL基线（提升1.74%）和SSL方法（提升最高1.66%）。研究还发现，该方法具有稳健的规模效应，即合成数据的数量越多，性能越好。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种数据高效且符合隐私要求的三维医学图像分割解决方案。通过整合解剖学信息到合成数据生成过程中，成功弥合了FDSL与真实解剖学之间的语义差距，从而提高了模型的分割性能，并证明了其在数据受限和隐私敏感场景下的潜力。

title: Detection-Gated Glottal Segmentation with Zero-Shot Cross-Dataset Transfer and Clinical Feature Extraction
summary:
Background: Accurate glottal segmentation in high-speed videoendoscopy (HSV) is essential for extracting kinematic biomarkers of laryngeal function. However, existing deep learning models often produce spurious artifacts in non-glottal frames and fail to generalize across different clinical settings.
  Methods: We propose a detection-gated pipeline that integrates a YOLOv8-based detector with a U-Net segmenter. A temporal consistency wrapper ensures robustness by suppressing false positives during glottal closure and instrument occlusion. The model was trained on a limited subset of the GIRAFE dataset (600 frames) and evaluated via zero-shot transfer on the large-scale BAGLS dataset.
  Results: The pipeline achieved state-of-the-art performance on the GIRAFE benchmark (DSC 0.81) and demonstrated superior generalizability on BAGLS (DSC 0.85, in-distribution) without institutional fine-tuning. Downstream validation on a 65-subject clinical cohort confirmed that automated kinematic features (Open Quotient, coefficient of variation) remained consistent with established clinical benchmarks. The coefficient of variation (CV) of the glottal area was found to be a significant marker for distinguishing healthy from pathological vocal function (p=0.006).
  Conclusions: The detection-gated architecture provides a lightweight, computationally efficient solution (~35 frames/s) for real-time clinical use. By enabling robust zero-shot transfer, this framework facilitates the standardized, large-scale extraction of clinical biomarkers across diverse endoscopy platforms. Code, trained weights, and evaluation scripts are released at https://github.com/hari-krishnan/openglottal.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种基于YOLOv8和U-Net的检测门控流水线，用于高帧率内窥镜检查中的声门分割，实现了优异的泛化能力和效率，并能提取有临床意义的运动学特征。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在声门分割时存在伪影和泛化性差的问题，阻碍了从高帧率内窥镜检查中提取准确的喉部运动学生物标志物。
AI.method: 提出了一种检测门控流水线，结合了YOLOv8检测器和U-Net分割器。引入时间一致性包装器来抑制虚假阳性。在GIRAFE数据集的一个小子集上训练，并在BAGLS数据集上进行零样本迁移评估。
AI.result: 该流水线在GIRAFE上达到了0.81的DSC，在BAGLS上实现了0.85的DSC（零样本迁移）。下游临床验证表明，提取的运动学特征（如开放系数、变异系数）与临床基准一致，并且声门面积的变异系数能有效区分健康与病变声带功能（p=0.006）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的检测门控架构轻量高效（约35帧/秒），支持实时临床应用。通过实现鲁棒的零样本迁移，该框架有助于在不同内窥镜平台之间标准化、大规模地提取临床生物标志物。

title: Foundation Models in Remote Sensing: Evolving from Unimodality to Multimodality
summary: Remote sensing (RS) techniques are increasingly crucial for deepening our understanding of the planet. As the volume and diversity of RS data continue to grow exponentially, there is an urgent need for advanced data modeling and understanding capabilities to manage and interpret these vast datasets effectively. Foundation models present significant new growth opportunities and immense potential to revolutionize the RS field. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive technical survey on foundation models in RS, offering a brand-new perspective by exploring their evolution from unimodality to multimodality. We hope this work serves as a valuable entry point for researchers interested in both foundation models and RS and helps them launch new projects or explore new research topics in this rapidly evolving area. This survey addresses the following three key questions: What are foundation models in RS? Why are foundation models needed in RS? How can we effectively guide junior researchers in gaining a comprehensive and practical understanding of foundation models in RS applications? More specifically, we begin by outlining the background and motivation, emphasizing the importance of foundation models in RS. We then review existing foundation models in RS, systematically categorizing them into unimodal and multimodal approaches. Additionally, we provide a tutorial-like section to guide researchers, especially beginners, on how to train foundation models in RS and apply them to real-world tasks. The survey aims to equip researchers in RS with a deeper and more efficient understanding of foundation models, enabling them to get started easily and effectively apply these models across various RS applications.

AI.tldr: 本文对遥感（RS）领域的基础模型进行了全面的技术调研，从单一模态和多模态两个角度探讨了其演进，并为初学者提供了模型训练和应用的指导。
AI.motivation: 遥感数据量和多样性爆炸式增长，需要更先进的数据建模和理解能力；基础模型为遥感领域带来了新的增长机遇和变革潜力。
AI.method: 对遥感领域现有的基础模型进行了系统性分类，分为单一模态和多模态两类，并提供了一个教程部分指导研究者进行模型训练和应用。
AI.result: 调研和总结了遥感领域基础模型的背景、重要性、现有进展以及如何训练和应用这些模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文旨在为遥感领域研究者提供对基础模型更深入、更有效的理解，帮助他们快速入门并有效地将其应用于各种遥感任务。

title: Event-Anchored Frame Selection for Effective Long-Video Understanding
summary: Massive frame redundancy and limited context window make efficient frame selection crucial for long-video understanding with large vision-language models (LVLMs). Prevailing approaches, however, adopt a flat sampling paradigm which treats the video as an unstructured collection of frames. In this paper, we introduce Event-Anchored Frame Selection (EFS), a hierarchical, event-aware pipeline. Leveraging self-supervised DINO embeddings, EFS first partitions the video stream into visually homogeneous temporal segments, which serve as proxies for semantic events. Within each event, it then selects the most query-relevant frame as an anchor. These anchors act as structural priors that guide a global refinement stage using an adaptive Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) scheme. This pipeline ensures the final keyframe set jointly optimizes for event coverage, query relevance, and visual diversity. As a training-free, plug-and-play module, EFS can be seamlessly integrated into off-the-shelf LVLMs, yielding substantial gains on challenging video understanding benchmarks. Specifically, when applied to LLaVA-Video-7B, EFS improves accuracy by 4.7%, 4.9%, and 8.8% on VideoMME, LongVideoBench, and MLVU, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为事件锚定帧选择（EFS）的层次化、事件感知框架，用于解决大规模视频语言模型（LVLMs）在处理长视频时效率低下的问题。EFS通过自监督DINO嵌入将视频分割成同质化的时间段（代表事件），然后在每个事件中选择最相关的帧作为锚点，最后使用自适应最大边际相关性（MMR）方案进行全局优化，以平衡事件覆盖、查询相关性和视觉多样性。该方法不需训练，可即插即用，并显著提升了LLaVA-Video-7B在多个长视频理解基准上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频理解模型面临帧冗余和上下文窗口限制的问题。现有的帧选择方法将视频视为无结构帧集合，效率低下。因此，需要一种更高效、结构化的帧选择方法来提高长视频理解的效率和性能。
AI.method: 1. 利用自监督DINO嵌入对视频进行分割，形成视觉上同质化的时间段，作为语义事件的代理。2. 在每个事件内部，选择最查询相关的帧作为“锚点”。3. 将这些锚点作为结构化先验，指导全局优化阶段。4. 使用自适应最大边际相关性（MMR）方案进行全局细化，以确保最终关键帧集合能够同时优化事件覆盖、查询相关性和视觉多样性。
AI.result: EFS作为一个训练无关、即插即用的模块，集成到LLaVA-Video-7B模型后，在VideoMME、LongVideoBench和MLVU基准上分别将准确率提高了4.7%、4.9%和8.8%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的事件锚定帧选择（EFS）是一种有效的、层次化的帧选择方法，能够克服现有方法的局限性，显著提高长视频语言模型在各种视频理解任务上的性能。该方法通过结合事件分割、锚点选择和MMR优化，实现了对视频内容的有效压缩和关键信息的提取。

title: physfusion: A Transformer-based Dual-Stream Radar and Vision Fusion Framework for Open Water Surface Object Detection
summary:
Detecting water-surface targets for Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USVs) is challenging due to wave clutter,
  specular reflections, and weak appearance cues in long-range observations. Although 4D millimeter-wave
  radar complements cameras under degraded illumination, maritime radar point clouds are sparse and
  intermittent, with reflectivity attributes exhibiting heavy-tailed variations under scattering and
  multipath, making conventional fusion designs struggle to exploit radar cues effectively.
  We propose PhysFusion, a physics-informed radar-image detection framework for water-surface perception.
  The framework integrates: (1) a Physics-Informed Radar Encoder (PIR Encoder) with an RCS Mapper and
  Quality Gate, transforming per-point radar attributes into compact scattering priors and predicting
  point-wise reliability for robust feature learning under clutter; (2) a Radar-guided Interactive Fusion
  Module (RIFM) performing query-level radar-image fusion between semantically enriched radar features and
  multi-scale visual features, with the radar branch modeled by a dual-stream backbone including a
  point-based local stream and a transformer-based global stream using Scattering-Aware Self-Attention
  (SASA); and (3) a Temporal Query Aggregation module (TQA) aggregating frame-wise fused queries over a
  short temporal window for temporally consistent representations.
  Experiments on WaterScenes and FLOW demonstrate that PhysFusion achieves 59.7% mAP50:95 and 90.3% mAP50
  on WaterScenes (T=5 radar history) using 5.6M parameters and 12.5G FLOPs, and reaches 94.8% mAP50 and
  46.2% mAP50:95 on FLOW under radar+camera setting. Ablation studies quantify the contributions of PIR
  Encoder, SASA-based global reasoning, and RIFM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 PhysFusion 的雷达-图像融合框架，用于提高无人水面载具（USV）在水面目标检测中的性能，特别是在恶劣的海洋环境中。该框架通过物理信息雷达编码器、雷达引导交互式融合模块和时序查询聚合模块，有效解决了雷达点云稀疏、反射率变化大以及与相机融合的挑战。
AI.motivation: 水面目标检测对于无人水面载具（USV）来说充满挑战，尤其是在长距离观测中，由于海浪、镜面反射和微弱的视觉线索。虽然毫米波雷达在光照不佳时能补充相机的不足，但其点云稀疏、反射率变化大，使得传统融合方法难以有效利用雷达信息。
AI.method: 提出 PhysFusion 框架，包含三个主要部分：1) 物理信息雷达编码器（PIR Encoder），包含 RCS Mapper 和 Quality Gate，将雷达属性映射为散射先验并预测点可靠性；2) 雷达引导交互式融合模块（RIFM），通过双流骨干（点云局部流和基于散射感知自注意力（SASA）的全局Transformer流）实现雷达和图像的多尺度融合；3) 时序查询聚合模块（TQA），聚合帧级融合查询以获得时序一致性表示。
AI.result: 在 WaterScenes 和 FLOW 数据集上的实验表明，PhysFusion 在 WaterScenes 上取得了 59.7% 的 mAP50:95 和 90.3% 的 mAP50，在 FLOW 上取得了 94.8% 的 mAP50 和 46.2% 的 mAP50:95（雷达+相机设置）。消融实验量化了 PIR Encoder、SASA 全局推理和 RIFM 的贡献。
AI.conclusion: PhysFusion 框架能够有效地利用雷达和图像信息，克服海洋环境中的挑战，在水面目标检测任务中取得了显著的性能提升。该方法通过物理约束和有效的融合策略，提高了雷达在恶劣条件下的检测能力。

title: The Texture-Shape Dilemma: Boundary-Safe Synthetic Generation for 3D Medical Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have revolutionized medical image analysis, yet their data-hungry nature clashes with the scarcity and privacy constraints of clinical archives. Formula-Driven Supervised Learning (FDSL) has emerged as a promising solution to this bottleneck, synthesizing infinite annotated samples from mathematical formulas without utilizing real patient data. However, existing FDSL paradigms rely on simple geometric shapes with homogeneous intensities, creating a substantial gap by neglecting tissue textures and noise patterns inherent in modalities like CT and MRI. In this paper, we identify a critical optimization conflict termed boundary aliasing: when high-frequency synthetic textures are naively added, they corrupt the image gradient signals necessary for learning structural boundaries, causing the model to fail in delineating real anatomical margins. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel Physics-inspired Spatially-Decoupled Synthesis framework. Our approach orthogonalizes the synthesis process: it first constructs a gradient-shielded buffer zone based on boundary distance to ensure stable shape learning, and subsequently injects physics-driven spectral textures into the object core. This design effectively reconciles robust shape representation learning with invariance to acquisition noise. Extensive experiments on the BTCV and MSD datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms previous FDSL, as well as SSL methods trained on real-world medical datasets, by 1.43% on BTCV and up to 1.51% on MSD task, offering a scalable, annotation-free foundation for medical ViTs. The code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的物理启发式空间解耦合成框架，通过构建梯度屏蔽缓冲区域和注入物理驱动的光谱纹理，解决了现有Formula-Driven Supervised Learning (FDSL)在合成数据时忽视组织纹理和噪声的问题，有效弥合了合成数据与真实医学图像之间的差距，并在BTCV和MSD数据集上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的Vision Transformers (ViTs)在医学图像分析领域表现出色，但其对数据的需求与医学数据稀缺和隐私限制相冲突。Formula-Driven Supervised Learning (FDSL)可以合成大量标注数据，但现有方法生成的合成数据多为简单的几何形状，忽略了CT和MRI等模态固有的组织纹理和噪声，导致合成数据与真实医学图像存在较大差距。此外，当在高频合成纹理时，会产生边界混叠问题，干扰模型学习结构边界。
AI.method: 提出了一种物理启发式空间解耦合成框架。该框架首先基于边界距离构建一个梯度屏蔽缓冲区域，以确保形状学习的稳定性；然后，将物理驱动的光谱纹理注入到对象的中心区域。这种方法将合成过程正交化，实现了稳健的形状表示学习和对采集噪声的不变性。
AI.result: 在BTCV和MSD数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在BTCV上比现有的FDSL方法和在真实世界医学数据集上训练的SSL方法提高了1.43%，在MSD任务上提高了1.51%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的物理启发式空间解耦合成框架能够有效地解决现有FDSL方法的局限性，并在医学图像分析任务中取得了优于现有方法的性能。该方法为训练医学ViTs提供了一个可扩展、无需标注的基础。

title: FluxMem: Adaptive Hierarchical Memory for Streaming Video Understanding
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026. Project page: https://yiwengxie.com/FluxMem/
summary: This paper presents FluxMem, a training-free framework for efficient streaming video understanding. FluxMem adaptively compresses redundant visual memory through a hierarchical, two-stage design: (1) a Temporal Adjacency Selection (TAS) module removes redundant visual tokens across adjacent frames, and (2) a Spatial Domain Consolidation (SDC) module further merges spatially repetitive regions within each frame into compact representations. To adapt effectively to dynamic scenes, we introduce a self-adaptive token compression mechanism in both TAS and SDC, which automatically determines the compression rate based on intrinsic scene statistics rather than manual tuning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FluxMem achieves new state-of-the-art results on existing online video benchmarks, reaching 76.4 on StreamingBench and 67.2 on OVO-Bench under real-time settings, while reducing latency by 69.9% and peak GPU memory by 34.5% on OVO-Bench. Furthermore, it maintains strong offline performance, achieving 73.1 on MLVU while using 65% fewer visual tokens.

AI.tldr: FluxMem是一个训练无关的视频理解框架，通过时间邻近选择（TAS）和空间域合并（SDC）模块自适应地压缩视觉冗余，显著提高效率并保持高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有流媒体视频理解方法效率低下，需要更高效的训练无关框架来处理实时性要求高的场景。
AI.method: FluxMem采用两阶段设计：1. 时间邻近选择（TAS）模块去除帧间冗余；2. 空间域合并（SDC）模块合并帧内空间冗余。两者均包含自适应的token压缩机制，根据场景统计自动调整压缩率。
AI.result: FluxMem在StreamingBench（76.4）和OVO-Bench（67.2）上取得SOTA性能，同时OVO-Bench延迟降低69.9%，GPU内存减少34.5%。在MLVU上，性能为73.1，token使用量减少65%。
AI.conclusion: FluxMem通过有效的自适应冗余压缩，在保证高性能的同时，显著提高了流媒体视频理解的效率，适用于实时场景。

title: MAP-Diff: Multi-Anchor Guided Diffusion for Progressive 3D Whole-Body Low-Dose PET Denoising
summary: Low-dose Positron Emission Tomography (PET) reduces radiation exposure but suffers from severe noise and quantitative degradation. Diffusion-based denoising models achieve strong final reconstructions, yet their reverse trajectories are typically unconstrained and not aligned with the progressive nature of PET dose formation. We propose MAP-Diff, a multi-anchor guided diffusion framework for progressive 3D whole-body PET denoising. MAP-Diff introduces clinically observed intermediate-dose scans as trajectory anchors and enforces timestep-dependent supervision to regularize the reverse process toward dose-aligned intermediate states. Anchor timesteps are calibrated via degradation matching between simulated diffusion corruption and real multi-dose PET pairs, and a timestep-weighted anchor loss stabilizes stage-wise learning. At inference, the model requires only ultra-low-dose input while enabling progressive, dose-consistent intermediate restoration. Experiments on internal (Siemens Biograph Vision Quadra) and cross-scanner (United Imaging uEXPLORER) datasets show consistent improvements over strong CNN-, Transformer-, GAN-, and diffusion-based baselines. On the internal dataset, MAP-Diff improves PSNR from 42.48 dB to 43.71 dB (+1.23 dB), increases SSIM to 0.986, and reduces NMAE from 0.115 to 0.103 (-0.012) compared to 3D DDPM. Performance gains generalize across scanners, achieving 34.42 dB PSNR and 0.141 NMAE on the external cohort, outperforming all competing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为MAP-Diff的多锚点引导扩散框架，用于低剂量PET的渐进式去噪，通过利用临床中观察到的中间剂量扫描作为锚点，并进行时间步长依赖的监督，以确保去噪过程与PET剂量累积过程对齐，实验证明该方法在提高图像质量和减少量化误差方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 低剂量PET虽然减少了辐射暴露，但会引入严重的噪声并降低定量准确性。现有的基于扩散的去噪模型虽然重建效果好，但其反向过程不受约束，且与PET剂量形成过程的渐进性不匹配。因此，需要一种能够处理低剂量PET数据并保留其定量特性的去噪方法。
AI.method: 提出MAP-Diff框架，一个多锚点引导的扩散模型。该模型利用临床中观察到的中间剂量扫描作为“锚点”，并引入时间步长依赖的监督，以约束反向扩散过程，使其与剂量的渐进累积过程对齐。锚点时间步长通过模拟扩散退化与真实多剂量PET数据之间的匹配来校准，并使用时间步长加权的锚点损失来稳定分阶段学习。在推理时，模型仅需超低剂量输入，即可实现渐进的、剂量一致的中间图像恢复。
AI.result: 在内部（Siemens Biograph Vision Quadra）和跨扫描仪（United Imaging uEXPLORER）数据集上进行的实验表明，MAP-Diff相比于CNN、Transformer、GAN和3D DDPM等基线方法，在PSNR、SSIM和NMAE指标上均有显著提升。在内部数据集上，PSNR提高了1.23 dB（从42.48 dB到43.71 dB），SSIM提高到0.986，NMAE降低了0.012（从0.115到0.103）。在外部数据集上，MAP-Diff也表现出优越的性能，PSNR达到34.42 dB，NMAE为0.141。
AI.conclusion: MAP-Diff框架能够有效地实现低剂量PET的渐进式去噪，并通过引入剂量对齐的中间状态恢复，显著提高了图像质量和量化准确性，且在不同扫描仪上表现出良好的泛化能力。

title: MLRecon: Robust Markerless Freehand 3D Ultrasound Reconstruction via Coarse-to-Fine Pose Estimation
summary: Freehand 3D ultrasound (US) reconstruction promises volumetric imaging with the flexibility of standard 2D probes, yet existing tracking paradigms face a restrictive trilemma: marker-based systems demand prohibitive costs, inside-out methods require intrusive sensor attachment, and sensorless approaches suffer from severe cumulative drift. To overcome these limitations, we present MLRecon, a robust markerless 3D US reconstruction framework delivering drift-resilient 6D probe pose tracking using a single commodity RGB-D camera. Leveraging the generalization power of vision foundation models, our pipeline enables continuous markerless tracking of the probe, augmented by a vision-guided divergence detector that autonomously monitors tracking integrity and triggers failure recovery to ensure uninterrupted scanning. Crucially, we further propose a dual-stage pose refinement network that explicitly disentangles high-frequency jitter from low-frequency bias, effectively denoising the trajectory while maintaining the kinematic fidelity of operator maneuvers. Experiments demonstrate that MLRecon significantly outperforms competing sensorless and sensor-aided methods, achieving average position errors as low as 0.88 mm on complex trajectories and yielding high-quality 3D reconstructions with sub-millimeter mean surface accuracy. This establishes a new benchmark for low-cost, accessible volumetric US imaging in resource-limited clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 MLRecon 的无标记三维超声重建框架，利用单目 RGB-D 相机实现漂移鲁棒的六自由度探头姿态跟踪，并结合视觉引导的分歧检测器和双阶段姿态精炼网络，显著优于现有方法，为资源受限的临床环境提供了低成本、可及的三维超声成像新基准。
AI.motivation: 现有三维超声重建的跟踪方法面临成本高、侵入性强或累积漂移严重等限制。研究旨在克服这些限制，实现低成本、无标记、漂移鲁棒的三维超声成像。
AI.method: 使用单个商品级 RGB-D 相机进行无标记六自由度探头姿态跟踪。利用视觉基础模型进行连续跟踪，并引入视觉引导的分歧检测器来监控跟踪完整性并触发故障恢复。采用双阶段姿态精炼网络来分离高频抖动和低频偏差，从而实现轨迹去噪并保持运动学保真度。
AI.result: MLRecon 在复杂轨迹上实现了低至 0.88 mm 的平均位置误差，显著优于竞争的无传感器和传感器辅助方法。重建的三维超声图像具有亚毫米级别的平均表面精度。
AI.conclusion: MLRecon 框架在无标记三维超声重建领域取得了突破，通过创新的姿态跟踪和精炼技术，克服了现有方法的局限性，为资源受限的临床环境提供了高质量、低成本、易于使用的三维超声成像解决方案。

title: LiftAvatar: Kinematic-Space Completion for Expression-Controlled 3D Gaussian Avatar Animation
summary: We present LiftAvatar, a new paradigm that completes sparse monocular observations in kinematic space (e.g., facial expressions and head pose) and uses the completed signals to drive high-fidelity avatar animation. LiftAvatar is a fine-grained, expression-controllable large-scale video diffusion Transformer that synthesizes high-quality, temporally coherent expression sequences conditioned on single or multiple reference images. The key idea is to lift incomplete input data into a richer kinematic representation, thereby strengthening both reconstruction and animation in downstream 3D avatar pipelines. To this end, we introduce (i) a multi-granularity expression control scheme that combines shading maps with expression coefficients for precise and stable driving, and (ii) a multi-reference conditioning mechanism that aggregates complementary cues from multiple frames, enabling strong 3D consistency and controllability. As a plug-and-play enhancer, LiftAvatar directly addresses the limited expressiveness and reconstruction artifacts of 3D Gaussian Splatting-based avatars caused by sparse kinematic cues in everyday monocular videos. By expanding incomplete observations into diverse pose-expression variations, LiftAvatar also enables effective prior distillation from large-scale video generative models into 3D pipelines, leading to substantial gains. Extensive experiments show that LiftAvatar consistently boosts animation quality and quantitative metrics of state-of-the-art 3D avatar methods, especially under extreme, unseen expressions.

AI.tldr: LiftAvatar 是一种新的范式，可以通过运动空间（例如面部表情和头部姿势）的稀疏单目观测来完成，并利用这些完成的信号来驱动高保真度化身动画。它是一个细粒度、可控表情的大规模视频扩散 Transformer，能够根据单个或多个参考图像合成高质量、时间连贯的表情序列。
AI.motivation: 解决现有 3D 高斯溅射（3D Gaussian Splatting）方法在单目视频中因稀疏运动线索导致的表达能力有限和重建伪影问题。
AI.method: LiftAvatar 引入了一个多粒度表情控制方案（结合阴影图和表情系数）和一个多参考条件机制（聚合来自多个帧的互补线索），将不完整输入数据提升到更丰富的运动表示中。
AI.result: LiftAvatar 能够生成高质量、时间连贯的表情序列，并且可以作为即插即用模块，显著提升现有 3D 化身方法的动画质量和定量指标，特别是在极端、未见的表情下。
AI.conclusion: LiftAvatar 能够有效增强 3D 化身方法的性能，尤其是在处理稀疏运动线索和生成高保真表情动画方面，并能促进大型视频生成模型先验知识向 3D 流水线的有效提炼。

title: Let Your Image Move with Your Motion! -- Implicit Multi-Object Multi-Motion Transfer
summary: Motion transfer has emerged as a promising direction for controllable video generation, yet existing methods largely focus on single-object scenarios and struggle when multiple objects require distinct motion patterns. In this work, we present FlexiMMT, the first implicit image-to-video (I2V) motion transfer framework that explicitly enables multi-object, multi-motion transfer. Given a static multi-object image and multiple reference videos, FlexiMMT independently extracts motion representations and accurately assigns them to different objects, supporting flexible recombination and arbitrary motion-to-object mappings. To address the core challenge of cross-object motion entanglement, we introduce a Motion Decoupled Mask Attention Mechanism that uses object-specific masks to constrain attention, ensuring that motion and text tokens only influence their designated regions. We further propose a Differentiated Mask Propagation Mechanism that derives object-specific masks directly from diffusion attention and progressively propagates them across frames efficiently. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlexiMMT achieves precise, compositional, and state-of-the-art performance in I2V-based multi-object multi-motion transfer.

AI.tldr: FlexiMMT是一个新颖的隐式图像到视频（I2V）运动迁移框架，能够实现多对象、多运动的迁移，克服了现有方法在处理复杂场景时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有运动迁移方法主要关注单对象场景，难以处理需要不同运动模式的多个对象。本研究旨在解决多对象、多运动迁移的挑战。
AI.method: FlexiMMT提出了一种隐式I2V运动迁移框架，能够独立提取运动表示并将其分配给不同对象。核心技术包括：1. 运动解耦掩码注意力机制（Motion Decoupled Mask Attention Mechanism），通过对象特定掩码限制注意力范围，解决跨对象运动纠缠问题。2. 差异化掩码传播机制（Differentiated Mask Propagation Mechanism），从扩散注意力中提取对象特定掩码并逐帧传播。
AI.result: 实验证明，FlexiMMT在基于I2V的多对象多运动迁移方面，实现了精确、可组合且达到最先进水平的性能。
AI.conclusion: FlexiMMT是第一个实现多对象、多运动I2V迁移的隐式框架，通过创新的注意力机制和掩码传播机制，有效解决了运动纠缠问题，并取得了优异的实验结果。

title: GeodesicNVS: Probability Density Geodesic Flow Matching for Novel View Synthesis
summary: Recent advances in generative modeling have substantially enhanced novel view synthesis, yet maintaining consistency across viewpoints remains challenging. Diffusion-based models rely on stochastic noise-to-data transitions, which obscure deterministic structures and yield inconsistent view predictions. We propose a Data-to-Data Flow Matching framework that learns deterministic transformations directly between paired views, enhancing view-consistent synthesis through explicit data coupling. To further enhance geometric coherence, we introduce Probability Density Geodesic Flow Matching (PDG-FM), which constrains flow trajectories using geodesic interpolants derived from probability density metrics of pretrained diffusion models. Such alignment with high-density regions of the data manifold promotes more realistic interpolants between samples. Empirically, our method surpasses diffusion-based NVS baselines, demonstrating improved structural coherence and smoother transitions across views. These results highlight the advantages of incorporating data-dependent geometric regularization into deterministic flow matching for consistent novel view generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为数据到数据流匹配（Data-to-Data Flow Matching）的框架，并结合概率密度测地线流匹配（PDG-FM）技术，通过学习视图之间的确定性转换来解决生成模型在多视角合成中视图一致性不足的问题，并在实验中取得了优于现有扩散模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型（尤其是基于扩散的模型）在新的视角合成方面虽然取得了进展，但在保持不同视角之间的一致性方面仍面临挑战。扩散模型中的随机性会隐藏确定性结构，导致视图预测不一致。
AI.method: 提出了一个数据到数据流匹配（Data-to-Data Flow Matching）框架，该框架直接学习配对视图之间的确定性转换，通过显式地耦合数据来增强视图一致性。为了进一步提高几何一致性，引入了概率密度测地线流匹配（PDG-FM），它利用预训练扩散模型概率密度指标导出的测地线插值来约束流轨迹，使插值更符合数据流形的高密度区域。
AI.result: 在实际应用中，所提出的方法在视图一致性和跨视图过渡的平滑性方面，优于现有的基于扩散模型的新的视角合成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 将数据依赖的几何正则化纳入确定性流匹配中，对于生成一致性的新视角具有优势，并能有效提升视图间的结构一致性和平滑度。

title: Kiwi-Edit: Versatile Video Editing via Instruction and Reference Guidance
summary: Instruction-based video editing has witnessed rapid progress, yet current methods often struggle with precise visual control, as natural language is inherently limited in describing complex visual nuances. Although reference-guided editing offers a robust solution, its potential is currently bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality paired training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce a scalable data generation pipeline that transforms existing video editing pairs into high-fidelity training quadruplets, leveraging image generative models to create synthesized reference scaffolds. Using this pipeline, we construct RefVIE, a large-scale dataset tailored for instruction-reference-following tasks, and establish RefVIE-Bench for comprehensive evaluation. Furthermore, we propose a unified editing architecture, Kiwi-Edit, that synergizes learnable queries and latent visual features for reference semantic guidance. Our model achieves significant gains in instruction following and reference fidelity via a progressive multi-stage training curriculum. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our data and architecture establish a new state-of-the-art in controllable video editing. All datasets, models, and code is released at https://github.com/showlab/Kiwi-Edit.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个名为RefVIE的数据集生成管道和Kiwi-Edit模型，以解决现有基于指令的视频编辑方法在精确视觉控制方面的不足，通过利用生成模型创建合成参考，并引入了一个新的统一编辑架构，在视频编辑任务上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于指令的视频编辑方法在精确控制方面存在局限，因为自然语言难以描述复杂的视觉细节。虽然参考引导编辑是一个有效的解决方案，但高质量配对训练数据的稀缺性限制了其发展。
AI.method: 研究人员开发了一个可扩展的数据生成管道，利用图像生成模型创建合成参考，将现有的视频编辑对转换为高质量的训练四元组。基于此管道构建了RefVIE数据集和RefVIE-Bench评估基准。同时，提出了一种名为Kiwi-Edit的统一编辑架构，该架构结合了可学习查询和潜在视觉特征，以实现语义引导。模型采用了渐进式多阶段训练课程。
AI.result: 通过RefVIE数据集和Kiwi-Edit模型，在指令遵循和参考保真度方面取得了显著的提升，确立了新的可控视频编辑技术水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过创新的数据生成方法和统一的编辑架构，成功克服了现有方法在精确视频编辑上的挑战，并展示了其在可控视频编辑领域的优越性能。

title: Dr.Occ: Depth- and Region-Guided 3D Occupancy from Surround-View Cameras for Autonomous Driving
summary: 3D semantic occupancy prediction is crucial for autonomous driving perception, offering comprehensive geometric scene understanding and semantic recognition. However, existing methods struggle with geometric misalignment in view transformation due to the lack of pixel-level accurate depth estimation, and severe spatial class imbalance where semantic categories exhibit strong spatial anisotropy. To address these challenges, we propose Dr.Occ, a depth- and region-guided occupancy prediction framework. Specifically, we introduce a depth-guided 2D-to-3D View Transformer (D$^2$-VFormer) that effectively leverages high-quality dense depth cues from MoGe-2 to construct reliable geometric priors, thereby enabling precise geometric alignment of voxel features. Moreover, inspired by the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework, we propose a region-guided Expert Transformer (R/R$^2$-EFormer) that adaptively allocates region-specific experts to focus on different spatial regions, effectively addressing spatial semantic variations. Thus, the two components make complementary contributions: depth guidance ensures geometric alignment, while region experts enhance semantic learning. Experiments on the Occ3D-nuScenes benchmark demonstrate that \textbf{Dr.Occ} improves the strong baseline BEVDet4D by 7.43\% mIoU and 3.09\% IoU under the full vision-only setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Dr.Occ 的 3D 语义占用预测框架，通过引入深度引导的视图转换器（D$^2$-VFormer）来解决几何不匹配问题，并利用区域引导的专家转换器（R/R$^2$-EFormer）来应对类别空间不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有 3D 语义占用预测方法在处理视图转换时的几何不匹配以及空间类别不平衡（即不同语义类别在空间上的分布不均）方面存在困难。这是因为缺乏像素级精确的深度估计，并且语义类别存在空间各向异性。
AI.method: 该研究提出 Dr.Occ 框架，包含两个关键组件：1. 深度引导的 2D-to-3D 视图转换器 (D$^2$-VFormer)，利用 MoGe-2 提供的深度信息来建立可靠的几何先验，实现体素特征的精确几何对齐。2. 区域引导的专家转换器 (R/R$^2$-EFormer)，借鉴 Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) 框架，自适应地分配区域特定的专家来处理不同空间区域的语义变化。
AI.result: 在 Occ3D-nuScenes 基准测试中，Dr.Occ 在纯视觉设置下，相比强基线 BEVDet4D，mIoU 提高了 7.43%，IoU 提高了 3.09%。
AI.conclusion: Dr.Occ 通过深度引导确保了几何对齐，并通过区域专家增强了语义学习，有效解决了 3D 语义占用预测中的几何不匹配和空间类别不平衡问题，并在实验中取得了显著的性能提升。

title: Leveraging Model Soups to Classify Intangible Cultural Heritage Images from the Mekong Delta
comment: Early accept of Vol 2025 No 3, November : Journal on Information Technologies & Communications
summary: The classification of Intangible Cultural Heritage (ICH) images in the Mekong Delta poses unique challenges due to limited annotated data, high visual similarity among classes, and domain heterogeneity. In such low-resource settings, conventional deep learning models often suffer from high variance or overfit to spurious correlations, leading to poor generalization. To address these limitations, we propose a robust framework that integrates the hybrid CoAtNet architecture with model soups, a lightweight weight-space ensembling technique that averages checkpoints from a single training trajectory without increasing inference cost. CoAtNet captures both local and global patterns through stage-wise fusion of convolution and self-attention. We apply two ensembling strategies - greedy and uniform soup - to selectively combine diverse checkpoints into a final model. Beyond performance improvements, we analyze the ensembling effect through the lens of bias-variance decomposition. Our findings show that model soups reduces variance by stabilizing predictions across diverse model snapshots, while introducing minimal additional bias. Furthermore, using cross-entropy-based distance metrics and Multidimensional Scaling (MDS), we show that model soups selects geometrically diverse checkpoints, unlike Soft Voting, which blends redundant models centered in output space. Evaluated on the ICH-17 dataset (7,406 images across 17 classes), our approach achieves state-of-the-art results with 72.36% top-1 accuracy and 69.28% macro F1-score, outperforming strong baselines including ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, and ViT. These results underscore that diversity-aware checkpoint averaging provides a principled and efficient way to reduce variance and enhance generalization in culturally rich, data-scarce classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合CoAtNet和模型汤（model soups）的框架，用于解决湄公河三角洲非物质文化遗产（ICH）图像分类中数据稀缺、类间相似性高和域异质性等挑战。该方法通过平均训练轨迹中的不同检查点来提高模型泛化能力，并在ICH-17数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 低资源设置下，现有深度学习模型在ICH图像分类任务中存在泛化能力差、过拟合等问题，这是由于数据标注不足、类间视觉相似性高以及域异质性造成的。
AI.method: 研究者提出了一个集成混合CoAtNet架构和模型汤（model soups）的框架。CoAtNet通过阶段性融合卷积和自注意力来捕获局部和全局模式。模型汤是一种轻量级的权重空间集成技术，通过平均单次训练轨迹中的检查点来构建最终模型，并采用了贪婪和均匀两种集成策略。此外，研究还通过偏差-方差分解分析了模型汤的效果，并使用交叉熵距离和多维标度（MDS）来评估检查点的多样性。
AI.result: 在ICH-17数据集（7,406张图像，17类）上，所提出的方法实现了72.36%的top-1准确率和69.28%的宏F1分数，优于ResNet-50、DenseNet-121和ViT等基线模型。模型汤通过稳定模型快照的预测来降低方差，同时引入的偏差很小。研究表明，模型汤选择的是几何上多样化的检查点，而软投票则倾向于融合冗余模型。
AI.conclusion: 多样性感知的检查点平均化是一种有效且高效的方法，可以在数据稀缺且文化丰富的分类任务中降低模型方差并提高泛化能力。该框架为解决低资源场景下的图像分类问题提供了一个有前景的解决方案。

title: Adaptive Confidence Regularization for Multimodal Failure Detection
summary: The deployment of multimodal models in high-stakes domains, such as self-driving vehicles and medical diagnostics, demands not only strong predictive performance but also reliable mechanisms for detecting failures. In this work, we address the largely unexplored problem of failure detection in multimodal contexts. We propose Adaptive Confidence Regularization (ACR), a novel framework specifically designed to detect multimodal failures. Our approach is driven by a key observation: in most failure cases, the confidence of the multimodal prediction is significantly lower than that of at least one unimodal branch, a phenomenon we term confidence degradation. To mitigate this, we introduce an Adaptive Confidence Loss that penalizes such degradations during training. In addition, we propose Multimodal Feature Swapping, a novel outlier synthesis technique that generates challenging, failure-aware training examples. By training with these synthetic failures, ACR learns to more effectively recognize and reject uncertain predictions, thereby improving overall reliability. Extensive experiments across four datasets, three modalities, and multiple evaluation settings demonstrate that ACR achieves consistent and robust gains. The source code will be available at https://github.com/mona4399/ACR.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为自适应置信度正则化（ACR）的新框架，用于检测多模态模型中的故障。ACR通过在训练期间惩罚置信度下降，并利用多模态特征交换来生成故障感知训练样本，从而提高模型拒绝不确定预测的能力。
AI.motivation: 在高风险领域（如自动驾驶和医疗诊断）部署多模态模型需要可靠的故障检测机制。然而，多模态故障检测是一个尚未得到充分研究的问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为自适应置信度正则化（ACR）的框架。ACR包含两个核心组件：1. 自适应置信度损失：该损失惩罚在训练过程中多模态预测置信度相对于任何单一模态分支显著降低的情况（称为置信度下降）。2. 多模态特征交换：一种新颖的异常值合成技术，用于生成具有挑战性的、故障感知的训练示例。
AI.result: 在四个数据集、三种模态和多种评估设置上进行的广泛实验表明，ACR在提高模型可靠性方面取得了持续且稳健的改进，能够更有效地识别和拒绝不确定的预测。
AI.conclusion: ACR框架通过引入置信度下降的概念和相应的训练策略，有效地解决了多模态模型中的故障检测问题，显著提高了模型的可靠性。

title: RaUF: Learning the Spatial Uncertainty Field of Radar
summary: Millimeter-wave radar offers unique advantages in adverse weather but suffers from low spatial fidelity, severe azimuth ambiguity, and clutter-induced spurious returns. Existing methods mainly focus on improving spatial perception effectiveness via coarse-to-fine cross-modal supervision, yet often overlook the ambiguous feature-to-label mapping, which may lead to ill-posed geometric inference and pose fundamental challenges to downstream perception tasks. In this work, we propose RaUF, a spatial uncertainty field learning framework that models radar measurements through their physically grounded anisotropic properties. To resolve conflicting feature-to-label mapping, we design an anisotropic probabilistic model that learns fine-grained uncertainty. To further enhance reliability, we propose a Bidirectional Domain Attention mechanism that exploits the mutual complementarity between spatial structure and Doppler consistency, effectively suppressing spurious or multipath-induced reflections. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that RaUF delivers highly reliable spatial detections with well-calibrated uncertainty. Moreover, downstream case studies further validate the enhanced reliability and scalability of RaUF under challenging real-world driving scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RaUF的空间不确定性场学习框架，通过利用毫米波雷达的各向异性特性来解决现有方法的局限性，从而提高空间检测的可靠性，并为下游感知任务提供更好的不确定性校准。
AI.motivation: 现有的毫米波雷达感知方法主要通过粗到精的跨模态监督来提高空间感知能力，但忽略了特征到标签映射的模糊性，这可能导致不适定的几何推断，并对下游感知任务构成挑战。
AI.method: 提出了RaUF框架，通过学习雷达测量的物理各向异性特性来建模雷达测量。设计了一个各向异性概率模型来学习细粒度的不确定性，以解决冲突的特征到标签映射。引入了双向域注意力机制，利用空间结构和多普勒一致性之间的互补性来抑制虚假或多径反射。
AI.result: 在公开基准和真实世界数据集上进行的大量实验表明，RaUF能够提供高度可靠的空间检测，并具有良好的不确定性校准。此外，下游案例研究验证了RaUF在具有挑战性的真实驾驶场景下增强的可靠性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: RaUF通过建模雷达的物理各向异性特性和引入新的机制来解决特征到标签映射的模糊性和抑制虚假反射，从而提高了毫米波雷达感知的可靠性和不确定性校准，为下游感知任务提供了更稳健的基础。

title: Vision-Language Feature Alignment for Road Anomaly Segmentation
summary: Safe autonomous systems in complex environments require robust road anomaly segmentation to identify unknown obstacles. However, existing approaches often rely on pixel-level statistics to determine whether a region appears anomalous. This reliance leads to high false-positive rates on semantically normal background regions such as sky or vegetation, and poor recall of true Out-of-distribution (OOD) instances, thereby posing safety risks for robotic perception and decision-making. To address these challenges, we propose VL-Anomaly, a vision-language anomaly segmentation framework that incorporates semantic priors from pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Specifically, we design a prompt learning-driven alignment module that adapts Mask2Forme's visual features to CLIP text embeddings of known categories, effectively suppressing spurious anomaly responses in background regions. At inference time, we further introduce a multi-source inference strategy that integrates text-guided similarity, CLIP-based image-text similarity and detector confidence, enabling more reliable anomaly prediction by leveraging complementary information sources. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VL-Anomaly achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets including RoadAnomaly, SMIYC and Fishyscapes.Code is released on https://github.com/NickHezhuolin/VL-aligner-Road-anomaly-segment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VL-Anomaly，一个结合了视觉-语言模型（VLMs）语义先验的异常分割框架，用于在复杂环境中安全地识别未知障碍物。该框架通过提示学习和多源推理策略，提高了在背景区域的鲁棒性，并有效降低了误报率，在多个数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有道路异常分割方法依赖像素级统计，易在天空、植被等正常背景区域产生高误报率，并遗漏真实的分布外（OOD）实例，威胁机器人感知和决策安全。
AI.method: 提出VL-Anomaly框架，利用预训练VLMs的语义先验。具体包括：1. 设计提示学习驱动的对齐模块，使Mask2Former的视觉特征与已知类别的CLIP文本嵌入对齐，抑制背景区域的误报。2. 推理时引入多源推理策略，整合文本引导相似度、CLIP图文相似度和检测器置信度，利用互补信息源进行更可靠的异常预测。
AI.result: VL-Anomaly在RoadAnomaly、SMIYC和Fishyscapes等基准数据集上取得了最先进（state-of-the-art）的性能。
AI.conclusion: VL-Anomaly通过融合视觉-语言模型强大的语义理解能力，有效解决了传统异常分割方法在复杂背景下的鲁棒性问题，实现了更准确、更安全的异常区域识别。

title: Unleashing VLA Potentials in Autonomous Driving via Explicit Learning from Failures
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving often hit a performance plateau during Reinforcement Learning (RL) optimization. This stagnation arises from exploration capabilities constrained by previous Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), leading to persistent failures in long-tail scenarios. In these critical situations, all explored actions yield a zero-value driving score. This information-sparse reward signals a failure, yet fails to identify its root cause -- whether it is due to incorrect planning, flawed reasoning, or poor trajectory execution. To address this limitation, we propose VLA with Explicit Learning from Failures (ELF-VLA), a framework that augments RL with structured diagnostic feedback. Instead of relying on a vague scalar reward, our method produces detailed, interpretable reports that identify the specific failure mode. The VLA policy then leverages this explicit feedback to generate a Feedback-Guided Refinement. By injecting these corrected, high-reward samples back into the RL training batch, our approach provides a targeted gradient, which enables the policy to solve critical scenarios that unguided exploration cannot. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method unlocks the latent capabilities of VLA models, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the public NAVSIM benchmark for overall PDMS, EPDMS score and high-level planning accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ELF-VLA的框架，通过引入明确的失败诊断反馈来解决自动驾驶VLA模型在RL训练中遇到的性能瓶颈，提高了在长尾场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA模型在RL优化时容易陷入性能停滞，特别是在长尾场景下，零值奖励信号无法区分失败的具体原因（规划、推理或执行），导致模型难以学习。以往的SFT限制了探索能力。
AI.method: 提出ELF-VLA框架，通过结构化的诊断反馈来增强RL。模型会生成详细的、可解释的失败报告，识别具体的失败模式。然后，VLA策略利用此反馈生成“反馈引导的精炼”样本，并将其重新注入RL训练批次，提供有针对性的梯度，以解决未引导探索无法解决的关键场景。
AI.result: ELF-VLA能够解锁VLA模型的潜在能力，在NAVSIM基准测试中，无论是在整体PDMS、EPDMS分数还是高级规划准确性方面，都达到了最先进（SOTA）的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入明确的失败诊断和反馈引导的精炼机制，ELF-VLA克服了RL训练中信息稀疏奖励的局限性，显著提高了VLA模型在复杂和长尾自动驾驶场景下的性能。

title: LLaDA-o: An Effective and Length-Adaptive Omni Diffusion Model
summary: We present \textbf{LLaDA-o}, an effective and length-adaptive omni diffusion model for multimodal understanding and generation. LLaDA-o is built on a Mixture of Diffusion (MoD) framework that decouples discrete masked diffusion for text understanding and continuous diffusion for visual generation, while coupling them through a shared, simple, and efficient attention backbone that reduces redundant computation for fixed conditions. Building on MoD, we further introduce a data-centric length adaptation strategy that enables flexible-length decoding in multimodal settings without architectural changes. Extensive experiments show that LLaDA-o achieves state-of-the-art performance among omni-diffusion models on multimodal understanding and generation benchmarks, and reaches 87.04 on DPG-Bench for text-to-image generation, supporting the effectiveness of unified omni diffusion modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/LLaDA-o.

AI.tldr: LLaDA-o是一个创新的全能扩散模型，通过混合扩散框架（MoD）和数据驱动的长度自适应策略，实现了高效的多模态理解和生成，并在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 为了开发一个能够同时处理多模态理解和生成任务，并且能够适应不同长度输出的统一模型，同时提高效率和性能。
AI.method: 提出了混合扩散（MoD）框架，将文本理解的离散掩码扩散与视觉生成的连续扩散解耦，并通过共享的注意力骨干连接；同时引入了数据驱动的长度自适应策略，允许在不改变模型架构的情况下进行灵活长度的解码。
AI.result: LLaDA-o在多模态理解和生成基准测试中均取得了最先进的性能，并在文本到图像生成任务的DPG-Bench上达到了87.04的分数。
AI.conclusion: LLaDA-o证明了统一全能扩散模型在多模态理解和生成任务中的有效性，其MoD框架和长度自适应策略是实现高性能和灵活性的关键。

title: Beyond Global Similarity: Towards Fine-Grained, Multi-Condition Multimodal Retrieval
summary: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have substantially expanded the capabilities of multimodal retrieval, enabling systems to align and retrieve information across visual and textual modalities. Yet, existing benchmarks largely focus on coarse-grained or single-condition alignment, overlooking real-world scenarios where user queries specify multiple interdependent constraints across modalities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MCMR (Multi-Conditional Multimodal Retrieval): a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate fine-grained, multi-condition cross-modal retrieval under natural-language queries. MCMR spans five product domains: upper and bottom clothing, jewelry, shoes, and furniture. It also preserves rich long-form metadata essential for compositional matching. Each query integrates complementary visual and textual attributes, requiring models to jointly satisfy all specified conditions for relevance. We benchmark a diverse suite of MLLM-based multimodal retrievers and vision-language rerankers to assess their condition-aware reasoning abilities. Experimental results reveal: (i) distinct modality asymmetries across models; (ii) visual cues dominate early-rank precision, while textual metadata stabilizes long-tail ordering; and (iii) MLLM-based pointwise rerankers markedly improve fine-grained matching by explicitly verifying query-candidate consistency. Overall, MCMR establishes a challenging and diagnostic benchmark for advancing multimodal retrieval toward compositional, constraint-aware, and interpretable understanding. Our code and dataset is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/MCMR

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 MCMR，一个大型基准测试，用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在处理包含多个相互依赖条件（视觉和文本）的自然语言查询时的细粒度多模态检索能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试通常只关注粗粒度或单条件匹配，无法很好地模拟真实世界用户查询中包含多个相互依赖的跨模态约束的场景。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含五个产品领域（服装、珠宝、鞋子、家具）的大型数据集 MCMR，其中查询包含互补的视觉和文本属性，要求模型同时满足所有条件。使用多种基于 MLLM 的多模态检索器和视觉-语言重排器进行基准测试，评估它们在条件感知推理方面的能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：(i) 不同模型在模态处理上存在不对称性；(ii) 视觉线索在早期排名精度上起主导作用，而文本元数据能稳定长尾排序；(iii) 基于 MLLM 的逐点重排器通过显式验证查询-候选的一致性，显著提高了细粒度匹配效果。
AI.conclusion: MCMR 提供了一个具有挑战性和诊断性的基准，以推动多模态检索朝着组合性、约束感知和可解释的理解方向发展。

title: Adaptive Augmentation-Aware Latent Learning for Robust LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
comment: Accepted by International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
summary: Adverse weather conditions significantly degrade the performance of LiDAR point cloud semantic segmentation networks by introducing large distribution shifts. Existing augmentation-based methods attempt to enhance robustness by simulating weather interference during training. However, they struggle to fully exploit the potential of augmentations due to the trade-off between minor and aggressive augmentations. To address this, we propose A3Point, an adaptive augmentation-aware latent learning framework that effectively utilizes a diverse range of augmentations while mitigating the semantic shift, which refers to the change in the semantic meaning caused by augmentations. A3Point consists of two key components: semantic confusion prior (SCP) latent learning, which captures the model's inherent semantic confusion information, and semantic shift region (SSR) localization, which decouples semantic confusion and semantic shift, enabling adaptive optimization strategies for different disturbance levels. Extensive experiments on multiple standard generalized LiDAR segmentation benchmarks under adverse weather demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, setting new state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为A3Point的自适应增强感知潜在学习框架，用于提高LiDAR点云语义分割在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性，通过语义混淆先验和语义偏移区域定位来处理增强带来的语义变化，并在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 恶劣天气条件（如雨、雪、雾）会显著降低LiDAR点云语义分割网络的性能，产生大的分布偏移。现有的基于增强的方法试图在训练期间模拟天气干扰来增强鲁棒性，但由于微弱和剧烈增强之间的权衡，难以充分利用增强的潜力。
AI.method: 提出A3Point框架，包含两个关键组件：1. 语义混淆先验（SCP）潜在学习：捕捉模型固有的语义混淆信息。2. 语义偏移区域（SSR）定位：解耦语义混淆和语义偏移，实现针对不同扰动水平的自适应优化策略。
AI.result: 在多个通用的LiDAR分割基准测试中，在恶劣天气条件下进行了广泛的实验，证明了该方法的有效性，并设定了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: A3Point框架能够有效地利用多种增强方法，同时减轻增强引起的语义偏移，从而提高LiDAR点云语义分割在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性，并取得了优于现有方法的性能。

title: Can Vision Language Models Assess Graphic Design Aesthetics? A Benchmark, Evaluation, and Dataset Perspective
summary: Assessing the aesthetic quality of graphic design is central to visual communication, yet remains underexplored in vision language models (VLMs). We investigate whether VLMs can evaluate design aesthetics in ways comparable to humans. Prior work faces three key limitations: benchmarks restricted to narrow principles and coarse evaluation protocols, a lack of systematic VLM comparisons, and limited training data for model improvement. In this work, we introduce AesEval-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark spanning four dimensions, twelve indicators, and three fully quantifiable tasks: aesthetic judgment, region selection, and precise localization. Then, we systematically evaluate proprietary, open-source, and reasoning-augmented VLMs, revealing clear performance gaps against the nuanced demands of aesthetic assessment. Moreover, we construct a training dataset to fine-tune VLMs for this domain, leveraging human-guided VLM labeling to produce task labels at scale and indicator-grounded reasoning to tie abstract indicators to concrete design regions.Together, our work establishes the first systematic framework for aesthetic quality assessment in graphic design. Our code and dataset will be released at: \href{https://github.com/arctanxarc/AesEval-Bench}{https://github.com/arctanxarc/AesEval-Bench}

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了AesEval-Bench，一个用于评估图形设计美学质量的综合性基准，并系统地评估了各种视觉语言模型（VLMs）在该任务上的表现。研究发现现有VLMs在理解和评估设计美学方面存在显著差距，并构建了一个用于微调VLMs的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在评估图形设计美学方面表现不足，现有基准存在局限性（如范围窄、评估粗糙）、缺乏系统性模型比较以及训练数据不足。
AI.method: 1. 构建了一个名为AesEval-Bench 的综合性基准，包含四个维度、十二个指标和三种可量化任务（美学判断、区域选择、精确定位）。2. 系统地评估了专有、开源和增强推理能力的VLMs。3. 构建了一个用于微调VLMs的数据集，利用人类引导的VLM标注和基于指标的推理。
AI.result: 现有VLMs在美学评估方面与人类存在明显差距，表明美学评估对模型提出了细致的要求。通过微调，VLMs的性能有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次建立了图形设计美学质量评估的系统性框架，并通过提出的基准和微调方法，为提升VLMs在设计美学评估任务上的能力奠定了基础。

title: Flow Matching-enabled Test-Time Refinement for Unsupervised Cardiac MR Registration
summary: Diffusion-based unsupervised image registration has been explored for cardiac cine MR, but expensive multi-step inference limits practical use. We propose FlowReg, a flow-matching framework in displacement field space that achieves strong registration in as few as two steps and supports further refinement with more steps. FlowReg uses warmup-reflow training: a single-step network first acts as a teacher, then a student learns to refine from arbitrary intermediate states, removing the need for a pre-trained model as in existing methods. An Initial Guess strategy feeds back the model prediction as the next starting point, improving refinement from step two onward. On ACDC and MM2 across six tasks (including cross-dataset generalization), FlowReg outperforms the state of the art on five tasks (+0.6% mean Dice score on average), with the largest gain in the left ventricle (+1.09%), and reduces LVEF estimation error on all six tasks (-2.58 percentage points), using only 0.7% extra parameters and no segmentation labels. Anonymized code is available at https://github.com/mathpluscode/FlowReg.

AI.tldr: FlowReg 是一种基于流匹配的无监督心脏电影 MR 图像配准框架，通过创新的训练策略（warmup-reflow）和迭代细化方法，能够在极少数步骤内实现高性能配准，同时显著减少了计算成本和 LVEF 估算误差，且无需分割标签。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散模型的心脏电影 MR 图像配准方法虽然效果好，但推理过程耗时过长，限制了其实际应用。研究人员希望开发一种既能保持高配准精度，又能显著提高推理速度的方法。
AI.method: FlowReg 提出了一种在位移场空间中进行流匹配的框架。其核心创新在于：1. Warmup-reflow 训练策略：使用单步网络作为教师，然后学生网络从任意中间状态进行学习和细化，避免了对预训练模型的依赖。2. Initial Guess 策略：将模型的预测结果反馈作为下一个迭代的起始点，以改进后续步骤的细化效果。FlowReg 在 ACDC 和 MM2 数据集上进行了测试，涵盖了六项任务，包括跨数据集泛化。
AI.result: FlowReg 在六项任务中的五项上优于现有最先进的方法，平均 Dice 分数提高了 0.6%，其中左心室的提升尤为显著（+1.09%）。同时，FlowReg 将 LVEF 估算误差降低了 2.58 个百分点。该方法仅增加了 0.7% 的额外参数，并且不需要分割标签。
AI.conclusion: FlowReg 是一种高效且有效的无监督心脏电影 MR 图像配准方法。它通过流匹配框架和创新的训练及细化策略，在保证或提升配准精度的同时，大幅缩短了推理时间，并降低了 LVEF 估算误差，为临床应用提供了更有前景的解决方案。

title: Data-Efficient Brushstroke Generation with Diffusion Models for Oil Painting
summary: Many creative multimedia systems are built upon visual primitives such as strokes or textures, which are difficult to collect at scale and fundamentally different from natural image data. This data scarcity makes it challenging for modern generative models to learn expressive and controllable primitives, limiting their use in process-aware content creation. In this work, we study the problem of learning human-like brushstroke generation from a small set of hand-drawn samples (n=470) and propose StrokeDiff, a diffusion-based framework with Smooth Regularization (SmR). SmR injects stochastic visual priors during training, providing a simple mechanism to stabilize diffusion models under sparse supervision without altering the inference process. We further show how the learned primitives can be made controllable through a Bézier-based conditioning module and integrated into a complete stroke-based painting pipeline, including prediction, generation, ordering, and compositing. This demonstrates how data-efficient primitive modeling can support expressive and structured multimedia content creation. Experiments indicate that the proposed approach produces diverse and structurally coherent brushstrokes and enables paintings with richer texture and layering, validated by both automatic metrics and human evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了StrokeDiff，一种基于扩散模型的框架，用于从少量手绘样本中学习和生成类人笔触，并引入了平滑正则化（SmR）来稳定训练，以及基于贝塞尔曲线的条件模块来控制生成，最终构建了一个完整的绘画流程。
AI.motivation: 现有的创意多媒体系统依赖于难以大规模收集且与自然图像不同的视觉基元（如笔触、纹理），导致数据稀缺，限制了生成模型在过程感知内容创作中的应用。
AI.method: 提出了StrokeDiff，一个基于扩散模型的框架，并引入了平滑正则化（SmR）在训练过程中注入随机视觉先验，以稳定稀疏监督下的扩散模型。此外，还设计了一个基于贝塞尔曲线的条件模块来实现笔触的可控生成，并将其整合到预测、生成、排序和合成等完整的绘画流程中。
AI.result: StrokeDiff能够生成多样化且结构连贯的笔触，生成的画作具有更丰富的纹理和层次感，并通过自动评估和人类评估得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 数据高效的基元建模可以支持富有表现力和结构化的多媒体内容创作，StrokeDiff框架有效地解决了从少量数据学习和控制笔触生成的问题。

title: GroundedSurg: A Multi-Procedure Benchmark for Language-Conditioned Surgical Tool Segmentation
summary: Clinically reliable perception of surgical scenes is essential for advancing intelligent, context-aware intraoperative assistance such as instrument handoff guidance, collision avoidance, and workflow-aware robotic support. Existing surgical tool benchmarks primarily evaluate category-level segmentation, requiring models to detect all instances of predefined instrument classes. However, real-world clinical decisions often require resolving references to a specific instrument instance based on its functional role, spatial relation, or anatomical interaction capabilities not captured by current evaluation paradigms. We introduce GroundedSurg, the first language-conditioned, instance-level surgical grounding benchmark. Each instance pairs a surgical image with a natural-language description targeting a single instrument, accompanied by structured spatial grounding annotations including bounding boxes and point-level anchors. The dataset spans ophthalmic, laparoscopic, robotic, and open procedures, encompassing diverse instrument types, imaging conditions, and operative complexities. By jointly evaluating linguistic reference resolution and pixel-level localization, GroundedSurg enables a systematic and realistic evaluation of vision-language models in clinically realistic multi-instrument scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial performance gaps across modern segmentation and VLMs, highlighting the urgent need for clinically grounded vision-language reasoning in surgical AI systems. Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/gaash-lab/GroundedSurg

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GroundedSurg，一个首个面向实例的、语言条件约束的手术场景理解基准，用于评估视觉-语言模型在手术场景中的实例级定位能力，以支持更智能的术中辅助。
AI.motivation: 现有的手术工具分割基准主要关注类别级别的分割，无法满足临床决策中对特定工具实例的识别需求，而这对于上下文感知的手术辅助至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为GroundedSurg的数据集，其中包含手术图像、针对单个工具的自然语言描述以及像素级的空间定位标注（边界框和锚点）。该数据集涵盖了多种手术类型和复杂性。
AI.result: 通过在GroundedSurg数据集上的实验，发现当前先进的分割模型和视觉-语言模型在实例级手术场景理解方面存在显著性能差距，表明在手术AI系统中进行临床场景的视觉-语言推理存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: GroundedSurg为评估和开发能够理解语言指令并精确定位手术工具实例的视觉-语言模型提供了一个新的、更贴近临床实际的基准，强调了在手术AI中实现临床场景下视觉-语言推理的紧迫性。

title: HeroGS: Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting under Sparse Views
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as a promising approach in novel view synthesis, combining photorealistic rendering with real-time efficiency. However, its success heavily relies on dense camera coverage; under sparse-view conditions, insufficient supervision leads to irregular Gaussian distributions, characterized by globally sparse coverage, blurred background, and distorted high-frequency areas. To address this, we propose HeroGS, Hierarchical Guidance for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting, a unified framework that establishes hierarchical guidance across the image, feature, and parameter levels. At the image level, sparse supervision is converted into pseudo-dense guidance, globally regularizing the Gaussian distributions and forming a consistent foundation for subsequent optimization. Building upon this, Feature-Adaptive Densification and Pruning (FADP) at the feature level leverages low-level features to refine high-frequency details and adaptively densifies Gaussians in background regions. The optimized distributions then support Co-Pruned Geometry Consistency (CPG) at parameter level, which guides geometric consistency through parameter freezing and co-pruning, effectively removing inconsistent splats. The hierarchical guidance strategy effectively constrains and optimizes the overall Gaussian distributions, thereby enhancing both structural fidelity and rendering quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HeroGS achieves high-fidelity reconstructions and consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines under sparse-view conditions.

AI.tldr: HeroGS 提出了一种分层指导框架，通过图像、特征和参数层面的协同优化，有效解决了 3D 高斯泼溅在稀疏视角下的重建质量下降问题，实现了高保真度的新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 现有的 3D 高斯泼溅（3DGS）方法在密集相机覆盖下表现出色，但在稀疏视角条件下，由于监督不足，会导致高斯分布不规则，出现全局稀疏、背景模糊和高频区域失真等问题。研究旨在解决稀疏视角下的 3DGS 重建质量问题。
AI.method: 提出 HeroGS 框架，包含三个层面的分层指导：1. 图像层面：将稀疏监督转化为伪密集指导，全局正则化高斯分布。2. 特征层面：通过特征自适应致密化与剪枝（FADP），利用低级特征细化高频细节，并自适应地致密化背景区域高斯。3. 参数层面：利用几何一致性（CPG）通过参数冻结和协同剪枝指导几何一致性，去除不一致的泼溅。
AI.result: HeroGS 在稀疏视角条件下实现了高保真度的重建，并且在实验中持续超越了现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HeroGS 的分层指导策略有效地约束和优化了整体高斯分布，显著提升了结构保真度和渲染质量，解决了稀疏视角下 3DGS 的关键挑战。

title: DeAR: Fine-Grained VLM Adaptation by Decomposing Attention Head Roles
summary: Prompt learning is a dominant paradigm for adapting pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to downstream tasks. However, existing methods often rely on a simplistic, layer-centric view, assuming shallow layers capture general features while deep layers handle task-specific knowledge. This assumption results in uncontrolled interactions between learnable tokens and original tokens. Task-specific knowledge could degrades the model's core generalization and creates a trade-off between task adaptation and the preservation of zero-shot generalization. To address this, we challenge the layer-centric view and propose \textbf{DeAR}, a framework that achieves fine-grained VLM adaptation by \textbf{De}composing \textbf{A}ttention head \textbf{R}oles. We posit that the functional specialization within VLMs occurs not between layers, but at the finer-grained level of individual attention heads in the deeper layers. Based on this insight, we introduce a novel metric, Concept Entropy, to systematically classify attention heads into distinct functional roles: \textit{Attribute}, \textit{Generalization}, and \textit{Mixed}. Guided by these roles, we introduce specialized attribute tokens and a Role-Based Attention Mask mechanism to precisely control information flow, ensuring generalization heads remain isolated from task-specific knowledge. We further incorporate a Task-Adaptive Fusion Strategy for inference. Extensive experiments on fifteen datasets show that DeAR achieves a strong balance between task adaptation and generalization, outperforming previous methods across various tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 DeAR 的新框架，通过分解注意力头角色来对视觉语言模型（VLMs）进行精细化适应，以解决现有方法在任务适应性和零样本泛化性之间存在权衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示学习的方法在适应预训练的 VLMs 到下游任务时，假设浅层捕捉通用特征，深层处理任务特定知识。这种方法导致可学习提示和原始 token 之间的交互不可控，从而损害了模型的泛化能力，并在任务适应性和保留零样本泛化能力之间产生了权衡。
AI.method: DeAR 框架通过分解注意力头的角色来实现精细化的 VLM 适应。它首先引入“概念熵”指标对注意力头的功能进行分类（属性、泛化、混合），然后基于这些角色，使用专门的属性 token 和基于角色的注意力掩码机制来控制信息流，并结合任务自适应融合策略进行推理。
AI.result: 在十五个数据集上的广泛实验表明，DeAR 在任务适应性和泛化性之间取得了良好的平衡，并且在各种任务上的表现优于先前的方法。
AI.conclusion: DeAR 框架成功地挑战了层级中心的观点，并通过识别和利用注意力头的功能特异性，实现了 VLM 的精细化适应，同时有效地平衡了任务适应性和零样本泛化能力。

title: Improved MambdaBDA Framework for Robust Building Damage Assessment Across Disaster Domains
summary: Reliable post-disaster building damage assessment (BDA) from satellite imagery is hindered by severe class imbalance, background clutter, and domain shift across disaster types and geographies. In this work, we address these problems and explore ways to improve the MambaBDA, the BDA network of ChangeMamba architecture, one of the most successful BDA models. The approach enhances the MambaBDA with three modular components: (i) Focal Loss to mitigate class imbalance damage classification, (ii) lightweight Attention Gates to suppress irrelevant context, and (iii) a compact Alignment Module to spatially warp pre-event features toward post-event content before decoding. We experiment on multiple satellite imagery datasets, including xBD, Pakistan Flooding, Turkey Earthquake, and Ida Hurricane, and conduct in-domain and crossdataset tests. The proposed modular enhancements yield consistent improvements over the baseline model, with 0.8% to 5% performance gains in-domain, and up to 27% on unseen disasters. This indicates that the proposed enhancements are especially beneficial for the generalization capability of the system.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种改进的 MambaBDA 模型，通过引入 Focal Loss、注意力门和对齐模块，提高了灾后建筑损坏评估（BDA）的准确性和泛化能力，尤其是在处理类别不平衡、背景干扰和跨领域数据集时。
AI.motivation: 现有灾后建筑损坏评估（BDA）模型在处理图像中的类别不平衡、背景杂乱以及不同灾难类型和地理位置带来的领域偏移问题时存在困难。
AI.method: 研究通过向 MambaBDA 添加三个模块来增强其性能：1. Focal Loss 用于缓解类别不平衡问题；2. 轻量级注意力门用于抑制无关背景信息；3. 紧凑型对齐模块用于在解码前将预事件特征空间扭曲以匹配后事件内容。
AI.result: 在 xBD、巴基斯坦洪水、土耳其地震和艾达飓风等多个卫星图像数据集上进行的实验显示，所提出的模块化增强在同域测试中带来了 0.8% 到 5% 的性能提升，在未见过的数据集（跨数据集测试）上提升高达 27%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模块化增强方法显著提高了 MambaBDA 模型的性能，尤其是在提升其对未知灾难的泛化能力方面。

title: GuiDINO: Rethinking Vision Foundation Model in Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Foundation vision models are increasingly adopted in medical image analysis. Due to domain shift, these pretrained models misalign with medical image segmentation needs without being fully fine-tuned or lightly adapted. We introduce GuiDINO, a framework that repositions native foundation model to acting as a visual guidance generator for downstream segmentation. GuiDINO extracts visual feature representation from DINOv3 and converts them into a spatial guide mask via a lightweight TokenBook mechanism, which aggregates token-prototype similarities. This guide mask gates feature activations in multiple segmentation backbones, thereby injecting foundation-model priors while preserving the inductive biases and efficiency of medical dedicated architectures. Training relies on a guide supervision objective loss that aligns the guide mask to ground-truth regions, optionally augmented by a boundary-focused hinge loss to sharpen fine structures. GuiDINO also supports parameter-efficient adaptation through LoRA on the DINOv3 guide backbone. Across diverse medical datasets and nnUNet-style inference, GuiDINO consistently improves segmentation quality and boundary robustness, suggesting a practical alternative to fine-tuning and offering a new perspective on how foundation models can best serve medical vision. Code is available at https://github.com/Hi-FishU/GuiDINO

AI.tldr: GuiDINO是一个新框架，通过生成视觉引导掩码来提升医学图像分割的性能，该掩码基于DINOv3的特征，并利用TokenBook机制聚合，然后用于门控分割骨干网络，同时支持参数高效的LoRA适应。
AI.motivation: 现有用于医学图像分析的预训练视觉基础模型，由于领域漂移问题，在未完全微调的情况下，与医学图像分割的需求不匹配。研究旨在找到一种更有效的方式来利用基础模型的能力。
AI.method: GuiDINO框架提取DINOv3的视觉特征，并通过轻量级的TokenBook机制（聚合token-prototype相似度）将其转换为空间引导掩码。该掩码用于门控多个分割骨干网络中的特征激活。训练采用引导监督损失，并将引导掩码与真实区域对齐，可选地增加了一个关注边界的铰链损失。GuiDINO还支持在DINOv3引导骨干网络上使用LoRA进行参数高效适应。
AI.result: 在多种医学数据集和nnUNet风格的推理下，GuiDINO一致地提高了分割质量和边界鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GuiDINO为医学图像分割提供了一种实用的替代微调的方案，并提供了一种利用基础模型的新视角，使其能更好地服务于医学视觉任务。

title: ConVibNet: Needle Detection during Continuous Insertion via Frequency-Inspired Features
summary:
Purpose: Ultrasound-guided needle interventions are widely used in clinical practice, but their success critically depends on accurate needle placement, which is frequently hindered by the poor and intermittent visibility of needles in ultrasound images. Existing approaches remain limited by artifacts, occlusions, and low contrast, and often fail to support real-time continuous insertion. To overcome these challenges, this study introduces a robust real-time framework for continuous needle detection.
  Methods: We present ConVibNet, an extension of VibNet for detecting needles with significantly reduced visibility, addressing real-time, continuous needle tracking during insertion. ConVibNet leverages temporal dependencies across successive ultrasound frames to enable continuous estimation of both needle tip position and shaft angle in dynamic scenarios. To strengthen temporal awareness of needle-tip motion, we introduce a novel intersection-and-difference loss that explicitly leverages motion correlations across consecutive frames. In addition, we curated a dedicated dataset for model development and evaluation.
  Results: The performance of the proposed ConVibNet model was evaluated on our dataset, demonstrating superior accuracy compared to the baseline VibNet and UNet-LSTM models. Specifically, ConVibNet achieved a tip error of 2.80+-2.42 mm and an angle error of 1.69+-2.00 deg. These results represent a 0.75 mm improvement in tip localization accuracy over the best-performing baseline, while preserving real-time inference capability.
  Conclusion: ConVibNet advances real-time needle detection in ultrasound-guided interventions by integrating temporal correlation modeling with a novel intersection-and-difference loss, thereby improving accuracy and robustness and demonstrating high potential for integration into autonomous insertion systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ConVibNet的实时框架，用于在超声引导下检测可见性差的针头，通过利用连续超声帧之间的时间依赖性和新的交集-差值损失函数，提高了针尖定位和角度估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 超声引导下的穿刺操作中，针头可见性差和间歇性是影响操作成功率的关键因素。现有方法受伪影、遮挡和低对比度限制，难以支持实时连续穿刺。
AI.method: 提出ConVibNet，作为VibNet的扩展，用于检测可见性差的针头。该方法利用连续超声帧之间的时间依赖性，实现了针尖位置和针杆角度的连续估计。引入了新的交集-差值损失函数来增强对针尖运动的时间感知。同时，构建了一个专门的数据集用于模型开发和评估。
AI.result: ConVibNet在自有数据集上表现优于基线模型VibNet和UNet-LSTM。其针尖误差为2.80±2.42 mm，角度误差为1.69±2.00度，在针尖定位精度上比最佳基线模型提高了0.75 mm，并保持了实时推理能力。
AI.conclusion: ConVibNet通过整合时间相关性建模和新的交集-差值损失函数，在实时超声针头检测方面取得了进展，提高了准确性和鲁棒性，并展示了集成到自主穿刺系统的巨大潜力。

title: BeautyGRPO: Aesthetic Alignment for Face Retouching via Dynamic Path Guidance and Fine-Grained Preference Modeling
summary: Face retouching requires removing subtle imperfections while preserving unique facial identity features, in order to enhance overall aesthetic appeal. However, existing methods suffer from a fundamental trade-off. Supervised learning on labeled data is constrained to pixel-level label mimicry, failing to capture complex subjective human aesthetic preferences. Conversely, while online reinforcement learning (RL) excels at preference alignment, its stochastic exploration paradigm conflicts with the high-fidelity demands of face retouching and often introduces noticeable noise artifacts due to accumulated stochastic drift. To address these limitations, we propose BeautyGRPO, a reinforcement learning framework that aligns face retouching with human aesthetic preferences.
