Based on our findings, We recommend encoder fine-tuning with hyperparameter optimization optimization to achieve the best possible performance, while using frozen encoders when users need quick results without extensive experimentation.(\href{https://github.com/Sk-2103/Cryo-Bench}{GitHub}).

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了 Cryo-Bench 评估基准，以测试 Geo-Foundation Models (GFMs) 在冰冻圈应用中的性能。结果表明，在某些设置下，GFMs 表现出色，尤其是在少样本场景下，并且具有良好的领域适应性。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏用于评估 Geo-Foundation Models (GFMs) 在冰冻圈应用中性能的基准数据集，这限制了对 GFMs 在该领域潜力的了解。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为 Cryo-Bench 的基准，包含碎屑覆盖冰川、冰川湖、海冰和崩解冰缘等关键冰冻圈组件，并跨越多种传感器和地理区域。评估了 14 种 GFMs 和 UNet、ViT 基线模型，并在不同设置下（冻结编码器、少样本、完全微调）进行了测试。
AI.result: 在冻结编码器设置下，UNet 取得了最高的平均 mIoU (66.38%)。在少样本设置下 (10% 输入数据)，DOFA 和 TerraMind 等 GFM 优于 UNet。完全微调 GFM 的性能不一致，但调整学习率可以显著提高性能（GLID 和 CaFFe 数据集平均相对提升 12.77%）。GFMs 即使在预训练数据中对冰冻圈代表性很小的情况下，也展现了显著的领域适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 建议通过超参数优化的编码器微调来获得最佳 GFM 性能，而当需要快速结果且无需大量实验时，可以使用冻结编码器。GFMs 在冰冻圈应用中具有强大的领域适应性，即使预训练数据中缺乏相关信息。

title: Preference Score Distillation: Leveraging 2D Rewards to Align Text-to-3D Generation with Human Preference
summary: Human preference alignment presents a critical yet underexplored challenge for diffusion models in text-to-3D generation. Existing solutions typically require task-specific fine-tuning, posing significant hurdles in data-scarce 3D domains. To address this, we propose Preference Score Distillation (PSD), an optimization-based framework that leverages pretrained 2D reward models for human-aligned text-to-3D synthesis without 3D training data. Our key insight stems from the incompatibility of pixel-level gradients: due to the absence of noisy samples during reward model training, direct application of 2D reward gradients disturbs the denoising process. Noticing that similar issue occurs in the naive classifier guidance in conditioned diffusion models, we fundamentally rethink preference alignment as a classifier-free guidance (CFG)-style mechanism through our implicit reward model. Furthermore, recognizing that frozen pretrained diffusion models constrain performance, we introduce an adaptive strategy to co-optimize preference scores and negative text embeddings. By incorporating CFG during optimization, online refinement of negative text embeddings dynamically enhances alignment. To our knowledge, we are the first to bridge human preference alignment with CFG theory under score distillation framework. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of PSD in aesthetic metrics, seamless integration with diverse pipelines, and strong extensibility.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Preference Score Distillation (PSD)的优化框架，利用预训练的2D奖励模型，无需3D训练数据即可实现人类偏好对齐的文本到3D生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法在人类偏好对齐方面存在挑战，需要特定任务的微调，这在数据稀缺的3D领域很困难。PSD旨在解决这个问题。
AI.method: PSD利用预训练的2D奖励模型，将其视为一种隐式奖励模型，并通过类似分类器自由引导（CFG）的机制实现偏好对齐。框架还引入了一种自适应策略，用于联合优化偏好分数和负文本嵌入，以克服冻结预训练扩散模型的限制。
AI.result: PSD在美学指标上表现优于现有方法，并能与不同的生成流程无缝集成，表现出很强的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: PSD成功地将人类偏好对齐与CFG理论相结合，并在评分蒸馏框架下实现了无需3D训练数据的高效文本到3D生成。

title: InterCoG: Towards Spatially Precise Image Editing with Interleaved Chain-of-Grounding Reasoning
summary: Emerging unified editing models have demonstrated strong capabilities in general object editing tasks. However, it remains a significant challenge to perform fine-grained editing in complex multi-entity scenes, particularly those where targets are not visually salient and require spatial reasoning. To this end, we propose InterCoG, a novel text-vision Interleaved Chain-of-Grounding reasoning framework for fine-grained image editing in complex real-world scenes. The key insight of InterCoG is to first perform object position reasoning solely within text that includes spatial relation details to explicitly deduce the location and identity of the edited target. It then conducts visual grounding via highlighting the editing targets with generated bounding boxes and masks in pixel space, and finally rewrites the editing description to specify the intended outcomes. To further facilitate this paradigm, we propose two auxiliary training modules: multimodal grounding reconstruction supervision and multimodal grounding reasoning alignment to enforce spatial localization accuracy and reasoning interpretability, respectively. We also construct GroundEdit-45K, a dataset comprising 45K grounding-oriented editing samples with detailed reasoning annotations, and GroundEdit-Bench for grounding-aware editing evaluation. Extensive experiments substantiate the superiority of our approach in highly precise edits under spatially intricate and multi-entity scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为InterCoG的文本-视觉交错式推理框架，用于复杂多实体场景下的细粒度图像编辑，通过文本空间推理、视觉定位和编辑描述重写实现精确编辑，并引入辅助训练模块和数据集GroundEdit-45K以提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的统一编辑模型在处理复杂场景下的细粒度编辑时存在挑战，尤其当编辑目标不明显且需要空间推理时。
AI.method: InterCoG框架首先在纯文本层面进行目标位置推理，然后通过视觉定位（生成边界框和掩码）识别编辑目标，最后重写编辑描述。引入了多模态接地重建监督和多模态接地推理对齐两个辅助训练模块。
AI.result: 在复杂空间和多实体场景下，InterCoG在高度精确的编辑任务上表现优于现有方法。实验结果验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: InterCoG框架能够有效地解决复杂场景下的细粒度图像编辑问题，尤其在需要空间推理和精确定位目标的情况下。提出的辅助训练模块和数据集GroundEdit-45K有助于提升模型的性能和可解释性。

title: PPEDCRF: Privacy-Preserving Enhanced Dynamic CRF for Location-Privacy Protection for Sequence Videos with Minimal Detection Degradation
summary: Dashcam videos collected by autonomous or assisted-driving systems are increasingly shared for safety auditing and model improvement. Even when explicit GPS metadata are removed, an attacker can still infer the recording location by matching background visual cues (e.g., buildings and road layouts) against large-scale street-view imagery. This paper studies location-privacy leakage under a background-based retrieval attacker, and proposes PPEDCRF, a privacy-preserving enhanced dynamic conditional random field framework that injects calibrated perturbations only into inferred location-sensitive background regions while preserving foreground detection utility. PPEDCRF consists of three components: (i) a dynamic CRF that enforces temporal consistency to discover and track location sensitive regions across frames, (ii) a normalized control penalty (NCP) that allocates perturbation strength according to a hierarchical sensitivity model, and (iii) a utility-preserving noise injection module that minimizes interference to object detection and segmentation. Experiments on public driving datasets demonstrate that PPEDCRF significantly reduces location-retrieval attack success (e.g., Top-k retrieval accuracy) while maintaining competitive detection performance (e.g., mAP and segmentation metrics) compared with common baselines such as global noise, white-noise masking, and feature-based anonymization. The source code is in https://github.com/mabo1215/PPEDCRF.git

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为PPEDCRF的框架，通过在驾驶视频中识别和扰乱位置敏感的背景区域，来保护录制地点隐私，同时保持前景对象检测的实用性。
AI.motivation: 由于自动驾驶系统收集的行车记录仪视频可能泄露录制地点信息，即使移除了GPS元数据，攻击者仍可通过匹配背景视觉线索（如建筑物、道路布局）来推断位置。因此，研究旨在解决此类背景视觉线索带来的位置隐私泄露问题。
AI.method: 研究提出了PPEDCRF（Privacy-Preserving Enhanced Dynamic Conditional Random Field）框架，该框架包含三个主要组成部分：1. 动态条件随机场（CRF）用于强制时间一致性，跨帧发现和跟踪位置敏感区域；2. 归一化控制惩罚（NCP）根据分层敏感性模型分配扰动强度；3. 实用性保护噪声注入模块，最小化对对象检测和分割的干扰。该框架仅在推断出的位置敏感背景区域注入经过校准的扰动。
AI.result: 在公开驾驶数据集上的实验表明，PPEDCRF显著降低了基于背景检索的位置检索攻击成功率（如Top-k检索准确率），同时与全局噪声、白噪声掩码和基于特征的匿名化等常用基线相比，保持了具有竞争力的检测性能（如mAP和分割指标）。
AI.conclusion: PPEDCRF能够有效地在保护行车记录仪视频位置隐私的同时，维持对象检测和分割的实用性，为解决此类隐私泄露问题提供了一种有效的方法。

title: TopoMaskV3: 3D Mask Head with Dense Offset and Height Predictions for Road Topology Understanding
summary: Mask-based paradigms for road topology understanding, such as TopoMaskV2, offer a complementary alternative to query-based methods by generating centerlines via a dense rasterized intermediate representation. However, prior work was limited to 2D predictions and suffered from severe discretization artifacts, necessitating fusion with parametric heads. We introduce TopoMaskV3, which advances this pipeline into a robust, standalone 3D predictor via two novel dense prediction heads: a dense offset field for sub-grid discretization correction within the existing BEV resolution, and a dense height map for direct 3D estimation. Beyond the architecture, we are the first to address geographic data leakage in road topology evaluation by introducing (1) geographically distinct splits to prevent memorization and ensure fair generalization, and (2) a long-range (+/-100 m) benchmark. TopoMaskV3 achieves state-of-the-art 28.5 OLS on this geographically disjoint benchmark, surpassing all prior methods. Our analysis shows that the mask representation is more robust to geographic overfitting than Bezier, while LiDAR fusion is most beneficial at long range and exhibits larger relative gains on the overlapping original split, suggesting overlap-induced memorization effects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TopoMaskV3，一种无需后处理即可进行3D道路拓扑预测的改进方法，并通过引入地理上独立的数据集和长距离基准来解决地理数据泄露问题，在新的基准上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于掩码的道路拓扑理解方法（如TopoMaskV2）在2D预测上存在离散化伪影，需要与参数化模型融合，并且在评估时存在地理数据泄露问题，导致模型过拟合。
AI.method: 提出了TopoMaskV3，通过引入两个新的密集预测头：密集偏移场（用于子网格离散化校正）和密集高度图（用于直接3D估计），将管道提升为独立的3D预测器。此外，设计了地理上独立的数据集划分和长距离（+/-100 m）基准来解决地理数据泄露问题。
AI.result: TopoMaskV3在地理上独立的新基准上取得了28.5 OLS的最先进性能，超越了所有先前方法。分析表明，掩码表示比Bezier对地理过拟合更鲁棒，而LiDAR融合在长距离上最有效，并且在有重叠的原始数据集上显示出更大的相对收益，这可能归因于重叠引起了记忆效应。
AI.conclusion: TopoMaskV3通过改进的3D预测能力和新颖的评估基准，在道路拓扑理解方面取得了显著进展。提出的评估方法有助于更公平地评估模型的泛化能力，并揭示了不同方法在处理地理数据时的鲁棒性差异。

title: Sparse View Distractor-Free Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables efficient training and fast novel view synthesis in static environments. To address challenges posed by transient objects, distractor-free 3DGS methods have emerged and shown promising results when dense image captures are available. However, their performance degrades significantly under sparse input conditions. This limitation primarily stems from the reliance on the color residual heuristics to guide the training, which becomes unreliable with limited observations. In this work, we propose a framework to enhance distractor-free 3DGS under sparse-view conditions by incorporating rich prior information. Specifically, we first adopt the geometry foundation model VGGT to estimate camera parameters and generate a dense set of initial 3D points. Then, we harness the attention maps from VGGT for efficient and accurate semantic entity matching. Additionally, we utilize Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to further identify and preserve the large static regions in the scene. We also demonstrate how these priors can be seamlessly integrated into existing distractor-free 3DGS methods. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness and robustness of our approach in mitigating transient distractors for sparse-view 3DGS training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在稀疏视图条件下增强无干扰3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的方法，通过整合几何基础模型（VGGT）和视觉语言模型（VLMs）的先验信息，来解决现有方法在稀疏数据下性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的无干扰3DGS方法在稀疏视图条件下性能会显著下降，主要是因为依赖颜色残差启发式训练变得不可靠。研究旨在解决这一挑战，提升稀疏视图场景下3DGS的效果。
AI.method: 1. 利用几何基础模型VGGT估计相机参数并生成初始3D点。2. 利用VGGT的注意力图进行语义实体匹配。3. 利用视觉语言模型（VLMs）识别和保留大的静态区域。4. 将这些先验信息无缝集成到现有的无干扰3DGS方法中。
AI.result: 通过实验证明，该方法能够有效地缓解稀疏视图3DGS训练中的瞬态干扰物问题，并在稀疏视图条件下提升3DGS的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架通过整合丰富的先验信息，成功地增强了稀疏视图条件下的无干扰3DGS，解决了现有方法的局限性，并展示了其有效性和鲁棒性。

title: Coarse-to-Fine Monocular Re-Localization in OpenStreetMap via Semantic Alignment
summary: Monocular re-localization plays a crucial role in enabling intelligent agents to achieve human-like perception. However, traditional methods rely on dense maps, which face scalability limitations and privacy risks. OpenStreetMap (OSM), as a lightweight map that protects privacy, offers semantic and geometric information with global scalability. Nonetheless, there are still challenges in using OSM for localization: the inherent cross-modal discrepancies between natural images and OSM, as well as the high computational cost of global map-based localization. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical search framework with semantic alignment for localization in OSM. First, the semantic awareness capability of DINO-ViT is utilised to deconstruct visual elements to establish semantic relationships with OSM. Second, a coarse-to-fine search paradigm is designed to replace global dense matching, enabling efficient progressive refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves both localization accuracy and speed. When trained on a single dataset, the 3° orientation recall of our method even outperforms the 5° recall of state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于OpenStreetMap（OSM）的层次化语义对齐重定位框架，解决了传统稠密地图的局限性，并提高了OSM的重定位效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于稠密地图的单目重定位方法存在可扩展性和隐私风险；OSM具有全局可扩展性且保护隐私，但存在跨模态差异和高计算成本的挑战。
AI.method: 利用DINO-ViT的语义感知能力建立视觉元素与OSM的语义关联；设计了一种粗到精的搜索范式，以替代全局稠密匹配，实现高效的渐进式精炼。
AI.result: 所提出的方法显著提高了重定位的准确性和速度。在单一数据集上训练时，本文方法的3°方向召回率甚至优于现有最先进方法的5°召回率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合OSM的优势和先进的视觉语义模型，成功地实现了高效且准确的单目重定位。

title: Dehallu3D: Hallucination-Mitigated 3D Generation from Single Image via Cyclic View Consistency Refinement
summary: Large 3D reconstruction models have revolutionized the 3D content generation field, enabling broad applications in virtual reality and gaming. Just like other large models, large 3D reconstruction models suffer from hallucinations as well, introducing structural outliers (e.g., odd holes or protrusions) that deviate from the input data. However, unlike other large models, hallucinations in large 3D reconstruction models remain severely underexplored, leading to malformed 3D-printed objects or insufficient immersion in virtual scenes. Such hallucinations majorly originate from that existing methods reconstruct 3D content from sparsely generated multi-view images which suffer from large viewpoint gaps and discontinuities. To mitigate hallucinations by eliminating the outliers, we propose Dehallu3D for 3D mesh generation. Our key idea is to design a balanced multi-view continuity constraint to enforce smooth transitions across dense intermediate viewpoints, while avoiding over-smoothing that could erase sharp geometric features. Therefore, Dehallu3D employs a plug-and-play optimization module with two key constraints: (i) adjacent consistency to ensure geometric continuity across views, and (ii) adaptive smoothness to retain fine details.We further propose the Outlier Risk Measure (ORM) metric to quantify geometric fidelity in 3D generation from the perspective of outliers. Extensive experiments show that Dehallu3D achieves high-fidelity 3D generation by effectively preserving structural details while removing hallucinated outliers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Dehallu3D 的方法，用于解决大型 3D 重建模型中的幻觉问题，通过引入多视图连续性约束和自适应平滑来提高 3D 生成的保真度，并提出 ORM 指标来量化几何保真度。
AI.motivation: 大型 3D 重建模型存在幻觉问题，导致生成 3D 内容出现结构异常，影响虚拟现实和 3D 打印的应用。现有方法从稀疏多视图图像重建 3D 内容，存在视角间隙和不连续性，加剧了幻觉。
AI.method: 提出 Dehallu3D 方法，采用即插即用的优化模块，包含两个关键约束：(i) 相邻视图一致性，确保跨视图的几何连续性；(ii) 自适应平滑，保留细节。还提出了 Outlier Risk Measure (ORM) 指标来量化几何保真度。
AI.result: Dehallu3D 有效地保留了结构细节，同时消除了幻觉产生的异常点，实现了高保真度的 3D 生成。ORM 指标能够量化生成结果的几何保真度。
AI.conclusion: Dehallu3D 是一种有效的方法，可以通过多视图连续性约束和自适应平滑来解决大型 3D 重建模型中的幻觉问题，生成高质量的 3D 内容。ORM 指标为评估 3D 生成的几何保真度提供了一种新的量化方式。

title: DriveCombo: Benchmarking Compositional Traffic Rule Reasoning in Autonomous Driving
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are rapidly becoming the intelligence brain of end-to-end autonomous driving systems. A key challenge is to assess whether MLLMs can truly understand and follow complex real-world traffic rules. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-rule scenarios like traffic sign recognition, neglecting the complexity of multi-rule concurrency and conflicts in real driving. Consequently, models perform well on simple tasks but often fail or violate rules in real world complex situations. To bridge this gap, we propose DriveCombo, a text and vision-based benchmark for compositional traffic rule reasoning. Inspired by human drivers' cognitive development, we propose a systematic Five-Level Cognitive Ladder that evaluates reasoning from single-rule understanding to multi-rule integration and conflict resolution, enabling quantitative assessment across cognitive stages. We further propose a Rule2Scene Agent that maps language-based traffic rules to dynamic driving scenes through rule crafting and scene generation, enabling scene-level traffic rule visual reasoning. Evaluations of 14 mainstream MLLMs reveal performance drops as task complexity grows, particularly during rule conflicts. After splitting the dataset and fine-tuning on the training set, we further observe substantial improvements in both traffic rule reasoning and downstream planning capabilities. These results highlight the effectiveness of DriveCombo in advancing compliant and intelligent autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 提出DriveCombo基准测试，用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在复杂交通规则下的推理能力，并设计了一种Rule2Scene Agent来生成视觉场景。实验表明，现有MLLMs在多规则并发和冲突时表现不佳，但通过Fine-tuning可以显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试未能捕捉真实世界中交通规则的复杂性（如多规则并发和冲突），导致MLLMs在简单任务上表现良好，但在复杂情况下会失败或违反规则。
AI.method: 提出DriveCombo基准测试，包含文本和视觉信息，用于评估组合式交通规则推理。设计了一个五级认知阶梯来评估从单规则理解到多规则整合和冲突解决的推理过程。提出Rule2Scene Agent，通过规则制作和场景生成，将语言规则映射到动态驾驶场景。
AI.result: 对14个主流MLLMs的评估显示，随着任务复杂度的增加，模型性能下降，尤其在规则冲突时。在数据集划分并在训练集上进行微调后，交通规则推理和下游规划能力均得到显著提升。
AI.conclusion: DriveCombo能够有效地评估和推动MLLMs在遵守交通规则方面的能力，对于开发合规、智能的自动驾驶系统至关重要。

title: Adaptive Spectral Feature Forecasting for Diffusion Sampling Acceleration
summary: Diffusion models have become the dominant tool for high-fidelity image and video generation, yet are critically bottlenecked by their inference speed due to the numerous iterative passes of Diffusion Transformers. To reduce the exhaustive compute, recent works resort to the feature caching and reusing scheme that skips network evaluations at selected diffusion steps by using cached features in previous steps. However, their preliminary design solely relies on local approximation, causing errors to grow rapidly with large skips and leading to degraded sample quality at high speedups. In this work, we propose spectral diffusion feature forecaster (Spectrum), a training-free approach that enables global, long-range feature reuse with tightly controlled error. In particular, we view the latent features of the denoiser as functions over time and approximate them with Chebyshev polynomials. Specifically, we fit the coefficient for each basis via ridge regression, which is then leveraged to forecast features at multiple future diffusion steps. We theoretically reveal that our approach admits more favorable long-horizon behavior and yields an error bound that does not compound with the step size. Extensive experiments on various state-of-the-art image and video diffusion models consistently verify the superiority of our approach. Notably, we achieve up to 4.79$\times$ speedup on FLUX.1 and 4.67$\times$ speedup on Wan2.1-14B, while maintaining much higher sample quality compared with the baselines.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为Spectrum的训练无关方法，通过将去噪器潜在特征视为时间函数并使用切比雪夫多项式进行近似，从而实现长距离特征重用，显著提高了扩散模型的推理速度，同时保持了高质量的样本生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的推理速度慢是由于其迭代次数多，现有方法通过特征缓存和重用虽能提速，但容易因局部近似导致误差累积，影响样本质量。本研究旨在解决这一问题，实现高效且高质量的加速。
AI.method: 将去噪器的潜在特征视为关于时间（扩散步数）的函数，并使用切比雪夫多项式进行近似。通过岭回归拟合基函数系数，用于预测未来多个扩散步的特征。这种方法理论上保证了更好的长时行为和不随步数累积的误差界限。
AI.result: 在图像和视频扩散模型上的实验证明了Spectrum方法的优越性。在FLUX.1和Wan2.1-14B上分别实现了高达4.79倍和4.67倍的加速，同时样本质量显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Spectrum是一种有效的训练无关技术，通过基于全局长距离特征重用的方法，显著提高了扩散模型的推理速度，并且在保持高质量样本生成方面优于现有技术。

title: QCAgent: An agentic framework for quality-controllable pathology report generation from whole slide image
summary: Recent methods for pathology report generation from whole-slide image (WSI) are capable of producing slide-level diagnostic descriptions but fail to ground fine-grained statements in localized visual evidence. Furthermore, they lack control over which diagnostic details to include and how to verify them. Inspired by emerging agentic analysis paradigms and the diagnostic workflow of pathologists,who selectively examine multiple fields of view, we propose QCAgent, an agentic framework for quality-controllable WSI report generation. The core innovations of this framework are as follows: (i) it incorporates a customized critique mechanism guided by a user-defined checklist specifying required diagnostic details and constraints; (ii) it re-identifies informative regions in the WSI based on the critique feedback and text-patch semantic retrieval, a process that iteratively enriches and reconciles the report. Experiments demonstrate that by making report requirements explicitly prompt-defined, constraint-aware, and verifiable through evidence-grounded refinement, QCAgent enables controllable generation of clinically meaningful and high-coverage pathology reports from WSI.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为QCAgent的基于智能体的框架，用于生成质量可控的全切片图像（WSI）病理报告，通过用户定义的检查清单进行批评和迭代细化，从而实现临床上有意义且覆盖全面的报告。
AI.motivation: 现有的WSI报告生成方法无法将细粒度陈述与局部视觉证据联系起来，并且缺乏对报告内容和验证的控制。受到病理学家选择性检查多个视野的诊断流程和新兴的智能体分析范式的启发。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为QCAgent的智能体框架。该框架包含一个定制的批评机制，该机制由用户定义的检查清单指导，指定所需的诊断细节和约束。它通过批评反馈和文本-补丁语义检索来重新识别WSI中的信息区域，从而迭代地丰富和协调报告。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过使报告要求成为明确的提示定义、约束感知和证据基础的精炼可验证的，QCAgent能够从WSI生成可控的、临床上有意义的、高覆盖率的病理报告。
AI.conclusion: QCAgent通过引入基于智能体的质量可控机制，能够生成更准确、更可靠且可解释的WSI病理报告，解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: PromptStereo: Zero-Shot Stereo Matching via Structure and Motion Prompts
summary: Modern stereo matching methods have leveraged monocular depth foundation models to achieve superior zero-shot generalization performance. However, most existing methods primarily focus on extracting robust features for cost volume construction or disparity initialization. At the same time, the iterative refinement stage, which is also crucial for zero-shot generalization, remains underexplored. Some methods treat monocular depth priors as guidance for iteration, but conventional GRU-based architectures struggle to exploit them due to the limited representation capacity. In this paper, we propose Prompt Recurrent Unit (PRU), a novel iterative refinement module based on the decoder of monocular depth foundation models. By integrating monocular structure and stereo motion cues as prompts into the decoder, PRU enriches the latent representations of monocular depth foundation models with absolute stereo-scale information while preserving their inherent monocular depth priors. Experiments demonstrate that our PromptStereo achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot generalization performance across multiple datasets, while maintaining comparable or faster inference speed. Our findings highlight prompt-guided iterative refinement as a promising direction for zero-shot stereo matching.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的迭代细化模块Prompt Recurrent Unit (PRU)，通过将单目结构和立体运动线索作为提示（prompt）注入到单目深度基础模型的解码器中，以提升零样本立体匹配的泛化能力，并在多个数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本立体匹配方法主要关注特征提取和视差初始化，但对至关重要的迭代细化阶段研究不足。现有的基于GRU的迭代方法难以充分利用单目深度先验，因为其表示能力有限。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为Prompt Recurrent Unit (PRU) 的新型迭代细化模块，该模块基于单目深度基础模型的解码器。通过将单目结构和立体运动线索作为提示（prompt）整合到解码器中，PRU在保留单目深度先验的同时，用绝对立体尺度信息丰富了单目深度基础模型的潜在表示。
AI.result: 提出的PromptStereo方法在多个数据集上实现了最先进的零样本泛化性能，并且保持了可比或更快的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 基于提示（prompt）引导的迭代细化是实现零样本立体匹配的一个有前景的方向，PRU模块能够有效地将单目深度先验与绝对立体尺度信息相结合，从而提升泛化能力。

title: FastLightGen: Fast and Light Video Generation with Fewer Steps and Parameters
summary: The recent advent of powerful video generation models, such as Hunyuan, WanX, Veo3, and Kling, has inaugurated a new era in the field. However, the practical deployment of these models is severely impeded by their substantial computational overhead, which stems from enormous parameter counts and the iterative, multi-step sampling process required during inference. Prior research on accelerating generative models has predominantly followed two distinct trajectories: reducing the number of sampling steps (e.g., LCM, DMD, and MagicDistillation) or compressing the model size for more efficient inference (e.g., ICMD). The potential of simultaneously compressing both to create a fast and lightweight model remains an unexplored avenue. In this paper, we propose FastLightGen, an algorithm that transforms large, computationally expensive models into fast, lightweight counterparts. The core idea is to construct an optimal teacher model, one engineered to maximize student performance, within a synergistic framework for distilling both model size and inference steps. Our extensive experiments on HunyuanVideo-ATI2V and WanX-TI2V reveal that a generator using 4-step sampling and 30\% parameter pruning achieves optimal visual quality under a constrained inference budget. Furthermore, FastLightGen consistently outperforms all competing methods, establishing a new state-of-the-art in efficient video generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 FastLightGen 的新算法，可以通过同时压缩模型大小和减少采样步数来加速视频生成，并在实验中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前强大的视频生成模型存在计算开销大（模型参数多、推理采样步数多）的问题，限制了其实际应用。现有方法要么减少采样步数，要么压缩模型大小，但同时压缩两者以实现快速轻量化模型仍未被探索。
AI.method: 提出 FastLightGen 算法，在一个协同框架内构建最优的教师模型，以同时蒸馏模型大小和推理步数。通过实验确定在给定推理预算下，4 步采样和 30% 参数剪枝的模型能达到最佳视觉质量。
AI.result: 在 HunyuanVideo-ATI2V 和 WanX-TI2V 数据集上的实验表明，FastLightGen 能够生成高质量视频，并优于所有竞争方法，在高效视频生成领域达到了新的 state-of-the-art。
AI.conclusion: FastLightGen 是一种有效的算法，可以将大型、计算密集型的视频生成模型转化为快速、轻量级的模型，通过协同压缩模型大小和采样步数实现了性能的突破。

title: A Diffusion-Driven Fine-Grained Nodule Synthesis Framework for Enhanced Lung Nodule Detection from Chest Radiographs
comment: Accepted at MIDL 2026 (Poster). Published on OpenReview on February 14, 2026. Proceedings version pending. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=7DL7cu8Ui8
summary: Early detection of lung cancer in chest radiographs (CXRs) is crucial for improving patient outcomes, yet nodule detection remains challenging due to their subtle appearance and variability in radiological characteristics like size, texture, and boundary. For robust analysis, this diversity must be well represented in training datasets for deep learning based Computer-Assisted Diagnosis (CAD) systems. However, assembling such datasets is costly and often impractical, motivating the need for realistic synthetic data generation. Existing methods lack fine-grained control over synthetic nodule generation, limiting their utility in addressing data scarcity. This paper proposes a novel diffusion-based framework with low-rank adaptation (LoRA) adapters for characteristic controlled nodule synthesis on CXRs. We begin by addressing size and shape control through nodule mask conditioned training of the base diffusion model. To achieve individual characteristic control, we train separate LoRA modules, each dedicated to a specific radiological feature. However, since nodules rarely exhibit isolated characteristics, effective multi-characteristic control requires a balanced integration of features. We address this by leveraging the dynamic composability of LoRAs and revisiting existing merging strategies. Building on this, we identify two key issues, overlapping attention regions and non-orthogonal parameter spaces. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel orthogonality loss term during LoRA composition training. Extensive experiments on both in-house and public datasets demonstrate improved downstream nodule detection. Radiologist evaluations confirm the fine-grained controllability of our generated nodules, and across multiple quantitative metrics, our method surpasses existing nodule generation approaches for CXRs.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于扩散模型和低秩适配（LoRA）的方法，用于生成具有可控放射学特征的肺结节合成图像，以解决肺结节检测数据集稀缺和多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 肺结节的早期检测对改善患者预后至关重要，但由于其外观微妙且在大小、纹理和边界等方面存在差异，利用深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统训练数据集的构建面临挑战。现有合成数据生成方法缺乏精细控制，限制了其在解决数据稀缺方面的应用。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种基于扩散模型和LoRA适配器的框架。首先，通过结节掩码条件训练扩散模型来控制大小和形状。然后，为每个放射学特征（如纹理、边界）训练独立的LoRA模块，以实现个体特征控制。为了有效整合多种特征，研究利用LoRA的动态可组合性，并提出了新的合并策略，解决了重叠注意力区域和非正交参数空间的问题，引入了正交性损失项。
AI.result: 在内部和公共数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法生成的合成结节图像能够提高下游结节检测的性能。放射科医生的评估证实了所生成结节的精细可控性，并在多项定量指标上优于现有的肺结节生成方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的扩散模型与LoRA相结合的框架，能够有效生成具有精细放射学特征可控性的肺结节合成图像，为解决肺结节检测中的数据稀缺问题提供了新的解决方案，并显著优于现有方法。

title: MSP-ReID: Hairstyle-Robust Cloth-Changing Person Re-Identification
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2026)
summary: Cloth-Changing Person Re-Identification (CC-ReID) aims to match the same individual across cameras under varying clothing conditions. Existing approaches often remove apparel and focus on the head region to reduce clothing bias. However, treating the head holistically without distinguishing between face and hair leads to over-reliance on volatile hairstyle cues, causing performance degradation under hairstyle changes. To address this issue, we propose the Mitigating Hairstyle Distraction and Structural Preservation (MSP) framework. Specifically, MSP introduces Hairstyle-Oriented Augmentation (HSOA), which generates intra-identity hairstyle diversity to reduce hairstyle dependence and enhance attention to stable facial and body cues. To prevent the loss of structural information, we design Cloth-Preserved Random Erasing (CPRE), which performs ratio-controlled erasing within clothing regions to suppress texture bias while retaining body shape and context. Furthermore, we employ Region-based Parsing Attention (RPA) to incorporate parsing-guided priors that highlight face and limb regions while suppressing hair features. Extensive experiments on multiple CC-ReID benchmarks demonstrate that MSP achieves state-of-the-art performance, providing a robust and practical solution for long-term person re-identification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MSP（Mitigating Hairstyle Distraction and Structural Preservation）的框架，用于解决服装变化下的人物重识别（CC-ReID）问题。MSP通过增加发型变化的数据增强（HSOA）来减少对发型的依赖，并通过保留服装结构的随机擦除（CPRE）来减少纹理偏差，同时利用基于区域解析的注意力（RPA）来区分人脸和身体结构。实验证明MSP在多个CC-ReID数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CC-ReID方法倾向于移除服装或只关注头部区域，但将头部整体处理而不区分脸部和发型，容易导致过度依赖易变的 hairstyle 信息，在发型变化时性能下降。因此，需要一种能够减少发型干扰并保留结构信息的方法。
AI.method: 1. Hairstyle-Oriented Augmentation (HSOA)：生成同一身份下的发型多样性数据，减少对特定发型的依赖，增强对稳定的人脸和身体线索的关注。2. Cloth-Preserved Random Erasing (CPRE)：在服装区域进行比例控制的随机擦除，抑制纹理偏差，同时保留身体形状和上下文信息。3. Region-based Parsing Attention (RPA)：利用解析引导的先验信息，突出人脸和四肢区域，抑制发型特征。
AI.result: 在多个CC-ReID基准测试上，MSP框架取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: MSP框架通过专门处理发型干扰和保留结构信息，为长期人物重识别提供了一个鲁棒且实用的解决方案，有效地解决了现有方法在发型变化时的性能退化问题。

title: DiffusionXRay: A Diffusion and GAN-Based Approach for Enhancing Digitally Reconstructed Chest Radiographs
summary: Deep learning-based automated diagnosis of lung cancer has emerged as a crucial advancement that enables healthcare professionals to detect and initiate treatment earlier. However, these models require extensive training datasets with diverse case-specific properties. High-quality annotated data is particularly challenging to obtain, especially for cases with subtle pulmonary nodules that are difficult to detect even for experienced radiologists. This scarcity of well-labeled datasets can limit model performance and generalization across different patient populations. Digitally reconstructed radiographs (DRR) using CT-Scan to generate synthetic frontal chest X-rays with artificially inserted lung nodules offers one potential solution. However, this approach suffers from significant image quality degradation, particularly in the form of blurred anatomical features and loss of fine lung field structures. To overcome this, we introduce DiffusionXRay, a novel image restoration pipeline for Chest X-ray images that synergistically leverages denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) and generative adversarial networks (GANs). DiffusionXRay incorporates a unique two-stage training process: First, we investigate two independent approaches, DDPM-LQ and GAN-based MUNIT-LQ, to generate low-quality CXRs, addressing the challenge of training data scarcity, posing this as a style transfer problem. Subsequently, we train a DDPM-based model on paired low-quality and high-quality images, enabling it to learn the nuances of X-ray image restoration. Our method demonstrates promising results in enhancing image clarity, contrast, and overall diagnostic value of chest X-rays while preserving subtle yet clinically significant artifacts, validated by both quantitative metrics and expert radiological assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DiffusionXRay的新型图像修复流水线，结合了去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）和生成对抗网络（GAN），用于增强胸部X光片的图像质量，以解决深度学习肺癌诊断中高质量标注数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在肺癌诊断中有巨大潜力，但其性能受限于高质量、标注详尽的训练数据集，尤其是对于细微肺结节。现有的通过CT生成合成X光片的方法存在图像质量下降问题。
AI.method: DiffusionXRay采用两阶段训练过程：1. 分别使用DDPM和GAN（MUNIT-LQ）生成低质量X光片，将其视为风格迁移问题以缓解数据稀缺。2. 在配对的低质量和高质量图像上训练一个基于DDPM的模型，以学习X光片图像的修复。
AI.result: DiffusionXRay在提高X光片的清晰度、对比度和诊断价值方面取得了有希望的结果，同时保留了细微的临床重要伪影。结果通过定量指标和放射科专家评估得到验证。
AI.conclusion: DiffusionXRay通过结合DDPM和GAN，并采用创新的两阶段训练策略，能够有效修复胸部X光片图像，提升图像质量和诊断价值，为解决肺癌AI诊断中的数据稀缺问题提供了一种有效途径。

title: CoopDiff: A Diffusion-Guided Approach for Cooperation under Corruptions
summary: Cooperative perception lets agents share information to expand coverage and improve scene understanding. However, in real-world scenarios, diverse and unpredictable corruptions undermine its robustness and generalization. To address these challenges, we introduce CoopDiff, a diffusion-based cooperative perception framework that mitigates corruptions via a denoising mechanism. CoopDiff adopts a teacher-student paradigm: the Quality-Aware Teacher performs voxel-level early fusion with Quality of Interest weighting and semantic guidance, then produces clean supervision features via a diffusion denoiser. The Dual-Branch Diffusion Student first separates ego and cooperative streams in encoding to reconstruct the teacher's clean targets. And then, an Ego-Guided Cross-Attention mechanism facilitates balanced decoding under degradation by adaptively integrating ego and cooperative features. We evaluate CoopDiff on two constructed multi-degradation benchmarks, OPV2Vn and DAIR-V2Xn, each incorporating six corruption types, including environmental and sensor-level distortions. Benefiting from the inherent denoising properties of diffusion, CoopDiff consistently outperforms prior methods across all degradation types and lowers the relative corruption error. Furthermore, it offers a tunable balance between precision and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: CoopDiff是一个基于扩散模型的协同感知框架，通过去噪机制来应对现实世界中不确定和不可预测的腐蚀，提升了协同感知的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的协同感知面临多样化和不可预测的腐蚀问题，严重影响其鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: CoopDiff采用师生范式。质量感知教师（Quality-Aware Teacher）进行体素级早期融合，并采用质量兴趣加权（Quality of Interest weighting）和语义引导，通过扩散去噪器生成干净的监督特征。双分支扩散学生（Dual-Branch Diffusion Student）首先分离自身和协同流进行编码，以重建教师的干净目标，然后利用自导跨注意力（Ego-Guided Cross-Attention）机制，通过自适应地整合自身和协同特征，在降级情况下实现平衡解码。
AI.result: CoopDiff在OPV2Vn和DAIR-V2Xn两个包含六种腐蚀类型（环境和传感器级失真）的多重退化基准上进行了评估，在所有退化类型上均优于现有方法，并降低了相对腐蚀误差。此外，它还提供了精度和推理效率之间的可调平衡。
AI.conclusion: CoopDiff通过引入基于扩散的去噪机制，有效地解决了协同感知中的腐蚀问题，并在多退化场景下展现出优越的性能和良好的泛化能力，同时提供了效率和精度的权衡。

title: WhisperNet: A Scalable Solution for Bandwidth-Efficient Collaboration
summary: Collaborative perception is vital for autonomous driving yet remains constrained by tight communication budgets. Earlier work reduced bandwidth by compressing full feature maps with fixed-rate encoders, which adapts poorly to a changing environment, and it further evolved into spatial selection methods that improve efficiency by focusing on salient regions, but this object-centric approach often sacrifices global context, weakening holistic scene understanding. To overcome these limitations, we introduce \textit{WhisperNet}, a bandwidth-aware framework that proposes a novel, receiver-centric paradigm for global coordination across agents. Senders generate lightweight saliency metadata, while the receiver formulates a global request plan that dynamically budgets feature contributions across agents and features, retrieving only the most informative features. A collaborative feature routing module then aligns related messages before fusion to ensure structural consistency. Extensive experiments show that WhisperNet achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving AP@0.7 on OPV2V by 2.4\% with only 0.5\% of the communication cost. As a plug-and-play component, it boosts strong baselines with merely 5\% of full bandwidth while maintaining robustness under localization noise. These results demonstrate that globally-coordinated allocation across \textit{what} and \textit{where} to share is the key to achieving efficient collaborative perception.

AI.tldr: WhisperNet是一个创新的、以接收者为中心的协作感知框架，通过动态分配带宽和路由信息，解决了通信预算限制的问题，显著提高了效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的协作感知方法在通信带宽受限的情况下存在不足，固定速率编码适应性差，而基于空间选择的方法会牺牲全局上下文信息。研究旨在克服这些局限，实现更高效的全局感知。
AI.method: WhisperNet提出了一种以接收者为中心的范式。发送者生成轻量级显著性元数据，接收者则制定全局请求计划，动态分配来自不同代理和不同特征的贡献，并只检索最关键的信息。一个协作特征路由模块用于在融合前对齐相关消息，确保结构一致性。
AI.result: WhisperNet在OPV2V数据集上取得了先进的性能，AP@0.7提升了2.4%，通信成本仅为0.5%。作为可插拔组件，它能在仅使用5%全带宽的情况下提升现有基线模型的性能，并对定位噪声保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过在“共享什么”和“共享哪里”的全局协调分配，是实现高效协作感知的关键。WhisperNet证明了其在通信效率和感知性能上的优越性。

title: Learning Domain-Aware Task Prompt Representations for Multi-Domain All-in-One Image Restoration
summary: Recently, significant breakthroughs have been made in all-in-one image restoration (AiOIR), which can handle multiple restoration tasks with a single model. However, existing methods typically focus on a specific image domain, such as natural scene, medical imaging, or remote sensing. In this work, we aim to extend AiOIR to multiple domains and propose the first multi-domain all-in-one image restoration method, DATPRL-IR, based on our proposed Domain-Aware Task Prompt Representation Learning. Specifically, we first construct a task prompt pool containing multiple task prompts, in which task-related knowledge is implicitly encoded. For each input image, the model adaptively selects the most relevant task prompts and composes them into an instance-level task representation via a prompt composition mechanism (PCM). Furthermore, to endow the model with domain awareness, we introduce another domain prompt pool and distill domain priors from multimodal large language models into the domain prompts. PCM is utilized to combine the adaptively selected domain prompts into a domain representation for each input image. Finally, the two representations are fused to form a domain-aware task prompt representation which can make full use of both specific and shared knowledge across tasks and domains to guide the subsequent restoration process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DATPRL-IR significantly outperforms existing SOTA image restoration methods, while exhibiting strong generalization capabilities. Code is available at https://github.com/GuangluDong0728/DATPRL-IR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DATPRL-IR，一种首个能够处理多个图像领域和多个恢复任务的“多领域一体化图像恢复”方法，通过领域感知任务提示表示学习，自适应地组合任务提示和领域提示来指导图像恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有的一体化图像恢复方法（AiOIR）通常局限于特定图像领域，缺乏跨领域处理能力。作者旨在将AiOIR扩展到多领域，解决这一局限性。
AI.method: 1. 构建任务提示池，编码任务相关知识。2. 提出提示组合机制（PCM），自适应选择相关任务提示并组合成实例级任务表示。3. 引入领域提示池，从多模态大语言模型中提取领域先验知识并蒸馏到领域提示。4. 再次使用PCM组合自适应选择的领域提示，生成领域表示。5. 融合任务表示和领域表示，形成领域感知任务提示表示，指导恢复过程。
AI.result: DATPRL-IR在多个图像领域和任务上显著优于现有最先进（SOTA）的图像恢复方法，并表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DATPRL-IR成功实现了多领域一体化图像恢复，通过领域感知任务提示表示学习，能够有效利用跨任务和跨领域的共享及特有知识，从而提升了图像恢复的性能和泛化能力。

title: Search Multilayer Perceptron-Based Fusion for Efficient and Accurate Siamese Tracking
comment: 23 pages, 12 figures, 7 tables. This work was completed in 2024 and accepted for publication in IEEE TCDS (2026)
summary: Siamese visual trackers have recently advanced through increasingly sophisticated fusion mechanisms built on convolutional or Transformer architectures. However, both struggle to deliver pixel-level interactions efficiently on resource-constrained hardware, leading to a persistent accuracy-efficiency imbalance. Motivated by this limitation, we redesign the Siamese neck with a simple yet effective Multilayer Perception (MLP)-based fusion module that enables pixel-level interaction with minimal structural overhead. Nevertheless, naively stacking MLP blocks introduces a new challenge: computational cost can scale quadratically with channel width. To overcome this, we construct a hierarchical search space of carefully designed MLP modules and introduce a customized relaxation strategy that enables differentiable neural architecture search (DNAS) to decouple channel-width optimization from other architectural choices. This targeted decoupling automatically balances channel width and depth, yielding a low-complexity architecture. The resulting tracker achieves state-of-the-art accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. It ranks among the top performers on four general-purpose and three aerial tracking benchmarks, while maintaining real-time performance on both resource-constrained Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) and Neural Processing Units (NPUs).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MLP的融合模块，用于解决Siamese视觉跟踪器在资源受限硬件上的精度-效率不平衡问题。通过分层搜索空间和定制的放松策略，实现了高效、低复杂度的跟踪器，并在多个基准测试中达到了最先进的精度-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的Siamese视觉跟踪器在像素级交互方面效率低下，尤其是在资源受限的硬件上，导致精度-效率不平衡。
AI.method: 设计了一个基于MLP的融合模块，构建了一个分层的MLP模块搜索空间，并引入了一种定制的放松策略，以实现可微分神经架构搜索（DNAS），从而将通道宽度优化与其他架构选择解耦。
AI.result: 该方法能够自动平衡通道宽度和深度，生成低复杂度的高精度跟踪器。所提出的跟踪器在四个通用和三个空中跟踪基准测试中表现优异，并能在资源受限的GPU和NPU上实现实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于MLP的融合模块和DNAS策略能够有效地解决Siamese视觉跟踪器在资源受限设备上的精度-效率问题，实现最先进的性能。

title: Unifying Heterogeneous Multi-Modal Remote Sensing Detection Via Language-Pivoted Pretraining
summary: Heterogeneous multi-modal remote sensing object detection aims to accurately detect objects from diverse sensors (e.g., RGB, SAR, Infrared). Existing approaches largely adopt a late alignment paradigm, in which modality alignment and task-specific optimization are entangled during downstream fine-tuning. This tight coupling complicates optimization and often results in unstable training and suboptimal generalization. To address these limitations, we propose BabelRS, a unified language-pivoted pretraining framework that explicitly decouples modality alignment from downstream task learning. BabelRS comprises two key components: Concept-Shared Instruction Aligning (CSIA) and Layerwise Visual-Semantic Annealing (LVSA). CSIA aligns each sensor modality to a shared set of linguistic concepts, using language as a semantic pivot to bridge heterogeneous visual representations. To further mitigate the granularity mismatch between high-level language representations and dense detection objectives, LVSA progressively aggregates multi-scale visual features to provide fine-grained semantic guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BabelRS stabilizes training and consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods without bells and whistles. Code: https://github.com/zcablii/SM3Det.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BabelRS的语言驱动的预训练框架，用于多模态遥感目标检测，通过解耦模态对齐和下游任务学习来提高训练稳定性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将模态对齐和任务优化耦合在下游微调阶段，导致训练不稳定且泛化性不佳。
AI.method: BabelRS包含两个主要组件：概念共享指令对齐（CSIA）和层级视觉-语义退火（LVSA）。CSIA利用语言作为语义枢纽，将不同传感器模态对齐到共享的语言概念；LVSA逐步聚合多尺度视觉特征，为检测目标提供细粒度语义指导。
AI.result: BabelRS在实验中展现出稳定的训练过程，并在多项评估中超越了最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: BabelRS成功解耦了模态对齐和下游任务学习，并通过语言作为中介，有效解决了异构多模态遥感目标检测中的挑战，提高了模型性能和泛化能力。

title: Dual Distillation for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomaly detection is a critical task in computer vision with profound implications for medical imaging, where identifying pathologies early can directly impact patient outcomes. While recent unsupervised anomaly detection approaches show promise, they require substantial normal training data and struggle to generalize across anatomical contexts. We introduce D$^2$4FAD, a novel dual distillation framework for few-shot anomaly detection that identifies anomalies in previously unseen tasks using only a small number of normal reference images. Our approach leverages a pre-trained encoder as a teacher network to extract multi-scale features from both support and query images, while a student decoder learns to distill knowledge from the teacher on query images and self-distill on support images. We further propose a learn-to-weight mechanism that dynamically assesses the reference value of each support image conditioned on the query, optimizing anomaly detection performance. To evaluate our method, we curate a comprehensive benchmark dataset comprising 13,084 images across four organs, four imaging modalities, and five disease categories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that D$^2$4FAD significantly outperforms existing approaches, establishing a new state-of-the-art in few-shot medical anomaly detection. Code is available at https://github.com/ttttqz/D24FAD.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 D^24FAD 的新颖的少样本异常检测框架，该框架利用双蒸馏和自适应加权机制，在仅使用少量正常参考图像的情况下，能够有效地检测先前未见过的医学图像中的异常。
AI.motivation: 现有的无监督异常检测方法需要大量的正常训练数据，并且难以适应新的解剖结构，这在医学影像领域尤其具有挑战性，早期识别病变至关重要。因此，研究一种在数据有限的情况下（少样本）且能泛化到新任务的异常检测方法是必要的。
AI.method: D^24FAD 框架采用双蒸馏策略：1. 使用预训练编码器作为教师网络，提取支持集和查询集图像的多尺度特征。2. 学生解码器从教师网络在查询集图像上蒸馏知识，并在支持集图像上进行自蒸馏。3. 引入一个动态的“学习加权”机制，根据查询图像自适应地评估每个支持图像的参考价值，以优化异常检测性能。
AI.result: 在包含四个器官、四种成像模态和五种疾病类别的 13,084 张图像的综合基准数据集上进行了广泛实验。结果表明，D^24FAD 在少样本医学异常检测方面显著优于现有方法，取得了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: D^24FAD 是一种有效的少样本医学异常检测方法，通过双蒸馏和自适应加权机制，即使在仅有少量正常参考图像的情况下，也能在新的、未见过的任务中实现高性能。该方法为解决医学影像中数据稀缺的异常检测问题提供了一个新的解决方案。

title: Preoperative-to-intraoperative Liver Registration for Laparoscopic Surgery via Latent-Grounded Correspondence Constraints
summary: In laparoscopic liver surgery, augmented reality technology enhances intraoperative anatomical guidance by overlaying 3D liver models from preoperative CT/MRI onto laparoscopic 2D views. However, existing registration methods lack explicit modeling of reliable 2D-3D geometric correspondences supported by latent evidence, leading to limited interpretability and potentially unstable alignment in clinical scenarios. In this work, we introduce Land-Reg, a correspondence-driven deformable registration framework that explicitly learns latent-grounded 2D-3D landmark correspondences as an interpretable intermediate representation to bridge cross-modal alignment. For rigid registration, Land-Reg embraces a Cross-modal Latent Alignment module to map multi-modal features into a unified latent space. Further, an Uncertainty-enhanced Overlap Landmark Detector with similarity matching is proposed to robustly estimate explicit 2D-3D landmark correspondences. For non-rigid registration, we design a novel shape-constrained supervision strategy that anchors shape deformation to matched landmarks through reprojection consistency and incorporates local-isometric regularization to alleviate inherent 2D-3D depth ambiguity, while a rendered-mask alignment enforces global shape consistency. Experimental results on the P2ILF dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method on both rigid pose estimation and non-rigid deformation. Our code will be available at https://github.com/cuiruize/Land-Reg.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Land-Reg 的新方法，用于提高腹腔镜肝脏手术中增强现实的配准精度，该方法通过学习可解释的 2D-3D 地标对应关系来解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有腹腔镜肝脏手术中的增强现实技术，虽然能通过叠加 3D 模型来提供解剖学指导，但其配准方法缺乏明确的、有潜在证据支持的 2D-3D 几何对应关系，这导致了可解释性差且在临床中可能不稳定。
AI.method: Land-Reg 框架通过一个跨模态潜在对齐模块将多模态特征映射到统一的潜在空间，并提出一个不确定性增强的重叠地标检测器来鲁棒地估计显式的 2D-3D 地标对应关系。对于非刚性配准，该方法采用了一种新颖的形状约束监督策略，通过重投影一致性和局部等距正则化来锚定形状变形，同时利用渲染掩码对齐来强制执行全局形状一致性。
AI.result: 在 P2ILF 数据集上的实验结果表明，Land-Reg 在刚性姿态估计和非刚性形变方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Land-Reg 框架通过引入可解释的、潜在地标支持的 2D-3D 对应关系，有效地提高了腹腔镜肝脏手术中增强现实配准的鲁棒性和准确性，为临床应用提供了更可靠的解剖学指导。

title: NeuroSymb-MRG: Differentiable Abductive Reasoning with Active Uncertainty Minimization for Radiology Report Generation
summary: Automatic generation of radiology reports seeks to reduce clinician workload while improving documentation consistency. Existing methods that adopt encoder-decoder or retrieval-augmented pipelines achieve progress in fluency but remain vulnerable to visual-linguistic biases, factual inconsistency, and lack of explicit multi-hop clinical reasoning. We present NeuroSymb-MRG, a unified framework that integrates NeuroSymbolic abductive reasoning with active uncertainty minimization to produce structured, clinically grounded reports. The system maps image features to probabilistic clinical concepts, composes differentiable logic-based reasoning chains, decodes those chains into templated clauses, and refines the textual output via retrieval and constrained language-model editing. An active sampling loop driven by rule-level uncertainty and diversity guides clinician-in-the-loop adjudication and promptbook refinement. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in factual consistency and standard language metrics compared to representative baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为NeuroSymb-MRG的自动放射报告生成框架，它结合了神经符号推理和主动不确定性最小化，以生成更准确、更符合临床事实的报告。
AI.motivation: 现有自动生成放射报告的方法在流畅性方面取得进展，但在视觉-语言偏见、事实不一致和缺乏明确的多步临床推理方面存在不足，旨在解决这些问题。
AI.method: 该框架将图像特征映射到概率性临床概念，构建可微分的基于逻辑的推理链，将推理链解码为模板化条款，并通过检索和约束语言模型编辑来优化文本输出。利用规则级不确定性和多样性驱动的主动采样循环来指导临床医生参与的裁决和提示集优化。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，与代表性基线相比，在事实一致性和标准语言指标方面均取得了持续的改进。
AI.conclusion: NeuroSymb-MRG框架能够生成结构化、符合临床事实的放射报告，并在准确性和一致性方面优于现有方法。

title: Action-Guided Attention for Video Action Anticipation
summary: Anticipating future actions in videos is challenging, as the observed frames provide only evidence of past activities, requiring the inference of latent intentions to predict upcoming actions. Existing transformer-based approaches, which rely on dot-product attention over pixel representations, often lack the high-level semantics necessary to model video sequences for effective action anticipation. As a result, these methods tend to overfit to explicit visual cues present in the past frames, limiting their ability to capture underlying intentions and degrading generalization to unseen samples. To address this, we propose Action-Guided Attention (AGA), an attention mechanism that explicitly leverages predicted action sequences as queries and keys to guide sequence modeling. Our approach fosters the attention module to emphasize relevant moments from the past based on the upcoming activity and combine this information with the current frame embedding via a dedicated gating function. The design of AGA enables post-training analysis of the knowledge discovered from the training set. Experiments on the widely adopted EPIC-Kitchens-100 benchmark demonstrate that AGA generalizes well from validation to unseen test sets. Post-training analysis can further examine the action dependencies captured by the model and the counterfactual evidence it has internalized, offering transparent and interpretable insights into its anticipative predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Action-Guided Attention (AGA)的新型注意力机制，通过利用预测的动作序列作为查询和键来指导视频动作预测，以解决现有方法在捕捉潜在意图和泛化能力方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的方法在像素级别进行注意力计算，缺乏高层语义信息来有效建模视频序列，导致模型过拟合于过去的视觉线索，难以捕捉潜在意图，泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出Action-Guided Attention (AGA)机制，将预测的动作序列作为查询（queries）和键（keys）来指导注意力计算，使模型能够根据即将发生的活动来关注过去的相关时刻，并通过门控函数将这些信息与当前帧的嵌入结合起来。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchens-100数据集上进行了实验，证明AGA在验证集到测试集的泛化能力良好。
AI.conclusion: AGA通过利用预测的动作序列来增强注意力机制，能够更好地捕捉视频中的潜在意图，提高动作预测的泛化能力。此外，AGA支持训练后分析，可以检查模型捕获的动作依赖关系和内化的反事实证据，从而提供透明且可解释的预测洞察。

title: StepVAR: Structure-Texture Guided Pruning for Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Visual AutoRegressive (VAR) models based on next-scale prediction enable efficient hierarchical generation, yet the inference cost grows quadratically at high resolutions. We observe that the computationally intensive later scales predominantly refine high-frequency textures and exhibit substantial spatial redundancy, in contrast to earlier scales that determine the global structural layout. Existing pruning methods primarily focus on high-frequency detection for token selection, often overlooking structural coherence and consequently degrading global semantics. To address this limitation, we propose StepVAR, a training-free token pruning framework that accelerates VAR inference by jointly considering structural and textural importance. Specifically, we employ a lightweight high-pass filter to capture local texture details, while leveraging Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to preserve global structural information. This dual-criterion design enables the model to retain tokens critical for both fine-grained fidelity and overall composition. To maintain valid next-scale prediction under sparse tokens, we further introduce a nearest neighbor feature propagation strategy to reconstruct dense feature maps from pruned representations. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art text-to-image and text-to-video VAR models demonstrate that StepVAR achieves substantial inference speedups while maintaining generation quality. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations consistently show that our method outperforms existing acceleration approaches, validating its effectiveness and general applicability across diverse VAR architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 StepVAR 的训练无关的 token 剪枝框架，用于加速视觉自回归（VAR）模型的推理过程。StepVAR 通过同时考虑结构和纹理重要性来选择 token，并采用最近邻特征传播来重建特征图，从而在不牺牲生成质量的情况下显著提高推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有 VAR 模型在高分辨率下的推理成本会随分辨率二次方增长，而高分辨率的生成内容主要包含高频纹理且存在空间冗余。现有的剪枝方法只关注高频信息，忽略了全局结构，导致生成结果的全局语义下降。
AI.method: StepVAR 提出了一种结合高通滤波器（捕捉局部纹理细节）和主成分分析（PCA，保留全局结构信息）的双标准剪枝方法。同时，引入最近邻特征传播策略来重建被剪枝后的密集特征图，以保持有效的下一尺度预测。
AI.result: StepVAR 在文本到图像和文本到视频的 VAR 模型上进行了实验，结果表明该方法能够显著加速推理过程，同时保持生成质量。与现有加速方法相比，StepVAR 在定量和定性评估中均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: StepVAR 是一种有效的训练无关的 token 剪枝框架，能够显著加速 VAR 模型推理，并保持生成质量，适用于各种 VAR 架构。

title: Neural Operator-Grounded Continuous Tensor Function Representation and Its Applications
summary: Recently, continuous tensor functions have attracted increasing attention, because they can unifiedly represent data both on mesh grids and beyond mesh grids. However, since mode-$n$ product is essentially discrete and linear, the potential of current continuous tensor function representations is still locked. To break this bottleneck, we suggest neural operator-grounded mode-$n$ operators as a continuous and nonlinear alternative of discrete and linear mode-$n$ product. Instead of mapping the discrete core tensor to the discrete target tensor, proposed mode-$n$ operator directly maps the continuous core tensor function to the continuous target tensor function, which provides a genuine continuous representation of real-world data and can ameliorate discretization artifacts. Empowering with continuous and nonlinear mode-$n$ operators, we propose a neural operator-grounded continuous tensor function representation (abbreviated as NO-CTR), which can more faithfully represent complex real-world data compared with classic discrete tensor representations and continuous tensor function representations. Theoretically, we also prove that any continuous tensor function can be approximated by NO-CTR. To examine the capability of NO-CTR, we suggest an NO-CTR-based multi-dimensional data completion model. Extensive experiments across various data on regular mesh grids (multi-spectral images and color videos), on mesh girds with different resolutions (Sentinel-2 images) and beyond mesh grids (point clouds) demonstrate the superiority of NO-CTR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 NO-CTR 的神经算子为基础的连续张量函数表示方法，通过引入连续且非线性的模式-n 算子来替代离散线性的模式-n 乘积，从而实现更真实的连续数据表示，并减少离散化误差。该方法在多维数据补全任务上展示了优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的连续张量函数表示方法仍然受限于离散线性的模式-n 乘积，限制了其潜能。作者希望开发一种更符合连续数据特性的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为“神经算子为基础的模式-n 算子”的连续非线性算子，用于直接映射连续的核张量函数到连续的目标张量函数。在此基础上，构建了神经算子为基础的连续张量函数表示（NO-CTR）。证明了 NO-CTR 可以近似任何连续张量函数，并提出了一个基于 NO-CTR 的多维数据补全模型。
AI.result: NO-CTR 方法在处理规则网格数据（多光谱图像、彩色视频）、不同分辨率网格数据（Sentinel-2 图像）以及非网格数据（点云）的多维数据补全任务上，均取得了优于经典离散张量表示和现有连续张量函数表示的性能。
AI.conclusion: NO-CTR 是一种有效的连续张量函数表示方法，它通过引入连续非线性的模式-n 算子，克服了传统方法的局限性，能够更真实地表示复杂连续数据，并在多项实验中验证了其优越性。

title: Affine Correspondences in Stereo Vision: Theory, Practice, and Limitations
summary: Affine transformations have been recently used for stereo vision. They can be exploited in various computer vision application, e.g., when estimating surface normals, homographies, fundamental and essential matrices. Even full 3D reconstruction can be obtained by using affine correspondences. First, this paper overviews the fundamental statements for affine transformations and epipolar geometry. Then it is investigated how the transformation accuracy influences the quality of the 3D reconstruction. Besides, we propose novel techniques for estimating the local affine transformation from corresponding image directions; moreover, the fundamental matrix, related to the processed image pair, can also be exploited. Both synthetic and real quantitative evaluations are implemented based on the accuracy of the reconstructed surface normals. For the latter one, a special object, containing three perpendicular planes with chessboard patterns, is constructed. The quantitative evaluations are based on the accuracy of the reconstructed surface normals and it is concluded that the estimation accuracy is around a few degrees for realistic test cases. Special stereo poses and plane orientations are also evaluated in detail.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了仿射变换在立体视觉中的应用，并提出了一种基于图像方向和基本矩阵估计局部仿射变换的新方法，以提高三维重建的准确性。
AI.motivation: 仿射变换在立体视觉中具有广泛的应用前景，但其准确性对三维重建质量的影响尚需深入研究。作者希望提出更精确的仿射变换估计方法，并量化其对三维重建精度的影响。
AI.method: 首先，回顾了仿射变换和对极几何的基本理论。然后，研究了变换精度对三维重建质量的影响。接着，提出了一种从对应图像方向估计局部仿射变换的新技术，并考虑了基本矩阵的利用。最后，通过合成数据和真实数据进行量化评估，评估指标是重构表面法线的精度。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在合成和真实数据上都取得了良好的量化评估结果，在真实测试案例中，重构的表面法线精度约为几度。详细评估了特殊的立体姿态和平面方向。
AI.conclusion: 仿射变换的准确性对三维重建的质量至关重要。本文提出的基于图像方向和基本矩阵估计局部仿射变换的新方法能够有效提高三维重建的精度，在实际应用中具有潜力。

title: Efficient Test-Time Optimization for Depth Completion via Low-Rank Decoder Adaptation
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures [We achieved a new Pareto frontier in test-time depth completion.]
summary: Zero-shot depth completion has gained attention for its ability to generalize across environments without sensor-specific datasets or retraining. However, most existing approaches rely on diffusion-based test-time optimization, which is computationally expensive due to iterative denoising. Recent visual-prompt-based methods reduce training cost but still require repeated forward--backward passes through the full frozen network to optimize input-level prompts, resulting in slow inference. In this work, we show that adapting only the decoder is sufficient for effective test-time optimization, as depth foundation models concentrate depth-relevant information within a low-dimensional decoder subspace. Based on this insight, we propose a lightweight test-time adaptation method that updates only this low-dimensional subspace using sparse depth supervision. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new Pareto frontier between accuracy and efficiency for test-time adaptation. Extensive experiments on five indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over prior methods, highlighting the practicality of fast zero-shot depth completion.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级的测试时间自适应方法，仅更新低维解码器子空间，实现了高效且准确的零样本深度补全。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本深度补全方法计算成本高昂（测试时间优化）或推理速度慢（视觉提示方法），需要改进效率。
AI.method: 通过洞察发现深度基础模型中的深度相关信息集中在低维解码器子空间，提出了一种仅使用稀疏深度监督来更新此低维子空间的轻量级测试时间自适应方法。
AI.result: 在五个室内外数据集上取得了最先进的性能，在准确性和效率之间建立了新的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: 仅适应解码器子空间足以实现有效的测试时间优化，并且该方法实现了快速的零样本深度补全，具有实用性。

title: CTForensics: A Comprehensive Dataset and Method for AI-Generated CT Image Detection
summary: With the rapid development of generative AI in medical imaging, synthetic Computed Tomography (CT) images have demonstrated great potential in applications such as data augmentation and clinical diagnosis, but they also introduce serious security risks. Despite the increasing security concerns, existing studies on CT forgery detection are still limited and fail to adequately address real-world challenges. These limitations are mainly reflected in two aspects: the absence of datasets that can effectively evaluate model generalization to reflect the real-world application requirements, and the reliance on detection methods designed for natural images that are insensitive to CT-specific forgery artifacts. In this view, we propose CTForensics, a comprehensive dataset designed to systematically evaluate the generalization capability of CT forgery detection methods, which includes ten diverse CT generative methods. Moreover, we introduce the Enhanced Spatial-Frequency CT Forgery Detector (ESF-CTFD), an efficient CNN-based neural network that captures forgery cues across the wavelet, spatial, and frequency domains. First, it transforms the input CT image into three scales and extracts features at each scale via the Wavelet-Enhanced Central Stem. Then, starting from the largest-scale features, the Spatial Process Block gradually performs feature fusion with the smaller-scale ones. Finally, the Frequency Process Block learns frequency-domain information for predicting the final results. Experiments demonstrate that ESF-CTFD consistently outperforms existing methods and exhibits superior generalization across different CT generative models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于CT图像伪造检测的数据集CTForensics和一个名为ESF-CTFD的CNN模型，该模型通过整合小波、空间和频率域的特征来提高检测的准确性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在医学影像领域的快速发展带来了CT图像伪造的风险，但现有研究在数据集和检测方法上存在不足，无法满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 构建了包含10种不同生成方法的CTForensics数据集。提出ESF-CTFD模型，一个CNN网络，通过小波变换将CT图像分解到不同尺度，并结合空间和频率域的特征进行检测。
AI.result: ESF-CTFD模型在各种CT生成方法上都表现出优于现有方法的性能，并具有出色的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ESF-CTFD模型能够有效检测CT图像伪造，并且CTForensics数据集为评估CT伪造检测方法的泛化能力提供了一个全面的平台。

title: GroupEnsemble: Efficient Uncertainty Estimation for DETR-based Object Detection
comment: Accepted to IEEE IV 2026. 8 pages, 5 figures
summary:
Detection Transformer (DETR) and its variants show strong performance on object detection, a key task for autonomous systems. However, a critical limitation of these models is that their confidence scores only reflect semantic uncertainty, failing to capture the equally important spatial uncertainty. This results in an incomplete assessment of the detection reliability. On the other hand, Deep Ensembles can tackle this by providing high-quality spatial uncertainty estimates. However, their immense memory consumption makes them impractical for real-world applications. A cheaper alternative, Monte Carlo (MC) Dropout, suffers from high latency due to the need of multiple forward passes during inference to estimate uncertainty.
  To address these limitations, we introduce GroupEnsemble, an efficient and effective uncertainty estimation method for DETR-like models. GroupEnsemble simultaneously predicts multiple individual detection sets by feeding additional diverse groups of object queries to the transformer decoder during inference. Each query group is transformed by the shared decoder in isolation and predicts a complete detection set for the same input. An attention mask is applied to the decoder to prevent inter-group query interactions, ensuring each group detects independently to achieve reliable ensemble-based uncertainty estimation. By leveraging the decoder's inherent parallelism, GroupEnsemble efficiently estimates uncertainty in a single forward pass without sequential repetition. We validated our method under autonomous driving scenes and common daily scenes using the Cityscapes and COCO datasets, respectively. The results show that a hybrid approach combining MC-Dropout and GroupEnsemble outperforms Deep Ensembles on several metrics at a fraction of the cost. The code is available at https://github.com/yutongy98/GroupEnsemble.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GroupEnsemble的有效不确定性估计方法，用于DETR类目标检测模型，通过在推理时并行处理独立的查询组来克服现有方法的局限性，并在自动驾驶和日常场景中取得了优于深度集成（Deep Ensembles）的性能，同时成本更低。
AI.motivation: 现有的DETR类模型仅能捕捉语义不确定性，无法评估空间不确定性，导致对检测可靠性的评估不完整。深度集成（Deep Ensembles）可以提供空间不确定性，但内存消耗巨大。MC Dropout（蒙特卡洛Dropout）虽然更节省内存，但推理延迟高。
AI.method: GroupEnsemble通过在推理时向Transformer解码器输入额外多样化的目标查询组，并行预测多个独立的检测集。每个查询组由共享的解码器独立处理，并通过注意力掩码防止组间交互，从而实现可靠的集成式不确定性估计，且仅需一次前向传播。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和COCO数据集上的实验表明，GroupEnsemble能够有效地估计不确定性。结合MC Dropout的混合方法，在性能上优于Deep Ensembles，同时成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: GroupEnsemble是一种高效且有效的DETR类模型不确定性估计方法，通过利用解码器的并行性，在单次前向传播中实现了低成本、高质量的空间不确定性估计，克服了现有方法的不足，尤其适用于对实时性和资源效率要求高的自动驾驶等场景。

title: Resolving Blind Inverse Problems under Dynamic Range Compression via Structured Forward Operator Modeling
summary: Recovering radiometric fidelity from unknown dynamic range compression (UDRC), such as low-light enhancement and HDR reconstruction, is a challenging blind inverse problem, due to the unknown forward model and irreversible information loss introduced by compression. To address this challenge, we first identify monotonicity as the fundamental physical invariant shared across UDRC tasks. Leveraging this insight, we introduce the \textbf{cascaded monotonic Bernstein} (CaMB) operator to parameterize the unknown forward model. CaMB enforces monotonicity as a hard architectural inductive bias, constraining optimization to physically consistent mappings and enabling robust and stable operator estimation. We further integrate CaMB with a plug-and-play diffusion framework, proposing \textbf{CaMB-Diff}. Within this framework, the diffusion model serves as a powerful geometric prior for structural and semantic recovery, while CaMB explicitly models and corrects radiometric distortions through a physically grounded forward operator. Extensive experiments on a variety of zero-shot UDRC tasks, including low-light enhancement, low-field MRI enhancement, and HDR reconstruction, demonstrate that CaMB-Diff significantly outperforms state-of-the-art zero-shot baselines in terms of both signal fidelity and physical consistency. Moreover, we empirically validate the effectiveness of the proposed CaMB parameterization in accurately modeling the unknown forward operator.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为 CaMB-Diff 的新框架，用于从具有未知动态范围压缩（UDRC）的图像中恢复辐射度保真度。该框架利用单调性作为物理不变性，并通过级联单调 Bernstein (CaMB) 算子来参数化前向模型，同时结合扩散模型进行结构和语义恢复。
AI.motivation: 从未知动态范围压缩（UDRC）的图像中恢复辐射度保真度是一个具有挑战性的盲逆问题，因为前向模型未知且压缩过程中存在信息丢失。现有方法难以解决这个问题。
AI.method: 1. 识别单调性作为 UDRC 任务的根本物理不变性。 2. 提出级联单调 Bernstein (CaMB) 算子来参数化未知前向模型，并将单调性作为硬架构归纳偏置。 3. 将 CaMB 与即插即用扩散框架结合，提出 CaMB-Diff。 4. 扩散模型负责结构和语义恢复，CaMB 负责建模和修正辐射度失真。
AI.result: CaMB-Diff 在低光增强、低场 MRI 增强和 HDR 重建等零样本 UDRC 任务上，在信号保真度和物理一致性方面均显著优于最先进的零样本基线。同时，实验也验证了 CaMB 参数化在准确建模未知前向算子方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CaMB-Diff 框架能够有效解决 UDRC 图像的盲恢复问题，通过结合单调性约束的前向算子和扩散模型的几何先验，实现了信号保真度和物理一致性的显著提升。

title: Generative Visual Chain-of-Thought for Image Editing
summary: Existing image editing methods struggle to perceive where to edit, especially under complex scenes and nuanced spatial instructions. To address this issue, we propose Generative Visual Chain-of-Thought (GVCoT), a unified framework that performs native visual reasoning by first generating spatial cues to localize the target region and then executing the edit. Unlike prior text-only CoT or tool-dependent visual CoT paradigms, GVCoT jointly optimizes visual tokens generated during the reasoning and editing phases in an end-to-end manner. This way fosters the emergence of innate spatial reasoning ability and enables more effective utilization of visual-domain cues. The main challenge of training GCVoT lies in the scarcity of large-scale editing data with precise edit region annotations; to this end, we construct GVCoT-Edit-Instruct, a dataset of 1.8M high-quality samples spanning 19 tasks. We adopt a progressive training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to build foundational localization ability in reasoning trace before final editing, followed by reinforcement learning to further improve reasoning and editing quality. Finally, we introduce SREdit-Bench, a new benchmark designed to comprehensively stress-test models under sophisticated scenes and fine-grained referring expressions. Experiments demonstrate that GVCoT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models on SREdit-Bench and ImgEdit. We hope our GVCoT will inspire future research toward interpretable and precise image editing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GVCoT的统一框架，通过生成空间线索来定位编辑区域，然后执行编辑，实现了原生的视觉推理和图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法在复杂场景和细致的空间指令下难以准确感知编辑位置。
AI.method: GVCoT框架首先生成空间线索以定位目标区域，然后执行编辑。与纯文本CoT或依赖工具的视觉CoT不同，GVCoT在推理和编辑阶段联合优化生成的视觉Token，实现了端到端的训练。为此，研究人员构建了一个包含180万个样本的GVCoT-Edit-Instruct数据集，并采用了渐进式训练策略（监督微调+强化学习）。
AI.result: GVCoT在SREdit-Bench和ImgEdit基准测试中均取得了优于现有最先进模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: GVCoT框架通过整合视觉推理和编辑，实现了更精准、可解释的图像编辑，并为未来的研究提供了新的方向。

title: Zero-shot Low-Field MRI Enhancement via Diffusion-Based Adaptive Contrast Transport
summary: Low-field (LF) magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) democratizes access to diagnostic imaging but is fundamentally limited by low signal-to-noise ratio and significant tissue contrast distortion due to field-dependent relaxation dynamics. Reconstructing high-field (HF) quality images from LF data is a blind inverse problem, severely challenged by the scarcity of paired training data and the unknown, non-linear contrast transformation operator. Existing zero-shot methods, which assume simplified linear degradation, often fail to recover authentic tissue contrast. In this paper, we propose DACT(Diffusion-Based Adaptive Contrast Transport), a novel zero-shot framework that restores HF-quality images without paired supervision. DACT synergizes a pre-trained HF diffusion prior to ensure anatomical fidelity with a physically-informed adaptive forward model. Specifically, we introduce a differentiable Sinkhorn optimal transport module that explicitly models and corrects the intensity distribution shift between LF and HF domains during the reverse diffusion process. This allows the framework to dynamically learn the intractable contrast mapping while preserving topological consistency. Extensive experiments on simulated and real clinical LF datasets demonstrate that DACT achieves state-of-the-art performance, yielding reconstructions with superior structural detail and correct tissue contrast.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DACT的零样本框架，利用预训练的高场扩散模型和可微分的Sinkhorn最优传输模块，从低场MRI数据中恢复出高质量、具有真实组织对比度的图像，无需配对训练数据。
AI.motivation: 低场MRI虽然易于获取，但存在信噪比低和组织对比度失真等问题。现有方法难以在没有配对数据的情况下，准确恢复高场MRI图像的质量和组织对比度。
AI.method: DACT框架结合了预训练的高场扩散模型和一种物理信息驱动的自适应前向模型。该模型包含一个可微分的Sinkhorn最优传输模块，用于在反向扩散过程中显式建模并纠正低场和高场域之间的强度分布变化，从而动态学习对比度映射。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实临床低场MRI数据集上的实验表明，DACT在重建图像的结构细节和组织对比度方面均优于现有方法，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DACT是一种有效的零样本框架，能够无需配对监督，从低场MRI数据中生成具有高场质量和正确组织对比度的图像，克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: LaST-VLA: Thinking in Latent Spatio-Temporal Space for Vision-Language-Action in Autonomous Driving
summary: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have revolutionized autonomous driving by unifying perception and planning, their reliance on explicit textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) leads to semantic-perceptual decoupling and perceptual-symbolic conflicts. Recent shifts toward latent reasoning attempt to bypass these bottlenecks by thinking in continuous hidden space. However, without explicit intermediate constraints, standard latent CoT often operates as a physics-agnostic representation. To address this, we propose the Latent Spatio-Temporal VLA (LaST-VLA), a framework shifting the reasoning paradigm from discrete symbolic processing into a physically grounded Latent Spatio-Temporal CoT. By implementing a dual-feature alignment mechanism, we distill geometric constraints from 3D foundation models and dynamic foresight from world models directly into the latent space. Coupled with a progressive SFT training strategy that transitions from feature alignment to trajectory generation, and refined via Reinforcement Learning with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to ensure safety and rule compliance. \method~setting a new record on NAVSIM v1 (91.3 PDMS) and NAVSIM v2 (87.1 EPDMS), while excelling in spatial-temporal reasoning on SURDS and NuDynamics benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 LaST-VLA 的框架，通过将离散的符号推理转变为物理约束的潜在时空推理，解决了当前 VLA 模型中语义感知解耦和感知符号冲突的问题，并在多个基准测试中取得了 SOTA 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的 Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 模型依赖显式的文本链式思考 (CoT)，导致语义感知解耦和感知符号冲突。而纯粹的潜在推理又缺乏物理约束，容易形成与物理过程无关的表示。
AI.method: 提出 Latent Spatio-Temporal VLA (LaST-VLA) 框架，引入物理约束的潜在时空链式思考 (Latent Spatio-Temporal CoT)。通过双特征对齐机制，从 3D 基础模型中提取几何约束，从世界模型中提取动态预测。采用渐进式 SFT 训练策略，并结合 GRPO 进行强化学习优化。
AI.result: 在 NAVSIM v1 (91.3 PDMS) 和 NAVSIM v2 (87.1 EPDMS) 上创下新纪录，并在 SURDS 和 NuDynamics 基准测试中展示了出色的时空推理能力。
AI.conclusion: LaST-VLA 通过将推理范式从离散符号处理转移到物理约束的潜在时空推理，有效地解决了 VLA 模型中的挑战，并在自动驾驶领域展现出优越的性能和安全性。

title: MobileMold: A Smartphone-Based Microscopy Dataset for Food Mold Detection
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia Systems (MMSys'26). Dataset and code available at https://mobilemold.github.io/dataset/
summary: Smartphone clip-on microscopes turn everyday devices into low-cost, portable imaging systems that can even reveal fungal structures at the microscopic level, enabling mold inspection beyond unaided visual checks. In this paper, we introduce MobileMold, an open smartphone-based microscopy dataset for food mold detection and food classification. MobileMold contains 4,941 handheld microscopy images spanning 11 food types, 4 smartphones, 3 microscopes, and diverse real-world conditions. Beyond the dataset release, we establish baselines for (i) mold detection and (ii) food-type classification, including a multi-task setting that predicts both attributes. Across multiple pretrained deep learning architectures and augmentation strategies, we obtain near-ceiling performance (accuracy = 0.9954, F1 = 0.9954, MCC = 0.9907), validating the utility of our dataset for detecting food spoilage. To increase transparency, we complement our evaluation with saliency-based visual explanations highlighting mold regions associated with the model's predictions. MobileMold aims to contribute to research on accessible food-safety sensing, mobile imaging, and exploring the potential of smartphones enhanced with attachments.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了一个名为MobileMold的开源智能手机显微镜数据集，包含4941张食品霉菌检测和食品分类的图像，并在此基础上建立了霉菌检测和食品分类的基线模型，取得了接近最优的性能，并提供了可解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 日常的食品安全检测主要依赖肉眼，检测精度有限。智能手机显微镜能够低成本、便携地提供微观图像，有望提升食品霉菌检测能力，但缺乏公开的数据集来支持相关研究。
AI.method: 创建了一个名为MobileMold的智能手机显微镜图像数据集，包含11种食品、4款智能手机、3款显微镜以及多样的真实世界场景下的图像。利用该数据集，研究人员建立了霉菌检测和食品类型分类的基线模型，并探索了多任务学习设置。模型评估采用了多种预训练深度学习架构和数据增强策略，并使用显著性图进行可视化解释。
AI.result: 在MobileMold数据集上，建立的基线模型在霉菌检测和食品类型分类任务上均取得了优异的表现，准确率、F1分数和MCC值分别达到0.9954、0.9954和0.9907，接近理想性能。可视化解释表明模型能够准确识别出与预测相关的霉菌区域。
AI.conclusion: MobileMold数据集的发布为食品安全传感、移动成像以及智能手机辅助检测领域的研究提供了宝贵资源。基于该数据集的模型性能验证了其在食品腐败检测方面的有效性，并展示了智能手机结合显微镜附件在食品安全领域的巨大潜力。

title: NICO-RAG: Multimodal Hypergraph Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Understanding the Nicotine Public Health Crisis
summary: The nicotine addiction public health crisis continues to be pervasive. In this century alone, the tobacco industry has released and marketed new products in an aggressive effort to lure new and young customers for life. Such innovations and product development, namely flavored nicotine or tobacco such as nicotine pouches, have undone years of anti-tobacco campaign work. Past work is limited both in scope and in its ability to connect large-scale data points. Thus, we introduce the Nicotine Innovation Counter-Offensive (NICO) Dataset to provide public health researchers with over 200,000 multimodal samples, including images and text descriptions, on 55 tobacco and nicotine product brands. In addition, to provide public health researchers with factual connections across a large-scale dataset, we propose NICO-RAG, a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework that can retrieve image features without incurring the high-cost of language models, as well as the added cost of processing image tokens with large-scale datasets such as NICO. At construction time, NICO-RAG organizes image- and text-extracted entities and relations into hypergraphs to produce as factual responses as possible. This joint multimodal knowledge representation enables NICO-RAG to retrieve images for query answering not only by visual similarity but also by the semantic similarity of image descriptions. Experimentals show that without needing to process additional tokens from images for over 100 questions, NICO-RAG performs comparably to the state-of-the-art RAG method adapted for images.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了NICO数据集（包含20万个以上的多模态样本）和NICO-RAG框架，用于分析烟草和尼古丁产品，以应对烟草行业的创新和新产品营销带来的公共健康挑战。NICO-RAG能够高效地检索图像和文本信息，并在不处理高昂图像token成本的情况下，通过超图表示实现基于视觉和语义相似度的图像检索。
AI.motivation: 烟草行业不断推出新产品（如调味尼古丁袋）吸引年轻消费者，这削弱了多年的控烟宣传效果。现有研究在规模和数据连接性方面存在局限，需要一个大规模、多模态的数据集和分析框架来应对这一公共健康危机。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个名为NICO的数据集，包含超过20万个关于55个烟草和尼古丁产品品牌的图像和文本描述。他们还提出了NICO-RAG框架，这是一个检索增强生成（RAG）框架，能够以低成本提取图像特征，避免了大型语言模型和图像token处理的昂贵成本。NICO-RAG通过将图像和文本提取的实体及关系组织成超图，以便提供准确的事实性回答，并支持基于视觉和语义相似度的图像检索。
AI.result: 实验表明，NICO-RAG在处理超过100个问题时，无需处理额外的图像token，其性能与专门为图像设计的现有最先进RAG方法相当。
AI.conclusion: NICO数据集和NICO-RAG框架为公共健康研究人员提供了一个强大的工具，能够高效地分析烟草和尼古丁产品的大规模多模态数据，支持更有效的公共健康干预措施，以应对烟草行业的创新挑战。

title: BAWSeg: A UAV Multispectral Benchmark for Barley Weed Segmentation
summary: Accurate weed mapping in cereal fields requires pixel-level segmentation from UAV imagery that remains reliable across fields, seasons, and illumination. Existing multispectral pipelines often depend on thresholded vegetation indices, which are brittle under radiometric drift and mixed crop--weed pixels, or on single-stream CNN and Transformer backbones that ingest stacked bands and indices, where radiance cues and normalized index cues interfere and reduce sensitivity to small weed clusters embedded in crop canopies. We propose VISA (Vegetation-Index and Spectral Attention), a two-stream segmentation network that decouples these cues and fuses them at native resolution. The radiance stream learns from calibrated five-band reflectance using residual spectral-spatial attention to preserve fine textures and row boundaries that are attenuated by ratio indices. The index stream operates on vegetation-index maps with windowed self-attention to model local structure efficiently, state-space layers to propagate field-scale context without quadratic attention cost, and Slot Attention to form stable region descriptors that improve discrimination of sparse weeds under canopy mixing. To support supervised training and deployment-oriented evaluation, we introduce BAWSeg, a four-year UAV multispectral dataset collected over commercial barley paddocks in Western Australia, providing radiometrically calibrated blue, green, red, red edge, and near-infrared orthomosaics, derived vegetation indices, and dense crop, weed, and other labels with leakage-free block splits. On BAWSeg, VISA achieves 75.6% mIoU and 63.5% weed IoU with 22.8M parameters, outperforming a multispectral SegFormer-B1 baseline by 1.2 mIoU and 1.9 weed IoU. Under cross-plot and cross-year protocols, VISA maintains 71.2% and 69.2% mIoU, respectively. The BAWSeg data, VISA code, and trained models will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为VISA的双流分割网络，用于精确分割农田中的杂草，并引入了一个新的数据集BAWSeg用于训练和评估。
AI.motivation: 现有的多光谱图像分割方法在处理辐射漂移、作物-杂草混合像素以及在作物冠层中嵌入的小型杂草簇时鲁棒性不足。研究旨在开发一种能够准确、可靠地在不同田地、季节和光照条件下进行像素级杂草分割的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为VISA（Vegetation-Index and Spectral Attention）的双流分割网络。该网络包含两个流：一个辐射流，利用残差光谱空间注意力从校准后的五波段反射率中学习，以保留精细纹理和行边界；一个索引流，利用窗口自注意力、状态空间层和Slot Attention在植被指数图上进行操作，以高效地建模局部结构和传播现场范围的上下文。此外，研究引入了一个名为BAWSeg的新数据集，包含四年收集的、经过辐射校准的无人机多光谱图像、植被指数和密集的标签。
AI.result: 在BAWSeg数据集上，VISA模型取得了75.6%的mIoU和63.5%的杂草IoU，参数量为22.8M，优于基线模型SegFormer-B1。在跨地块和跨年份的测试协议下，VISA模型仍然保持了71.2%和69.2%的mIoU。
AI.conclusion: VISA双流网络通过分离和融合辐射线索与植被指数线索，能够更有效地处理复杂场景下的杂草分割问题，在鲁棒性和准确性方面优于现有方法。BAWSeg数据集为该领域的研究提供了宝贵的资源。

title: PreSight: Preoperative Outcome Prediction for Parkinson's Disease via Region-Prior Morphometry and Patient-Specific Weighting
summary: Preoperative improvement rate prediction for Parkinson's disease surgery is clinically important yet difficult because imaging signals are subtle and patients are heterogeneous. We address this setting, where only information available before surgery is used, and the goal is to predict patient-specific postoperative motor benefit. We present PreSight, a presurgical outcome model that fuses clinical priors with preoperative MRI and deformation-based morphometry (DBM) and adapts regional importance through a patient-specific weighting module. The model produces end-to-end, calibrated, decision-ready predictions with patient-level explanations. We evaluate PreSight on a real-world two-center cohort of 400 subjects with multimodal presurgical inputs and postoperative improvement labels. PreSight outperforms strong clinical, imaging-only, and multimodal baselines. It attains 88.89% accuracy on internal validation and 85.29% on an external-center test for responder classification and shows better probability calibration and higher decision-curve net benefit.
